C: 嗨，今天应当是列车带着你启航的两周年。\n很久没见面了，但我一直在关注你的动向，就连此时此刻，我也能想象你读到这封信时的表情。不过别担心，我没有别的目的，只是想起你刚苏醒时的模样，与现在的你已是如此不同。我很高兴看到你的变化。\n听我说：往后的旅程会更加精彩，但无论何时，请务必做出你自己的选择——如此，你才能抵达故事的结局。
E: Hey. Today should be the second anniversary of the Express' journey with you onboard.\nIt has been a while since we last met, but I've always been watching your actions. Even now, I can imagine the expression on your face when you read this letter. Don't worry. I don't mean anything by it. I'm just happy to see how much you've changed compared to what you were like when you first woke up.\nListen. The road ahead will be even more resplendent, but make sure you make your own choices no matter what — That's the only way you can reach the end of the story.

C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
开拓者每日登录游戏后，可在「旅情事记」中领取当日奖励。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
奖励将根据开拓者累计登录天数依次解锁，当日奖励将在<unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>（服务器时间）刷新。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
Trailblazers can receive daily rewards in the Travel Log after logging in to the game each day.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
The rewards will be unlocked in sequential order according to the Trailblazer's accrued login days. Daily rewards will be refreshed at <unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> AM (server time) every day.

C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
在贝洛伯格，寒潮前的古代遗迹重见天日，珍奇异宝与古代遗物埋藏在深处，等待敢于冒险的寻宝者前去探索…

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 活动开启后，每日将会解锁新的遗迹，共计5个遗迹。
● 活动中，寻宝者可以通过消耗耐力值探索遗迹各个区域。区域中潜藏着道具、补给物资…还有危险的敌人，等待寻宝者前来探索。
● 合理地规划行动路线、分配耐力值，利用遗迹中发掘出来的道具，应对不同类型的敌人，将使寻宝任务更加顺利。
● 开拓者可以选择试用角色参与活动。
● 每次战斗结束后，将记录所有角色的生命值及能量。
● 当开拓者提升「均衡等级」时，活动中敌方和试用角色等级将同步提升。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
活动期间探索遗迹，达到特定探索进度时可在「探宝奖励」中领取任务奖励。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
In Belobog, the ancient ruins from before the Eternal Freeze are once again seeing the light of day. Rare treasures and ancient relics are buried in the depths, waiting to be uncovered by adventurers...

◆ Event Rules ◆
● After the event starts, a new ruin will be unlocked every day, with a total of 5 ruins.
● During the event, treasure hunters can explore various areas of the ruins by consuming stamina. There are items, supplies, and even dangerous enemies lurking in the ruins, waiting to be found by treasure hunters.
● Planning your route and stamina use carefully, being resourceful with items unearthed in the ruins, and preparing to deal with a variety of enemies will make for a smoother treasure hunting expedition.
● Trailblazers can use trial characters in this event.
● The HP and Energy of all characters will be recorded at the end of each battle.
● Raising the Equilibrium Level will also raise the enemy and trial character levels in the event.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Explore the ruins during the event and claim Treasure Hunt Rewards after reaching a certain level of exploration progress.

C:
◆「砺烁新辉」说明 ◆
 ● 角色加强后，技能，行迹，以及星魂的效果可能产生变化。
 ● 角色加强后，已有角色与新获得的角色，默认为加强后的状态。
 ● 可以在【角色详情】-【角色加强】页面，切换角色加强前后的状态。
E:
◆ Novaflare Details ◆
● After characters are enhanced, their abilities, Traces, and Eidolon effects may change.
● After enhancement, both existing and newly obtained characters default to their enhanced state.
 ● You can switch between pre-enhanced and enhanced states on the "Character Details" > "Character Enhancement" page.

▌联动角色<color=#f29e38ff>不支持英语配音</color>，您可以切换至其他语音语言进行体验。

▌「命运/驻足梦国之夜」
● 实现一切梦想的万能许愿机——「圣杯」，降临逐梦之星。那位活过十个琥珀纪的匹诺康尼商业巨头向贵客们奉上了圣杯战争的请柬……

▌「命运/今晚留下来」
◆ 简介 ◆
● 匹诺康尼圣杯战争已经结束，而天才们却为圣杯赋予了全新的机能。在晖长石号的一隅，一场全新的拟似圣杯战争即将开幕！

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 在「命运/今晚留下来」中，开拓者将与7位模拟角色共同参与圣杯战争，经过多轮1v1对战，最终决出胜者。  

◆ 常驻奖励 ◆
● 通过游玩「命运/今晚留下来」，可以获得奖励积分，奖励积分达到不同档位时可领取【积分奖励】中的常驻奖励。
E:
▌ The collaboration characters have <color=#f29e38ff>no English voiceovers</color>. You may switch to another voiceover language if preferred.

▌ Fate/Night in Dreamland
● An omnipotent wish-granting chalice — the Holy Grail — has descended upon the planet of dream-chase, and that Penaconian business magnate who has lived through <unbreak>10</unbreak> Amber Eras offered the Holy Grail War's invitations to distinguished guests...

▌ Fate/stay night
◆ Introduction ◆
● The Penaconian Holy Grail War has concluded. Yet, the geniuses have imbued the Holy Grail with new functions. In a corner of the Radiant Feldspar, a new simulated Holy Grail War will soon begin!

◆ Event Rules ◆
● In Fate/stay night, the Trailblazer will participate in the Holy Grail War alongside 7 simulated characters. After multiple 1v1 showdowns, a final victor will be decided.

◆ Regular Rewards ◆
● You can accumulate points by playing Fate/stay night. Once your points reach certain ranks, you can obtain regular rewards from Point Rewards.

E: I don't feel so tired anymore.

C: 领队推荐
E: Alpha's Recommendation

C: 完成！
E: Complete!

C: 加班中：第#1轮
E: Overtime: Round #1

C: 尼卡多利一战，以一众黄金裔取胜告终。你们返回奥赫玛，见证尼卡多利火种的归还。白厄踏入了火种试炼——他需向尼卡多利的神性证明，自己能够击溃内心深处的恐惧。
E: The battle against Nikador ends with victory for the Chrysos Heirs. Upon returning to Okhema, you witness Nikador's Coreflame returned. Phainon then enters the Coreflame trial, seeking to prove to Nikador's divinity that he can defeat his innermost fears.

C: 再创世的所有条件均已达成，翁法罗斯内外的不同势力也蠢蠢欲动。你们回到大墓深处德谬歌矩阵前，归还十二枚泰坦的火种，完成再创世的仪式。至此，新世界已经到来……
E: All conditions for the Era Nova had been fulfilled, and various forces within and beyond Amphoreus were stirring. You returned to the Demiurge Matrix deep within the Great Tomb to return the twelve Titan's Coreflames and complete the Era Nova ritual. At that moment, the new world arrived...

C: 对猎人来说，要时刻警醒自己成为猎物——陷落死地的天击将军，积恨七百年的步离狼首，将在一处意想不到的战场上展开最后的决战，不死不休！
E: For the hunter, one must always remain vigilant against becoming the prey — the Merlin's Claw who had fallen into a deadly trap and the borisin wolf-head who had harbored seven centuries of grudges will face off in an unexpected battlefield for a final, to-the-death showdown!

C: 金人巷不少商铺与码头建立了合作，码头上的运单也比之前更加复杂。小秘书似乎是有事相求的样子。\n到码头看看，也许有你能帮上忙的部分。
E: Plenty of shops and stores in Aurum Alley have established a collaborative relationship with the docks, and the logistics orders coming in are also more complex than before. Mingxi's expression seems to imply a need for assistance.\nHead to the docks and see if you can help with anything.

C: 为了帮助贝洛伯格重归宇宙社会，卢卡拿着一张过时的邀请函，来到了仙舟「罗浮」，参加星天演武仪典。机缘巧合之下，你成为了他的教练，并陪他一起斩获了一场又一场胜利……\n但前路迢迢，你们的旅程才刚刚开始。
E: To help Belobog rejoin cosmic society, Luka arrives at The Xianzhou Luofu with an expired invitation to participate in the Luminary Wardance. You become his coach by chance and win one victory after another with him...\nBut the road ahead is still long, and your journey has just begun.

C: 钟表小子在游戏中拔得头筹，成为了电玩市的传说。一位黑客男孩认可了钟表小子的实力，两人相约未来再战。
E: Clockie ends up coming first in the game, going down in the annals as a legendary gamer at the market. A hacker boy recognizes Clockie's prowess, and the two agree to meet up in the future for a battle.

C: 听了这个故事，钟表小子才原谅了哈努兄弟的无礼。\n「滴答，主要是我觉得打不过他。」
E: Only after hearing this story does Clockie eventually forgive Brother Hanu's insolence.\n"Tick-tock, the point is, I don't think I can beat him."

C: 哈努兄弟感到十分失落，他没想到自己的坚持会引来大家的背叛。好吧，他其实想到了，他并不后悔。
E: Brother Hanu feels very lost. He never expected his persistence to lead to everyone's betrayal. Fine, he did think about it, but he doesn't regret it.

C: 钟表小子每天都在海边等待消息，终于有天，他收到了一份来自谐乐小镇的回信，一位名为木头老爷的好心人愿意伸出援助之手……
E: Clockie waits for news every day by the sea until finally, one day, he receives a message from Charmonyville. A kind person named Old Man Wood was willing to offer a helping hand...

C: 钟表小子掏出帽子师傅留下的宽檐帽，抓紧帽子，乘风起飞。
E: Clockie whips out the wide-brimmed hat left behind by Master Hat, grabs hold of it, and flies off into the wind.

C: 叶子店长和汽水先生听了钟表小子的意见，但比起让大家清醒，他们觉得现在的美梦小镇还是多攒钱更重要。\n「咕噜噜，等美梦小镇的金币多到哪儿都放不下，大家也就不那么重视钱了，对吧？」
E: Shopkeeper Leaf and Mr. Soda listened to Clockie's opinion, but they believed making money was more important for Dreamville at that moment than bringing everyone to their senses.\n"*gurgle* Wait till Dreamville is laden with Gold Coins. Money will matter less to everyone, right?"

C: 钟表小子与船员们遇到了一个醉醺醺的汽水瓶，他想向船员们赠送他手中的气泡药水。\n「咕噜噜…我是汽水先生，新朋友们要买几瓶苏乐达吗？」
E: Clockie and the crew come across an intoxicated Soda Bottle, who wants to give the crew the bubbly potion in his hand.\n"*gurgle*... I'm Mr. Soda. Would you new friends like to buy a few bottles of SoulGlad?"

C: 野花姐姐受不了哈努兄弟的无情，选择了抛下伙伴，离开了小镇。
E: Sister Wildflower can't stand Brother Hanu's mercilessness and decides to quit town, leaving her mates behind.

C: 为了防止风沙磨损自己闪亮的小跑车，石头老板决定在小镇外建造一条又高又长的围墙，墙壁不光遮挡风沙，也会遮住小镇所有的阳光……
E: To prevent the wind and sand from damaging his sparkly sports car, Boss Stone decides to build a tall, long wall around the perimeter of town. Not only would it block the wind and the sand, but it would also block out all of the sunshine for the town...

C: 在钟表小子的帮助下，坏镇民们都被缉拿归案了。木头老爷原谅了那些诬陷他的镇民，并愿意接纳他们为自己今后的帮手。
E: With the help of Clockie, the nefarious townsfolk are all arrested and brought to justice. Old Man Wood forgives the townsfolk who framed him and is willing to accept them as his helpers.

C: 苏乐达的禁令没有成功打压牛仔们的非法收入，反倒让更多镇民把钱送给了走私苏乐达的牛仔们……
E: Instead of stopping the cowboys from getting illegal earnings, the ban on SoulGlad causes the townsfolk to give money to the cowboys for the smuggling of SoulGlad...

C: 在钟表小子的指挥下，牛仔们不再用极端的方式表达意愿，而是开始请愿，向镇民们宣传自己的想法。
E: Under the command of Clockie, the cowboys no longer adopt extreme ways to express their wishes. Instead, they sign a petition and promote their wishes to the townsfolk.

C: 狼鳄之交
E: Alliance of Wolf and Croc

C: 石头老板，你的阴谋绝对不会得逞的！滴答！
E: Boss Stone, your plan will never succeed! Tick-tock!

C: 滴答！对了，我们有会修房子的折纸小鸟和猫头鹰老师，还有我无所不能的船员——镜子公主与左轮队长！
E: Tick-tock! That's right, we have origami birds and Professor Owl who can repair houses, and my omnipotent crew members — Mirror Princess and Captain Revolver!

C: 他们都相信能在这里找到属于自己的归宿，把小镇当成是一场美梦——就和哈努兄弟设想的一样！
E: They all believe that they can find their destiny here, and treat this town like a dream — just as Brother Hanu envisioned!

C: 镇民越来越多，木头老爷的工作也越来越繁重，在小镇的霓虹灯下，似乎正有阴影滋生……
E: There are more and more townsfolk, and Old Man Wood is getting overloaded with work. Beneath the neon lights of the town, a shadow grows...

C: 我方角色造成的雷属性伤害提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>。
E: Lightning DMG dealt by allies increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

E: Inference Extrapolation

E: Rejuvenating Soda Water

C: 这甜甜的味道不错，我还挺喜欢的。
E: The sweetness is just right, I quite enjoy it.

C: 希望你的这杯饮料不会和那个蓝色闹钟一样蠢。
E: I hope this drink of yours won't be as stupid as that blue clock.

C: 来自匹诺康尼外的特产，它为何会出现在这始终是个谜。
E: A specialty from outside Penacony. Why it appeared remains a mystery.

C: 温润清香的植物饮料，部分人会将它作为药物来使用。
E: A warm and refreshing plant-based drink. Some use it for medicinal purposes.

C: 黑桃果然有些疯疯的，说起话来胡言乱语，希望它不要拿我作为捉弄对象。
E: Spade is indeed a bit mad and talks nonsense. Hopefully, it doesn't decide to prank me.

C: 淑女打算去表明心意，但它真能顺利把心里话说出来嘛？习惯逃避后，重新正视自己的心可没那么简单。
E: Lady plans to confess its love, but can it really manage to say what it wants to say? It's not that easy to face your heart once again after you got used to running away.

C: 悲观…忧郁…叹气
E: Pessimistic... Depressed... Sighing

C: 刻律德菈的「惊奇礼物」会变化成<color=#f29e38ff>前一个队友的「惊奇礼物」</color>。
E: Cerydra's Surprise Gift will transform into the <color=#f29e38ff>previous teammate's Surprise Gift</color>.

E: After Feixiao <color=#f29e38ff>uses an attack</color>, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> points of Giggle Gauge.

C: 砂金<color=#f29e38ff>施放终结技</color>时，根据<color=#f29e38ff>「抽奖结果」</color>，获得对应点数的「憋笑度」。
E: When Aventurine <color=#f29e38ff>uses Ultimate</color>, gain Giggle Gauge points according to the <color=#f29e38ff>"Lottery Result"</color>.

C: 使装备者施放战技后额外恢复<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>点能量，该效果单个回合内不可重复触发。
E: After the wearer uses their Skill, additionally regenerates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> Energy. This effect cannot be repeatedly triggered in a single turn.

C: 装备者回合开始时恢复<unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>点能量。若敌方目标拥有装备者添加的弱点，装备者对其造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>。\n当敌方目标受到装备者攻击时，装备者使其防御力降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>，持续<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>回合。同类效果无法叠加。
E: When the wearer's turn starts, regenerates <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> Energy. If the enemy target has a Weakness implanted by the wearer, increases the wearer's DMG dealt to it by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>.\nWhen an enemy target gets attacked by the wearer, the wearer decreases the target's DEF by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). The same types of effects cannot stack.

C: 【七彩棒球】行动时，敌方每持有1个弱点，伤害倍率提高至<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#13[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>。
E: When "Seven-Colored Baseball" takes action, their DMG multiplier increases to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#13[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> for every Weakness on the enemy.

C: 【歼灭标记】被击破伤害触发时，激光的发射次数提高至<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#14[i]</unbreak>)}</color>。
E: When "Mark of Ruin" is triggered by Break DMG, the number of times the laser is fired increases to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#14[i]</unbreak>)}</color>.

C: 【游侠徽章】以固定速度施放攻击，我方目标越多造成的伤害越高。
E: "Ranger's Badge" uses attacks at a set SPD, dealing more DMG with more ally targets.

C: 我方目标每损失1%生命值，造成的最终伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#11[f1]%</unbreak>)}</color>。
E: For every 1% HP an ally target had lost, their final DMG dealt increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#11[f1]%</unbreak>)}</color>.

C: 点亮此技能后，每级提升我方全体<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的攻击力
E: After activating this ability, each level increases all allies' ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>

C: 【范围】类型的武器每多击中1个目标，伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak></color>)}</color>。
E: For every extra target AoE-type weapons hits, their DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>.

C: 我方目标及武器每造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>次伤害，下一次造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak></color>)}</color>。
E: For every <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> times that ally targets and weapons deal DMG, increases the next DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>.

C: 【至善赐福】以固定速度施放增益，使我方全体伤害提高，行动提前，并回复能量和战技点。祝福使我方全体造成的伤害在本局中小幅永久提高。
E: "Kindest Benediction" grants buffs at a fixed speed, increasing the DMG dealt by all allies, Advancing actions, regenerating Energy, and recovering Skill Points. The buff permanently increases DMG dealt by all allies slightly within this game round.

E: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

C: 白厄变身为卡厄斯兰那时，行动序列上出现的倒计时。倒计时回合开始时卡厄斯兰那获得1个额外回合，最后1个倒计时回合开始时改为卡厄斯兰那发动最后一击并结束变身。\n倒计时的初始行动值平均设置在0~<unbreak>100%</unbreak>之间，每个波次开始时不重置行动值。\n当卡厄斯兰那受到行动提前效果时，改为首个倒计时行动提前。
E: When Phainon transforms into Khaslana, a countdown will appear on the Action Order. When the countdown begins, Khaslana will gain 1 extra turn. When the last turn of the countdown begins, transforms into Khaslana and delivers a final hit before ending the transformation.\nThe countdown initial action value will be set between 0–<unbreak>100%</unbreak>. The action value will not be reset at the start of each wave.\nWhen Khaslana is under the effect of action advance, the first countdown's action is advanced instead.

C: 效果命中能提高对敌方目标造成负面效果的概率。\n这个数值越高，成功造成负面效果的概率就越高。
E: Effect Hit Rate increases the chance of applying debuffs to enemy targets. \nA higher Effect Hit Rate will result in higher chances of successfully applying a debuff.

C: 攻击该目标后，攻击者会受到少量量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>。
E: After attacking this target, the attacker will receive minor Quantum "<u>Atrophy DMG</u>."

C: 异化信标，带有该信标的区域中敌人将变成「错误」的敌人。战斗胜利后获得额外的宇宙碎片。
E: Mutation beacon. Enemies in the domains with this beacon will become "Bugs." After winning a battle, receive additional Cosmic Fragments.

C: 特殊事件区域，在这个区域中可以调整自我认知的数值，从而前往不同的分支。
E: Special Occurrence Domain. You can adjust your Intra-Cognition value in this domain and go to varied branches.

C: 基于圣杯的奇迹得以参赛的谜之怪盗。拥有令人称奇的神速，理论上可以暗杀掉一切参赛者而不被任何人发现。至于她没有这样做的原因……\n\n「哎呀，那样很累人的好吧。你们不都说这是一场游戏？游戏重在参与，我总要给别人留点机会嘛。」
E: A mysterious thief who joined the tournament through a miracle born of the Holy Grail. Possessing incredible speed, she theoretically could have assassinated all contestants without being discovered. As for why she didn't do such a thing...\n\n"Ugh, that sounds exhausting! Aren't you all saying this is supposed to be a game? Participation is the most important. Gotta leave some fun for others, right?"

C:
每场战斗获得<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>层【盾牌】。每层【盾牌】使我方目标受到的伤害降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>。受到精英敌人攻击后，失去1层【盾牌】。

<color=#8790abff>重复获得此宝具将提升效果：

Gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> "Harmward" in every battle. Each stack of "Harmward" reduces DMG taken by ally targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. Loses 1 stack of "Harmward" after being attacked by an Elite enemy.

<color=#8790abff>Obtaining this Noble Phantasm again improves its effect:

C: 记下这次失败的原因，好好复盘。

C:
◆ 「开拓助力」礼包说明 ◆
● 礼包内容：购买后，开拓者可立即获得<color=#f29e38ff>古老梦华*<unbreak>320</unbreak></color>和<color=#f29e38ff>燃料*2</color>的首日奖励。次日起，每日登录可解锁1份<color=#f29e38ff>星轨专票*1</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>燃料*2</color>的奖励，共计<color=#f29e38ff>4</color>份。
● 自购买礼包日起，开拓者可在有效期<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>10</unbreak></color>日内领取「开拓助力」礼包。
● 上架期间该礼包限购1次。<color=#eb4d3dff>如果因特殊情况导致重复购买，将直接返还<unbreak>330</unbreak>古老梦华。</color>
● 礼包页面的超值比例表示礼包总价值相对于售价的倍数，通过【礼包内所有道具对应的古老梦华价值】与【售价对应的古老梦华价值】计算得出。
E:
◆ Trailblaze Assistance Pack Details ◆
● Pack Contents: After making your purchase, Trailblazers will immediately get <color=#f29e38ff>Oneiric Shard ×<unbreak>320</unbreak></color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Fuel ×2</color> as first-day rewards. Starting from the following day, every daily login will unlock <color=#f29e38ff>Star Rail Special Pass ×1</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Fuel ×2</color> as rewards, for a total of <color=#f29e38ff>4</color> times.
● From the day you purchase the pack, the Trailblazer can claim the Trailblaze Assistance Pack within an effective period of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>10</unbreak></color> days.
● When on sale, the pack will be limited to 1 purchase. <color=#eb4d3dff>If special circumstances result in repeated purchases, Trailblazers will directly receive <unbreak>330</unbreak> Oneiric Shards in recompense.</color>
● The value ratio on the gift pack page represents the total worth of the pack relative to its purchase price. It is calculated by comparing the "Oneiric Shard value of all items in the pack" with the "Oneiric Shard value corresponding to its purchase price."

C: 规则说明
E: Rules

C:
◆凝滞虚影◆
「凝滞虚影」是停留在裂界中的扭曲残影，若不触碰便不会有危险——你该不会想碰它吧？

●开拓者可以通过触碰的方式激活「凝滞虚影」，击败敌人后消耗「开拓力」并获得相应的奖励。
E:
◆ Stagnant Shadow ◆
A distorted illusion in the Fragmentum — hardly a threat as long as you don't touch it. You are not going to, are you?

● Touch the Stagnant Shadow to activate its power. Rewards can be claimed using the Trailblaze Power once the foes are defeated.

C:
◆均衡等级◆
对世界的探索程度，将通过「均衡等级」体现。
开拓等级达到<unbreak>20</unbreak>/<unbreak>30</unbreak>/<unbreak>40</unbreak>/<unbreak>50</unbreak>/<unbreak>60</unbreak>/<unbreak>65</unbreak>时，需通过对应「『均衡』的试炼」，方可继续提升开拓等级。
目前开拓等级上限为<unbreak>70</unbreak>级。
随着「均衡等级」的提升，探索「拟造花萼」、「凝滞虚影」、「侵蚀隧洞」、「历战余响」将有机会获得更加丰厚的宝藏。与此同时，敌人也会变得更加强大。
开拓等级达到上限后，溢出的里程将转化为信用点。
E:
◆Equilibrium Level◆
Equilibrium Level changes as you explore the universe.
When your Trailblaze Level reaches <unbreak>20</unbreak>, <unbreak>30</unbreak>, <unbreak>40</unbreak>, <unbreak>50</unbreak>, <unbreak>60</unbreak>, and <unbreak>65</unbreak>, you must complete the corresponding Trial of Equilibrium before further increasing your Trailblaze Level.
Currently, the max Trailblaze Level is <unbreak>70</unbreak>.
As your Equilibrium Level increases, you will obtain better rewards from Calyx, Stagnant Shadow, Cavern of Corrosion, and Echo of War. However, enemies will also become stronger.
After your Trailblaze Level reaches the limit, excess Trailblaze EXP will be converted to credits.

C: 使用「黑塔」特许通行认证开启舱门
E: Use the Space Station Special Permit to open the hatch.

C: 遗器
E: Relics

C: 自时光中凝取的稀薄力量。正是所有微不足道的刹那，编织成了壮绝的命运。\n\n「有能力摧毁某样事物的人，才是它真正的掌控者。」
E: A drop of strength condensed from time itself. All the seemingly insignificant moments come together to form the magnificent choir of fate. \n\n"Absolute control comes from the ability to inflict total destruction."

C: 官邸的桌上摆放着一张老相片，在远远的一角。\n偶尔目光落在上面，她总会不自觉地错开视线。\n记忆中的模样虽已远去，但今天的梦仍自萦绕。
E: An old photo lies on the far end of the table in the guardian's residence.\nShe would always subconsciously move her eyes away whenever she happened to see it.\nThe memories of the past had already become distant, but the dreams of today still linger.

C: 所愿的永恒美梦于一瞬消散。向大地坠落之时，他并不悲伤，只是想闭上双眼。 踏上的旧路已然破碎，而前程依旧笼罩于一片迷雾之中。 「清醒之后，世界依然在历经痛苦的循环，无物可逃，一如往常……」 他肩负过往，背朝故土，继续朝那尚不存在的乐园挪动脚步。 所以，人们为何入睡？人们为何醒来？ ——一颗又一颗星球在窗外掠过，这个答案如今需被赋予新的意义。 「也许——也许我还能……」
E: The eternal dream he longed for vanished in an instant. As he plummeted towards the earth, he felt no sadness, only a desire to close his eyes. The old path treaded upon has now crumbled, yet the journey ahead remains shrouded in mist. "After the awakening, the world continues its cycle of suffering, with no escape, the same as always..." He carries the past, turns his back on his homeland, and continues towards a paradise that does not yet exist. So, why do people slumber? And why do they wake? — As planets streak past outside the window, this answer now demands a new meaning to be given. "Maybe... just maybe I still can..."

C: 一枚映照着巨厦的单片晶石眼镜，与手杖、表链、胸针一起衬托出主人的时髦与学识。
E: A crystal monocle reflecting a grand building, demonstrating its owner's sophistication and erudition along with the cane, bracelet, and brooch.

C: 泛于星海的罗浮仙舟被收拢于球中，玉界门上浮槎去来，若星月之出入。无数人曾来此寻求长生之秘，却又失望而归。
E: The Xianzhou Luofu floating above the seas of stars was enclosed within the sphere. Skiffs went to and fro through the Jade Gate just like the celestial movements of stars and moons. Countless people had come here to seek the secrets of immortality, only to return in disappointment.

C: 位面封装的翁瓦克星球上最著名的岛屿——瓦克岛。整座岛屿郁郁葱葱，在名为「西斯腾」的大树上，结满了各式动物的果实。
E: Encapsulated in the plane is Wacq Island, the most well-known island on Planet Vonwacq. Teeming with plant life, the island houses a gigantic tree called Thestang, bearing fruits that would give birth to the various kinds of the island's wildlife.

C: 位面封装的是海洋世界露莎卡一处被淹没的城市。海平线不断上升直到城市也被淹没，只有巨大的「船邦」载着船员们在海上前进，找寻下次远航的方向。
E: Encapsulated in the plane is a submerged city in the marine world Lushaka. The sea level rose to the point where even the city was drowned. Only gigantic "stateships" carrying their sailors chug along across the sea, in search of the direction for their next distant voyage.

C: 实验室中随处可见的光信号缆线，它被用于采集实验数据，以达成不可告人的秘密。对「香蕉们」而言，认知世界的方法就藏在其中。
E: Optical cables that can be seen everywhere within the lab. They are used to collect experimental information to reach secretive goals that must not see the light of day. For the "Bananas," the way to perceive the world lurks within.

C: \n疑惑的知更鸟，阴郁的树——远远好过凝固的黎明。
E: \nThe puzzled robin, the gloomy tree — far better than the frozen dawn.

C: 《美梦多彩》
E: Color Your Dreams

C: 于开拓之旅中获得的饰品，可以用来装点你的房间。
E: Decorative items obtained during your trailblazing expedition. Can be used to spruce up your room.

C: 创造幻想的筑梦机械，赋予梦境造物灵魂的发动机。\n\n「如果发现这玩意儿出了故障…朋友，在陷入噩梦前快醒过来吧。」
E: A dream-building device that constructs fantasies and grants souls to Dreamscape creations.\n\n"If this device malfunctions... try to wake up before you descend into a nightmare, my friend."

C: 西衍先生故事中，你与丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝最终锻造出的武器。只凭外观就能看的出来，这支散发着危险气息的碎星绝尘剑 / 大宝剑 / 风灵月影剑 / 虚数内能便携式战术激光炮绝非凡物。\n其实是西衍先生小侄女的玩具枪。他非把人家玩具枪要过来做道具，气得小侄女三天没理他。（后来西衍先生把玩具枪还给她并诚恳道歉了。）
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, this is the weapon you and Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe managed to forge. You can tell at a glance that this Star-Shattering Blade of Truth / Big Sword / Reaper of Nexus Modder / Imaginary Intra-Kinetic Portable Tactical Laser Cannon, emitting an aura of pure danger, is no ordinary item.\nIt's actually a toy laser gun belonging to Mr. Xiyan's little niece. He forcibly got the toy off her to use it as a prop, and she didn't talk to him for three days. (He returned the toy laser gun to her later and apologized sincerely.)

C: 装着帝垣琼玉牌的垃圾袋。帝垣琼玉牌有着不同的稀有度，可以从垃圾袋的颜色上看出来。\n\n「适度娱乐，理性消费。」
E: A trash bag filled with celestial jade tiles. Celestial jade tiles possess differing levels of rarity, and the sorting can be seen from the colors of the trash bags.\n\n"Enjoy responsibly, spend wisely."

C: 在匹诺康尼，到处都可以找到这样的残片。 它们曾属于一颗颗破碎的心。 「黑色梦中我去安睡，梦中没有错与对。」
E: Shards like this can be found everywhere throughout Penacony. They once belonged to broken hearts. "In the realm of black dreams I sleep, where distinctions of right or wrong are buried deep."

C: 手工雕琢的银戒，附耳能够听到雪融的声音。 在哀地里亚，逝者临行前将冰雪封入戒指，献给生者，代为同行余下生路。 「冰消雪释时，花会盛开，你会找到我。」
E: A handcrafted silver ring — if you hold it to your ear, you can hear the sound of melting snow. In Aidonia, the departed seal ice and snow into a ring before their final journey, offering it to the living as a token to walk the rest of the path in their stead. "When the ice melts and the snow fades, the flowers will bloom, and you will find me."

C: 让我们一起逃离烦恼，坠入音乐的乌托邦，引爆音浪狂潮吧！
E: Let us escape our troubles and take a deep dive into the musical utopia. Let's unleash a sonic frenzy!

C: 拥有二十亿信用点的富豪是世界上最惨的富豪：不能直接退休，继续工作下去又不值得。哎，烦恼。
E: The billionaire with two billion credits is the most pitiable billionaire in the world: Retirement is not an option, and continuing to work is not worthwhile. How miserable.

C: 想和石头老板一起上天吗？
E: Want to ride up to heaven with Boss Stone?

C: 面具可是个好东西…要不，你也弄一个戴戴？
E: Masks can be quite useful... How about you also get one and try it on?

C: 《以太战线》中的游戏道具，以太灵配备后可以获得特殊的强化能力。
E: A game item in Aetherium Wars. Aether Spirits will gain a special enhanced ability after equipping it.

C: 你意识深处的种种开拓经历，将其完整回忆后能为游戏提供灵感。
E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

C: 据说有保护眼睛，预防夜盲症的功效。因此在四处都非常昏暗的迷路迷境，意外地广受欢迎。
E: It's said to protect your eyes and prevent night blindness. That's why it's unexpectedly popular in the dimly lit Membrance Maze.

C: 其实是苏乐达汽水的瓶盖。\n\n「看似无用的物品，却是某些人最珍贵的宝藏。」
E: It's actually the caps of SoulGlad soda bottles.\n\n"Even seemingly useless items are the most precious treasures to some."

C: 博识学会研发的高科技护具，不但能保护身体最脆弱的部位，还能将受到的冲击部分转化为能量，替护具充能，满足长时间作战需求。 该护具的原型机在武装考古学派中少量投放，获得大量有效数据。博识学会据此改进了护具，并交由星际和平公司对外贩售。 「改进版什么时候发给我们？」 「快了，学士！先拿一次性防护壁凑合凑合！」
E: High-Tech protective gear developed by the Intelligentsia Guild. It keeps the most vulnerable parts of your body from harm and converts the impact into energy used to charge the gear, making it fit for prolonged combat operations. The prototypes of this model were distributed in small numbers among the Armed Archaeologists, allowing the Guild to collect large amounts of data to help improve the model. The Interastral Peace Corporation was tasked to sell it on the retail market. "When can we get our hands on the upgraded model?" "Soon, my scholars...! You're gonna have to make do with Disposable Shields for the time being."

C: 以未知合金锻造而成的护盾，制作技艺难以复现。可中幅提升<color=#f29e38ff>存护</color>角色的命途行迹。
E: A shield forged with irreplaceable craftsmanship from an unknown alloy. Used to level up Traces moderately for <color=#f29e38ff>Preservation</color> characters.

C: 蚕食者之影佩戴的头饰，虚数属性角色的晋升素材。
E: Headwear of the Decaying Shadow. Can be used for the Ascension of Imaginary characters.

C: 行迹升级的高阶素材。
E: Advanced level-up material for Traces.

C: 旧世界时代遗留的机器引擎。强化所需的高级材料。
E: Mechanical engine left behind from the Old World. Advanced material used for enhancement.

C: 当开拓力恢复至上限或超出上限时，后备开拓力开始随时间恢复。每<unbreak>18</unbreak>分钟恢复1点，存储上限<unbreak>2400</unbreak>点。\n后备开拓力可等量取出为开拓力。每次最多可取出<unbreak>300</unbreak>点。
E: When Trailblaze Power reaches or exceeds the max limit, Reserved Trailblaze Power will begin to regenerate over time. Reserved Trailblaze Power recovers 1 point every <unbreak>18</unbreak> minutes for a max of <unbreak>2400</unbreak> points.\nReserved Trailblaze Power can withdraw an equivalent amount of Trailblaze Power for a max of <unbreak>300</unbreak> points each time.

C: 【大敌名录 • 烬灭卷 • 目录】 …… …… 绝灭大君 末日兽 践踏者 虚卒 重子/反重子 …… …… 【词条】绝灭大君 分类 依其起源种属，并不固定。 摘要 绝灭大君是「烬灭祸祖」纳努克所擢选的令使，「反物质军团」众多部队的领军者。 尽管纳努克令无数世界枯萎死灭，消灭了数不尽的文明物种，但对顺从其意志，乃至甘愿踏入「毁灭」命途的有能者，祂依旧会留有活路，延宕其末日。受赐毁灭之力，被反转扭曲，这些生灵成了众所畏惧的「绝灭大君」。 根据传言，纳努克座下共有七位大君，代表了「毁灭」的七种极致倾向。但目前为止，我们仍未能完整查知这七位大君的具体情报。 无论是联盟的观测记录，还是公司的情报网，所能获取的有效信息极少——毕竟「毁灭」所过之处，什么也不会留下，连信息也是如此。其中至少有四位大君尚且不知其名，仅能从「毁灭」的倾向判断其存在。 观测记录 【焚风】 「焚风」有「一人万军」的恐怖名声，也是最热衷于暴力毁灭的大君。如其名所示，焚风痴迷于事物在毁灭瞬间所爆发的力量与美感。 星历6804年，点燃新伯利恒的太阳，以巨量辐射炙烤其地表，使之玻璃化； 星历7143年，生成巨大的气旋风暴，将亚甸星上的生态系统搅动至支离破碎； 星历7658年，钻破月卫之盾的地壳，进行地核打击压碎整个世界…… 这些毁灭行径都充分反映了他对末日降临景象的极端喜好。 对联盟潜在危害：极高。 【星啸】 「星啸」是烬灭祸祖的先锋将军。 虽然无人能理解纳努克的行动逻辑，但星啸确实是祂最常启用的将军，其部队遍布银河，在群星间织出行军路径和毁灭的道路。 曜青、朱明、方壶仙舟都曾留下过与星啸率领的军团卒子交战的记录。 星啸也是目前唯一登陆过仙舟的「毁灭」令使。按照《仙舟通鉴》的记载，她曾在星历5700年左右要求朱明仙舟放弃抵抗，改变航路协助她攻伐造翼者的世界。 对联盟潜在危害：极高。 【铁墓】 「铁墓」最擅于攻伐技术发达的世界。 所有幸存者提供的情报无一例外地指出，他们目睹了「智慧的溃败」。 无机的AI军团在瞬间瘫痪、倒戈；外层空间防御阵列开始向地面齐射；飞行载具如同蝇群纷扰四散，无法对敌……铁墓最擅于攻下那些自信科技的文明世界。 就在最近，根据玉阙仙舟提供的情报，「铁墓」攻下了巴兰扎熔炉。吾等需要尽早防备他的攻势。 对联盟潜在危害：极高。 【？？？】 未能明确标定其称呼，但留下了观测记录的大君。 玉阙仙舟的观星士曾提供了对死亡星球「叙拉古-III」持续一百五十二年的观察记录。 军团在这个世界极为缓慢地推进阵线，构筑优势，施加压力，蚕食抵抗者，又如同观察蚁群一般，观察受难文明在结构上的缓慢崩溃。 类似的现象也反复出现在赤色巴别、奥古尔星环等世界的死亡过程中。可以推测其幕后隐有一位如棋手般冷静自持的大君，引导着相关战事的发展。 对联盟潜在危害：极高。 【？？？】 未能标定其称呼，但留下了观测记录的大君。 按照星际和平公司的记录，他们最近三百年间至少观察到了一百二十二个世界陷入不知原因的混乱，最终被反物质军团击溃。 一开始公司派出的调查者们倾向于这些事件都是各自孤立的结果。但所有灾后评估报告却将这些世界的灭亡归结为一个原因：「精神」的破灭——信仰体系的内部冲突、精神支柱的瓦解、文明内部信任的崩溃、以及对希望的彻底弃绝。 玉阙仙舟的太卜司认为，这一系列操作的背后潜藏着某位看不见的绝灭大君。 对联盟潜在危害：未知。 【？？？】 未能标定其称呼，但留下了观测记录的大君。 博识学会向我们提供了一张来自雅梵娜之链的星区光度对比图，其上三分之一的恒星在将近三百年的时间里被某种力量熄灭，这绝对不可能是正常的天文现象。 在这些被黑暗笼罩的世界里，反物质军团任意穿行，自永夜里降下毁灭。根据逃离雅梵娜的幸存者们的证言，他们称其为「吞日之兽」。 对联盟潜在危害：未知。 【？？？】 未能标定称呼，但留下了观测记录的大君。 罗浮地衡司的生态学者曾调查过一个被彻底反物质化的奇特世界。其上所有的事物都在奔向自己的镜映般的对偶产物，随后在对撞中爆发出湮灭的炫光。 反物质军团的造物素来拥有扭曲而奇异的外形，在摧毁它们的瞬间，许多军团造物会迸发出激烈的逆火，将敌人一同拖入湮灭。也许这种奇异性质，正是来源于这位大君？ 对联盟潜在危害：未知。 （卷宗底部批注了两行小字） 「云骑军虽奉帝弓诰谕讨伐孽物，但联盟成立至今，我等与反物质军团的冲突不可胜数。可预见的未来，云骑将难免与烬灭祸祖的爪牙一战，应当早做准备。」
E: [List of Archenemies — Ruin Scroll — Contents] ... ... Lord Ravager Doomsday Beast Trampler Voidranger Baryon/Antibaryon ... ... [Glossary] Lord Ravager Category Their identities are not fixed and are based on species of origin. Summary A Lord Ravager is an Emanator who oversees many divisions in the Antimatter Legion, and is selected by the Ruin Author, Nanook. Despite the countless worlds, civilizations, and lives that Nanook has annihilated, THEY still leave a pathway open to delay the doomsday of some powerful individuals who willingly obey THEIR will or step gleefully onto the Path of Destruction. Endowed with the powers of Destruction, these creatures are twisted into dreadful Lord Ravagers. Rumor has it that Nanook has seven Overlords, each representing one of the seven extremes of Destruction. But so far, we have yet to find comprehensive data on these seven Overlords. Both the Alliance's observational records and the IPC's intelligence networks have obtained only slivers of useful information on these entities. After all, there are no remnants by definition wherever Destruction goes, and that includes information. We do not even know the names of at least four of the Overlords, and can only discern their existence by their varied tendencies regarding Destruction. Observational Records [Zephyro] With a terrifying reputation as a one-man army, Zephyro is the Overlord most passionate about violent destruction. Zephyro is obsessed with the raw power and beauty observed in the explosive moment of utter destruction. In Year 6804 of the Star Calendar, he ignited the sun of planet New Bethlehem, scorching its planetary surface with huge amounts of radiation and instantly turning it into glass. In Year 7143 of the Star Calendar, he stirred up a huge cyclone, smashing the ecosystem on planet Aedirn into smithereens; In Year 7658 of the Star Calendar, he drilled straight through the Moonshield's outer planetary crust, launching an attack on the planetary core that crushed the entire world... These acts of Destruction neatly encapsulate his extreme passion for doomsday scenarios. Potential threat to the Alliance: Very high. [Celenova] Celenova is the front-line general for the Ruin Author. Though none can comprehend the logic behind Nanook's actions, Celenova is indeed the general THEY most frequently deployed. Her troops spread throughout the cosmos, weaving a network of destruction between the stars through their marches and raids. The Yaoqing, the Zhuming, and the Fanghu ships all have records of fighting against Celenova's Legion minions. Celenova is also the only Emanator of Destruction to ever board a Xianzhou ship. Records from the History of the Xianzhou have her requesting a ceasefire with the Xianzhou Zhuming around Year 5700 of the Star Calendar, requesting the ship to cease fighting her and change course in assisting her to attack the home world of the wingweavers. Potential threat to the Alliance: Very high. [Irontomb] Irontomb's is most adept at attacking technologically advanced worlds. All survivors, without exception, recount that they witnessed "the fall of wisdom." In a flash, inorganic AI legions are paralyzed or turn against their mates, outer space defense arrays begin targeting the home planet, flying vehicles scatter at random like flies, unable to target the enemy... Irontomb's forte is attacking civilized worlds confident in their technology. Recently, the Xianzhou Yuque has produced intelligence about Irontomb overcoming the Baranza Forge. We must guard against his attack as soon as we can. Potential threat to the Alliance: Very high. [???] This Overlord's name has not been clearly identified, but they have left behind observational records. Stargazers of the Yuque once produced 152 consecutive years' worth of observational records about the dead planet Syracuse-III. The Legion's front lines crept forward very slowly in this world. It built up an advantage, exerted pressure, and chipped away at any resistance. Then, just like observing an ant colony, they watched as the civilization experienced a slow structural collapse. Similar phenomena also occurred during the deaths of Red Babel, the Ogul ring, and other worlds. Speculation rose that behind the scenes lay an Overlord with the calm, self-sufficient temperament of a chess grandmaster, pulling the strings of strife as war developed. Potential threat to the Alliance: Very high. [???] This Overlord's name has not been identified, but they have left behind observational records. Based on IPC records, at least 122 planets were plunged into chaos of unknown origin over the past 300 years before their ultimate demise at the hands of the Antimatter Legion. IPC investigators initially leaned toward these being isolated events, but all disaster assessment reports attributed these events to a single cause: "spiritual" disintegration — The internal conflict of belief systems, the crumbling of pillars of faith, the collapse of trust within civilizations, and the complete abandonment of all hope. The Yuque's Divination Commission believes that behind this series of events lurked an invisible Lord Ravager. Potential threat to the Alliance: Unknown. [???] This Overlord's name has not been identified, but they have left behind observational records. The Intelligentsia Guild has provided us with a light comparison map of the star zone around the Yvanna chain. One-third of its stars have been extinguished by some unknown force in the past 300 years. It would have been impossible for such phenomenon to occur naturally. The Antimatter Legion roams freely across these worlds that are shrouded in darkness, raining down destruction from within this eternal night. Survivors from the Yvanna system term this one "The Sun Devourer." Potential threat to the Alliance: Unknown. [???] This Overlord's name has not been identified, but they have left behind observational records. Ecologists from the Luofu's Realm-Keeping Commission once researched a strange world that had been completely converted into antimatter. All objects on that world hurtle toward their matter counterparts, releasing a destructive dazzle upon impact. Antimatter Legion creations have always had distorted, twisted appearances. When destroyed, many instantly implode with an intense backfire, dragging their enemy along with them to their destruction. Perhaps this strange characteristic is derived from this unnamed Overlord? Potential threat to the Alliance: Unknown. (Two lines of postscripts are recorded at the bottom of the dossier) "The Cloud Knights have been created following the Reignbow's edict to fight against Abominations, but we have fought so many battles against the Antimatter Legion since the Alliance's foundation. The Cloud Knights will inexorably come up against minions of the Ruin Author in the foreseeable future, so adequate preparations should be made soon."

C: 苏乐达炸弹 信息来源：奥希洛特-猎犬-黄金的时刻 主题分类：带有「奇幻色彩」的恐怖袭击 内容概述： 据说有位逐梦客在梦中耗尽家财，却又不甘就此离开，于是以噼咔白葡萄汽水和酸梦软糖为原料，研发出一种极具威力的跳跳糖；继而通过特殊手段，将跳跳糖贮藏于苏乐达瓶中，制造出大批苏乐达炸弹。 此人意图通过气泡锂犬在运输过程中产生的颠簸，使二者混合、引发爆炸，从而在城市中造成大规模混乱。 然而该计划却因其与锂犬们过于亲近而惨遭夭折。据说几十瓶苏乐达炸弹造成的威力直接导致了严重的脑震荡，使得该逐梦客至今未能醒来。 梦境中的迷因 信息来源：科琳-筑梦师-筑梦边境 主题分类：梦境中的迷因怪物 信息概述： 近期匹诺康尼发生了多起失踪案件。经调查确认，失踪者的身体皆完好地保存于酒店入梦池内，意识却不知去向，且无法通过人为方式自外界唤醒。 据消息提供者称，这些人皆被某个突然出现的、被称为「迷因」怪物所掳走。受害者消失前所处的梦境时刻、所属种族和行为模式皆不相同，暂无法确定该迷因的狩猎逻辑。 此外，目击者相关记忆都已被家族消除，暂无法通过该途径进行更深入调查。 被污染的迷钟 信息来源：伍尔西-猎犬-梦境酒店 主题分类：被污染的梦境造物 信息概述： 近期匹诺康尼发生了多起针对「美梦剧团」成员的袭击事件。被袭击的梦境造物不仅外壳严重损毁，意识也遭到重度污染。 每个案发现场都留有一盘磁带古怪的磁带，系污染源。据说其能够使生物变得愈发易怒、惶恐，甚至产生幻觉，长时间接触则可能导致彻底的精神崩溃。更有甚者，该存在能够使梦境本身发生扭曲。 恶魔之门 信息来源：W-逐梦客-梦境酒店 主题分类：未知神秘力量 信息概述： 据消息提供者称，在发生崩塌的梦境酒店中，有个无法通过的通路。 那里的时空呈现出一种诡异的状态，该状态无法言明、但能够感知。 「我看向尽头…但没有尽头…只看见看不见的存在……」 「…只能在绝对的寂静中，听见听不见的唱诗……」
E: SoulGlad Bomb Source: Auslotte of Bloodhound, Golden Hour Classification: A terrorist attack with a fantasy overtone Summary: There are rumors about a Dreamchaser who depleted their family's fortune in the Dreamscape but refused to leave peacefully. They then devised a potent popping candy using Pika White Grape Soda and "Sour Dreams" Soft Candy. By storing this special candy in SoulGlad bottles, they produced a large quantity of SoulGlad bombs. Their intention was to trigger explosions when Bubble Hounds jostled the bottles and mixed the two during transportation, causing widespread chaos in the city. However, their plan ultimately backfired due to the Dreamchaser's proximity and closeness with the Bubble Hounds. It is said the volatile explosion from dozens of SoulGlad bombs caused a severe concussion, leaving the Dreamchaser in a coma to this day. Memes in Dreamscape Source: Dreamweaver Colleen, Dream's Edge Classification: Memetic monsters within Dreamscape Summary: Penacony has recently experienced a series of disappearances. Investigations have revealed that the bodies of the missing individuals remain intact in the dreampools of the hotel, but their consciousness is lost and cannot be awakened by any external means in reality. According to the informant, these individuals were abducted by a monster known as "meme," which appeared seemingly out of nowhere. The victims were taken from various Dreamscape Moments, were of diverse races, and exhibited a variety of different behavioral patterns before their disappearance. The monster's motives and modus operandi remain shrouded in mystery. Moreover, all witnesses' memories have been erased by The Family, impeding further investigation. Corrupted Dream Ticker Source: Woolsey of Bloodhound, hotel in the Dreamscape Classification: Corrupted objects in the Dreamscape Summary: The Sweet Dreams Troupe in Penacony has recently suffered a series of attacks. The attacked Dreamscape creations not only suffered significant physical damage to their shells but also underwent a profound corruption of their consciousness. At each crime scene, a bizarre tape was discovered, believed to be the source of the corruption. Exposure to the tape is believed to induce excessive irritability, fear, and even hallucinations. Prolonged exposure can lead to a complete mental disintegration. Additionally, the presence of the tape has the ability to distort the Dreamscape itself. Devil's Gate Source: Dreamchaser "W," hotel in the Dreamscape Classification: Unidentified mysterious power Summary: According to the informant, there is an impassable pathway within the collapsed section of the hotel in the Dreamscape. The space and time in that section exhibits an eerie state. It cannot be described but can be sensed. "I looked at the end... but there was no end... and I saw an entity that couldn't be seen..." "...I can only hear inaudible chants in the absolute silence..."

C:
自仙舟「罗浮」与丹轮寺建立正式外交关系以来，究竟该如何处理丹轮寺问题，一直是一个各司部之间争执不休的问题。

我在此代表地衡司，向各司部及十王司再次重申我们的意见：断不应当与丹轮寺有更进一步的合作，更应该立刻放弃任何与其结盟的天真念头。

这几日开会时，我察觉到很多同僚对地衡司的判断不满，更有人因此将我当做了不近人情的怪物。因此我有必要将自己的理由说得更明白些，以避免加深误会。

第一、目前与丹轮寺建交的仙舟，只有「罗浮」一艘。且不论那些物理距离过远的同胞和避世隐居已久的同胞，至少在「曜青」和「朱明」未对此做出任何判断前，我们都不应当擅自与丹轮寺进一步交好。

第二、第三次丰饶民战争才过去三十年，「丰饶民」这个词对广大仙舟住民来说依然意味着仇恨与血泪——更不要提狐族与步离人的千年血债。这些都并不是几千个僧人就能在短时间内扭转的（即使他们真的都是极为纯善的好人）。

第三、与丹轮寺结盟后，他们还会愿意孤零零地住在那个破庙里吗？就算他们愿意，结盟后他们必然会成为丰饶民仇恨的焦点，我们能心安理得地放他们依然住在那里吗？这可不是仙舟的待客之道。

如果让他们住在罗浮上，我们要怎么看待他们的风俗习惯和信仰生活？不许他们这样做吗？这同样也不是仙舟人的待客之道。

但要是我们允许他们那样做，他们自然会遵循他们的信仰，从各个战场抓来一些小孽物，再放到庙里面去感化。当这间寺院在宇宙中流浪时，这种善行当然与我们无关，但当这作座寺院位于「罗浮」上时，你们谁敢说，这些小孽物不会逃出寺庙，跑到街上去大开杀戒？你们谁敢付负这个责任？

如果诸位没有信心妥善安排好他们的生活，那建议立刻死了这条心。

第四、也许各位不知道，博识学会的调查结果显示，丹轮寺涅槃殿里供奉着的那一万三千具「金身」，在生物学上依然是「活着」的。

我们不知道这些「金身」会不会在条件成熟时苏醒，更不知道当他们醒来时，究竟是「得道高僧」，还是「丰饶孽物」。

综上所述，我代表地衡司再次强调我们的意见：断不应当与丹轮寺有更进一步的合作，更应该立刻放弃任何与其结盟的天真念头。

<align="right">地衡司司衡，惠父</align>
E:
Ever since the Xianzhou Luofu established official diplomatic relations with Claretwheel Temple, the question of how to deal with the Claretwheel Temple issue has always been a constant matter of contention between the various commissions.

As the representative of the Realm-Keeping Commission, I would like to reiterate our stance to the other Commissions and the Ten-Lords Commission: We should avoid any further cooperation with Claretwheel Temple and abandon any naive notion of allying with them.

Over the course of the meetings in the past couple of days, I have noticed that many colleagues are unhappy with the Realm-Keeping Commission's decision. There are even people who think that I'm a heartless monster. Therefore, I feel the need to elaborate further on my reasoning to avoid creating any further misunderstandings.

Firstly, at present, the only Xianzhou ship that has established diplomatic relations with Claretwheel Temple is the Luofu. Even if we disregard our compatriots who are physically too far away and those who have gone into recluse, at the very least, we should avoid deepening our relationship with Claretwheel Temple before the Yaoqing and the Zhuming have passed their judgment.

Secondly, it has only been thirty years since the Third Denizens of Abundance War. The term "Denizens of Abundance" is still one that reminds many Xianzhou residents of hatred and bloodshed. This is even before we talk about the thousand-year blood debt between the foxian and borisin. Such hatred is not something that a few thousand monks can overcome in such a short time (even if they are truly all extremely kind and pure of heart).

Thirdly, after we form an alliance with Claretwheel Temple, would they still be willing to live by themselves in that dilapidated temple? Even if they were willing, they would undoubtedly become the focus of the Denizens of Abundance's hatred after allying with us. Could we really allow ourselves to let them stay there? That's not how the Xianzhou treats its guests.

If we allow them to stay on the Luofu instead, what would be our attitude towards their customs and faith? Shall we forbid them from practicing such rituals? That's also not how the Xianzhou treats its guests.

However, if we allow them to do as they please, they would naturally adhere to their beliefs, which involve capturing baby abominations from various battlefields and putting these creatures in the temple in an attempt to reform them. While the temple still wanders the universe, this behavior is naturally none of our concern. However, once the temple is situated on the Luofu, can you be certain that these mini abominations will not escape the temple and slaughter the innocent on our streets? Should that happen, which one of you would be willing to take responsibility?

If none of you have any confidence in coming up with a concrete and appropriate plan for their living arrangement, then I suggest that we give up on this idea right now.

Fourth, perhaps you are not aware of this fact, but investigations from the Intelligentsia Guild show that the <unbreak>13,000</unbreak> "golden bodhisattvas" enshrined in the Nirvana Hall of Claretwheel Temple are still technically "alive" from a biological point of view.

We do not know whether these "golden bodhisattvas" will awaken when certain conditions are met, nor do we know whether they will be "esteemed high monks" or "Abominations of Abundance" when they awaken.

In conclusion, on behalf of the Realm-Keeping Commission, I would like to re-emphasize our stance: We should avoid any further cooperation with Claretwheel Temple and abandon any naive notion of allying with them.

<align="right">Huifu, Realm-Keeping Commissioner</align>

C:
我院是折纸大学的核心院系之一，肩负着培养新一代筑梦师的重任。
筑梦师是梦境世界的缔造者，他们运用非凡的创造力和想象力，将梦境打造为栩栩如生的现实。
本大纲旨在为学生提供系统、全面的筑梦教育，帮助其掌握筑梦必备的理论知识与实践技能，成长为优秀的筑梦师。

一、培养目标
1、知识目标：掌握筑梦的基本原理和方法，包括忆质物理学、梦境美学、梦境工程学等学科的核心知识。
2、能力目标：具备优秀的创造力和想象力，能够运用所学知识独立完成各类梦境建筑的设计与建造。
3、素质目标：具有筑梦师应有的职业素养和道德操守，能够充分理解并践行筑梦的社会责任。

二、学制与学分
筑梦学院实行四年制教学，共8个学期，每学期<unbreak>18</unbreak>周。学生修满<unbreak>160</unbreak>个学分方可毕业。
其中：
1、公共课：<unbreak>20</unbreak>学分
2、专业基础课：<unbreak>35</unbreak>学分
3、专业核心课：<unbreak>70</unbreak>学分
4、专业选修课：<unbreak>25</unbreak>学分
5、毕业设计：<unbreak>10</unbreak>学分

三、课程设置
【第一学年：奠基之年】
1、想象力训练（8学分）：通过系列训练激发学生的创造力，开拓思维的边界。
2、忆质物理学（9学分）：学习忆质的物理特性及其在梦境构建中的应用。
3、梦境美学基础（9学分）：掌握色彩、构图、光影等美学元素在梦境创作中的运用。
4、空间几何（9学分）：学习空间、形态、结构等建筑几何学基础。
5、公共课程（5学分）：匹诺康尼通识教育，了解匹诺康尼的历史、文化与价值观。

【第二学年：游历之年】
1、筑梦技法（<unbreak>10</unbreak>学分）：跟随资深筑梦师学习各类筑梦技法，如忆质雕塑、梦境编织等。
2、现场考察（6学分）：实地考察匠人前辈的筑梦作品，学习他们的理念与技艺。
3、民俗采风（6学分）：深入了解不同地域的风俗民情，从中获取灵感。
4、跨界筑梦（<unbreak>10</unbreak>学分）：尝试将音乐、绘画等其他艺术形式融入筑梦素材中，拓宽表现力。
5、公共课程（9学分）：星际文明概论，了解不同文明间的交流与冲突。

【第三学年：磨砺之年】
1、筑梦工程学（<unbreak>11</unbreak>学分）：掌握大型梦境工程的设计、规划与管理方法。
2、极限建造（<unbreak>11</unbreak>学分）：在恶劣环境下进行梦境构建的方法与策略。
3、情感映射（<unbreak>11</unbreak>学分）：将情感体验融入梦境空间，打造感知丰富的梦境体验。
4、筑梦实习（9学分）：深入筑梦一线，参与实际的梦境建设项目。
5、公共课程（2学分）：了解筑梦技术发展带来的伦理、社会责任与职业道德问题。

【第四学年：成才之年】
1、未来筑梦学（4学分）：了解前沿科技发展，探索筑梦的未来图景。
2、筑梦管理（4学分）：项目管理、团队协作等筑梦师必备的管理技能。
3、专业选修课（<unbreak>25</unbreak>学分）：根据学生个人意愿进行细分领域的研究，包含梦境生态学、多维筑梦学、梦境修复与维护、梦境景观与主题设计等学科。
4、毕业设计（<unbreak>10</unbreak>学分）：独立完成梦境空间的构筑，凝聚大学所学。
5、公共课程（4学分）：理解「家族」理念，培养不同文化背景下的沟通与群体协作能力。

四、教学要求
1、理论与实践相结合，鼓励学生将所学应用于实际筑梦项目。
2、因材施教，充分激发学生的创造力，培养学生的个性化发展。
3、优化师资配备，保证教学质量，同时邀请业界专家参与实践教学。
4、拓展学院与匹诺康尼本地企业的合作，为学生提供更多实习、就业机会。
5、重视筑梦伦理教育，培养学生的社会责任感。

五、质量监控
1、完善教学督导制度，定期召开教学工作会议，研究解决教学疑难问题。
2、建立学生评教与教师评学相结合的教学评价机制。
3、定期进行教学质量评估，形成持续改进的良性循环。

筑梦学院将秉承「想象力造就未来」的办学理念，致力于培养具有扎实理论基础、过硬实践技能、开阔创新思维的高素质筑梦人才。在未来，愿我们的毕业生能够成为匹诺康尼的中流砥柱，为创造更加精彩的梦境不懈努力。
E:
Our academy is one of the core institutions in Paperfold University, shouldering the great duty of nurturing a new generation of Dreamweavers.
Dreamweavers are the creators of the Dreamscape world. They use their extraordinary creativity and imagination to craft the Dreamscape into a lifelike reality.
This syllabus aims to provide students with a systematic and comprehensive dreamweaving education to help them grasp the necessary theoretical knowledge and practical skills required to become an outstanding Dreamweaver.

I. Training targets
1. Knowledge objectives: Mastering basic principles and methods of Dreamweaving, including core course knowledge such as memoria physics, Dreamscape aesthetics, and Dreamscape engineering.
2. Skill objectives: Possessing outstanding creativity and imagination, as well as the ability to apply knowledge gained to complete various Dreamscape building design and construction work independently.
3. Professional objectives: Possessing the expected ethics and professionalism of Dreamweavers, and being able to fully understand and exercise the social responsibility of Dreamweaving.

II. Academic system and credits
Dreamweaver Academy has a 4-year educational system, with 8 terms of <unbreak>18</unbreak> weeks each. Students can graduate after completion of <unbreak>160</unbreak> credits.
These include:
1. Public courses: <unbreak>20</unbreak> credits
2. Professional foundation courses: <unbreak>35</unbreak> credits
3. Professional core courses: <unbreak>70</unbreak> credits
4. Professional elective courses: <unbreak>25</unbreak> credits
5. Graduation design: <unbreak>10</unbreak> credits

III. Course structure
Year 1: Foundation year
1. Imagination training (8 credits): Stimulating student creativity and expanding the boundaries of thought through a series of training.
2. Memoria physics (9 credits): Studying the physical traits of memoria and their use in Dreamscape construction.
3. Dreamscape aesthetic foundation (9 credits): Teaching the use of color, structure, light and shadow, and other elements in Dreamscape construction.
4. Spatial geometry (9 credits): Studying space, shape, structure and other architectural geometric knowledge.
5. Public courses (5 credits): Penacony general education, learning the history, culture, and values of Penacony.

Year 2: Travel year
1. Dreamweaving techniques (<unbreak>10</unbreak> credits): Learn various Dreamweaving techniques such as memoria sculpture and Dreamscape creation under an experienced professional Dreamweaver.
2. On-site observation (6 credits): Observe on-site the Dreamweaving work of senior masters and learn about their philosophy and skills.
3. Customs and folk culture (6 credits): Dive deep into the local customs and popular sentiments of people of different areas and obtain inspiration.
4. Interdisciplinary Dreamweaving (<unbreak>10</unbreak> credits): Attempt to infuse art of different forms including music, painting, and more into Dreamweaving source material and expand powers of expression.
5. Public courses (9 credits): Introduction to interastral culture. Understand communication and clashes between different cultures.

Year 3: Practical year
1. Dreamweaver engineering (<unbreak>11</unbreak> credits): Learn the design, planning, and management processes involved in large-scale Dreamscape engineering.
2. Extreme construction (<unbreak>11</unbreak> credits): Methods and strategies for Dreamscape construction in harsh environments.
3. Emotional reflection (<unbreak>11</unbreak> credits): Infuse emotional experiences into Dreamscape spaces to create an immersive and rich Dreamscape experience.
4. Dreamweaving work experience (9 credits): Go deep into the frontline of dreamweaving and take part in a real Dreamscape construction project.
5. Public courses (2 credits): Understand issues surrounding ethics, social responsibility, and professionalism that arise in Dreamweaving.

Year 4: Finishing year
1. Future Dreamweaving (4 credits): Understand cutting-edge technology developments to explore the future roadmap of Dreamweaving.
2. Dreamweaving management (4 credits): Project management, team cooperation, and other must-have management skills for Dreamweavers.
3. Professional elective course (<unbreak>25</unbreak> credits): Detailed research on a specialized area as selected by students themselves, including Dreamscape ecology, multidimensional Dreamweaving, Dreamscape repair and maintenance, Dreamscape landscape design, and themed design.
4. Graduation design (<unbreak>10</unbreak> credits): Complete independent construction of a Dreamscape, bringing together everything learned through your university education.
5. Public courses (4 credits): Understand the values of "The Family" and cultivate communication and cooperation skills under different cultural backgrounds.

IV. Teaching requirements
1. Encouraging students to apply what they have learned to real-life Dreamweaving projects through combining theory and practice.
2. Teaching students according to their natural talent to fully stimulate students' creativity and nurture their individual development.
3. Optimizing teaching staff, ensuring the quality of education, and inviting industry experts to take part in practical education.
4. Expanding the cooperation between the academy and Penaconian businesses to provide students with more work experience and career opportunities.
5. Placing importance on the teaching of dreamweaving ethics and cultivating students' societal responsibility.

V. Quality control
1. Optimize the teaching supervision system and hold periodic educational meetings to research and solve teaching issues.
2. Establish an educational evaluation system that combines teacher evaluation of students and student evaluation of teachers.
3. Hold periodic teaching quality evaluations to create a positive cycle of constant improvement.

Dreamweaver Academy adheres to the principle that "imagination shapes the future" and is committed to cultivating high-quality Dreamweavers with sound theoretical foundational knowledge, outstanding practical skills, and innovative thinking. In the future, we hope that our graduates will become cornerstones of Penacony, working tirelessly to create an even more wonderful Dreamscape.

C: 黎明云崖访客审查标准： 1、可无碍出入黎明云崖者，唯刻法勒高级祭司、元老院成员，以及受认可的终身贵宾。其姓名、相貌均在贵宾名册中有载。此类访客自由出入、不予登记，切不可怠慢。 2、在黎明云崖工作、生活的公民，需佩戴特制的刻法勒石符，展示石符、验明身份后可出入黎明云崖。不予登记。 3、除以上两类访客，其他访客原则上均需审慎询问身份。唯有受邀宾客可登访黎明云崖，此类宾客需手持一次性刻法勒石符登访，行程结束后其石符由迎宾组成员统一收缴。 4、受元老院郑重接见的最尊贵访客，待遇不在上列。元老院将派元老以特殊的高等礼节接见。 5、严格禁止平民无端进入黎明云崖。 光历4930年，平衡月，11日 …… 践行时，访客五位。 福玻斯，富商，捐巨款前来观光。石符已收缴。 卡森德拉，神谕者，受邀登访。石符已收缴。 宁芙，黎明云崖贵族祭司的侄女，由侍女陪同前来。按其亲属的要求，暂住云崖。 …… 光历4930年，耕耘月，9日 门扉时，访客两位。 克里默斯，前元老院成员，出示失去神性的石符，称按手续前来为石符续以刻法勒神性。 次日注：此人对被逐出元老院一事心存不满，在黎明云崖私自对石符灌注神性、妄图据为己有，如今已吊销石符，其人被黎明云崖永久拒访。 尤里萨，异邦贵族，受邀登访。其人为元老院提供巨额财货，石符已永续神性，后续来访不予登记。 …… 光历4930年，自由月，17日 …… 离愁时，访客一位。 特殊贵宾，其人拒绝透露姓名，元老院遣专人接见，并由一名刻法勒辅祭恳请刻法勒神体垂腕，乘坐泰坦的手掌登访。这等壮景往往数年得观一回，实属罕见。
E: Dawncloud Visitor Screening Standards: 1. Those who may freely enter and exit Dawncloud are limited to high priests of Kephale, members from the Council of Elders, and recognized lifetime VIPs. Their names and appearances are recorded in the VIP registry. Such visitors can travel freely and are not to be registered or neglected. 2. Citizens who work or live in Dawncloud must wear a specially crafted Kephale stone talisman. They may enter and exit upon displaying the talisman and verifying their identity. They are not to be registered. 3. All other visitors, in principle, must be carefully questioned about their identity. Only invited guests may visit Dawncloud, and such guests must carry a one-time Kephale stone talisman. After their visit, the talisman will be collected by the reception team. 4. The most distinguished guests received by the Council of Elders are not subject to the above rules. The Council will dispatch an Elder to receive them with special high-level etiquette. 5. Commoners are strictly prohibited from entering Dawncloud without reason. Light Calendar 4930, Month of Balance, Day 11 ... At the Action Hour, there were five visitors. Phoebus, a wealthy merchant, donated a large sum to visit. The stone talisman has been collected. Cassondra, an oracle, was invited to visit. The stone talisman has been collected. Nympha, the niece of an aristocrat priest of Dawncloud, arrived accompanied by a maid. At the request of her relative, she will temporarily reside at Dawncloud. ... Light Calendar 4930, Month of Cultivation, Day 9 At the Entry Hour, two visitors arrived. Clymenus, former member of the Council of Elders, presented a stone talisman that has lost its divinity, claiming he had come to reconsecrate it with Kephale's blessing as per procedure. Next day's note: This individual harbors resentment over his expulsion from the Council of Elders and made unsanctified attempts to infuse the talisman with divinity at Dawncloud, seeking to claim it for himself. The talisman has since been recalled, and the individual is permanently barred from Dawncloud. Ulysse, an outlander noble, was invited to visit. Having provided substantial amounts of wealth and goods to the Council of Elders, his talisman has been permanently consecrated, and all future visits will no longer require registration. ... Light Calendar 4930, Month of Freedom, Day 17 ... At the Parting Hour, one visitor arrived. A special guest, who refused to give their name, was received by a designated Council representative. A Kephale acolyte was also employed to request the Titan's divine form to lower their wrist, allowing the guest to ascend in their palm for the visit. Such a spectacle is rare, seen only once every few years.

C: [古老的日记，部分内容残缺，前后文已不可考] 我决定开始记录这些不同寻常的事，或许在将来的某一天，会有人需要了解我们是如何失去光明的。尽管现在想来，那些再平常不过的光辉，竟已恍如隔世…… 最初的异象出现在何时？我有些想不清了，只记得早在三个月前，我在书房整理资料的时候，突然听见窗外传来一阵骚扰。我从窗户望去，人们纷纷跑到街上，指着天空议论纷纷。我瞧了两眼，发现艾格勒洒下的光辉像是在颤抖一样——一息明亮一息黯淡，如此闪烁了数次，便恢复了往日的光芒，只是看上去似乎比平日里黯淡了几分，但不仔细看很难看得出来。 再后来…是远方传来消息，我的学生说，他们那里的世界变得一片昏暗。很快，黑暗就像章鱼泼洒的墨汁一样扩散。我在浴场听到一位在卖粮食的小贩说，他家里的作物已经因为缺乏足够的光照逐渐开始枯萎。 最令人不安的是…侍奉██████的祭司们的沉默。往日里，总听闻有虔诚信徒向它祈祷后得到诸多回应。可这一次，无论祭司们如何祷告，它都没有任何反应——要不是我认识██████，我还真不知道这一层机密。 直到昨天，变故终于降临，奥赫玛在劫难逃…… 门扉时我就醒了，不知为何心跳得很快，我发现窗外市集的人格外地多，大家都在仰望天空——在圣城上空，艾格勒的光辉如我躁动不安的眼皮般颤抖，我拼命地想睁开眼睛，却又无可奈何地阖上。街上的气氛变得异常压抑，有人开始啜泣，有人拼命向艾格勒祈祷。我看见孩子扯着妈妈的衣角问发生了什么，但那位母亲却说不出话来，只是紧紧地抱住孩子。 没过多久，最后的光明终于消失了——艾格勒终于阖上了它的眼睛。街上响起一片哀叹。就在所有人以为永夜就此降临之际，圣城上空突然亮起一道金光。那是「黎明机器」——黎明云崖的大司铎向大家宣布，这是刻法勒的恩赐，它将在此照耀奥赫玛，永不停歇。 虽然它的光芒不及艾格勒的光辉明亮，但它至少给了我们一线希望。尽管大家都对████的话深信不疑，但我却对此表示怀疑——我们怎能指望一台什么机器就能与泰坦的神力相媲美？ 当然，这话我可不敢往外说…… 离愁时分，我第一次注意到城中多了许多光亮，邻居们纷纷点起了火烛。大家都很害怕黑暗的降临，但那些火光是多么的渺小，一丝清风就能将它们吹熄，和我们每个人的心一样脆弱。我不知道这样的日子还要维持多久，我朋友占星师████说，他观测到一些异常的天象，似乎有什么可怕的东西在接近艾格勒。但我们谁都不敢声张，祭司们声称有「神谕」，我们私下妄自关注██████，万一被发现了，等待我们的恐怕是…… 写到这里，我也不知道该说些什么。这本日记我上了三重锁，希望不会被人发现。希望我的孩子在长大后读到这些文字时，世界已经重新迎来了永恒的光明。窗外有喧哗声，今天有如此巨变，城中有不少地方都遭了殃，还不知道住得最远的阿妹现在如何了……愿诸位泰坦保佑我们。
E: [An ancient diary with fragments missing, its full context cannot be determined] I've decided to document these extraordinary occurrences. Perhaps someday, someone will need to understand how we lost the light. Though, reflecting on it now, that once-ordinary brilliance already seems like a distant dream... When did the first strange sign appear? I can't quite remember now, but I recall that roughly three months ago, while organizing materials in my study, I suddenly heard a commotion outside my window. People were running into the streets, pointing skyward and talking urgently. When I looked up, I noticed Aquila's radiance trembling — alternating between brightness and dimness, flickering several times before returning to its normal glow. It did appear slightly dimmer than before, though one would hardly notice without careful attention. Later... messages arrived from distant places. My students reported that their world had been plunged into darkness. Soon after, the darkness spread like ink expelled from an octopus. While at the baths, I overheard a grain vendor explaining that his crops had begun withering due to insufficient light. Most unsettling of all... is the silence from priests who serve ██████. In the past, faithful worshipers would frequently receive responses after praying to it. But this time, no matter how fervently the priests prayed, there was no answer — had I not been acquainted with ██████, I would never have learned of this classified information. Until yesterday, when the catastrophe finally descended, and Okhema's doom became inevitable... I awakened at Entry Hour with my heart pounding unexpectedly. The market outside was unusually crowded, with everyone staring skyward — above Okhema, Aquila's light quivered like my restless eyelids. I struggled desperately to keep my eyes open, yet found myself helplessly closing them. The atmosphere in the streets grew intensely somber. Some began weeping, while others prayed frantically to Aquila. I saw a child tugging at their mother's clothing, asking what was happening, but the mother remained speechless — only holding her child closely. Shortly thereafter, the final light vanished — Aquila had closed their eyes completely. A chorus of lamentations echoed through the streets. Just as everyone believed Evernight had descended upon us, a golden light suddenly illuminated the sky above the holy city. It was the Dawn Device. The Chaplain of Dawncloud proclaimed to everyone that this was Kephale's blessing, which would shine upon Okhema forever, never ceasing. Though its brilliance cannot match Aquila's radiance, it at least provides us with a ray of hope. While everyone firmly believes what ███████ proclaimed, I harbor doubts — how could we possibly expect a machine to rival the divine power of a Titan? Of course, I wouldn't dare voice such thoughts publicly... At Parting Hour, I noticed numerous lights throughout the city for the first time as neighbors lit their candles and torches. Everyone fears the approaching darkness, yet those flames are so small — a gentle breeze could extinguish them, as fragile as our hearts. I don't know how long we must endure these conditions. My friend, Astrologist ██████, reports observing unusual celestial phenomena, as if something terrible approaches Aquila. Yet none of us dare speak openly. The priests claim to have received a "prophecy," and if we were caught privately concerning ourselves with ████████, we would surely face... Having written this much, I find myself at a loss for words. I've secured this diary with three separate locks, hoping it remains undiscovered. I pray that when my child reads these words after growing up, the world will have reclaimed its eternal light. I hear commotion outside — with today's tremendous upheaval, many parts of the city have suffered. I still don't know how my youngest sister, who lives farthest away, is faring... May the Titans protect us all.

C: …… 在成为祭司的第七年，我终于得以进入████深处，参与祭祀仪式。但正是这次机会，让我对艾格勒的本质产生了动摇。 我们晖之民一直深信，艾格勒偏爱着我们。毕竟在所有天空眷属中，只有我们能承受最炽烈的阳光。我们将这视作泰坦的青睐，甚至因此轻视其他眷属。但当我走入画壁深处，亲眼目睹了泰坦行事的真相，一切都变得不同了。 画壁中央有一面巨大的镜子，能映照出艾格勒注视大地的百只眼睛。那一天，我看见一群虔诚的信徒正在祈祷，恳求艾格勒保佑他们的收成。但泰坦对此无动于衷，它的目光始终凝视着远方渐起的黑潮。当黑雾逼近时，艾格勒会不由自主地将眼睛转向高处，仿佛在躲避什么可怕的东西。 这一幕让我忽然明白了许多。艾格勒并非出于偏爱才青睐我们这些生活在高处的晖之民，它只是在逃避地面上不断蔓延的黑潮。我们误将泰坦的恐惧当作了恩宠，为此沾沾自喜。更讽刺的是，它对信徒们的祈祷从不在意，那些虔诚的跪拜在它眼中不过是蝼蚁的舞蹈。 我开始注意到更多细节。每当有城邦倾覆，艾格勒便会略微收缩瞳孔，但那不是悲悯，而是在评估黑潮的蔓延速度。它高居云端，永远冷漠地俯瞰众生。就连它创造的光明，也不过是为了照亮自己的视野，好让它能更清楚地观测黑潮的动向。 有天夜里，我又一次站在画壁前。虔诚的信徒们正在歌颂太阳与光明，赞美泰坦的仁慈。但我看到艾格勒的眼中闪过一丝轻蔑。它厌恶这些软弱的生灵，正如它厌恶那些令它恐惧的黑暗。在它的天空中，既无慈悲，也无真理，只有一个永恒的悖论——它既是光明的主宰，却又是最怯懦的逃亡者。 最讽刺的是，当我写下这些文字时，依然能感受到艾格勒的注视。但我知道它不会因为我的亵渎而降下惩罚。在它眼中，我的背叛与信徒的崇拜同样无关紧要。或许正是这种冷漠，才是它最真实的神性。 [后记：此篇手稿被发现于██████的角落，疑似出自████之手。经考证，作者很可能是已叛逃的████大祭司。神悟树庭图书馆内藏有一份抄本，原件下落不明。]
E: ... In my seventh year as a priest, I was finally granted the opportunity to enter the depths of ██████ and partake in the sacred rituals. Yet it was this very opportunity that began to shake my belief in Aquila's true nature. We, the Sunfolk, have always believed that Aquila favors us. After all, of all the Skykin, only we are capable of enduring the harshest sunlight. We saw this as the Titan's special favor, even looking down on the other Kin. But when I ventured deep into the mural and witnessed the true nature of the Titan's actions, everything changed. At the heart of the mural, there stood a vast mirror reflecting Aquila's hundred eyes watching the earth. On that day, I witnessed a group of devout worshipers praying, beseeching Aquila to bless their harvest. Yet the Titan remained indifferent, its gaze always fixed on the distant, creeping black tide. As the black mist approached, Aquila instinctively turned their eyes skyward, as though trying to flee from something terrifying. In that moment, everything became clear. Aquila's favor was not due to an affinity for us, the Sunfolk, but rather their attempt to escape the ever-advancing black tide below. We mistook the Titan's fear for favor, taking pride in what was, in fact, their flight from danger. Even more tragically, they paid no heed to the prayers of the worshipers, viewing their devotions as little more than the dancing of ants. I began to notice other details. Whenever a city-state fell, Aquila's pupils would contract ever so slightly—but not out of sorrow. They were calculating the spread of the black tide. From their lofty perch in the heavens, they coldly observed all things. Even the light they bestowed was merely to illuminate their own path, enabling them to track the advance of the black tide. One night, I stood once more before the mural. The faithful were singing their praises, hailing the sun and light, singing of Aquila's benevolence. But in that instant, I saw a flicker of disdain in Aquila's eyes. They despised these weak, fragile creatures, just as they feared the darkness that loomed below. In their skies, there was neither compassion nor truth — only an eternal paradox. They were the ruler of light, yet the most cowardly of fugitives. The cruelest irony is that, even as I pen these words, I can still feel Aquila's gaze upon me. Yet I know they will not punish me for my blasphemy. To them, my betrayal is no more significant than the worship of their followers. Perhaps it is this very indifference that constitutes their true divinity. Postscript: This manuscript was discovered in a corner of ████████, believed to be the work of ██████. Upon examination, it is highly likely that the author is the High Priest who has since defected. A copy of this manuscript is stored in the library at the Grove of Epiphany, though the original is missing.

E: A luxurious bath prepared to reward the heroes saving the world. However, this is more than just a place for their comfort, for it also serves as the door that leads them to their mission's end...

E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 劫夺建木而生的肉体未能长存不坏，那么何处才能寻得下一个希望呢？她怅然退去，如花般剥落遗恨。
E: The flesh born from pillaging the Ambrosial Arbor has not been able to last, so where shall one locate the next bit of hope? She withdrew, her dejection as evident as a fallen petal.

C: 铁卫禁区正在组织高强度的军事演练。作为临时教官，你必须通过完成一系列挑战来证明实力，提高名望。
E: A high-intensity military drill is being organized in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone. As their temporary drillmaster, you have to complete a series of challenges to prove your strength and raise your reputation.

C: 极地探险家玲可似乎正在收集贝洛伯格古代钱币——她准备了许多「有趣」的东西作为交换。
E: The extreme explorer, Lynx, seems to be collecting ancient Belobog coins. She has prepared many "interesting" things for exchange.

C: 极致时速，无懈防护；\n梦境优享，至尊服务。\n——匹诺康尼车行，您永远的最佳选择。
E: Ultimate speed, flawless protection.\nDreamscape pleasure, top-class service.\n — Penacony Car Dealer, always your best choice.

C: 开设于折纸树林的学堂，折纸小鸟的聚集地之一。
E: A classroom that's founded in Paperfold Woods. A place where Origami Birds gather.

C: 阿格莱雅外派的衣匠，驻于永夜中的悬锋城。
E: A Garmentmaker sent out by Aglaea. It resides in Castrum Kremnos during nighttime.

C: 某位贤人的塑像，名姓已不可考，但事迹犹记载于卷上。
E: The statue of some sage. Their names are now long lost, but their deeds are still recorded in books.

C: 自远古时期便在翁法罗斯存在的自然生物，由裂分之枝，瑟希斯为其赋予活性。从未被任何城邦驯服过，性情暴烈不羁，泰坦的赐福同时也成为了致命的武器。
E: A natural creature from the ancient Amphoreus era, brought to life by Cerces, the Bough of Rift. Untamed by any city, they are feral and unruly. As it turns out, the blessings of the Titans have transformed into a lethal weapon.

C: 神奇扑满在哪里？不如去歌德宾馆，问问神奇的雷金自制感应仪！
E: Where is the Mystery Trotter? Why not consult Regin's homemade sensor at the Goethe Hotel!

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血，蕴藏掠夺而来的「理性」。被制造出来的意义并非是研究普遍的知识，而是钻研杀戮的兵法与弱肉强食的残酷理论，散布假名为哲学的疯病。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They contain plundered "rationality" within their vessels. The reason behind their creation is not truly toward the study of universal knowledge, but to delve deep into brutal martial tactics and the merciless laws of survival, further spreading madness masquerading as philosophy.

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血。信仰如飞箭矢志不移，为泰坦造主的悬锋与凶矛寻取猎物，猎杀荒原中的奇兽与战场上的敌兵，射程之内无活物得以幸免。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. With faith as steadfast as flying arrows, they are the means to find prey for Kremnos' forces, hunting down beasts and foes across the wastes, and ensuring none survive within firing range.

C: 每个轮开始时，对敌方全体施加【记忆印记】，敌方目标每有1个其他负面效果，则额外叠加1层【记忆印记】，每层使目标防御力降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，最多叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>层，该效果持续到下个轮开始。
E: Apply Memory Imprint to all enemies at the beginning of each Cycle. For each other debuff currently on the enemy, apply 1 extra stack of Memory Imprint to that enemy. Each stack reduces the target's DEF by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> for a maximum of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> stacks. This effect lasts until the start of the next Cycle.

C: 我方相同目标连续行动时，获得1层【记忆印记】。【记忆印记】的持有者施放攻击后，每层【记忆印记】有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>固定概率使目标陷入【离神】 状态，持续1回合。拥有【记忆印记】的目标造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>，该效果不可以叠加。在行动者改变后，移除场上所有【记忆印记】。\n【离神】：被视为冻结状态，期间无法行动，当该状态解除时，目标受到等同于生命上限<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>的冰属性附加伤害。
E: When the same ally acts consecutively, they receive 1 stack of Memory Imprint. When allies with Memory Imprint attack, every Memory Imprint stack has a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> fixed chance to inflict the target with Dissociation that lasts for 1 turn. Allies with Memory Imprint deal <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> more DMG. This effect cannot be stacked. When a different ally acts, remove all Memory Imprint stacks on the field.\nDissociation: This state is considered as the Freeze state. Affected units cannot take action. When this state is removed, the affected target receives Ice Additional DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of their respective Max HP.

E: Increases the Weakness Break Efficiency of all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 本局游戏中，我方目标及武器每造成过一种属性伤害，使所有我方目标及武器造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>。
E: During this game, for each different DMG Type dealt by ally targets and weapons, increases DMG dealt by all ally targets and weapons by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>.

E: When enemy units with <color=#f29e38ff>"Steadfast Safeguard"</color> have their <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color>, dispels all control debuffs, recovers Skill Points, and activates Ultimates for all allies.\nAll enemies take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> more DoT. Increases Skill DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

E: When using Skill or Ultimate on one ally target, increases the ability target's CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s). This effect can stack up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> time(s).

E: I don't wanna spoil it

E: Remember to switch accounts

E: When can we chat again?

C: 狐斋志异
E: A Foxian Tale of the Haunted

C: 希露瓦的「机械热潮」演出现场场场爆满、非常火热。不过粉丝也在议论纷纷——这乐队成员更迭不停，最初的「机械热潮」现如今只剩下了希露瓦，也许换一个别的乐队名可能更合适？希露瓦对你的想法很感兴趣——
E: Serval's "Mechanical Fever" has been playing to a full house and is extremely popular. But there's chatter among fans — the members of the band have been constantly changing, with only Serval left from the original band. Maybe a name change will be more appropriate? Serval is very interested in your thoughts...

C: 自诩上网冲浪达人的小桂子有些消沉，她遇到了创作瓶颈，好巧不巧，网上的黑粉也不断扭曲事实，用难以自辩的谣言不停攻击她…人红是非多，这似乎是互联网生活中避无可避的一环，也许你应该帮帮小桂子——
E: The self-proclaimed web-surfing master Little Gui is a little depressed. She's experiencing a creative block. And unfortunately, the haters on the net are twisting the truth, attacking her with scathing rumors... With fame comes hate, this is unavoidable if you live on the net... Maybe it's time to lend a hand to Little Gui...

C: 还被摔得七荤八素的。
E: You've gotten thrown around a lot.

C: 共同的经历赋予了你们无声的默契。
E: Your shared experiences have gifted you both a silent bond.

C: 但是收留他到月底还是不行的。
E: But it's still not all right to let him stay till the end of the month.

C: 己所不欲勿施于人，她好痛苦。
E: Do unto others as you would have them do unto you — she's conflicted.

C: 青雀不再细问，太卜对你的临场发挥感到满意。
E: Qingque does not pursue the subject, and the Master Diviner is pleased with your spontaneity.

C: 该男子希望你不要只是*动动嘴皮*。
E: The man hopes you aren't just *moving your mouth*.

C: 罗刹露出了苦笑。
E: Luocha smiles bitterly.

C: 尝试着憋笑试试看。
E: Try stifling a laugh and see what happens.

C: 回想医学知识。
E: Recall your medical knowledge.

C: 将军悻悻而归。
E: The General returns, upset.

C: 装着罗刹的仇人。
E: It's Luocha's nemesis.

C: 他们对你崇拜得五体投地。
E: They worship at your feet and praise your name.

C: 忍不住称赞「希世难得号」。
E: Can't help but marvel at the One and Only.

C: 购买后获得增益效果：获得开拓券时，额外获得<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1%</unbreak></color>，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2</unbreak></color>回合。
E: Gain the following buff after purchase: When obtaining Trailblaze Funds, receive an extra <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2</unbreak></color> turn(s).

C: 太阳薄饼
E: Suncake

C: 音乐小组
E: Music Squad

C: <color=#f29e38ff>寒鸦</color>改编了云上五骁的剧本，<color=#f29e38ff>雪衣</color>搭好了苍城仙舟的布景，邀请了天才剑客<color=#f29e38ff>彦卿</color>扮演剑首镜流…真是精彩啊精彩！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Hanya</color> adapted the High-Cloud Quintet script, <color=#f29e38ff>Xueyi</color> built the stage modeled after the Xianzhou Cangcheng, and they invited the genius swordmaster <color=#f29e38ff>Yanqing</color> to play the role of Jingliu, the Sword Champion... How outstanding!

C: 最适合为旅行做计划的人是谁？
E: Who is the best person to plan for a trip?

C: 最适合为旅行开支做整理的人是谁？
E: Who is the best person to be in charge of the travel expenses?

C: 空花阳焰
E: Hollowflower Blaze

C: 以旧世界遗留的科技拼凑制造的自动机器单元，负责替代人类进行最基础的体力劳动。\n战斗中，自动机兵「蜘蛛」的动力非常不稳定，极易在损毁时发生殉爆事故。
E: An automaton pieced together with Old World technology, tasked with replacing humans in performing the most basic forms of physical labor.\nIn combat, Automaton Spiders are highly unstable, capable of exploding when damaged.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为以旧世界遗留的科技拼凑制造的自动机器单元，加装了厚重的铠甲，用于冲锋陷阵保护银鬃铁卫。\n战斗中，自动机兵「灰熊」（完整）会发出信号召来「蜘蛛」合作战斗，同时会积蓄动能发出强力一击。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is an automaton pieced together with Old World technology. It's been reinforced with durable armor so that it could charge into battle and offer protection for the Silvermane Guards.\nIn combat, Automaton Grizzly (Complete) will send out a signal to summon Automaton Spiders, and at the same time unleash powerful charged attacks.

C: 以古老机巧术铸造的镇守金人。\n无数岁月前，金人随着仙舟出航求取仙方，监管和辅助人类进行战争——但历尽叛乱后，金人最终为仙舟人所降服。\n而今所有的金人都被符箓严格宰制，用以把守机要重地。
E: Garrison aurumaton created with ancient ingenium technology.\nCountless years ago, the aurumatons set sail with the Xianzhou to seek divine recipes of immortality, and were tasked with overseeing humanity and aiding humankind during warfare. However, after countless rebellions, they were finally overpowered by the Xianzhou natives.\nNow, all aurumatons are strictly controlled with talismans and are employed to guard important places.

C: 代码受到影响后的错误投影。参照本体为高如山岩的苍猿，破坏力惊人。\n在「建木」上一次伫立时，仙舟人曾以奇术繁育众多异兽珍禽。长右即为伴随军阵行进的战兽之一。
E: A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is an ape as tall as mountainous boulders with terrifying might.\nWhen the Ambrosial Arbor still stood, the Xianzhou people bred many fantastic creatures with their esoteric techniques. Malefic Apes were one of the war beasts that walked alongside the army.

C: 心兽之爪，决天维，裂地纪。
E: Claw of the Inner Beast, shredder of heavenly planes, sunderer of earthly latitudes.

C: 「枪」的雕塑；萦绕着纯美灵魂，枪与盾相依，枪是击破黯淡的勇气。
E: A statue of "The Spear." Encircling the Soul of the Beauty, the Spear and Shield are interdependent, and the Spear stands for the courage to pierce through the darkness.

C: 「纷争」的泰坦，在疯狂中延续疯狂的战争，乃是翁法罗斯众邦挥之不去的恐惧。\n它也曾身负荣耀的威名，令众邦众神心怀敬意。而那敬畏它的城邦被踏碎，那赞颂它的诗篇被焚毁，只有恶名回荡在无光的末世，玷污全世之座背负的光辉。
E: The Titan of Strife continues the mad war in their frenzy, becoming the unconquerable fear of the masses of Amphoreus.\nThey once were famed through glory, earning respect from gods and from the people of the land. And yet, the city that revered them was sundered, and the poems that praised their name were destroyed. Only their evil reputation lingers in this lightless era and end times, tainting the Throne of Worlds' brilliance.

C: 游荡在裂界中的晶体元素，只有最简单的智能，其形态犹如气流缠绕，驰翔疾风的鸟类生命。
E: Crystallized elements with only the simplest intelligence. It drifts in the Fragmentum in the form of a bird engulfed in twisting winds, raging on like a tornado.

C: 迷失在群星中的跨维度生物，性温，味甘，不可食用。一生中大部分时间花在进食和逃跑上。偶遇它的旅行者视之为吉兆。
E: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

C: 迷失在群星中的跨维度生物，性温，味甘，不可食用。一生中大部分时间花在进食和逃跑上。偶遇它的旅行者视之为吉兆。
E: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

C: 不属此世的怪异生命，自星核带来的裂界中成长，寄生在世界的根基结构中汲取能量，其甲胄外壳上燃烧着星辰内核的烈焰。\n在战斗中，外宇宙之炎能轻易将敌人焚作灰烬。
E: Born of the Fragmentum and created by the Stellaron, this alien life form feeds on this world's energy. The blazing fires from the core of a star burn on its armor.\nIn combat, the Blaze Out of Space will incinerate anything it touches.

C: 无尽寒冬之槊
E: Lance of the Eternal Freeze

C: 金人司阍（错误）
E: Aurumaton Gatekeeper (Bug)

C: 蕉研组的筑梦蕉师
E: Banacademic Office's Dreamweaver BananAdvisor

C: 「同音共律的来日」
E: "Tomorrow in Harmonious Chords"

E: Furiae Archer

E: Furiae Troupe

E: Sequence Trotter

E: Trotter of Abundance
