E: Abundance Lotus

C: 召唤2个【冰锋】。
E: Summons 2 Ice Edges.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to a single target.

C: 对我方全体造成冰属性伤害。
E: Deals Ice DMG to all targets.

C: 对我方全体造成火属性伤害，使陷入灼烧状态的我方目标发生爆炸同时对自身及相邻目标造成火属性伤害，同时解除该目标的灼烧状态。
E: Deals Fire DMG to all targets. Burned target will explode, subsequently dealing Fire DMG to the Burned target and units adjacent to the target. The Burn status will be removed afterward.

C: 使我方多名目标进入【心理暗示】状态，并在行动序列上添加【揭晓】，下次【揭晓】行动时陷入【心理暗示】的角色陷入【支配】状态。
E: Applies Psychological Suggestion to multiple targets, and adds Revelation onto the Action Order. The next time Revelation takes action, any targets with Psychological Suggestion will become Dominated.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成雷属性伤害，如主目标处于触电状态，则会使副目标也陷入触电状态。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to a single target and units adjacent to the target. If the primary target is Shocked, inflicts Shock on the secondary units as well.

C: 对我方全体造成雷属性伤害。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to all targets.

C: 对我方全体造成大量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals massive Ice DMG to all targets.

C: 对指定我方单体造成冰属性伤害，同时有大概率使受到攻击的目标陷入冻结状态。
E: Deals Ice DMG to a single target, with a high chance to Freeze the target.

C: 场上有我方目标陷入【强烈震荡】状态时，锁定该目标，下次行动对其施放【天坠】。
E: When there are targets afflicted with Strong Reverberation on the field, lock on to those targets and during the next action, use Heaven's Fall on them.

C: 对指定我方单体造成雷属性伤害。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to a single target.

C: 召唤建木枝梢【嘉实之杪】。
E: Summons Ambrosial Arbor branch "Twig of Lavish Fruits."

C: 对我方全体造成少量风属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Wind DMG to all targets.

C: 当敌方施放攻击后，为<u>能够进入【月狂】状态的敌方单位</u>附加1层【<u>嗜血</u>】，当【<u>嗜血</u>】达到指定层时，将使其进入【<u>月狂</u>】状态。\n行动序列上出现【月狂】倒计时，倒计时回合开始时所有敌方单位解除【<u>月狂</u>】状态。
E: After a friendly unit launches an attack, apply 1 stack of "<u>Bloodlust</u>" to <u>friendly units who can enter the "Moon Rage" state</u>. When "<u>Bloodlust</u>" reaches a certain number of stacks, the friendly unit enters the "<u>Moon Rage</u>" state.\nA "Moon Rage" countdown icon appears in the Action Order. When the countdown's turn begins, "<u>Moon Rage</u>" is dispelled across all friendly units.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量物理属性伤害，有概率使受到攻击的我方目标效果抵抗降低。
E: Deals minor Physical DMG to a single target, with a chance to reduce the target's Effect RES.

C: 使我方战技点减少。只能在【狂乱】状态下使用。
E: Reduces Skill Points for targets. This ability can only be used while under the "Rabid" state.

C: 对我方单体造成火属性伤害。
E: Deals Fire DMG to a single target.

C: 对我方全体造成大量火属性伤害。
E: Deals massive Fire DMG to all targets.

C: 锁定一个目标，进入蓄力状态，下次行动施放【笼中传福音】。蓄力期间如果受到其他单位攻击，将会同时锁定发动攻击的我方单位。蓄力期间当自身的弱点被击破时，使其行动延后。
E: Locks onto one target and enters the Charging state. In the next action, uses "Desmios Evangelion." During the Charging state, if this unit is attacked by another target, it will also lock onto the attacking target. Delays the unit's action when they are Weakness Broken during the Charging state.

C: 永眠墓碣不会进行行动。
E: Sombrous Sepulcher will not take action.

C: 处于【迟到的死讯】状态下，【生者不应逃离】强化为【死者不应躲避】。
E: While in the "Overdue Obituary" state, "The Living Shan't Flee" enhances to "The Dead Shan't Avoid."

C: 吸收【天谴斗士】，随后对我方全体造成大量虚数属性伤害并施加【易伤】效果，伤害和【易伤】效果由目标<u>平均分摊</u>，吸收的【天谴斗士】数量越多，造成的伤害越高。
E: Absorbs "Furiae Warrior," then deals massive Imaginary DMG to all ally targets and inflicts "Vulnerability." The DMG and Vulnerability states are <u>distributed evenly</u> among the targets. The more "Furiae Warriors" absorbed, the higher the DMG dealt.

C: 拥有一定层数的【战甲】，使自身受到的伤害降低。受到攻击后减少自身1层【战甲】，减少到0层时，【战甲】被破坏，对自身造成大量虚数属性伤害，并使自身行动延后，使破坏【战甲】的我方单位恢复能量。【战甲】被破坏后，自身受到攻击时额外再受到少量虚数属性伤害。【战甲】在自身回合结束时恢复到最大层数。
E: Possesses a number of "War Armor" stacks, which decreases DMG taken. Loses 1 stack of "War Armor" on this unit after being attacked. When at 0 stacks, "War Armor" will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit and delaying their action. The target that destroyed "War Armor" will regenerate Energy. After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

C: 使【哀悯长臂】得到强化，并使其行动提前，持续3回合。
E: Causes "The Long Arms of Sorrow" to be enhanced and advances its action, lasting for 3 turns.

C: 对指定我方单体及相邻目标造成量子属性伤害。
E: Deals Quantum DMG to one designated target and adjacent targets.

C: 使自身进入<u>【厄堕】</u>状态，下一次行动会施放【浑流奔涌】。
E: This unit enters the "<u>Ominous Degeneration</u>" state. Uses "Torrential Surge" in the next action.

C: 令自身和指定我方角色及该角色召唤的目标进入<u>【决斗】</u>状态。并在3回合后施放【破心灭道】。优先选择增益效果数量最多的目标。
E: Causes this unit, a designated target character, and the target character's summon to enter the <u>"Duel"</u> state. Uses "Spirit Breaker" after 3 turns, prioritizing the target with the most number of buffs.

C: 消耗所有<u>【灾难之力】</u>对我方全体造成数次少量物理属性伤害，消耗的【灾难之力】层数越多，伤害的段数越多，随后对我方全体造成少量物理属性伤害。
E: Consumes all <u>"Calamity Power"</u> and deals several instances of minor Physical DMG hits to all targets, where the more consumed "Calamity Power" stacks, the higher the instances of DMG. Then, deals minor Physical DMG to all targets.

C: 使【残破容器】进入【共祭】状态，在数次行动内施放【幽冥的悼念】。
E: Causes "Long-Shattered Vessel" to enter the "Mutual Sacrifice" state. Uses "Underworld's Grief" in a certain number of turns.

C: 连续对我方随机单体目标造成少量量子属性伤害。
E: Deals successive minor Quantum DMG to random single targets.

C: 当前处于【论证形态】，场上会不断生成【黑潮造物】。同时在行动序列上生成【CALL _毁灭论证法】，每次【CALL _毁灭论证法】行动时，使下次赞达尔施放的【求解：第一因之果】获得强化。敌方目标被消灭、我方角色陷入无法战斗状态或忆灵消失累计达到一定数量后，赞达尔施放【求解：第一因之果】。
E: Currently in the "Disputation Mode." "Black Tide Creatures" will continuously appear on the field. "CALL _DESTRUCTION_THEOREM" will also be generated in the Action Order. Each time "CALL _DESTRUCTION_THEOREM" takes action, it enhances Zandar's next "Query: Prime Mover's Outcome." Zandar will use "Query: Prime Mover's Outcome" after a certain accumulation of friendly units being eliminated, target characters being knocked down, or memosprite disappearances is reached.

C: 进入蓄力状态并获得【旋绕】，下次行动时若仍有【旋绕】，则施放【罪血涡旋】。
E: Enters the Charging state and gains "Whirl." If "Whirl" still persist during the next action, uses "Hemotort Vortex."

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量伤害，并有概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入虚弱状态。
E: Deals minor DMG to a single target, with a chance to Weaken them.

C: 敌方或我方目标被消灭时，使自身立即行动。
E: Gains an immediate action when a target or a friendly unit is defeated.

C: 对我方全体造成火属性伤害并大概率使我方全体陷入【焚烧】状态，吸收的【焚烧】状态越多，本次攻击造成的伤害越高。
E: Deals Fire DMG to all targets and has a high chance to inflict Enkindle to all targets. The more Enkindle absorbed, the more DMG this attack will deal.

C: 锁定我方全体，【玄莲】下次行动施放【万劫不复】。
E: Locks onto all targets. All lotuses' will use Eternal Condemnation in the next action.

C: 受到致命攻击时，对敌方全体造成量子属性伤害，并使受到攻击的敌方目标受到的伤害提高。
E: When receiving a killing blow, deals Quantum DMG to all friendly units and increases their DMG taken.

C: 解除场上所有真蛰虫群的控制类负面状态与弱点击破状态，并对我方目标造成风属性伤害，使我方目标每次受到攻击时大概率陷入1层风化状态。
E: Dispels all Crowd Control debuffs and Weakness Breaks affecting True Stings on the field. Deals Wind DMG to the target, and causes the target to have a high chance of being inflicted with 1 stack of Wind Shear every time they get attacked.

C: 繁殖真蛰虫群。
E: Spawns True Stings.

C: 夺取所有【基层员工•外勤】和【基层员工•安保】的【绩效点】。
E: Seizes all Performance Points from Grunt: Field Personnel and Grunt: Security Personnel.

C: 夺取所有【基层员工•外勤】和【基层员工•安保】的【绩效点】。
E: Seizes all Performance Points from all Grunt: Field Personnel and Grunt: Security Personnel.

C: 对输掉赌局的我方单体造成虚数属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方单体陷入禁锢状态。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to a target that lost the Gamble, with a high chance of inflicting Imprisonment on the attacked target.

E: From Dawn to Skyveil

C: 城邦守护者
E: Polis Protector

E: Fury Falls, and All Bows to Strife

E: Detonation Order

E: Phew... Escaped

E: Lightning Condemnation

E: Tranquil Ban

C: 归元
E: Moksha

C: 开牌下注
E: Betting the Flop

C: 盲注
E: Blind Bet

C: 推进<color=#f29e38ff>翁法罗斯</color>剧情以解锁命途
E: Progress the <color=#f29e38ff>Amphoreus</color> Storyline to Unlock this Path

C: 综合区-内
E: General Hall — Interior

C: 展品所在展区的「吸引人流」指标需求减少5%
E: Reduces the Visitor Appeal parameter of the exhibition area where the exhibit is located by 5%

C: 节奏嘻哈
E: Hip Hop Rhythms

E: Silvermane Lieutenant

E: Howling Casket

E: Stellaron Hunter: Sam

E: Firefly

E: Fu Xuan With Hand on Hip

C: 士兵
E: Soldier

C: 匹克
E: Peak

C: 星神精英
E: Elite Aeon

C: 斯科特

E: Fulin

E: Cloda

E: Silver

E: Eacus

E: "The Unviewable"

C: 阿佑
E: Wright

C: 迎宾员
E: Usher

E: Lv. 2 Implement Researcher

E: Food Journalist

C: 域外行商
E: Outworld Traveling Merchant

C: 愚者之箱
E: The Fool's Box

C: 丹轮寺 - 均衡
E: Claretwheel Temple: Equilibrium

C: 试试手气
E: Try Your Luck

C: 收徒
E: Apprenticeship open

C: 成千上百个系统时都耗在了这梦境里，真是有命赚，没命花！
E: I've spent countless hours on the Dreamscape, earning enough money but not having time to spend it!

C: 与班尼聊聊，填补他缺失的情绪
E: Speak with Benny and restore his missing emotions

C: 探索克劳克影视乐园的哈努兄弟主题区
E: Explore the Brother Hanu section in Clock Studios Theme Park

C: 与影城入口的「钟表小子」交谈，揭示其真实身份
E: Talk with the "Clockie" at the entrance to the theme park and expose their true identity

C: 星穹列车
E: Astral Express

C: 黑天鹅压制住「死亡」，并为你和流萤打开通往现实世界的传送门，催促你们尽快离开此地。
E: Black Swan subdued "Death" and created a portal to reality for you and Firefly, urging you both to leave this place quickly.

C: 知更鸟以令咒下令，代表匹诺康尼归还「阿斯娜」的名字，归还她身为英灵的证明，归还她身为人的自由。
E: By the Command Spell, Robin gave the order on behalf of Penacony: return the name "Asna," return her claim as a Heroic Spirit, and restore her freedom as a human being.

C: 在激战中，砂金令Archer寻找敌人的位置并发动攻击。一矢既出，葛瑞迪的摄像机被Archer摧毁。
E: Amid the clash of battle, Aventurine commanded Archer to locate the enemy and strike. With a single shot, Archer destroyed Grady's camera.

C: 丹恒怒不可遏，将手中长枪「击云」掷出。龙师涛然应声惨叫，被长枪钉立在身后石壁之上。
E: Enraged beyond restraint, Dan Heng hurled his spear "Cloud-Piercer" with all his might. Preceptor Taoran screamed in pain as the spear pinned him firmly against the stone wall behind.

C: 星核猎手<color=#f29e38ff>银狼</color>使用「以太编辑」将怪物传送走。银狼提议前往空间站「奇物」房间，在那里可以获知<color=#f29e38ff>「星核」</color>所处位置。
E: The Stellaron Hunter <color=#f29e38ff>Silver Wolf</color> transported the monsters away via aether editing. She suggested heading toward the space station's Curio room, where the location of the <color=#f29e38ff>Stellaron</color> can be found out.

C: 你们在孤儿院前的杂物箱中翻找，然而一无所获。一个裂界怪物突然出现在你们身后，你与希儿、布洛妮娅集合迎战。
E: You rummaged through the junk piles out front, but found nothing. Then, without warning, a Fragmentum monster lunged from behind. You, Seele, and Bronya braced for battle.

C: 符玄与景元研判星核危机，揭露「药王秘传」欲借建木复苏作乱。景元坦言早知星核所在却按兵不动，欲诱敌深入，一网打尽。
E: Fu Xuan and Jing Yuan analyzed the Stellaron crisis, exposing the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus's plot to exploit the Arbor's resurgence. Jing Yuan admitted to knowing prior knowledge of the Stellaron's location but withheld action to lure the adversary into a trap.

C: 波提欧入座，发现芮克先生正在身边，与其讨论群像演员的「人生」。知更鸟做好包容不协和音的准备，要带来属于流梦礁的自由之声。
E: Boothill took a seat and found Mr. Reca beside him, discussing the "life" of ensemble actors. Robin prepared to embrace the dissonant notes, ready to bring the voice of freedom from Dreamflux Reef.

C: 你与昔涟重逢，得知她与天才们的计划。来古士的化身被破坏的瞬间，就是植入「记忆」的时机。昔涟请你与她携手，完成最后一步，并满足她小小的任性。
E: When you reunited with Cyrene, she shared the plan she and the Geniuses had prepared. The moment Lygus's incarnation was destroyed would be the perfect opportunity to implant Remembrance. Cyrene asked you to stand with her, take the final step together, and satisfy her little wish for indulgence.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>螺丝咕姆</color>造访空间站，他为赴与黑塔的约定而来。螺丝咕姆好奇你与星核共生的感受，并在艾丝妲的带领下前往黑塔办公室。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Screwllum</color> visited the space station for his scheduled meeting with Herta. Curious about your experience of coexisting with the Stellaron, he followed Asta to Herta's office.

C: 在刃的要求下，镜流决定再次赐他短暂的死亡。
E: At Blade's request, Jingliu decided to grant him another brief death.

C: 三月七的拍照声引起了神秘狐人们的注意。对方显露出「步离人」的真面目，向三月七等人发起攻击。
E: March 7th's camera shutter sound caught the attention of the mysterious foxians. They revealed their true identity as borisin and launched an attack.

C: 你完成任务后，卡芙卡问出了第二个问题：你还想再见到她吗？
E: After you completed the mission, Kafka asked her second question: Do you want to see her again?

C: 你们遇到一个拦路的机器人。希儿称她对于应付这种型号的对手有经验，与你一起发起进攻。
E: You encountered a robot blocking the way. Seele mentioned she had experience dealing with opponents of this model and attacked alongside you.

C: 布洛妮娅与可可利亚的残影再次出现，她们之间交谈的声音变得更清晰。丹恒有预感，你们离北方的雪原已经很近了。
E: The afterimages of Bronya and Cocolia appeared again, and their voices grew clearer. Dan Heng had a feeling you were nearing the Snow Plains.

C: 你们来到「不夜侯」，将一盒茶种送给梦茗。梦茗呈上回礼，那是以停云之名命名的茶饮「遏云歌」。
E: You arrived at the Sleepless Earl and gave a box of tea to Mengming. Mengming gave a return gift, a tea named after Tingyun, "Tingyun's Blend."

C: 黄泉称这是她的房间。砂金以为你与她已有联系，先行离开。黄泉自称是一位<color=#f29e38ff>巡海游侠</color>，因迷路而找不到自己的房间，拜托你为他指路。
E: Acheron claimed that was her room, and Aventurine believed that you have a connection to her, so he left first. Acheron said she was a <color=#f29e38ff>Galaxy Ranger</color>, and found herself lost. As she was unable to find her own room, she asked you to guide her.

C: 少女感谢你出手相助，介绍自己为鸢尾花家系的艺者<color=#f29e38ff>流萤</color>。流萤提议由她担任向导，带你体验匹诺康尼当地的有趣事物。
E: The girl thanked you for your help and introduced herself as <color=#f29e38ff>Firefly</color>, an artist of the Iris Family. She suggested that she could be your guide and let you experience all the interesting things to do at Penacony.

C: 在游览路上，流萤向你介绍「奥帝购物中心」。只要财力足够，你可以在此买到任何你想要的东西，还能通过额外服务「带回」现实。
E: During the tour, Firefly introduced you to Oti Mall. If you got enough money, you can buy anything you want there, and you can even "bring it back" to reality through an additional service.

C: 黄泉、瓦尔特与列车组会合。瓦尔特称黄泉并非凶手，需要让砂金给出对指控的解释。砂金的声音自广播传来，邀请众人前往影视乐园。
E: Acheron, Welt, and the Crew regrouped. Welt said that Acheron was not the killer and that Aventurine needed to explain the accusations. Aventurine's voice came through the broadcast, inviting everyone to the Clock Studios Theme Park.

C: 引导员向你揭示神秘红发记录保持者的身份，并为你介绍下一关「枪火时间」的挑战事项。
E: The guide revealed the identity of the mysterious red-haired record holder and briefed you on the next stage: the "Gunfire Time" challenge.

C: 售票处站满人偶，你们有所警觉，察觉剧院异常愈发明显。
E: The ticketing area is full of mannequins. Your party grew alarmed and became ever more aware of the abnormalities in the theater.

C: 你在准备休息时遇到流萤，你和她边走边聊起近日经历。
E: You encountered Firefly as you were about to rest. As you walked with her, you two chatted about your recent experiences.

C: 托帕报告公司找到<unbreak>329</unbreak>个假娃娃，特种小组无果而终，只能依靠列车组。
E: Topaz reported that the IPC found <unbreak>329</unbreak> fake dolls. The special task force did not find the target and could only rely on the Express Crew.

C: 波提欧发现自己身处睡蕉社的活动场地，一位高级社员正在宣讲。波提欧对此毫无兴趣，对三月七说，他去别处逛逛。
E: Boothill found himself at the Slumbernana Association's event venue, where a senior member was giving a presentation. Having zero interest in this, he told March 7th he'd go explore somewhere else.

C: 你靠近奇怪的猴子，不受控制地随其唱起「蕉蕉」的歌谣。更多猴子闻声而来，正当你将要沉溺其中时，一位忍者打破这场诡异的合唱。
E: You approached the strange monkey and uncontrollably joined in singing its "banana" song. More monkeys came at the sound, and just as you were about to be overwhelmed, a ninja interrupted this eerie chorus.

C: 你讲述方才的怪梦，并在附近看到同样的猴子。三月七介绍，这是现在大学里最流行的「睡蕉小猴」，并拉你加入「校友群」。
E: You described your strange dream and saw the same monkeys nearby. March 7th introduced them as the popular Slumbernana Monkey on campus and invited you to join the campus group chat.

C: 波提欧遇到三月七与蒙塔娜，发现蒙塔娜已经恢复正常。波提欧提议带她们去个好地方，邀其加入派对。
E: Boothill ran into March 7th and Montana, finding that Montana had returned to normal. Boothill suggested taking them to a nice place and invited them to join the party.

C: 大地兽发出满意的叫声，你趁机摸了摸它的庞大身躯。你邀请遐蝶也来摸摸看，但她温柔地拒绝了。
E: The dromas let out a satisfied sound, and you reached out to pet its huge body. You asked Castorice to join you in petting it, but she kindly refused.

C: 由罪犯建造的外城悬桥坍塌损坏，拦住你们的去路。你自告奋勇使用欧洛尼斯祷言修复悬桥。
E: The bridge to the outer city, which criminals had built, was broken and blocked your way. You offered to use Oronyx's Prayer to fix it.

C: 遐蝶向你展示她为缇安缝制的礼物。缇安梦到母亲但看不清样貌，迷迷表示可以帮上忙，但是需要大家在旅途中留心收集回忆。
E: Castorice showed you the gift she had sewn for Trianne. Later, Trianne dreamt of her mother, though her face still remained a blur. Mem offered to help, but needed everyone to keep an eye out for collecting memories along the way.

C: 遐蝶登门拜访，希望没有打扰到你休息。出于私人的心愿，遐蝶请你陪她去取一样东西。
E: Castorice dropped by to visit you, apologizing if she disturbed your rest. She asked you to accompany her to retrieve something.

C: 缇宝带风堇选址，计划在奥赫玛重建「昏光庭院」，并谈论天空之民的历史。克莱门汀带来紧急消息，称阿格莱雅在云石天宫遭遇不测。
E: Tribbie brought Hyacine around Okhema to choose a site to rebuild the Twilight Courtyard. They talked about the history of the Skyfolk. Clementine arrived with urgent news, and said that Aglaea had met with an accident in the Marmoreal Palace.

C: 经由法吉娜秘术创造、只能通过一人的灵水之门，风堇来到创世涡心。祭仪水盆旁，缇宝正与赛飞儿交谈。
E: Only one could pass through the gate of spirit water, which was created with one of Phagousa's secret techniques. Hyacine arrived in the Vortex of Genesis and found Tribbie talking to Cipher near the basin.

C: 昔涟留下的仪式剑将白厄送回时间的起点。待白厄从岁月的浪潮中挣扎站起，已是光历<unbreak>3870</unbreak>年。<color=#f29e38ff>第1次永劫回归开启</color>。
E: The ceremonial blade left by Cyrene sent Phainon back to the beginning of time. When he stumbled back to his feet from the currents of time, the year was Light Calendar <unbreak>3870</unbreak>. <color=#f29e38ff>Thus began the 1st Eternal Recurrence.</color>

C: 白厄收回「纷争」的火种，这已是他身负的第十万八千六百四十二枚「纷争」火种。
E: Phainon reclaimed the Coreflame of Strife. This was already the <unbreak>108,642</unbreak>nd Coreflame of Strife he carried.

C: 以五百名英雄的鲜血为祭品，刻律德菈完成「律法」试炼。来古士请你继续下潜，直至深渊尽头。
E: With the blood of five hundred heroes, Cerydra completed the Trial of Law. Lygus urged you to keep diving until you reached the abyss's end.

C: 丹恒进入客房车厢，听到姬子与黑天鹅在讨论翁法罗斯的忆域环境。丹恒一直没有听到三月七的声音，决定进入房间去看看她的情况。
E: Dan Heng stepped into the Passenger Cabin and overheard Himeko and Black Swan discussing the Memory Zone of Amphoreus. With no sign of March 7th's voice, Dan Heng chose to check on her himself.

C: 黑天鹅展示第四面镜，正是它帮助丹恒完成「精神折跃」。通过破解关押于镜中忆者们的记忆，黑天鹅得知流光忆庭在翁法罗斯的目的。
E: Black Swan revealed the Fourth Mirror, the very one that had helped Dan Heng complete the spirit warp jump. By decoding the memories of the Memokeepers imprisoned within it, Black Swan learned the Garden of Recollection's purpose in Amphoreus.

C: 你拨通前台电话，听到三月七的熟悉声音。从远处传来迷迷的呼唤，提醒你那不是她，别被迷惑。
E: You called the hotel reception and heard March 7th's familiar voice. From the distance, Mem's call reminded you that it was not truly her and warned you not to be misled.

C: 丹恒认为，长夜月身上名为「忘却」的力量与令使无异。而在涤去一切的忆质浪潮中，是遐蝶保护着你的灵魂免受侵蚀。
E: Dan Heng believed that the power of "Oblivion" within Evernight was no different from an Emanator's. And in the waves of memoria that washed everything away, it was Castorice who protected your soul from corrosion.

C: 你取得「负世」的绝望，幼年白厄的身影在远方出现。「空白的造像」终获自由，让他和你们一起，笑着走向结局吧。
E: You obtained the Despair of Worldbearing, and young Phainon's figure appeared in the distance. The Blank Statue was finally free. Let him walk towards the end by your side with a wide smile.

C: 你们在主控舱段见到温世玲。温世玲称阿德勒先前总在念叨着「香味」，并把阿德勒频繁翻阅的小册子交给你们。
E: You met Wen Shiling in the master control zone. She mentioned that Adler had been constantly murmuring about a "phrase" and handed you a small booklet he often read.

C: 娜塔莎赶来，揭穿「互助会」会长以假药敛财的卑劣行径。娜塔莎感谢你为追缴假药所做的付出，她将会给患者们一个解释。
E: Natasha rushed over and exposed the despicable scheme of the president of "mutual aid society," who had been profiting from counterfeit medicine. Natasha thanked you for your efforts in tracking down the fake drugs, and she would provide an explanation to the patients.

C: 帕斯卡如今一切都好，唯独语言功能依旧不够完善。离别之际，它赠你一束自己做的铁皮花朵，并用稚拙的言语向你致谢。
E: Pascal was doing well in every aspect now, except that its language function still needed improvement. At the moment of farewell, it gifted you a bouquet of flowers made from scrap iron, expressing gratitude in its childlike speech.

C: 卢卡邀请你和希儿加入他的修炼计划，见证卢卡下一步的成长。修炼的地点选在史瓦罗的地盘，卢卡请你们准备好之后，和他一起出发。
E: Luka invited you and Seele to join his training plan and witness his next stage of growth. The training site was located on Svarog's domain. Luka asked you to get ready and set out with him.

C: 奥列格讲述卢卡机械臂的来历，称卢卡把身边人的命看得比他自己更重要。奥列格认为卢卡的「自我修炼」一定另有原因。
E: Oleg shared the story behind Luka's mechanical arm, saying Luka valued others' lives more than his own. He believed Luka's "training" had a deeper purpose.

C: 丹恒消失，与符玄的联系也时断时续，三月七决定靠自己寻找出路。
E: Dan Heng vanished, and contact with Fu Xuan became intermittent. March 7th decided to find her own way out.

C: 黑天鹅已经觉察出谜题的奇怪之处，并同桑博一起去向警长汇报。
E: Black Swan noticed something odd about the puzzle and went to report it to the Sheriff with Sampo.

C: 怀炎等候着云璃同他对话，并关心你是否疲累。
E: Huaiyan waited for Yunli to come talk and asked if you were feeling tired.

C: 你与飞霄的对话提前结束。飞霄觉得列车组没能自圆其说。
E: Your conversation with Feixiao ended prematurely. She found the Express Crew's explanation unconvincing.

C: 椒丘与伪装称狐人模样的步离人对话，对方称其服用了神异的魔药。椒丘据此推测，这些潜入者在仙舟罗浮上有内应。
E: Jiaoqiu spoke with a borisin disguised as a foxian, who admitted to taking a magic pill. From this, Jiaoqiu deduced these infiltrators must have an insider on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 三月七 / 赵相机的摄影技术的确见长！
E: March 7th / Say~Cheese~'s photography skill is truly magnificent!

C: 选材不错，加油。
E: Decent composition. Keep at it.

C: 相机里的世界
E: World Within the Camera

C: 丹鼎司
E: Alchemy Commission

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 差分宇宙
E: Divergent Universe

C: 我是乐队经理，我不同意！
E: I'm the band manager and I say no!

C: 莫慌，先观望一波后续。
E: Don't worry. Let's wait and see.

C: 「斯诺兰德」的寓意是「雪地」。
E: "Snowland" means "a land covered in snow."

C: 你强行扫描了舰长的记忆。
E: You scan the captain's memory forcibly.

C: 试驾新款星槎。
E: Take the new starskiff for a spin.

C: 列车有善战的龙，纯洁的冰…而你可以是「贪饕」的行者。
E: The Express has a valorous dragon, a block of pure ice... and you could be a pathstrider of Voracity.

C: 「不错，杀伐果断，我再睡会……」
E: "Well done, decisive and firm. Now let me sleep some more..."

C: 列车大扫除时，三月七突然想到了新点子……\n「说起来，你会用球棒和炎枪，我会用双剑和长弓，不如我们轮流做彼此的师傅吧！说不定我们也像丹恒那样，还有隐藏的力量没使出来呢！这次先让本姑娘来教你几招~」

C:
旧日监牢主人担忧失去世间无二的锻造技术，只好用低劣的手段束缚着火匠一族——在被禁锢的岁月里，火匠的族长无一例外都必有腿部缺陷。

毁灭的主人解放了被囚禁的火匠一族，毁灭印记赋予了火匠们用之不竭的力量。

离开牢笼之后，火匠族长无法再像常人一般行动自如，但他获得了真正的自由——不再因卓越的技艺而被囚禁的自由。族长将怨恨与屈辱倾注其中，锤击数日也不会感到疲惫。顽固而高傲的反物质生灵在一次次锤击下，不得不改变形态，屈从于毁灭者的改造。

纵使牢狱不再有形，火匠对铸造的痴狂又何尝不是一种牢笼呢。

「血肉是种拖累，铸造亦是毁灭。」族长看着残缺的匠人越来越多，不禁感慨道。
E:
In the old days, the prison masters feared losing the extraordinary arts of Firesmithing, so they would employ the most despicable tricks to incarcerate the Firesmith clan — all the chiefs of the Firesmiths would undoubtedly suffer deformities in the legs in those days of imprisonment.

It was the Master of Destruction that set free the imprisoned Firesmith clan and bestowed upon them the mark of Destruction which in turn granted the Firesmiths unlimited power.

Despite the inability to move around like an able-bodied man, the chief of Firesmith obtained true freedom, for he was no longer imprisoned just for his extraordinary skills and talents in the art of Firesmithing. The chief poured in all his resentment and humiliation into the forge and would never be tired, not even by days of non-stop hammering. Upon one hammering after another, the once stubborn and proud antimatter creatures had to eventually change their form and give in to the remolding by the Destroyer.

Despite being free from any tangible cages, the Firesmiths' obsession with forging had become another form of prison for them, had it not?

"Flesh and blood are a burden. Forging is also destruction." The chief looked at the ever-growing number of deformed Firesmiths and lamented.

C:
只有技术最为卓越、最值得尊敬和依赖的渔猎队长会被授予「鹰击指环」。他们在空中吹动渔哨，组织起严丝合缝的协同，是最为敏锐的猎鹰。

对队员们来说，每一次翱翔总是孤独而脆弱的，能依靠的只有队长传来的<unbreak>124</unbreak>种「哨型」。

因此，在萨尔索图流传着一句话：「空渔人将三分之一的性命交付给千锤百炼的技术，将三分之一的性命交给巧夺天工的装备。而最后的三分之一交给他们信赖的渔猎队长。」

肩负着不同家庭托付的队长，时刻感受到小小指环所承载的重量。

这枚鹰击指环的蚀刻已经斑驳了，指环内侧刻着一个词语：「责任」。
E:
Only the most skilled, respected, and reliable skyfisher captains would receive a Soaring Ring. They blew their fishing whistles in the sky and seamlessly coordinated with one another, like they were the most sharp-eyed hunting eagles.

For the duration of each flight, each team member was lonely and vulnerable. All they could rely on were the <unbreak>124</unbreak> types of whistles that could be performed by their team captain.

Hence, there had long been a saying in Salsotto — "Skyfishers entrusted one-third of their lives to the rigorously developed technology, one-third to their ingeniously refined equipment, and one-third to their reliable lead skyfisher captain."

Being asked by so many families to take care of their skyfisher children, the team captain constantly felt the burden of this little ring he wore.

This Soaring Ring's etching was mottled, with one word engraved on the inner side of the ring: "Duty."

C: ……「同谐」的希佩，噢，集群星之母！祂宣扬和谐一致的喜乐，将所有意志归于一尊。家族的颂歌传播于世间各个角落，祂对万物意志理解、支持与配合的拿捏程度难以想象，或许在此之上祂已走向凡人难以想象的维度。无限扩张的「同谐」着实令人憧憬，宇宙如液体碎钻环绕、装饰祂的身躯，文明在祂手中变成一抹捏住的彩虹。我十分好奇祂如何吞并「秩序」——希佩的颂歌总纵向传播扩张，时而以意识态支配；太一的和音则以立体音程排开，如同帝皇掌控万生等级秩序；二者在命途上确有一定重合，但古老的「秩序」体量庞大，绝不可小觑，吞并祂怎会是易事？…星神间令我难以推测的事太多了。
E: ...Xipe the Harmony. Oh, the mother of all stars! THEY proclaimed harmonious hymns of celebration, and united all wills as one. The Family's songs spread to all corners of the world, and THEIR degree of understanding, support, and synergy for the will of all creatures was beyond imagination. Or perhaps, THEY were already on a plane beyond mortal minds. The ever-expanding Harmony was truly worthy of human longing. The universe encircles and decorates THEIR body like crushed diamonds, and civilization became a rainbow to be snatched in THEIR palm. I am filled with curiosity about how THEY swallowed up Order. The hymns of Xipe continue to spread and grow, occasionally overseen by ideology. In contrast, Ena's harmonic songs seems to align within a three-dimensional framework, akin to an emperor maintaining hierarchical order among all creatures. While there may be some overlap between THEIR Paths, the ancient Order is enormous in size, and swallowing THEM would prove far from effortless... Among the Aeons, there exist countless enigmas that surpass my own speculations.

C: 博识学会的一部分发明创造总是让人怀疑内部混入了假面愚者，例如这台「平行宇宙对讲机」，据称它能检测时空变动的微小分歧，在最近的两个分歧点间建立联系，实现二者的信息交流——但使用者听到的只是从对讲机里传来的自己的回声。对此，项目负责人杜威特博士表示，这恰恰证明了平行宇宙的高度相似性，以至于连对话双方的想法都完全一致。
E: Some of the inventions produced by the Intelligentsia Guild always make people wonder whether the Masked Fools had infiltrated the guild. An example would be this "Parallel Universe Walkie-Talkie." Apparently, it can detect the tiny divergences in space-time shifts, and establish a relationship between the two closest divergence points, allowing information to be passed between the two — but the only thing the user can hear is their echo from the walkie-talkie. The project's manager Doctor DeWitt indicates that this phenomenon precisely illustrates the high level of similarity between parallel universes, where even the thoughts of the doppelganger would be completely identical.

C: 这枚骰子的各面并不规则，内部有奇异的光彩肆意流转，传说封印着恐怖而不可名状的邪神，必须避免在无光的环境下与之接触。过去有人不相信上述传说，执意在黑暗中与骰子共处一室，却发现骰子自身的光华无法遮蔽。由此产生了著名的「闪耀偏方三八面骰悖论」：你没法证明没法证明的事情。
E: This die has irregular sides and a wondrous light that twirls unrestrained within it. It is said to be the seal of a horrible and indescribable evil god, and one must avoid contact with it in dark places at all costs. Some people did not believe in the above myth and insisted on staying in a dark room with the die, only to find that the light within the die itself cannot be blocked out. That is how the famous Shining Trapezohedron Die Paradox came to be — You cannot prove something that cannot be proven.

C: 曾有一个保姆机器人突发奇想，将丰饶香涎做成干酪，好满足小主人看似永无止境的食欲。不料香涎干酪竟自己生长起来，保姆机器人和主人开足马力，消化速度却也跟不上干酪的生长速度。于是他们只好求助路过的悲悼伶人，搭乘贡多拉逃去了别的星系。直到现在，银河中仍然有一个星系被美味的干酪塞得严严实实，一丁点空隙也没留下。这个故事很有教育意义：不要浪费粮食。
E: Once upon a time, a helper robot turned Ambergris of Abundance into cheese on a whim to satisfy its little master's seemingly never-ending appetite. Unexpectedly, the Ambergris Cheese started to multiply on its own. The helper robot and the master worked at full speed, but their digestion still could not keep up with how fast the cheese was multiplying. Therefore, they had to ask for help from a group of passing Mourning Actors and escaped to another world on a gondola. That one world in the cosmos is still stuffed full of delicious cheese to the day, packed so tight that not a single centimeter of space is left. The story teaches an important lesson about not wasting food.

C:
快乐就像是气球，一个个的乐子在眼前哗啦啦地升起，在天空炸开，落下噼里啪啦的礼花。他们说，乐子玩过一次就会疲惫。而你并不反驳，因为气球会随着孩子的手不断传播。

被关进舞台的小丑，段子只能逗乐眼前的观众。在街边分发气球的你，却能让宇宙的两端掌声连连。巴蒂亚的少年在宴会上模仿你的舞蹈，一边露出怪相，奥莉的少女在树荫下分享你的故事，然后捂嘴偷笑。

如果一个乐子被一千万个人玩过，那它就是一个巨大的乐子。你是快乐的气球商，出现在每个需要笑声的角落。
E:
Happiness is like balloons that rise before you and explode in the sky, showering down ribbons. People say once you have tried something fun once, you will get sick of it. You don't put forth an argument, knowing that the children will keep passing the balloons around.

A clown locked to the stage can only entertain the audience present at the show with jokes, but you can receive applause from both ends of the universe by distributing balloons on the streets. A young man from Bathia makes funny faces while imitating your dance moves. A young lady from Ollie shares your story under a tree and covers her mouth as she giggles.

If a fun idea is used by ten million people, it makes a great idea. You are the seller of the balloons of happiness, showing up at places in need of laughter.

C: 你刻意地摔倒，被他扶起，指尖掠过脖颈，如镰刀划过，切割下潜意识底部的记忆。漆黑的，粘稠的，血腥的有毒数据，他在深夜的网络中瞥视到这些故事，它们悄无声息地扎根在大脑里，默默地等待宿主在侵蚀中走向疯狂。但现在，它们不过是手心里的灰烬。\n\n偷渡的电子生命，传染的病毒模因，它们玷污神圣的记忆，藏匿在太阳也看不见的意识缝隙。你化身死神在人群中穿行，陪它们玩上猫抓老鼠的游戏，污秽在顷刻间被连根拔起，而后关进牢狱。世上有不可为之事，亦有不应留存的记忆。
E: You fall to the ground intentionally and, as he helps you to your feet, his fingertips brush past your neck like a sickle, severing the memories lurking deep in your subconscious. Toxic data, like thick, black blood. He had glimpsed these stories in the after-midnight internet. They silently take root in the host's mind and quietly wait for the host to become insane in the corrosion. But now, they have been reduced to no more than ashes in the palm of a hand.\n\nStowaway electronic lifeforms, an infectious memetic virus. They tarnish the sacred memories and lurk in the cracks of consciousness that even the sun cannot perceive. You transform into Death and walk among the masses, joining these beings in a game of cat-and-mouse, uprooting the filth immediately and locking them away in jail. In this world, there are things that must not be done, as well as memories that must not be retained.

C:
没有什么永恒不朽，包括永恒本身。人们的肉身腐朽，故事风化，最终迎来名为遗忘的第三次死亡。你回想起儿时门前的大树，枝桠被折断，脓液流淌，然后痊愈。那道狰狞的伤痕永远伴随着它，直到泥土成了毒药，直到大厦竞相倾塌。

你要为宇宙也留下伤痕，令它苦痛，令它铭记。碾碎的恒星迸发绚烂的光华，毁灭的光景镌刻进众生的眼眸，将这一日的恐惧永世流传。死亡的呼号向着世界的尽头进军，待到千年亿年，乃至筑墙的琥珀也已瓦解，在遥远的彼岸，仍有人能看见迟来的死光。

指针停摆，你的时光不再，唯有破灭的伤痕，仍带着往事在噩梦间传唱。
E:
Nothing is permanent, not even permanence itself. People's bodies decay, stories fade away, and the third death named "forgotten" will always lie in wait. You recall the great tree that stood in front of your gate as a child. Its branches broke, its sap flowed like weeping pus, then it made a full recovery. That repulsive scar will remain with it for eternity, until the soil becomes poison and the buildings collapse to the ground one after one.

You want to leave a scar on the universe too, to make it suffer and remember your name. The pulverized stars burst into brilliant light and the destructive scene is bored into the eyes of all living beings, ensuring that the fear of this day is passed down to every generation for eternity. The call of death advances toward the end of the world. Endless millennia later, when even the amber that constructs the walls crumbles, there will still be those on distant shores who can see the delayed death rays.

The hands of time have stopped, and your moment is no more. Only the scars of havoc still carry its stories of the past, told between nightmares in song.

C: 谜语大师巴德•巴比巴伯•巴拉的故事向来为人津津乐道。他用一百零九种谜语制造出名为「塔奥」的卡牌，散布到宇宙各处，用它们为智慧生命的未来蒙上层层迷雾。当自称占卜师的人们掀开相同的牌面，做出不同的解读，用似是而非的话语，阐释一道道命运的谜题，「神秘」便在其中悄然滋生——它似乎什么也没改变，又似乎改变了一切。
E: People have always loved to recount the story of the Riddler, Baden Babbibalo Bala. Using <unbreak>109</unbreak> different riddles, he created a card set named "Tawot" and scattered it all over the universe, using it to shroud the future of intelligent races in layers of fog. When those who call themselves fortune-tellers flip open the same cards, they make different interpretations, speak subtly varied words, and decipher one question about fate after another. That is when Enigmata quietly takes root — It doesn't seem to have changed anything, yet it seems to have changed everything.

C: 收到「终末」的厄兆后，关于分裂灾变的咕咕钟突然出现在黑森林中，黑森林无机生命团块链因此发生了不明原因断裂。一位闯入黑森林的无名客却因对咕咕钟的狂热喜爱而将其收藏，并执意将之带去自己的故乡——分裂咕咕钟在旅途中不断分裂，最终将无名客的飞行器塞得满满当当。但因其并未在有限时间内参悟分裂咕咕钟不停分裂的现象预示何物，他在星际旅行的半路被虫潮吞没。
E: After receiving an omen from the Finality, the Cuckoo Clocks connected to the cataclysm suddenly appeared in the Black Forest, causing blockchains of inorganic entities to break up for reasons unknown. A Nameless intruding in the forest, however, began collecting the clocks for reasons related to passion and was determined to bring the clocks back home with them. The Fission Cuckoo Clock constantly split during the journey, and in the end, the ship of the Nameless was filled to the brim. However, due to not comprehending the hints given by emerging phenomena resulting from constantly splitting the Fission Cuckoo Clock within the allotted time, the Nameless was devoured by the swarm halfway through their interstellar voyage.

C: 通过在空间结构上的投影架设出的引力桥梁，被博识学会评为宇宙最无用的一万个发明之一。该装置诞生于虚构史学家「红鼻老人」酒后的一场豪赌，他自称能沿着灯光爬到天上，并为此押上了十分之一的家当。可当距离过远时，在光桥上行走与长跑无异；当距离过近时，维持投影的能耗又远高于架设实体桥梁的成本——这的确是一件创造性的发明，只是不知道该被用在哪里。
E: A gravitational bridge built through projections on spacial structures, judged by the Intelligentsia Guild as one of the ten thousand most useless inventions in the universe. This device was born from a gamble made by the History Fictionologist "Red-Nosed Old-Timer." He claimed to be able to climb into the sky via lamplight and bet one-tenth of his wealth on it. However, when the distance is too long, walking on the light bridge is no different to a long-distance marathon. Yet if the distance is too short, the energy consumption needed to maintain the project far exceeds the cost of building a physical bridge — This is indeed an innovative creation, but it's hard to figure out where it should be used.

C: 生物的躯壳脆弱无比，过高的重力，有毒的空气，深海的压强，任何本土居民习以为常的环境，都将是来访者致命的考验。参考星穹列车的智库，一些技术员出身的无名客制作出自由变化的泥偶，它们模拟出异星居民的形态，与操纵者的感官连通，通过远程遥控，再恶劣的环境也拦不住开拓的步伐。由于缺乏真实感，泥偶探险很快被无名客们舍弃，但这一技术却在星际旅游领域发光发热，让星际和平公司赚得盆满钵满。
E: The bodies of organic life are extremely fragile things. Extreme gravity, toxic air, deep ocean pressure — these things that are no more than daily realities for natives become trials of survival for any visitor. According to the Astral Express's data bank, a number of former technician Nameless worked together to create a clay doll that was capable of free transformation. They could simulate the physical form of native citizens and connect to the senses of their controller to allow the trailblazing journey to continue through even the harshest environments through long-distance operations. Due to their lack of realism, clay doll exploration was quickly abandoned by the Nameless, but this technology became a huge boom in the field of interstellar tourism, allowing the IPC to make massive profits.
