C:
性格活泼的小女孩，持明族的「衔药龙女」，药到病除的名医。
经常开出不拘一格的药方，如「多喝热水」、「睡一觉就好了」。
见不得人受苦，治病时总是闭着眼睛。
——总之病好了就行！
E:
A vivacious young lady of the Vidyadhara race, she is known as the "Healer Lady" due to her expertise with medicine.
She often dishes out unorthodox prescriptions such as "Stay well hydrated" and "Get a good night's rest."
Bailu cannot bear to see people suffer, and that's why you'll see her with her eyes shut tightly as she cures ailments.
"As long as they're cured, that's all that matters, right?"

C: 藿藿被早早送进十王司内，为的是避免尾巴那货跑出来为非作歹，图个安稳。 渐渐地随着她逐渐熟悉冥差工作，藿藿开始对十王司记载的各种「邪祟」如数家珍。 「雪衣大人，上、上次备好的符箓，好用吗？」 「好用，对付星灵生物绰绰有余。」 「嘿嘿…那就好，我也不知道效果如何嘛……」 「自己试试呢？」 「不不不，我怕……」 「藿藿，所谓『邪祟』，多半是外星生物或以某种形式存在的有害智慧生命。」 「雪衣大人，我知道它们是什么，却还是怕得不行，我想，我是不是不适合这份工作呢……」 「…只能问问汝自身了。」 藿藿并非对自己的胆小无动于衷，她尝试过，想要培养战胜「邪祟」的勇气。 她熬夜观摩乙级小成本恐怖喜剧片，试图磨砺胆量，却只得到了黑眼圈。她全数购入新式科学驱魔道具，用来提升战力，却只是让钱包变得更干瘪。尾巴常常讥笑这些尝试徒劳无功，并想尽办法在过程中添油加醋，变本加厉。 「最吓人的还是尾巴……」 但在雪衣看来，藿藿对尾巴早算不得是「畏惧」了。
E: When Huohuo was taken in by the Ten-Lords Commission, the judges initially wanted to ensure that Tail wouldn't cause any trouble. Gradually, as she familiarized herself with her duties as a spiritfarer, she became acquainted with the various evil spirits documented by the Commission. "Madam Xueyi! H—How about the talismans I prepared last time?" "They were great. Very effective against Astral Spirits." "Ha—Haha... Glad to know that. I was worried if it would work well." "Why didn't you try them yourself?" "N—N—No... I'm too scared..." "You know, Huohuo? Most of those 'evil spirits' are actually extraterrestrial creatures or malevolent sentient beings that exist in various forms." "I know what they are, but I'm still so afraid, Madam Xueyi. Maybe I'm not really cut out for this job..." "...Well, only you know the answer to that." Huohuo is not okay with her timidity. She struggled to muster the courage needed to confront the evil spirits. She stayed up late watching horror-comedy films in an attempt to strengthen her nerves, but all she got were dark circles. She invested in the latest scientific exorcism tools to enhance her abilities, but it only left her with empty pockets. Tail sneered at the futility of her efforts, finding ways to make sarcastic remarks and mock her. "To be honest, Tail is the scariest of all..." However, in Xueyi's eyes, Huohuo has long ceased to fear Tail.

C: 在曜青的军营中，她穿上云骑铠甲，拿起武器。 新的语言、新的生活习惯、新的名字、新的战斗方式——她痛苦地学着，学得飞快。她跟随月御征战，为月御执旗。在无尽的征战中，少女已成为独当一面的战士。 战吼仍旧时不时在耳边回响，一开始，她以为那是恐惧。 但直到有一次，她闭上眼，眼前那温暖的红色流淌着，她好像看到了一轮血腥的月亮，向她温柔地呼唤着，鼓动着她的血脉。 她的肌肤寸寸崩裂，野蛮的力量像洪水一般涌入——她发现自己只需轻轻踮脚，便可如同流光一般极速而动。 她沐浴鲜血穿梭在敌军之中，在他们还未回过神来时送上死亡，敌阵中赫然显现出一道越来越宽阔的裂口。 漫天血雨的长战中，她的速度愈来愈快。没人能跟上她的脚步。 恐惧——她从敌人眼中看到了恐惧，而在身体中时时刻刻涌动的，是战栗与愤怒。 她回过神来，望向自己所经之处，身后只有步离人的尸体，愈来愈多，越垒越高。 曜青的战士们也远远地望着她，他们的眼神有惊讶、有欣喜、也有恐惧。 她倒了下去。 再次醒来时，只有月御坐在她的身边，营外模模糊糊的声音传入她的耳朵。 「你没看到她没尾巴吗？这也未免……」 「天生的？怪可怜的。」 「她以前是步离人的战奴，怪不得拼那么凶。」 「你们不知道那是『月狂』？我当时快吓疯了，怕她谁都不认……」 「但如果不是因为她，我们这次恐怕没法赢得那么轻松吧？」 她明白，这些声音或许将伴随着她的一生。
E: In the Yaoqing military barracks, she puts on the armor of the Cloud Knights and picks up a weapon. A new language, a new way of life, a new name and new battle tactics. She studies in intense agony, yet learns everything quickly. She would follow Yueyu into battle and bear the general's flag. During their countless conquests, she becomes an elite warrior. The battle cry would still occasionally echo in her ears from time to time, but she initially believed that was just fear. Until one day she closes her eyes as a warm scarlet flows across her vision. She thinks that she sees a sanguineous moon gently calling out to her, stirring up the blood in her veins. Her skin begins to split inch after inch as a wild power pours into her body like roaring waves — She realizes that, with just a gentle tiptoe, she could move in unrivaled speed like a flash of light. She traverses the battlefield, bathed in blood, delivering death to her enemies before they even realize what is happening. A fissure in the enemy's ranks begins to grow wider and wider. As the long battle continues under a rain of blood, her movements seem to grow only faster. No one could hope to match her speed. Fear... That is what she sees in the eyes of her enemies. All that she feels in her body is intimidation and rage. When she regains her senses, she looks back on the path she has covered to see only borisin corpses behind her, piled higher and higher. The Yaoqing soldiers are looking at her from a distance, their eyes filled with surprise, admiration, and also fear. She collapses to the ground. When she wakes up, Yueyu sits alone by her bedside as muffled voices reach her ears from outside the tent. "Didn't you see that she had no tail? That's a bit too..." "Is it natural? That's an awful shame." "She used to be a borisin war slave after all... Explains her raw ferocity." "You couldn't tell she was in 'Moon Rage'? I was about to wet myself at the sight. Thought she couldn't recognize anyone..." "But if it wasn't for her, we might not have been able to win so easily this time." She realizes that these voices will likely follow her for the rest of her life.

C:
气质温婉优雅的学者，「天才俱乐部」#81号会员，生命科学领域的专家。
凭借天赋与惊人的执著得到了博识尊的瞩目，在秘密的角落开始了对生命本源的研究与探索。
并因此被黑塔邀请，同螺丝咕姆、斯蒂芬联合开发了「模拟宇宙」。
私下里，她十分喜爱传统戏剧与点心，对刺绣也很感兴趣。
E:
A scholar of exquisite temperament, member #81 of the illustrious Genius Society, and an expert in the field of life sciences.
She earned Nous' attention with her talent and terrifying perseverance, and began her research on the origin of life in a secretive corner of the universe.
Subsequently, she was invited by Herta to collaborate with Screwllum and Stephen to develop the Simulated Universe.
Privately, she revels in traditional theater and desserts, and she is also very interested in embroidery.

C: 「许多人沉湎于过去的美好，幻想能活在回忆中，所以他们想要成为忆者。可惜，这样的人往往会变成为所欲为的焚化工，随意将回忆篡改成自己喜欢的样子。但她不一样…我看到了她对于记忆本身的尊重，以及强烈的意志与决心。按照惯例，成为忆者前的三个问题，她的回答如下： 『你是否愿意用尽你的一生去收集记忆？』 『我愿意。』 『你是否愿意为此放弃肉身，接受自我的异变？』 『我愿意。』 『如果有一天你不复存在，你会给世界留下什么？』 『我的记忆。那里有过去的种子，它会在未来重生。』 有些记忆琐碎而温暖，有些记忆宏大而浩瀚，有些记忆像宠物一样温驯，有些记忆则像猛兽一样难以控制…而她成为忆者的那一刻，她的记忆变得安静而平和，仿佛汹涌的海浪遇到了属于自己的港湾。」 ——一位忆者的回忆 「想到了什么？」忆者问道。 她睁开眼，记忆的碎片绕着她的身边旋转。 「人们以为自己面对的是现在与未来，却无人知晓我们其实都在走向过去。」
E: Many individuals obsess over the glory of the past and aspire to become Memokeepers, longing to live within their memories. Such individuals often degenerate into unbridled Cremators, distorting memories to suit their preferences. However, she is different... I've sensed her unwavering determination and profound respect for memories themselves. Following tradition, I asked her three questions before making her a Memokeeper. "Will you dedicate your whole life to the collection of memories?" "I will." "Will you relinquish your physical form and embrace the transformation of self?" "I will." "If one day you cease to exist, what legacy will you leave behind for the world?" "My memories. They hold seeds from the past, destined for rebirth into the future." Memories come in various forms. Some are trivial and heartwarming, while others are grand and expansive. Some are gentle and meek, while others are wild and untamed... When she became a Memokeeper, her memories became tranquil and serene, like the calm waves that finally found their destined harbor. — A Memokeeper's memories "What comes to your mind?" The Memokeeper asked. As she opened her eyes, fragments of memories swirled around her. "People tend to believe they are facing the present and the future, yet fail to realize that we are all, in fact, moving toward the past."

C: 黄泉：超越善恶
E: Acheron: Beyond Good & Evil

C: 黑塔：谁为残酷协议负责
E: Herta: Who's Responsible For Cruel Protocols?

C: 吸引人流
E: Visitor Appeal

C: 你乘上了神奇的星穹列车，现在熟悉一下乘员和设施吧！今后，这里就是你的家了。
E: You boarded the amazing Astral Express, and it's time to get familiar with its passengers and facilities! From now on, this will be your home.

C: 三月七试图说服你，但结果呢？你突然不是那么在乎了，因为你在此时此刻遭到了小朋友的挑衅。\n这你可忍不了！——是时候让小朋友感受成年人世界的严酷了。\n这群小鬼还不知道的是，刚才的演练不过是热身罢了…真正残忍的「捉迷藏游戏」才刚刚开始！
E: March 7th attempts to convince you but you no longer care for it as much anymore, because the kids have started taunting you.\nYou will not stand for this! It's time to show these children the cruelty of the grown-ups' world.\nLittle do they know that the practice just now was just a warm-up... The cruel and real Hide-and-seek is only about to begin!

C: 根据娜塔莎的说法，在已经废弃的「铆钉镇」或许还有剩余的医疗物资，而你们和希儿的任务就是把那些物资抢救回来，榨干它们的最后一点价值…呃，不对，是让它们在诊所里发光发热。\n希儿似乎是在彼处度过了尚可称为完整的童年…此次任务对她来说或许有着特殊的意义。\n那个工业小镇就在磐岩镇的北方不远处，收拾停当后就和大家一起出发吧。
E: According to Natasha, there may still be remaining medical supplies in the abandoned Rivet Town. The mission for you and Seele is to retrieve the supplies and deplete them of their final value... Erm, to let them shine and be useful in the clinic.\nSeele seems to have spent her entire childhood there... So this mission may hold a special value to her.\nThe industrial town is just north of Boulder Town. Set out with everyone once you're packed up and ready.

C: 你早有物资会被人捷足先登的预感，可你没能想到这是熟人干的好事。\n好吧，其实也不太熟…但你们至少见过一面——四舍五入的话，你已经是克拉拉的家人了。\n所以，这样可爱的克拉拉为何会独自一人（和一机器人）在这种凶险的地方出没？你务必要问个清楚。
E: You've had the feeling that someone has gotten to the supplies before you but you didn't think it'd be someone that you were close with.\nOkay, maybe not that close... but you've at least met her before — you're technically family to Clara now.\nSo what is cute Clara doing alone (with a robot) in such a dangerous place? You have to get to the bottom of this.

C: 你和同伴击退裂界生物，保证了克拉拉的安全。你本想借此机会说服克拉拉将大家带到史瓦罗面前，可惜她是个比三月七更透彻、更坚持自己信念的孩子…因此，这次交涉以失败告终。\n但是，这次交流也并非没有收获：你们觉察到了或许能令她和史瓦罗松口的突破口——接下来，只需找到克拉拉重新交涉即可。\n她似乎乘坐电梯前往炉心之下了，现在立即出发或许还来得及。
E: You and your companions defeated the Fragmentum organisms and secured Clara's safety. You wanted to take the opportunity to persuade Clara into bringing you to Svarog, but she has a firmer and clearer conviction than March 7th... Your persuasion ended in failure.\nHowever, all is not lost. You've noticed a breakthrough that could make her and Svarog talk — all you have to do now is to find Clara and revisit the conversation.\nShe seems to have taken the elevator and headed below the Furnace Core. You can still make it in time if you leave now.

C: 按照景元所想，欲得知星核猎手的真正意图，普通的审问手法毫无作用。唯有借太卜司中名为「穷观」的法阵，鉴往知来，演算真相。\n但此刻阵基停转，符箓熄灭。景元再度使出兵法中「来都来了」之计，请你们出手相助。
E: Jing Yuan postulates that ordinary interrogations will not be effective in learning the true motive of the Stellaron Hunters. Such a goal can only be achieved using the computational algorithm named Matrix of Prescience in the Divination Commission, which can examine the past and future and calculate the truth.\nHowever, the base terminals are currently out of commission and their talismans deactivated. Once again, Jing Yuan employs the stratagem of "Since You Are Here" to ask for your help.

C: 另一边，联系上云骑的素裳将船停靠在了丹鼎司的行医市集，歧路多舛的三人终于靠岸。这儿曾是你熟悉故土的一角，旧日的回忆纷纷涌现，数不清的影子徘徊来去。不过，眼下朋友们音讯不明，你不打算继续在此停留。
E: On the other side of Luofu, Sushang parks the skiff at the Alchemy Commission's Healer's Market after making contact with the Cloud Knights. The three finally land after a tumultuous journey. This was once a part of your familiar home. Memories of the past swell up into your mind, and countless bygone shadows swivel before your eyes. However, your friends are currently missing. You have no plans to remain here.

C: 你的█ ██ ██ █注意力彻底被那█ ███ █埃维金男孩夺去了。他到底是██ █ ██ █ 什么来头？还有时间，或许你可以追上█ ███ ██，问问他究竟是什么██ ███ ██ ██。
E: You are c█m█lete██ ██tranc█d by t█e █vgin boy.██ust who ███he? There█s sti█l tim███Mayb█ you ███ catch up ██ h██ and as█ █im exactly wha█ █████████.

C: 你已抵达自己的结局。\n最后的时光，同████好好道别吧。尽量让自己……\n…死而无憾。
E: You have reached your final end.\nBid your farewells to █████████ in your final moments. Try your best to...\n...Die without regrets.

C: 即便砂金以生命为代价向众人揭示了家族在匹诺康尼的黑暗秘密，但经由万众一心的家族运作，谐乐大典的倒计时仍未中止。这都多亏了你——身为家族（暂时）的骄傲，你现在的一举一动都将牵动整个匹诺康尼的心。\n是时候做你该做的事了，「知更鸟」。
E: Despite Aventurine revealing The Family's dark secrets in Penacony to all at the cost of his own life, the countdown to the Charmony Festival continues thanks to the operations of The Family's united efforts. This is all thanks to you... As the (temporary) pride of The Family, your every move from now will affect the very beating heart of Penacony.\nIt is time to do what you must, "Robin."

C: 米沙声称流梦礁是自己的家——如果真是这样，那「白日梦」酒店的待遇可真有够糟糕的。不过，天真可爱的小米沙不以为意，反而看出你们遇到了麻烦，提出带领各位寻找走失的同伴，顺便游览这座冷寂的小镇。不仅如此，你们甚至还有机会见到一位老朋友——知更鸟。\n但在那以前，你们首先要和三月七与姬子会合才行。小米沙认为列车组成员很有可能身在贸易区，或许你们可以前去看看。
E: Misha claims Dreamflux Reef to be his home... If that is the case, you can only imagine how bad the treatment must have been at The Reverie. Although, the cute and naïve Misha has not taken that to heart. In fact, seeing that you are in trouble, he offers to lead you on a search for your lost companions and give you a tour of the desolate town along the way. Not only that, you may even have a chance to meet with an old friend... Robin.\nBefore anything else, you need to regroup with March 7th and Himeko. Misha believes that the Express Crew is likely in the trading district. Maybe you should go and check it out.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•时间的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将与钟表小子动画系列中广受欢迎的角色——钟表小子——一道，突破重重难关，最终……\n…帮助这位并非真正的钟表小子的钟表小子克服与生俱来的存在主义危机。游戏也可以很深刻，不是吗？
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Time Trial stage. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role ever-popular protagonist from the Clockie series — Clockie. Smash through the final obstacles together...\n...Help this inauthentic Clockie overcome an existential crisis. The game can also be rather profound, can't it?

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 你们即将面对本届苏乐达™盛会海选最后、也是最难的关卡——「巨星巅峰战」。能成为匹诺康尼下一位盛会巨星的，只有在擂台上笑到最后的那个人……\n那究竟是你？还是那位高大、坚实、热情似火、凭一己之力拿下演技挑战最高分的高贵男子？敬请拭目以待！
E: You are about to face the final and most challenging stage of the SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions — "The Superstar Showdown"! Only they who laugh last in the ring will be able to become the next Penacony Festive Superstar...\nWill that person be you? Or will it be the towering, strong, passionate nobleman who easily secured the top score in the acting challenge? Stay tuned to find out!

C: 与奥帝•艾弗法的会面令托帕和翡翠都暗吃一惊，她们没有料到对方竟然在筹划匹诺康尼集团的上市流程。\n她们必须在下半场的会谈中直击老奥帝的痛点，以确保公司入驻匹诺康尼的计划万无一失。\n下半场的会谈即将开始，翡翠已经准备好毫无保留地施展她的反击。
E: The meeting with Oti Alfalfa surprised Topaz and Jade. They didn't expect him to be preparing for the public listing of Penacony Conglomerate.\nThey have to go straight for Old Oti's sore spots during the second half of negotiations to guarantee the IPC's entry into Penacony goes off without a hitch.\nThe second half of the meeting is about to begin. Jade is ready to hold nothing back as she launches her counterattack.

C: 你终于来到了真正的折纸大学，方才的怪梦可能只是厌学症的表现…但看看这所流光溢彩的华丽校园，看看这群热情洋溢的精英校友，还有什么好怕的呢？让玫瑰色的青春吞噬灰色的你吧！\n在校园里转转，了解一下这里的环境——尤其是要了解一下教学楼到食堂的最短路径。
E: You finally step into the real Paperfold University. The bizarre dream back then might just be a manifestation of your fear of school... But what is there to fear now that you've seen this glittering and magnificent campus, together with the passionate elite classmates? Let the rosy vitality of youth consume your gray!\nExplore the campus and familiarize yourself with the surroundings, especially noting the shortest path from the classroom to the cafeteria.

C: 又遇到了忍者和顶着猴子脑袋的老师，看来这所学府已经被腐化了。可叹，看来这也是末法之世的一个侧面…忍者，速去窥察虫豸•邪祟之动向。\n你问为什么文本风格变了？当然是为了适配已经定型的故事主题。
E: Once again, you come across the ninja and the monkey-headed teacher. Looks like corruption is rampant within the academy. Unfortunately, this seems to be a part of the Mappou Age of the Dharma... Get moving, ninja! Keep an eye on the Fiendling Pest's activities.\nOh, you're wondering about the sudden change in text style? It's to match the theme of the story, naturally.

C: 最终的壮绝•狩猎已经开始！踏入狩猎场的众忍，握紧手中的忍法帖，挥洒那些你们曾见过的血泪——那不只是缭乱•忍侠的血泪，而是成万上亿被御猿•邪忍迫害之人的血泪！此战并非为忍义，而是为往日那些遮蔽银河群星的仇恨，以及断绝未来的仇恨的种子而战！化作大岚神的箭矢，照亮黑夜，唤醒众生，刺穿邪祟吧！\n唤醒迷惘的小猴，追猎逃窜的蕉授，不死不休，不死不休！
E: The final Grand Hunt has begun! The ninjas, who have entered the hunting grounds, grasp their ninjutsu talisman tight, and shed blood and tears that they have seen — It's not just the blood and tears of the Dazzling Ninja Hero, but the blood and tears of the billions of victims ruined by Evil Ninja Osaru! This battle is not fought for ninja honor, but for the vengeance that had covered the very stars in the past, and to uproot the seeds of hatred in the future once and for all! Transform into the arrows of the Great Lan, lighting up the night, awakening those affected, and piercing through the fiendish foes!\nAwaken the bewildered monkeys and pursue the fleeing Profnana! To the death! TO THE DEATH!

C: 匹诺康尼的旅程再次告一段落。如今列车能源告急，亟需一场足够「开拓」的旅程进行补充。
E: The journey to Penacony has come to a close once again. With the Express running low on energy, a journey that is sufficiently Trailblazing is urgently needed to refuel.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 「粉霞天女」风波差点闹出人命。我们以暴露天外来客身份为代价救下了执着的达米亚诺斯，只是，如此一来…便违背了对阿格莱雅的承诺。
E: The "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco almost caused someone their life. We rescued the persistent Damionis at the cost of exposing our identities as guests from beyond the sky. But in doing so... we broke our promise to Aglaea.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 在面见阿格莱雅之前，那刻夏提出了自己的要求：前去慰问黑潮之灾牺牲者的家属。
E: Prior to seeing Aglaea, Anaxa asks to visit the families of those lost to the black tide.

C: 为了复现记忆、完成对克拉特鲁斯的承诺，*我们*悄悄来到命运重渊，寻找历经当年岁月的事物。
E: To replicate memories and fulfill the promise to Krateros, we quietly visit the Abyss of Fate, searching for objects that have witnessed those years.

C: 一场梦境，将*我们*带回那段早已为岁月所模糊的遥远回忆之中，而这场幻梦，印刻着*我们*内心最深处的不安。
E: A dream carries us back to memories long faded by time, and this dream mirrors the profound fears within our hearts.

C: 我，不死的迈德漠斯，亡国的王储，纷争的新神…如今已迈上以血作辙的归途。
E: I, the undying Mydeimos, the Last Prince, the new God of Strife... now tread the blood-soaked road home.

C: 冥界…果真如传说那样，是一片花海。\n世人皆知灰黯之手，却鲜有人知晓塞纳托斯的另一只手——如今，你们终于相遇了。\n跟随着塞纳托斯前进，顺道一观她看顾的这片花海吧。
E: Just as the legends say... The nether realm is truly a sea of flowers.\nEveryone knows of the Hand of Shadow, but few know of Thanatos's other hand — And now, you have finally met each other.\nProceed with Thanatos, and behold the sea of flowers that she watches over.

C: 赛飞儿发短信邀请{NICKNAME}前往斯缇科西亚寻宝，或许能够成为一道不错的调剂。
E: Cipher sent a message inviting {NICKNAME} to go treasure hunting in Styxia — could be a welcome change of pace.

C: 圣城陷入永夜，混乱令人不安，而距火种尽数归还也仅剩一步，危机下，完成「再创世」恐怕是我们唯一的选择。取回刻法勒的火种后，我们将立刻赶往创世涡心。
E: Evernight has descended upon the holy city, bringing disturbing chaos in its wake. With just one final Coreflame to return, completing the "Era Nova" may be our only choice in this crisis. After retrieving Kephale's Coreflame, we will immediately head to the Vortex of Genesis.

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 你看，「时辰」的精灵来了，她是来解放你的。但解放需要支付代价——\n关于你所离席的岁月，永远消失在时间的裂隙里，再也回不来了。\n但你要前进，用你创造的未来，偿还你欠下的债。
E: Look, the "Clockkeeper" is here with your temporal pardon. But this bail comes with interest.\nThe seconds, minutes, and years of your absence will be foreclosed upon, forever beyond withdrawal.\nThe only way out is forward, where each new moment you create becomes the currency to settle what you've borrowed from time's unforgiving bank.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C: 在翁法罗斯经历的一切，在列车上又到底经过了多长呢？好像自己还是和星穹列车隔了一层，这究竟是怎么回事？\n总之，别忘记出发时大家的担忧，看看三月现在怎么样了。
E: How long has it really been since everything that happened in Amphoreus, and how much time has passed on the Express? It feels like there's still some kind of barrier between you and the Astral Express. What exactly is going on here?\nIn any case, don't forget everyone's concerns when you set out. Let's see how March is doing.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n收集泰坦符文，完成密钥封装。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nCollect the Titan runes to complete the encryption key encapsulation.

C: 仙舟盟誓：「欲令后世免于侵凌攻伐、危疑苛暴之衅」。此番请缨出战，但为扫除仇寇，援联盟友，佑护银河众生。
E: The Xianzhou Alliance Oath: "To save future generations from war and bloody dispute." We volunteer for this battle to eliminate our foes, uphold our allies, and protect all life in the cosmos.

C: 了解封锁区域的现况。
E: Learn about the current status of the blocked-off area.

C: 击败被识别程序标记的怪物，收集信标数据。
E: Defeat enemies marked by the recognition system and collect beacon data.

C: 卡波特的粉丝手里有一份录音稿，里面记载着关键的线索。\n既然没有办法从卡波特教授那里得到有效线索，那就换个切入点继续挖掘吧。
E: One of Capote's fans has a transcript that contains important clues.\nSeeing as you can't get any useful information out of Professor Capote, keep digging from another angle.

C: 一旁的维修工程师手动为你开启了光学身份校验程序，对你来说，这压根算不上什么难题。
E: The maintenance engineer starts the optical identity verification for you manually. So far, so good.

C: 阮•梅离开了空间站，你觉得还是告知一下艾丝妲比较好
E: Ruan Mei has left the space station. You feel you should mention that to Asta.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n碰上麻烦了。贝洛伯格欠了公司一大笔钱。得去和托帕交涉。人在博物馆。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nWe're in trouble. Belobog owes a whole lot of money to the IPC. Need to negotiate with Topaz in the museum.

C: 不愿配合复诊的患者们各执一词，围绕着某种「特效药」的谜团也令你陷入深思。\n但一段时间的相处使你深信娜塔莎身为医生的医德和人品，你决定先去把情况向她汇报清楚。
E: The patients who refuse to come to the clinic for the follow-up visit share their different opinions, and the mystery about a type of "wonder medicine" attracts your attention.\nBut the time spent with Natasha makes you believe that she is a good doctor and a good person, you decide to report what you found to her first.

C: 与娜塔莎交流后，她希望你能去下层区探访最后一位患者。\n据说那位患者深受瓦赫留下的「特效药」所害，或许你在和她交谈时应该倍加谨慎……
E: After talking with you, Natasha hopes that you can go to the underworld to visit the last patient.\nIt is said that she is a victim of Vache's "wonder medicine," which means you need to be extra cautious when talking with her...

C: 帕斯卡带领你与克拉拉来到了铆钉镇的废弃工作室「淬火工坊」。从帕斯卡破碎的词句中，你们拼凑出它行如此举动的部分动机。\n帕斯卡似乎是将此处当作了自己的「秘密基地」，并在这里日夜不停地维护整个铆钉镇。\n你发现了一些可疑的物件，但它们似乎并不能说明些什么——还是在这里继续调查吧。
E: Pascal led Clara and you to the abandoned workshop in Rivet Town, the Tempering Workshop. You piece together some of the motivation underlying Pascal's behavior from its broken speech.\nPascal seemed to have treated this place as its secret base and maintained the entire Rivet Town ceaselessly from here.\nYou find some suspicious objects, but they don't really explain much — Keep looking around for a bit longer.

C: 尤利安交给了你一本残缺的《冒险鼹鼠队》，就在仅剩的目录上竟然留着书页的线索。说不定真的能找到书页。\n既然能找到书页，是不是也能找到宝藏…不好，不能把儿童文学当真了。
E: Julian gives you a damaged book called The Adventurous Moles. You find clues about the rest of this book in its table of contents. Maybe you can find the whole book.\nThen, maybe you can even find the treasure... Wait, this is just a book for kids. Don't take it seriously.

C: 向邓恩了解现场状况
E: Find out more about the on-site situation from Dunn

C: 你应邀来到博物馆整理间，果然在这里找到了等待已久的朗道姐弟。\n上前听听他们究竟有何请求吧。
E: You arrive at the Museum Finishing Room as invited, and find the Landau siblings waiting for you here.\nGo and listen to their request.

C: 根据瓦尔特的说法，在雅利洛-Ⅵ的风雪减弱后，他与姬子便在此地探测到了不明信号。\n为避免这簇信号引来别有用心之人，威胁这颗尚在重生中的星球，你不妨接受瓦尔特的请求，前往指定位置进行调查。
E: According to Welt, Himeko and he had detected an unknown signal here after Jarilo-VI's blizzard had subsided.\nTo prevent this signal cluster from attracting people with ulterior motives and threatening this regenerating planet, you might as well accept Welt's request and head to the designated location to investigate.

C: 你不得不按照那位「绿芙蓉」的要求，抄写《千手慈怀药王救世品》。但五百遍确实太多了…也许有其他办法？
E: You have to copy the Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation according to Green Hibiscus's demands, but 500 times is just too much... Maybe there's another way?

C: 通过影像和证言的比对，你和檀檀找到了肇事星槎去往了迴星港。嫌疑人擅自改造引擎，回到了迴星港船坞修理肇事星槎…走吧，去将嫌疑人逮捕起来。
E: By lining up the footage with the testimonials, you and Tantan deduce that the offending starskiff was heading to Stargazer Navalia. The suspect was using an illegally-modded engine and headed back to Stargazer Navalia for repairs... Mosey over and arrest ourselves a perpetrator.

C: 无趣的搜证工作终于结束，接下来就该开始紧张刺激的推理环节了！\n名侦探三月七信心满满，此番必定要抽丝剥茧，将事实真相大白于天下！\n祝她成功。
E: The boring evidence-collection task finally ended, and it is time for the mind-bending, action-packed deduction segment!\nGenius Detective March 7th is confident to reveal the truth to the world as she gets to the bottom of the case.\nLuck be with her.

C: 关于仙舟「罗浮」的记忆并不久远，很多事甚至还历历在目。但看着那些记忆中的人和事，三月七还是觉得有些惆怅。\n「明明只过了那么短的时间，很多事却再也回不到过去了。」她暗自想到。
E: Memories of the Xianzhou Luofu are very recent and are still fresh in her mind. However, March 7th still feels rather sad as she gazes upon the people and events in her memory.\n"It hasn't been that long, but many things won't ever be the same again," she thinks to herself.

C: 浮烟自称对恚炎的秉性了如指掌，它提出了一条破局之道。不过这鬼祟之物是真心想帮助人类取胜？抑或是它的提议包藏着别样的祸心？若不任由它将底牌掀开，一切尚未可知。尽管不安，但你们必须撑到这底牌掀开的一刻。
E: Cirrus claims to know Furynox like the back of its hand, and proposes a game changer of a counter. But does this shifty creature really want to help humanity win? Or could it be that it secretly harbors ulterior motives? We'll never know what's up its sleeve unless we let it play its trump card. You're nervous, but you have to hold on until that trump card gets played.

C: 黑天鹅开始收集线索，尝试解开花火留下的谜题。你不禁想，花火如此大费周章，究竟是为了什么？但对于花火这样的人来说，考虑「为什么」大概就落了下乘。不如先和黑天鹅一起，玩玩花火留下的推理游戏吧…也许这其中就隐藏着花火的真实目的。
E: Black Swan begins collecting clues, trying to solve the puzzle that Sparkle left behind. You can't help but wonder why Sparkle would go through all this effort. However, when it comes to people like Sparkle, asking "why" normally means you are on the wrong track. Why not play with Black Swan the logic game that Sparkle left behind... Perhaps Sparkle's true motive is concealed within.

C: 又一场谋杀、又一出戏剧、又一个谜题。桑博看起来苦恼极了，恨不得马上逃回那与世隔绝的静谧雪国。黑天鹅倒是悠然自得，醉心于花火安排的侦探游戏之中。但他们都不是那种会把真实想法写在脸上的人，所以你也分不清他们是不是真的苦恼、真的悠然。\n不过梦境贩售店好歹也算是个娱乐场所，与其猜测「剧中人」的真实想法，还不如专心研究花火留下的谜题，享受推理的乐趣呢。
E: Another murder, another play, and another puzzle. Sampo seems extremely distressed and ready to escape back into his secluded and quiet Winterland. Black Swan, on the other hand, seems calm and contented, thoroughly enjoying the detective game that Sparkle prepared. However, they are not the type to have their emotions displayed across their faces, so you are uncertain whether they are really distressed or calm.\nHowever, the Dreamscape Sales Store is still a place of entertainment, so perhaps it would be better to focus on investigating the puzzle Sparkle left behind than trying to assess the true thoughts of these "characters." Let's enjoy a game of logic and deduction.

C: 在怀炎半是玩笑、半是试探的邀请下，三月七意外得到了登上演武仪典的机会。受学于罗浮与朱明两大将军的高足，有机会一窥仙舟剑术的堂奥，三月真是前途无量、可喜可贺啊。
E: Under Huaiyan's invitation, laced with both levity and inquiry, March 7th fortuitously earned a chance to participate in the Wardance. Trained by the star pupils of the two great Luofu and Zhuming generals, she was now gifted with the chance to delve into the intricacies of Xianzhou swordplay. March's future prospects were boundless, a matter worth much celebration.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。\n深入幽囚狱中，你们渐渐察觉到个中之事的诡谲。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.\nDeep in The Shackling Prison, the abyssal treachery of the conspiracy gradually dawned upon you.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 幽狱失守，群狼破枷，在演武仪典即将正式召开前，这场惊变打乱了一切计划。仙舟街巷间的一切看似平静如旧，但能变化形貌的狼已潜蹑于人群中。\n你从幽囚狱中安然脱离后，找到了此刻正焦躁不安的彦卿……
E: The Shackling Prison has fallen, and a pack of wolves has broken free. This startling development has upset everyone's plans before the Wardance ceremony could even commence. While the Xianzhou alleyways seem as calm and peaceful as ever, wolves capable of shapeshifting have already hidden themselves in the crowd.\nAfter escaping from The Shackling Prison in one piece, you find Yanqing, who is anxiously pacing about...

C: 眼前的芙洛拉竟然是莱斯利•迪恩生前的演员助理。\n追随她留下的影子，见证她和莱斯利之间的故事吧。
E: It turns out that the lady named Flora was Lesley Dean's former assistant during his lifetime.\nFollow her shadow and witness the stories between her and Lesley.

C: 眼前的芙洛拉竟然是莱斯利•迪恩生前的演员助理。\n追随她留下的影子，见证她和莱斯利之间的故事吧。
E: It turns out that the lady named Flora was Lesley Dean's former assistant during his lifetime.\nFollow her shadow and witness the stories between her and Lesley.

C: 恢复了悲伤的情绪之后，柯柯娜似乎陷入了异常的精神状态，现实酒店的护理师乔凡娜应该可以帮助她。
E: Cocona seems to have fallen into an abnormal mental state after she regained the mood of sorrow. Giovanna, the dream nurse at the hotel in reality, should be able to provide aid.

C: 那时候的我，个子可真够小的。\n周围的人们都说，我比同龄人早熟，也比同龄人聪明。但我知道那都是我刻意营造出的假想。我只不过是个打肿脸充胖子的小姑娘罢了，强装出一副聪明世故的模样，来掩盖内心的不安。\n父亲死前对我说，生在帝王家，只有工于心计的人才能幸存。我并不擅长那些政治操弄，但我想活下去。
E: Back then, I was really little.\nEveryone around me said I was mature beyond my years and smarter than my peers. But I'm sure that was just an illusion I created. I was just an insecure little girl, pretending to be wise and smart.\nBefore my father died, he told me — in the royal family, only the cunning survive. I wasn't great at politics, but I wanted to survive.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 三月提出与彦卿一起送别其他仙舟的客人。\n曜青仙舟的飞霄将军、椒丘医士，还有鸦羽怪人…嗯，影卫貊泽悉数到场。他们即将回到曜青仙舟，能在离开之前见上一面真好。\n即便星海浩瀚，你坚信大家会再次见面的。
E: March suggests going with Yanqing to bid farewell to all of the guests from the other Xianzhou ships.\nGeneral Feixiao, Jiaoqiu the healer, and the crow-feather weirdo... Ahem, I mean, the shadow guard Moze... they are all present and correct. They are about to return to the Xianzhou Yaoqing. Fortunately, you get a chance to see them one more time before they do.\nEven if you are separated by the vast starry skies, you firmly believe that everyone will meet again.

C: 三月提出与彦卿一起送别其他仙舟的客人。\n接下来该送别朱明仙舟的客人了。
E: March suggests going with Yanqing to bid farewell to all of the guests from the other Xianzhou ships.\nNext, it's time to bid farewell to the guests from the Xianzhou Zhuming.

C: 求生、财富、信仰、荣耀、所要守护的事物…一切战士都有拼死而战的理由，为战而生的眷属也不例外。这位敌人为何要对自己不可能战胜的城邦挑起争端呢？\n从这个本应疯狂的战士口中，你听到了两个未曾听闻的名字。这些事情的真相与你寻找金丝的目的并无干系，但探索未知也确实是无名客的工作——至少比一拳打死她有趣，你接这活儿总不会真的是为了战斗吧？
E: Survival, fortune, faith, honor, things they want to protect... Every warrior has a reason to fight to the death, and the Titankin that live for battle are no exception. Why would this enemy initiate a conflict against a city that they have no hope of defeating?\nYou hear two unfamiliar names from the mouth of this supposedly crazed warrior. Though finding the truth behind these names has nothing to do with your objective of finding the golden thread, it is also the duty of a Nameless to explore the unknown... At least it would be more interesting than finishing her off with a single blow. You didn't just take this job to get into fights after all, right?

C: 科员以斯帖正在为自己的形象而苦恼，她正在研究撞色搭配的事。带着你独特的审美，过去指导一下以斯帖吧！
E: Researcher Esther is having a rough day with her appearance. She's trying to learn about how colors match and clash. With your unique perspective on beauty, go and advise Esther!

C: 根据「马桶怪谈」的投稿人提供的坐标位置，找到马桶，并调查出「怪谈」背后的真相。
E: Follow the coordinates provided by the submitter of the Toilet Incident, find the toilet in question, and unveil the truth about the "ghost story."

C: 行政区的华劳斯似乎在为某件事烦恼……\n作为热心的开拓者，你准备去打听一下他的近况。
E: Wallace in the Administrative District seems to be worried about something...\nAs one helpful Trailblazer, you plan to ask how he has been lately.

C: 行政区的华劳斯似乎在为某件事烦恼……\n作为热心的开拓者，你准备去打听一下他的近况。
E: Wallace in the Administrative District seems to be worried about something...\nAs one helpful Trailblazer, you plan to ask how he has been lately.

C: 为了「鼹鼠党振兴计划」，尤利安打算继续秘密配送「地火」留下的快递。\n这件快递包裹上署的名是矿工匹克，去大矿区找到他吧。
E: For the Moles' Reinvigoration Plan, Julian plans to keep secretly delivering the packages Wildfire had left behind.\nThis package should be sent to Peak the miner. Find him in the Great Mine.

C: 你从「正当权益会社」发布的公告中得知查威发布了委托，想要行使他的正当权益。帮帮查威！
E: You see that Chavez has issued a commission on the Rightful Rights Society's noticeboard and wants to exercise his rightful rights. Go help Chavez!

C: 「仲裁官」的试炼再度到来。它的内容、形式、好处和损害你已经很清楚了，不是吗？去吧，为了「均衡」……
E: The Arbitrator's trial is here once again. You are already well aware of its content, format, pros, and cons, aren't you? Go then. For the sake of Equilibrium...

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 丢失的奇物竟然在一名叫「管家」的造物手里，它是谁？它在哪儿？你和佩佩两眼一抹黑，在走丢的造物处，它们似乎知道「管家」的信息……
E: The lost Curio is currently held by a creation known as "butler." Who is this butler? And where can they be found? Despite lacking any information, you might uncover new leads by locating the lost Curio...

C: 地衡司收到居民在丹鼎司洞天里发现近似「云吟术」的异象，并且在异象中遭遇了隐身怪物。\n广进根据异象的规律，在海滩上备好了饵食，希望借此找到引起异象的元凶……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission received reports that anomalies resembling cloudhymn magic have been spotted in the Alchemy Commission delve, and that invisible monsters were encountered within this phenomenon.\nBased on the patterns of anomalies, Guangjin has prepared bait on the beach in hopes of uncovering the true source behind the phenomenon.

C: 看起来这些药王秘传就是破坏了栖木的罪魁祸首。\n这些狡猾的家伙躲了起来，但他们不知道你是操纵机巧鸟的高手。找到他们吧。
E: Seems like these Disciples of Sanctus Medicus are the culprits who broke the roost.\nThese cunning foes went into hiding, but little did they know you were an expert at flying cycranes. Go find them.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 哈托努斯愿意做公证，令人兴奋的时刻终于到了，现在拿起「最强之矛」，刺向「最强之盾」吧！
E: Chartonus has agreed to act as the arbitrator — what an exciting turn of events! Now, take up the Strongest Lance and attack the Strongest Shield!

C: 果蔬摊老板德墨忒尔的女儿失踪已久，然而就在昨天，她梦到了自己最亲爱的孩子。或许你回溯记忆的能力能够帮到她。
E: The fruit and veg store owner Demetria's daughter has been missing for a long time. However, she dreamt of her beloved child just last night. Perhaps your ability to rewind memories could be of assistance?

C: 黎明云崖作为供奉、景仰刻法勒的圣地，有许多令人印象深刻的景观，带希瑞雅四处逛逛、参观参观吧。
E: As a holy site dedicated to honoring Kephale, Dawncloud features many remarkable views. Show Serena around the place.

C: 要解救被困的刻牢刻和克利克，必须先把游荡的黑潮造物解决。\n这种小事何必你亲力亲为？你决定交给柯库翁发挥。
E: To rescue the trapped Kelok and Kilik, you must first eliminate the roaming Black Tide Creatures.\nWhy waste your strength on such a trifling matter? You decide to leave it to Glykon.

C: 阿波罗尼居然失踪了…最后的目击记录位于城下的古遗迹，顺着记忆的残像前进，寻找他的踪迹吧。
E: Who would have thought that Apollonius disappeared... He was last seen in the ancient ruins under the city. Advance after the fragments of memory and look for traces of him.

C: 终于到了最后一次实验，去向温世玲问问看还缺少什么素材吧！
E: It's the final experiment, finally. Ask Wen Shiling what materials are still missing in this experiment.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往永冬岭为冰封的反物质军团虚卒拍摄照片，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to take a picture of a frozen Antimatter Legion Voidranger at the Everwinter Hill to help the museum make a replica.

C: 三月七好像需要帮助，去问问发生了什么吧。
E: March 7th seems like she needs help. Go ask what happened.

C: 按道理来说，罗浮夜市不应该如此冷清。眼下似乎只有小吃摊旁边还算有些烟火气。\n白露想让你买些小吃，你可以趁这个机会打听一下什么好吃，不过，也可以直接找高阿姨买小吃。
E: Theoretically, Luofu's night market shouldn't be so deserted. Only the food stalls have some semblance of life around them.\nBailu wants you to buy some snacks. You can take this opportunity to ask around and see what's tasty, or you can directly get some snacks from Tall Auntie.

C: 霄老大看不惯金人巷一成不变的状态，被迫相信公司会更好，但是他现在有了新的选择——「金人巷复兴计划」。\n霄老大同意与码头建立商业合作，商会也应该拿出诚意将同功坊纳入规划之中。
E: Mr. Xiao is fed up with Aurum Alley's stagnancy and forced himself to believe that the IPC would provide a better future. However, now he has a new choice in the form of the "Aurum Alley Revival Project."\nMr. Xiao has agreed to establish business relations with the docks, and the merchant guild should also offer something back by including Artistry Hardware into their plans.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说卖小吃的高阿姨和商会建立合作关系。但高阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Tall Auntie, who sells snacks, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Tall Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬，联手推出了模拟宇宙的第一次大更新！天才们对做项目各有各的想法，塞了不少好东西进去。斯蒂芬做了些「觐见之骰」，来让这场测试更加有趣。据他所称，其中封存着不同命途的「力量」，这对你觐见星神有大用处。说真的…他是认真在研究星神，还是在做游戏？
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, and Stephen have joined forces to bring about the Simulated Universe's first major update! The geniuses added a substantial influx of fun content from all their various ideas. Stephen created some Audience Dice to add a bit more spice to this test. According to him, the dice hold "powers" connected to different Paths, and is conducive to ensuring that you meet with the Aeons. Honestly, though, it's hard to tell if he's actually investigating the Aeons... or just trying to make a game.

C: 仙舟有句俗语，「再一再二不可再三」，这群公司员工显然不明白这个道理。他们很快就会明白了。
E: There is a saying on Xianzhou that "Once is an accident, twice is a coincidence, three times is a pattern." Obviously, these IPC workers are not aware of this logic. They will get it, soon.

C: 被岁阳附身的人不会再被岁阳附身——这也不太准确。准确来说，被尾巴大爷罩住的藿藿是不会再被其他岁阳附身的。上吧，教训一下那个夺取藿藿神智的岁阳。
E: Someone who is possessed by a heliobus cannot be possessed by another heliobus — but it is not exact true. To be more precise, Huohuo cannot be possessed by another heliobus while Mr. Tail is covering her. Go. Time to teach a lesson to the heliobus who possessed Huohuo.

C: 你与捉鬼小队的成员们翻开「罗浮杂俎」开始讨论其哪些奇闻怪事是妖物作祟。分辨的要诀是百分之九十九的常识和百分之一的直觉——有人称为直觉，有人叫它灵力。\n这篇「亡妻复生」的求助帖让你感到不对劲，你决定去见见发帖的求助人。
E: You and your fellow ghost-hunters browse Ghostly Grove, discussing which rumors and anomalies might be caused by heliobi. Accurately distinguishing them requires <unbreak>99</unbreak> percent common sense and one percent intuition — some call it intuition, some call it psychic powers.\nA post titled "My neighbor's dead wife seems to have come back" strikes an incongruous chord in your mind. You decide to meet the person who made the post.

C: 你们前往金人巷，打算见见帖子里提到的这个丧偶鳏夫。
E: You make your way to Aurum Alley with the intention of meeting the widower mentioned in the post.

C: 小院之中堆放了许多从凶宅中取出的杂物。四处调查一番，也许去往下一处的线索就隐藏其中。
E: Many items removed from the haunted residence are stacked in the small courtyard. Look around, and you might find the clue for your next destination buried within.

C: 为了重新获取怪物们的信任，舒翁邀请你进入她的心绪空间。\n拿到的碎片，似乎正好可以完成眼前的这幅拼图……
E: To regain the monsters' trust, Siobhan invites you into her Emoscape.\nThe piece you've just found seems to fit the missing space of the jigsaw right in front of you...

C: 办公室里居然还能藏下东西，真是头疼，但你隐约感觉这不是最后一次。
E: To think that stuff can still be stashed in this office. What a headache! But you have a vague feeling that this won't be the last time.

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C:
「明知注定失败的比赛，我也要参加到底吗？」
「那老子问你：注定失败的人生，就不活了吗？」
「可如果这注定是一场徒劳的悲剧，又何必看到结尾呢？」
「因为你是个战士啊，蠢材。」
E:
"Should I still participate in a tournament till the end when I know I'll definitely lose?"
"Then let me ask you: Will you stop living if you know you'll life is doomed to fail?"
"But why should I see the end of this story when it's fated to be a tragedy that I can't change?"
"Because you're a fighter, idiot."

C: 在这个格外难熬的时候，藿藿和尾巴来看你了。\n虽然他们应该也帮不上什么忙，但藿藿那么可爱，见到她还是有利于心理健康的。
E: Huohuo and Tail come to see you at this particularly difficult juncture.\nThey probably can't help much, but Huohuo is so cute! Seeing her must be good for one's mental health.

C: 接下来就是与铄金的决战了。\n卢卡坚定地相信，用自己的铁拳可以打碎一切无聊的「盘外招」。\n希望事情能像他预想的那样顺利。
E: The decisive battle against Shuojin is next.\nLuka firmly believes that his iron fist can shatter all pointless "dirty tricks."\nHopefully things will go as smoothly as he anticipates.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n乱破及时赶到，闭幕演出正式开始！按照惯例，去问问现场观众对你们乐队的评价吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nRappa arrives in the nick of time! The closing act has begun! Per convention, go ask the live audience what they think about your band.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到垃圾桶组合的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of the trashcan group's beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 你好像还是第一次见到这么多黑塔。不过，看热闹前，还是先问问螺丝咕姆发生了什么吧。
E: This is the first time you've seen so many Hertas. However, before you whip out the popcorn, maybe it would be best to ask Screwllum what happened first.

E: "Black tide muddles clear waters." The pool water has been contaminated — the first disaster foretold in the prophecy has occurred.\nIs the prophecy coming true, or is someone deliberately creating confusion? This will determine whether you truly transform into a baby seal. You must investigate carefully.

C: 又是这种情况…不用说，这次的星轨异常原因也是——
E: This again... Don't tell me, it's gotta be...

C: 我有点困…
E: I'm kinda sleepy...

C: 想做什么就做吧，总比以后后悔要好。
E: If there's something you've got to do, do it now. Better than regretting it further down the line.

C: 丹恒的情况比较特殊，我们希望能尽量保护他。
E: Dan Heng's situation is special — we hope to protect him to the best of our ability.

C: {M#男人就该对过去守口如瓶。}{F#不能背地里议论女孩子。}
E: {M#A man should keep his past a secret.}{F#You shouldn't talk about girls behind their backs.}

C: 所以，是否转向前往仙舟，我们用民主投票的方式来决议：伸出手掌代表同意，不伸手代表反对。
E: So, we're about to hold a democratic vote on whether to set a course for the Xianzhou. All those in favor, hold out your hand. All those against, keep your arms by your side.

C: ——玉界门正在开启，我代表「仙舟联盟：罗浮」，欢迎远道而来的客人，请您按照指引，有序停靠——
E: ...The Jade Gate is now opening. On behalf of the Xianzhou Luofu: Welcome, guests from afar. Please proceed to dock in accordance with the guidance...

C: 帕姆很忙。列车的工作不能落下。
E: Pom-Pom's too busy — looking after the Express is a full-time job.

C: 别光顾着吃啊，应该多拍些漂亮的风景。
E: Always thinking with your stomach. What about all the scenic photo opportunities?

C: 别这样看着我，难道我不怪吗？我可是把过去都忘光了，你见过哪个失忆的没点神奇的背景故事？我给自己都编了几十个啦。
E: What's with the funny look? Am I not strange enough for you? Name me an amnesiac that didn't have some crazy backstory. I already made up a few dozen for myself.

C: 你的首次「开拓之旅」顺利结束——感觉如何，{NICKNAME}？
E: So, your first trailblazing expedition has concluded. How do you feel, {NICKNAME}?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：艾利欧能窥见未来，却无法干涉你的选择。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Listen</color>: Elio can foresee the future, but he can't make decisions for you.

C: 我们现在所在的主控舱段，则是空间站的控制中枢。
E: The master control zone where we are now is the control center of the whole space station.

C: 你一定想到了吧？「光锥」既然能保存记忆，也就能保存经验和能力。所以「光锥」是非常珍贵的奇物，在{RUBY_B#银河垄断经济体}星际和平公司{RUBY_E#}是二级管制流通商品。
E: But you've already realized it, haven't you? Since Light Cones can preserve memories, they can also preserve experiences and abilities. That's why Light Cones are extremely precious rare items under level-2 restriction by the {RUBY_B#Galactic Monopoly}Interastral Peace Corporation{RUBY_E#}.

C: 麻烦你了，年轻人，我们在进行卫星遥感的预调试。我按住监测信号的按钮，你按我说的步骤来推摇杆。
E: Thanks, kid. We're doing some pre-checks for the satellite remote sensing. I'll hold down the button to monitor the signal, and you push the control stick according to my instructions.

C: 要谨防肉身观测时的交叉干扰，以免错过对细节的捕捉。星神示现，就算是蛛丝马迹，也万万不可放过。嘿，嘿嘿……
E: Beware of any interferences from your mortal body when observing... you must seize every detail. When an Aeon appears, even the tiniest trace must not be missed. Hehehe...

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着卢卡：「<unbreak>55</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Luka: "<unbreak>55</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 朝最近的月台移动吧，与列车会合是当务之急。
E: Head to the nearest platform. Getting to the Express is our top priority.

C: 我不是小家伙。
E: Don't call me "little one."

C: 俱乐部的{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#76}螺丝咕姆{RUBY_E#}曾经和他们对过一局，听说有个成员的骇客水平非常高，能跟螺丝咕姆的差分机球打个平手。
E: {RUBY_B#Genius Society #76}Screwllum{RUBY_E#} went up against the Stellaron Hunters before. I heard there was a member whose hacking skills were on par with Screwllum.

C: 我也能感受到你对空间站的热情啦，不过还是得狠心拒绝你。
E: I can sense your enthusiasm for the space station, but I'm afraid I have to turn you away.

C: 咱们现在只有四个人，再加一个帕姆，一节车厢睡一个人都管够，你忍心看着车厢空空荡荡么？
E: There's only four of us now, plus Pom-Pom. Each of us can have our own carriage to sleep in! You wouldn't have the heart to leave your carriage unmanned, would you?

C: 要不现在就上车聊聊，我给你泡杯咖啡——独门手艺。
E: How about we continue talking on the Express? I'll make you a cup of coffee, my special blend.

C: 星辰大海不仅是我的梦想，也是列车的心愿，我渴望探索新世界，而列车希望重回它过去的航路。
E: I love the vast reaches of space, and the Express does too. I want to seek out new worlds, and the Express wants to return to its former path.

C: 总之，谢谢你救了小三月一回。
E: In any case, I have to thank you for saving March.

C: 你居然也认得那东西？
E: You recognize this as well?

C: 你在整理数据？
E: Are you sorting out the data?

C: 放心，很快你就会习惯起来，变成和我一样成熟靠谱的乘客的。嗯。
E: Don't worry, you'll get used to it too, and before you know it you'll be a mature and dependable passenger just like me.

C: 但对未来…还是稍微有点担心。
E: But... I'm still a little worried about what lies ahead.

C: 关于星神…
E: About the Aeons...

C: 我是可可利亚•兰德，贝洛伯格的守护者。在此聆听各位的来意。
E: I am Cocolia Rand, Belobog's supreme guardian. I would be grateful if you could tell me why you have come.

C: 对了，你们看那边，刚才我就想吐槽了——这个城市好怪哦，为什么要把加热器堆在屋子外面呀？
E: Oh — I've been wondering — you see that heater over there? Why do they keep it outdoors? This city is so weird...

C: 正常来说，供暖用的设备不是都该装在室内才对嘛？
E: Normally you'd want a heater INSIDE a building, right?

C: 我也会成长的啦！现在我就在想计划…计划…有了！
E: Hey, I'm improving! I'm coming up with a plan right now... aaaand... got one!

C: 那里因为裂界的侵蚀而被封锁——我知道了，这的确是个可行的计划。
E: The one that's been sealed off... Hmm, it's possible.

C: 没准不是来接咱们的呢？
E: Maybe they're not here to escort us?

C: 怎么了，有事吗？要请愿就到后面排队去，别想着插队。
E: Hey, you got a problem? If you wanna petition then start queuing. Don't even think about pushing in.

C: 啊，我想起来了！从贝洛伯格外面来的那三个！哎呀，你们怎么还在城里乱跑，不知道铁卫正满大街找你们吗？
E: Ah, I remember! The three outsiders! Wait — why are you still strolling around the city? Do you know the Silvermane Guards are looking all over for you?

C: 时间怕是不允许。
E: I fear we may not have the time.

C: 还好，这阵子怪物的攻势有所缓和，我先回城里处理点事务，晚些再返回前线…之前不是告诉你了吗？
E: Things are manageable, the latest wave of monster attacks has slowed. I'm back in the city to take care of a few matters, but I'll be back on the front line later... I thought I told you?

C: 唉，真是…走投无路的人哪还有心思玩解谜游戏啊，这根本就是在给祖孙后代添堵嘛！
E: Ugh... What were my ancestors thinking? Why would anyone in dire need have the time to solve puzzles? Way to mess with their children!

C: 出发，再去行政区溜达一圈！
E: Let's go! One more round in the Administrative District!

C: ——谁啊？不敲门就闯进来，知不知道……
E: Who's there? Didn't your parents tell you to knock before—

C: 既然上下层的联系又被打通了，咱们两家也该多交流交流待客经验了。
E: Since the passage between the Overworld and Underworld has opened up again, it's about time we shared some tips with each other, hotel manager to hotel manager.

C: 好了，时候不早咯——我们回去吧。
E: Well, it's getting late, let's head back.

C: 这个小箱子里装的是什么？
E: What's in the case, Serval?

C: 我还有事，先告辞了。
E: I have things to do, so I'll leave you to it.

C: 这是童话剧《蕾莎与特鲁太太》的宣传画。
E: A poster for the fairy-tale play Leisha and Mrs. Trude.

C: 不过从诊断结果来看，你们的身体没有异常。
E: Anyway, the opinion of the clinic is that none of you have come to harm.

C: 「地火」？
E: Wildfire?

C: 「地火」是什么？
E: What is Wildfire?

C: 你这么一说，我还挺想看你遭殃的诶。
E: Oh? Y'know, it might be interesting to see you get in trouble.

C: …光知道名字有什么用！
E: ...What good is your name by itself!

C: 这次的情况不一样…就这两天，矿工和流浪者间突然爆发了大规模的冲突，场面相当难看。
E: Things are much more serious this time... For two days now, huge clashes have been breaking out between the miners and the vagrants. It isn't pretty.

C: 实话实说而已，你们身手确实不赖。要是「地火」的人都有你们的功夫，也不至于被史瓦罗压制得死死的了。
E: I'll be honest, you guys are hardworking. If everyone from Wildfire were as impressive as you on the battlefield, we wouldn't be so hard-pressed by Svarog.

C: 我明白史瓦罗先生的用意！只是…克拉拉觉得，只有这样还不够。
E: I know why you did it, Mr. Svarog! It's just... I don't think it'll be enough.

C: 啊，他们啊，是桑博不知从哪带下来的「外来者」，因为有求于「地火」才跟我一起下来的。说来话长，还是留给他们自己解释吧。
E: Ahh, them! They're outsiders that Sampo brought down from who-knows-where. They need a favor from Wildfire, so I brought them with me. It'll be faster if they explain.

C: 如果你们在找的是个有点年头的东西…那没有比他更好的消息源了。
E: If you're looking to pick up a thread... he may well be your best source.

C: 嘿，抓住你了！
E: Ha! Gotcha!

C: 你的戏怎么这么多……
E: What are they feeding you kids down here...

C: 少来这套，你明明是看见我们心虚才跑的。
E: Save it. You saw us in there and got scared, so you pulled a runner.

C: 我跟你说，天底下什么事情都一个道理：找到需求，啥都好办。地下被封锁了十几年，总有一伙人不愿意坐以待毙吧？
E: I'm telling you, no matter where you go, there's only one rule to getting things done: Find the demand. Y'know, like supply and demand? Anyway, The underground has been sealed off for more than a decade — but do you think people here are just resigned to their fate?

C: 我没问题的，希儿和各位也一定要小心……
E: No problem. Seele, and the rest of you — be careful...

C: 银鬃铁卫已经奉命全部撤回地上了，在这里，我不能以铁卫的身份行动。
E: The Silvermane Guards withdrew to the surface long ago... I must avoid that identity here.

C: 「炉心」被封锁的详情还有待调查。除此之外，桑博似乎有一条来往上下层区的「门路」，是他的秘密，将来也许有用。
E: The reason for sealing the Furnace Core still needs to be investigated. In addition, it appears that Sampo has secret connections that grant him passage between here and the surface. That may come in useful to us.

C: 接下来是我们的目标——星核。
E: Next we have our goal — the Stellaron.

C: 那个所谓的「{RUBY_B#灾祸的源头}星核{RUBY_E#}」…假设真的找到了它，你们有多大把握能阻止寒潮？
E: This {RUBY_B#Source of the Disaster}Stellaron{RUBY_E#} you speak of... if you were to find it, how sure are you that you could stop the Eternal Freeze?

C: 这样吗…谢谢，你这么坦诚，我心里反而稍微踏实了些。
E: I see... Well, thank you for being sincere. In itself, it's a comfort to me.

C: 连接地上下的通道，里面全是螺旋上升的石阶。我反正是搞不懂，拥有这么发达的科技，筑城者还执着于台阶是图什么，盖个电梯不好么？
E: It's a passage connecting the Underworld and the Overworld, a big, stone, spiral stairway. Y'know, I don't understand the Architects' obsession with making these steps when there is such advanced technology available. Wouldn't an elevator have been better?

C: …我知道了。
E: ...I see.

C: 其实，虎克还有一些值钱的宝贝落在铆钉镇里了。它们被丢弃在那里也很可惜，要是带回来再卖个好价钱，那么虎克给老爹买礼物就不用求任何人了。
E: Actually, I still have some valuable treasure of my own in Rivet Town. It's a shame I left it there. If I go bring it back and sell it for a decent price, I can buy a gift for daddy without begging anyone for money.

C: 你怎么比虎克还没有礼貌，至少听完之后再拒绝嘛！
E: Hmph, at least hear me out first before you refuse.

C: 虎克那孩子，总能把人们团结到自己身边，不管对方是大人还是小孩。这是一种天分——强迫她当个「乖孩子」，就是在扼杀这种天分。
E: Hook has an uncanny ability to rally people to her cause — both adults and children. It's a skill alright, and forcing her to be well-behaved puts a lid on it.

C: 等等，这玩偶熊的眼睛……
E: W—Wait, look at the eyes...

C: 我看你心事重重的…
E: I can tell something's weighing on your mind...

C: 我担心盔甲的污染会影响他…
E: I'm worried about contamination by the armor...

C: 哎，「怪物盔甲」之前的战绩明明很不错的，可惜后期乏力……
E: But Monster Armor wasn't bad at all before. It's a shame he lost his edge...

C: 早知道你会过来，我就不派他去裂界里找新的盔甲了。这种事还是得交给你这种专业人士来才行。
E: If I had known you were coming, I wouldn't have sent him to the Fragmentum to find a new set of armor. Should always leave things like this to pros like you.

C: 为什么已经寄出的信会被退回呢？也许…也许是因为他的妻儿已经不在那里了。
E: Why would this letter be returned? Maybe... maybe his wife and children are no longer there.

C: 老板和我说过了，「特殊礼遇」其实就是贵宾级待遇嘛，您现在已经是我们拳馆的贵宾客座拳手了——只要您想比划比划，只消张张嘴，我们立刻给您安排！
E: Boss already told me, the house special is for VIPs, and you are definitely a VIP boxer now— anytime you want to swing a few, just say the word and we'll get someone for you!

C: 各位观众，请看！坐镇擂台西角的，正是在磐岩镇引起巨大轰动、武艺高超的新秀战士——{NICKNAME}！
E: Next up, we have! Sitting in the west corner of the ring, the rookie fighter who caused a huge stir in Boulder Town with {M#his}{F#her} superb skills and moves— {NICKNAME}!

C: 那是当然！你肯定想象不到，我们费了好～大的力气——
E: Mm-hmm, you bet! You might not believe this, but we summoned up all our strength, and then...

C: 「自己」…嗐，我都快忘了自己到底在追求什么样的生活了。
E: My "own" way... Ha, I don't even remember what kind of life I want.

C: 乖，喝了药就不疼啦。
E: C'mon, drink it up and you'll feel better.

C: 只要两只垃圾桶站在一起，它们就可以面对宇宙中的所有苦难。
E: As long as trashcans stand together, they can weather all difficulties in the universe.

C: 你有种预感，这东西在不久以后的将来，会给你创造麻烦。
E: You have a feeling that this thing will cause you problems in the future.

C: 这座古老的垃圾箱沉静、严肃、不怒自威，令你联想起一位老成持重的长者。许多年来，它就这样伫立在地下街边，见证沧海桑田，世事变迁。
E: This old dumpster stands silently, carrying its own resolute gravitas that reminds you of an elder of vast wisdom. It stood on the side of the street for years, witnessing its rise and fall.

C: 向它致敬。
E: I pay respects to it.

C: 我们歇一会再去。
E: We need to take a breather.

C: 很遗憾，事关外交，我必得公事公办。但若能捉拿猎手，得知其投放星核的目的，亦是在「星核」一事上帮了大忙。
E: I'm afraid my hands are tied on the matter — this is a diplomatic affair and I have rules to follow. But if you can bring me the Stellaron Hunter and discover her motive for placing a Stellaron on the ship, it would be of great help in resolving the incident.

C: 我们忙里忙外这么久，怎么天还亮着啊？在司辰宫里我都以为过去老半天了。
E: What? But we've done a whole day's work — what's the sun playing at? It felt like we spent the whole day in the Palace of Astrum.

C: 我明白了。
E: I understand.

C: 就是那位丹鼎司的龙女，白露大人。
E: The dragon lady of the Alchemy Commission — Lady Bailu.

C: 我们会向各位发放物资
E: We will be distributing supplies to everyone

C: 我？
E: Me?

C: 我？
E: Me?

C: 谁叫宇宙这么危险呢。作为行商，公司和联盟只能庇佑我们进行星际穿越而已，安保这件事可全得看自己的手段。
E: The universe is a dangerous place. The IPC and the Alliance can only ensure that we travel in safety. Our personal security is dependent on our own capacities.

C: 谁干的好事啊！这下完了，本姑娘对机巧玩意儿一窍不通…等会儿，你为什么会知道？！
E: Ughh, who did this? I'm terrible with machines and stuff... Hold on, how do you know!?

C: 与符玄一同出发
E: Go with Fu Xuan.

C: 这恐怕是从流水线上遗落的造船材料，虽然我也认不出这是什么……但这应该和卡芙卡没什么关系。
E: I think it might be shipbuilding material leftover from the assembly line, though I can't tell exactly what the substance is... I don't think it's connected to Kafka.

C: 哇，哪有你这么安慰人的！
E: Hey, is that supposed to make us feel better!?

C: 我相信这才是幻胧的目的——让我们因此身陷混乱和猜疑，彻底落入她的毒计。
E: I believe this to be Phantylia's goal — to sow seeds of doubt among us and ensnare us in a malevolent trap.

C: 这张仙舟人特有的不辨岁月的脸旁上凝固着强烈的痛苦。你在他发鬓边找到一簇变异的枝条——他死前似乎正经历炼狱般的折磨。
E: An expression of agony is frozen on the face of this Xianzhou man of indiscernible age. You find a cluster of mutated branches at the temples of his hair — he seems to have been subjected to purgatory-like torture before his death.

C: 毕竟，是他们将所有仙舟人转变成了长生种…也是他们自「建木」中研究出了种种不可思议的技术。
E: After all, it was they who changed the Xianzhou natives into long-life species... They also developed many incredible technologies from the tree itself.

C: 仙舟人最忌讳将「魔阴身」展露人前，因为那意味着放弃为人，输给了埋藏在长生血脉中的「孽物」…也违背了帝弓的训诫。
E: The greatest fear of the Xianzhou people is succumbing to our mara-struck form around others. To do so means that we have given up on being human, lost to the abomination sleeping in our immortal blood... and violated the Reignbow's admonishments.

C: 咳…要是本座说「不知道」，你该不会立即撂挑子不干吧？
E: *coughing* ...If I told you I wasn't certain, would you turn back on the spot?

C: 明白么？长生种的结局，就是不再感受到快乐与幸福、只余下如伤痕般镌刻在心头的痛悔恨仇。在这些极端情绪下，身为人的自我开始崩溃…这便是「魔阴身」的开端。
E: Do you understand now? The fate of all long-life species is to no longer feel joy and happiness, left only with hatred and regret etched into the heart. Under such extreme conditions, a person's ego starts to crumble... and that is the beginning of the mara-struck condition.

C: 盯上仙舟的不是「焚风」，不是「星啸」，你们很幸运哦。
E: You are fortunate that Zephyro and Celenova never set their gaze upon the Xianzhou.

C: 丹恒，你明白了吗？丹枫死后，罗浮的持明已没有能办到此事的人了。曾守望建木的你，应该能为我们开启前往「建木」的道路。
E: Do you understand, Dan Heng? Since Dan Feng perished, the Luofu Vidyadhara have no longer had an individual capable of performing such feats. But you, who once kept watch over the Arbor, should be able to open a way through to that great tree.

C: 这是什么谜语吗？「叩祝三爪」…什么意思啊？
E: Is that some kind of riddle? "Reverence to the three talons..." What the heck does that mean?

C: 各位想必都准备好了吧？
E: I hope everyone is prepared?
...Of course.

C: 他们此刻正身陷苦战呢。
E: They're caught in their own bitter struggle.

C: 让「毁灭」的力量侵蚀各位的血肉，将你们铸成纳努克大人的棋子！
E: The power of the Destruction will eat away at your flesh and transform you into pawns of the great Nanook!

C: 等太卜大人在这里干上个二三十年再说吧。
E: Better to wait until the master diviner has another twenty or thirty years under her belt.

C: 你给介绍介绍？
E: Go on...

C: 放心吧杨叔～
E: Don't worry, Mr. Yang.

C: 你是来道别的？
E: Are you here to say goodbye?

C: {NICKNAME}，要走了吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you off then?

C: 汪！
E: Woof!

C: 老大英明！「三少学习互助会」万岁！
E: Good thinking, Boss! Long live the Luofu Study Club!

C: 很高兴您能这么说，那担保的事……
E: I'm glad you've put it this way. So about the vouching...

C: 请放心，我已吩咐艾丽小姐尽快解决「系统故障」——再给各位升级房型作为补偿。酒店稍后就会安排合适的房间。
E: Please be at ease, I have instructed Miss Alley to resolve the system error as soon as possible. I have also upgraded your rooms as token compensation. Please wait a moment for the hotel to arrange for suitable accommodation.

C: 总算到了。大家先回房间放行李吧。
E: We're finally here. Let's all head to our rooms first and put down our bags.

C: 在你们处理罗浮星核的时候，我第一时间告诉了帕姆。
E: When we were handling that Luofu Stellaron matter. I told Pom-Pom about it first thing.

C: 我的目的很简单，帮公司拿回一些本属于它的东西。如果你愿意帮我，事成之后，你会得到丰厚的回报，还有「存护」的庇护。
E: My goal is simple: Help the IPC retrieve some things that belonged to them in the first place. If you agree, when this is done, you will stand to reap great rewards, as well as the Preservation's protection.

C: 那众人恐惧却渴望的力量，就在你双手一握中……
E: The power that men both fear and desire is right in the palms of your hands...

C: …厉害啊朋友，才来匹诺康尼没多久，就学会邀人入伙了。
E: ...Well played, friend. You haven't been in Penacony long, but you already know how to rope people in to your cause.

C: 我说，你为什么还不走？
E: I said, why haven't you left?

C: …我们在哪里见过吗？
E: ...Have we met somewhere before?

C: 呵呵，毕竟这里是「梦境」嘛。
E: Hehe, well you are in the Dreamscape, after all.

C: 「黄金的时刻」是什么？
E: What is "Golden Hour?"

C: （吓我一跳，广告牌居然会动？！）
E: (Wait, did that billboard just move!?)

C: 你怎么知道我是谁？
E: How do you know who I am?

C: （…复现完成！现在您可以更好地享用梦境了。）
E: (...The replication is complete! Now, you can enjoy an enhanced Dreamscape experience.)

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: …不，你不是帕。
E: ...No, you are not.

C: 咳咳。别得意，我还没报完菜名呢帕！
E: Ahem. Don't get carried away just yet. This is only the beginning of your list of culinary offenses!

C: 那你现在有活干了。
E: Well, you have a job now.

C: 再往下走就是格拉克斯大道——黄金时刻的主干道。
E: If we keep going, we'll reach Glaux Avenue, which is the road to Golden Hour.

C: 这样啊…那我们就去别的地方吧。
E: I see... Let's go somewhere else then.

C: 不愧是无名客。但对我来说…家族的「万众一心」铸就了它，也让这梦境变得博爱而宽容，就像家族本身。
E: I'm not surprised to hear that from a Nameless. If you ask me, I'd say it was the unity of The Family that brought this dream into existence — and the dream has become just as loving and forgiving as The Family.

C: 没想到能在这儿遇见你——哎呀，我真是走大运了！
E: What a coincidence to run into you here! Oh, my! I'm in luck today!

C: 有关「美梦」的真相——你不就在寻找它么？别被美景迷惑了，亲爱的，安逸的环境造就盲目的人。
E: Don't you want to find out the truth behind the dream? Don't let all the pretty scenery in the dream world distract you from your goal — as soon as you get complacent, you'll lose sight of the truth.

C: 一如既往，伙计。要是你真的不懂，就回头看看吧……
E: Same as always, pal. If you still don't get it, just turn around and take a look...

C: …谢谢。
E: ...Thank you.

C: 我好像看到奇怪的东西了…
E: I think I'm seeing things...

C: <color=#ff3a3e>与你分别后不久，我察觉到有人在暗中窥视。循着镜子中的视线，我最终找到了一位身披黑纱的女士，并与她做了些…深入交流。暂且不细述了。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Shortly after we parted ways, I felt someone's spying eyes on me. I looked in the mirror and spotted a lady wearing a black veil. We had a deep conversation, but I won't bore you with the details.</color>

C: 怎么办到的，小孔雀？脱光衣服向他下跪赔罪，承诺「呜呜呜，公司绝对不会打匹诺康尼的主意」？
E: How did you do it, little peacock? Did you strip yourself naked, apologize to him on your knees, and promise that IPC would never harm Penacony?

C: 他说要出人命了…
E: He says someone's life is in danger...

C: 我看到个表盘，然后拨动了它。
E: I saw a dial and got it moving.

C: 呜呜…我…突然想起了母星的老妈……
E: *sob*... I... thought about my mother on my home planet...

C: 方才的混乱…听说是有群假面愚者在街头闹事，扰乱了秩序。我途径此地，受到盘查，过程中发生了一些…误会。就结果而言，又给你添麻烦了。
E: About all the commotion just now... I heard a bunch of Masked Fools were causing a ruckus on the streets. I happened to be passing through, got stopped for questioning, and there were some... misunderstandings along the way. Anyway, I owe you another one.

C: 不了。
E: I don't think so.

C: 好吵…声音…越来越刺耳了……
E: So loud... the voice... It's becoming more shrill...

C: （爱德华医生说他来不及做那么多分支了，你就接受吧。）
E: (Dr. Edward said he didn't have the time to make any alternative storylines. Just accept it.)

C: 我明白你的愤怒，也愿意接受它…但时候未到。我们应当擦亮眼睛，思考真正的敌人藏身何处，以及如何与之相抗……
E: I understand your anger, and I will accept it... but this isn't the time. We should keep our eyes peeled and consider where the true enemies are hiding, and how to fight them...

C: 但是？没有什么但是，这就是事实。
E: But? There's no but. This is the truth.

C: 你很敏锐嘛，鸡翅膀男孩。
E: Pretty sharp, aren't you, Chicken Wing Boy?

C: 咦，这是怎么推断出来的？
E: Huh, how'd you figure that one out?

C: 不胜荣幸，那就感谢二位帮忙了。
E: I'm indebted to you both for your help.

C: 在我面前就可以吗？
E: How about in front of me?

C: <color=#ff3a3e>我的意思是，没问题。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>I mean, no problem.</color>

C: 以及——在撤离的同时，我们还能为流萤小姐做更多事，不是吗？这附近还残存着一些她留下的痕迹。在它们彻底消失前，让其成为你们的「记忆」吧。
E: Also, while we're departing, we can still do more for Miss Firefly, can't we? Some remnants of her presence linger nearby. Seize the chance to etch them into your "Remembrance" before they're gone.

C: 不怀好意的人们被一一驱逐，谐乐大典也平安到来。你们被奉为上上之宾，在歌剧院中央聆听这颗盛会之星的笑声。那些欢呼被夹杂在碰杯的苏乐达与歌舞的人群间，如此清晰——
E: With the expulsion of all ill-intentioned visitors, the Charmony Festival proceeds smoothly. As honored guests, you partake in the joyous atmosphere, filled with laughter, clinking glasses full of SoulGlad, and the exuberant singing and dancing of the crowd...

C: 《崩坏：星穹铁道》
E: Honkai: Star Rail

C: …忆者，我想我们的交易早就结束了。
E: ...Memokeeper, I think our little deal is finished.

C: （砂金自顾自走了…他确实没有强迫的意思，但总感觉不对劲……）
E: (Aventurine just sauntered off... He really doesn't mean to force it, but something still seems off...)

C: 有石而无水，有雷而无雨，有血而无泪。你用坠星捶打我们，用风雷淬炼我们，用裂土咀嚼我们……
E: Land of rock, but not water, lightning, but not rain, blood, but not tears. You beat us with your falling stars, you lash us with wind and storm, you chew us up with the cracked earth...

C: 回家…啊…三重眼的地母神，是您。您听见了么？谢谢…谢谢……
E: Back home... Ahh... Gaiathra Triclops, you came. Do you hear that? Thank you... Thank you...

C: 那个男人想再见你一面。
E: That man wants to see you again.

C: 陀斐特的火魔…即便你为那位星神献上生命，也得不到祂的垂青。
E: Fetora's fire demon... Even if you sacrifice your life for that Aeon, you won't get special treatment.

C: 乐意为您效劳。
E: Happy to be of service.

C: …算了，还是让本姑娘紧盯他吧！实在不行，咱们就反过来利用他呗。
E: ...Forget about it. Just let me keep an eye on him! If that doesn't work, we can just turn the tables and use him instead!

C: 有人声称你是这起连环命案的真凶——前来赴宴的泯灭帮同样惨死在你的刀下，而今，你试图在匹诺康尼掀起又一场腥风血雨。
E: Some claim that you're the real culprit behind these murders... that the Annihilation Gang's tragic fate at the banquet was a result of your blade... and that you're now attempting to unleash another bloodbath on Penacony.

C: 我们到了。朝露公馆，橡木家系的要塞，各位家主共议匹诺康尼大计的地点。
E: We're here. The Dewlight Pavilion is the Oak Family's fortress and a place where heads of the families meet to discuss great plans for Penacony.

C: 当然。交易嘛，重要的是你坐在桌子哪边。
E: Of course. It's business, after all. What's important is where you're seated at the table.

C: 我们之前犯了错，正在努力将功补过，没空管别的！监视公司高管托帕，确保她在匹诺康尼期间始终待在白日梦酒店——这次没找错人！
E: We made a mistake last time, and we're working hard to rectify it now. We don't have time for anything else! Surveilling the IPC Executive Topaz, ensuring that she stays put at The Reverie hotel during her time on Penacony... We've got the right one this time!

C: …将有无数的人越过他的身躯，飞上更高的天际。
E: ...countless others would surpass him, soaring to even greater heights.

C: 唉…世风日下，人心不古……
E: The world has truly lost its way...

C: 明知故问，因为你也快要和她一样，永远说不出话了呗。
E: Well, it means you'll soon end up like her, unable to speak ever again.

C: 喏，给你。这是我珍藏的「相互保证毁灭」按钮，我自己也有个一模一样的。只要我们中有一人按下它，对方就会立刻和整个匹诺康尼一起炸上天。
E: Here you go. This is my precious "Mutually Assured Destruction" button, and I have one just like it. When either of us presses it, the other and the whole of Penacony will go up in smoke.

C: 到了这份上还有心思大放厥词…不过，一言为定啦。
E: You're still talking big... But sure, if that happens, I'll stay true to my word.

C: 这里是梦境，可爱的小姐，只要你想，任何东西都可以下咽，安逸、饥饿、迷茫、厌倦…应有尽有，俯拾皆是。
E: Why, we're in a dream, my lovely lady. You can help yourself to anything if you wish for it — comfort, hunger, confusion, or even boredom... It's all within reach, right at your fingertips.

C: 说了这么多，其实调饮远没有你想的那么复杂，挑选喜欢的材料，再全部丢进杯子里拌匀，就这么简单。
E: That being said, mixing a drink is way simpler than you'd imagine. Just pick your favorite ingredients, toss them in a glass, mix it up, and it's done.

C: 这是饮料钱，请帮我转交给她。我先走了，再见。
E: Here's the payment for the drinks. Please pass it on to her. I'm leaving now.

C: {RUBY_B#同谐}同心圆{RUBY_E#}…愿你不会忘记自己的初心。
E: {RUBY_B#The Harmony}Concentric circles{RUBY_E#}... May you always remember where you started.

C: 不需要，里头人多口杂，咱们站外边说就行。
E: We don't need to go in — we don't want to draw any unwanted attention inside. We can just talk here.

C: 看来坊间传闻不错——「死亡」确实是在随机挑选受害者。并且从星期日的批注内容来看…他对「死亡」并不陌生。
E: Looks like the rumors were right — "Death" does seem to be targeting random victims. And based on Sunday's notes... he's no stranger to "Death."

C: 「…诡计永不败露。」
E: "...and your schemes forever concealed."

C: …再见。
E: ...Bye.

C: 好咯——演员已经就位，好戏该开场了。
E: Okay, all the actors are in place. It's time for the show to begin.

C: 哇，这里好高——比沙漠里最高的石头还要高——
E: Woah, this place... it's so tall. Even taller than the tallest rocks in the desert...

C: 我以为自己的意图已经足够明显了……
E: I thought my intent was crystal clear...

C: 给各位分享一则谚语吧：「睡眠是死亡的预演」。生命因何而沉睡？因为我们尚未准备好迎接死亡。
E: Have you ever heard the saying "Sleep is the rehearsal of death"? Why does life slumber? All because we are not ready for the final rest.

C: 在它们彻底消散之前……
E: Before they vanish completely...

C: …我的回答未必能消解你的困惑，因为它伴你一路走来，早已是你生命的一部分。
E: ...My answer might not be able to resolve your confusion, because it has been with you throughout your journey, and is already a part of your life.

C: 你已见过我了，星核猎手萨姆。
E: You've met me before — I'm Sam — the Stellaron Hunter.

C: 要真有人来找事，我们不怕上战场。请放心，梦境的和平稳定就由猎犬们来守护！
E: If trouble comes knocking on our door, we're not afraid to go to war. Rest assured. The Dreamscape's peace will be protected by the Bloodhound Family!

C: 更奇怪的是，这里也分成了贸易区和居住区，尽管朴素，却十分完备。看来有相当数量的人在此生活。
E: What's even more bizarre, is that this place is also separated into trade and residential areas. The layout may be simple, but the facilities are very comprehensive. It seems that there are quite a number of people living here.

C: 保险起见，还是确认一番为好。
E: We'd better check, just to be sure.

C: …嗯？你边上这位是……
E: ...Hm? And who might this be...?

C: 我慕名前来匹诺康尼，费尽千辛万苦找到流梦礁，只因为这里是她的逝世之地。天妒英才啊…如果拉扎莉娜女士还有时间，她一定能找出逆转忆质流动的方法！
E: I came to Penacony to learn more about my idol, and went to great lengths to seek out Dreamflux Reef, all because this is her final resting place. Prodigies always meet their demise prematurely... If only Madam Razalina had more time, she would've discovered a way to reverse the flow of memoria!

C: 呃，你说的不会是忆域迷因吧……
E: Uh... You're not talking about the Memory Zone Meme, are you...

C: 如果这说法属实，美梦与此地的诸多相似之处就说得通了。
E: If that's true, it's no wonder there are so many similarities between this place and the sweet dream.

C: 不过在此之前，还有位重要的客人要与你们一同前往。
E: But before that, you'll have an important guest joining you.

C: …如果羽翼不幸残缺，那就把翅膀借给彼此。
E: ...And should our feathers be damaged, then we share our wings with one another.

C: 呵呵，这确实是一种理想主义的解读。那么，星期日，你又是怎么想的？
E: Well, that's an idealistic way of putting it. So, what are your thoughts, Sunday?

C: 在开始前，重新做个自我介绍吧——流梦礁的建立者、「钟表匠」的副手，同时也是寄出那份邀请函的人……
E: Before we begin, let me reintroduce myself. I'm the founder of Dreamflux Reef, the deputy of the Watchmaker, and... the one who sent out that invitation...

C: 是的。
E: Yes.

C: 人我带来了，剩下的部分，就由加拉赫亲自向你们诉说吧…各位，保重。
E: Well I did my job — I gathered everyone here. Gallagher will explain the rest to you... Take care.

C: …不用多说，你没事就好。
E: ...There's no need for words. You're safe, and that's all that matters.

C: 但美梦终究是有局限的。它只是失意者们避风的港湾，并不能从现实的源头根除痛苦。
E: However, even the sweet dream has its limitations. While it provides solace to the disillusioned, it can't completely eliminate pain in reality.

C: 我们等那忆者半个系统时，如果她还不出现，就再想其他办法。这时间足够咱俩好好盘盘现状了，依你之见，问题出在哪？
E: Let's give the Memokeeper another half system hour. If she doesn't show up, we'll need to come up with a new plan. In the meantime, let's take stock of the situation. What do you think?

C: 虽然不知道你经历了什么，但人要为自己负责，这点我赞同，任何人都没法代劳。
E: I don't know what you've been through, but I agree that people must take responsibility for their choices, because no one else can do it for them.

C: 丹恒兄弟，你之前在酒店转了一圈，有没有看见哪位客人，或哪几位客人…身份比较尊贵？
E: By the way, when you were walking around the hotel, did you happen to see any... important-looking guests?

C: 但有些事即便没有意义，也总是要去做的。
E: Well, some tasks have to be done, even if they are pointless.

C: 不对吧…让你表演「失望」，你怎么这么雀跃……
E: No... that's not right... You're trying to express disappointment. Why do you sound so chipper?

C: 请走上舞台，用华丽的战斗技巧，制裁那些邪恶的反派角色吧！匹诺康尼下一位动作之星，就是你！
E: Please make your way to the stage and vanquish those malevolent scoundrels with your dazzling fighting techniques! The title of Penacony's next big action star awaits you!

C: 适者生存的蛮荒之地，还是人人得以幸福的美梦乐园？
E: A dystopia for the survival of the fittest, or a Sweetdream Paradise for all?

C: 上回书说到，哈努兄弟做好了战斗准备。就在这时，他听见走廊外传来了沉重的脚步声。果然，恶棍军团的喽啰们已经闯入了哈努兄弟的宅邸！
E: Last we saw, Hanu was preparing for battle. Suddenly, he hears heavy footsteps coming from the hallway. The Malevolent Mischief Makers have broken into his home!

C: 锵锵——成功了！
E: Ta-dah, success!

C: 你应该明白，这么做意味着与星穹列车为敌。
E: You should know that these actions make you an enemy of the Astral Express.

C: 我们认真将它抚养大，每天都备好精致的食料，还为它梳理羽毛。后来，在知更鸟离开匹诺康尼的那天，我们打开笼子的门，让它回到天空。
E: We passionately nursed it back to health, preparing only the best food for it every day. We even preened its feathers. Later, on the day that Robin left Penacony, we opened the cage door and let it fly back into the sky.

C: 「不错。她可提到身中流弹一事？」
E: "Correct. Has she mentioned anything about a stray bullet?"

C: 但我和你不同，我是为「自我」而活的。在我看来，人为自己做出选择，是理所应当的行为，也是他们与生俱来的权利。
E: But unlike you — I live for the "self." From my perspective, individuals making choices for themselves is their birthright.

C: 但很可惜…桂冠依旧属于伊德莉拉！
E: It's a pity... The laurels of victory belong to Idrila!

C: 你对这里有印象吗，米沙？
E: Does this place ring any bells, Misha?

C: 所以「钟表匠」留下的梦泡空无一物，不是因为没有内容，而是因为…其中的内容擅自离开了？
E: So, it's not that the Watchmaker's dream bubble is empty, but rather... the stuff inside ran away?

C: 没关系，我早知道你们几个是留不住的。安心去吧，朋友，把这个也带上。
E: Yeah, I knew you wouldn't stay on the Express forever. Leave in peace, my friend, and take this with you.

C: 再次感谢你对星穹列车提供的帮助。祝愿我们在现实中再见。
E: Thank you again for your assistance for the Astral Express. May we meet again in reality.

C: 你…没有味觉了么？
E: Have you... lost your sense of taste?

C: 回头看看你的朋友们吧。他们每个人都在为下一个目的地欢欣鼓舞，对各自的现在与未来充满了期待。要是现在就道破一切，岂不是太扫兴了么？
E: Turn around and take a look at your friends. Every one of them is reveling at the arrival of their next destination, all filled with hopes and expectations of their own present and future. Revealing everything at this moment would be a bit of a buzzkill, wouldn't it?

C: 不如就挑个夜晚吧。我会备好烛光、香氛，还有软榻，为你打造一个舒适的梦乡。然后，我就把那答案当做一个小小的睡前故事说给你听，哄你入睡……
E: How about one fine night? I will prepare the candles, aromatics, and even a cushy couch to create a cozy dream land for you. And then, I will tell you the answer in the form of a little bedtime story to lull you to sleep...

C: 你是想说，{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}沉眠无相者{RUBY_E#}从不瞥视任何人，因此绝无人可能分得「虚无」的权柄，对么？
E: Are you suggesting that {RUBY_B#IX, the Nihility}the sleeping and shapeless{RUBY_E#} never bestows its gaze upon anyone, and thus no one can truly possess the power of the Nihility?

C: 「梦想之地」匹诺康尼
E: Penacony, Land of the Dreams

C: 姬子
E: Himeko

C: 景元 仙舟联盟
E: Jing Yuan and The Xianzhou Alliance

C: 剧本指导
E: Script Supervisor

C: 前星穹列车机修工，匹诺康尼传奇大亨「钟表匠」。
E: Former mechanic of the Astral Express, and the legendary big shot of Penacony, "the Watchmaker."

C: 一道凉意自你的指尖传来。依经验，随着这道触感一同前来的，应当还有种种斑斓错杂的记忆幻影……
E: A chill travels from your fingertips, carrying with it a myriad of vibrant and intertwined memories, as experience would suggest...

C: 现在就差你了，赶紧收拾收拾。准备好了，咱们就出发！
E: Everyone's waiting for you, so hurry up and pack. We're leaving as soon as you're ready!

C: 现在，橡木以外的四大家系正在尽力平息事件余波。列车组也受到邀请，去家族的「晖长石号」上一坐，以见证人的身份参与重要会谈。
E: Now, all the major lineages, except for the Oak Family, are dealing with the aftermath. The Family has invited the Crew to the Radiant Feldspar as witnesses for an important meeting.

C: 别做引人瞩目的事，别去惹对你有印象的警卫，遵守这两点，就没人会在意你，你想去哪就去哪。
E: Don't do anything that may draw attention, and don't talk with guards, they might recognize you. Keep these two points in mind, and you can go wherever you want unbothered.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬…那我就单刀直入了。这次赶在正式会谈之前约二位见面，就是为了劝战略投资部彻底放弃打匹诺康尼的算盘。
E: Ohohoho... then I'll be straightforward. I requested this meeting before the official conference to dissuade the Strategic Investment Department from trying to lay a finger on Penacony.

C: 在这吧台边，我们无话不谈，可当他推门而去，我又发现自己完全不了解这个男人，加拉赫就是这么神秘。
E: We used to discuss everything here. But every time he'd leave, I'd realize that I didn't know him at all. Such is the mystery that is Gallagher.

C: 甜口的吧。
E: Sweet.

C: 没什么要问的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 我梦见列车驶过一站又一站，有人到来，有人离去，而我们五人始终都在，这段旅程似乎永远也不会结束。
E: In my dream, the Express stopped at many places, and passengers came and went. However, the five of us were always present, and the journey seemed never-ending.

C: 有列车长在，暂时不用担心。但我们也应该尽快返程，把无名客们的消息带给它。
