E: Given the conductor's presence, there's no need to worry about it. However, it's crucial that we soon return to inform Pom-Pom about uh... the Nameless.

C: 每有一个世界加入信用体系的版图，寰宇和平的事业便会再添一砖一瓦，直至所有的外汇、资本、贸易都被归于统一的「货币体系」之下。
E: With each new world integrated into the credit system, the IPC adds another building block to its cause. Eventually, all exchanges, capital, and businesses will operate within a unified monetary system.

C: 「晖长石号」…多好的一艘船啊。正事聊完，我也该去顾及下自己的*小爱好*了。
E: Radiant Feldspar... what a fantastic ship. Now that my business is done, it's time for me to indulge in my own little hobby.

C: 你们在流梦礁逗留的时候，其实我也就在附近。多亏有一位博学的朋友，不然我还真挖不到这么多黑料呢。
E: While you were at Dreamflux Reef, we were actually close by. We wouldn't have been able to dig up so much dirty information without the help of a knowledgeable friend.

C: 别太紧张。
E: I wouldn't be too worried.

C: 过了一段时间……
E: Some time later...

C: 你好，人类。我们又见面了，真没想到会在这里再见到你。
E: Hello, human. We meet again. I never thought I'd see you here.

C: 妈妈…我不想死…
E: Mommy... I don't wanna die...

C: 这样一来，我们作为「无名客」的使命就完成了…吧？
E: With that, our duty as Nameless should be complete... right?

C: 我想，我们每个人都在寻找这个问题的答案。
E: I think, each and every one of us is searching for the answer to this very question.

C: 也许是一种眷恋。
E: Perhaps some sort of sentimental attachment.

C: 对某个人的思念。
E: A longing for a certain someone.

C: 把这次的冒险经历告诉帕姆以后，它就突然开始哭了…我从来没见过帕姆这么伤心……
E: We told Pom-Pom all about our adventure, and... they suddenly started crying... I've never seen Pom-Pom so sad before...

C: …那要不，我们再把你塞回空间站的电脑里？
E: ...How about we shove you back in the space station's computer, then?

C: 人生苦短，良机莫失。
E: Life is too short to miss out on golden opportunities.

C: 再和大家聊聊。
E: Talk with the others a little longer.

C: （这都什么跟什么…要不在入梦前再检查一下？）
E: (I'm confused... Maybe I should look around before I enter the dream?)

C: （我刚刚…是不是看见了怪东西？）
E: (Did I... just see something strange?)

C: 蕉蕉，蕉蕉！
E: Bana bana bana!

C: 什么鬼？
E: What the...

C: 我还在做梦呢？
E: Am I still dreaming?

C: 校长是只猴子？
E: The dean is a monkey?

C: 要不要先买点东西，逛吃逛吃。
E: Let's get something to eat while we walk.

C: 这样香蕉派就完成了，我来烘烤一下……
E: The banana pie is complete. I'll start baking...

C: 你不早说？
E: Why didn't you say so earlier?

C: 造反了是吧？哪个学院的？叫什么名字？
E: A rebel, huh? What's your name? Which academy are you from?

C: 什、什么，匹诺康尼的股东！？
E: Wh—What? Penacony's shareholders!?

C: 多么令人敬佩的觉悟！伎乐忍徒，阁下已半步踏入忍侠之境。
E: Your determination is admirable! Ninja Initiate Gigaku, you have already stepped into the Ninja Hero Domain.

C: 嘿！你们几个小可爱，看这儿！
E: Hey! Look over here, muddle-fudgers!

C: 正因违背了流梦礁的原则，现在我才会这么犹豫。
E: I'm only hesitating so much because this is going against Dreamflux Reef's principles.

C: 这是……
E: This is...

C: 啊，波提欧先生…外面情况怎么样？
E: Oh, it's you Mr. Boothill... How are things outside?

C: 不用我多说了吧？
E: Need I say any more?

C: 站在这儿的每一个人，他们的记忆模块可没坏，身上长了这么个坚韧的脑子，不是为了把一切忘掉变成猴子！
E: Everyone here has a perfectly functional memory module. They didn't develop such robust brains to forget everything and become monkeys!

C: 从玩偶的材质可以看出，它的做工十分精巧，但它的形象设计却不太精巧。这幅贱兮兮的样子与充满智慧的眼神…真的会有人喜欢这种角色吗？
E: Judging from the materials, you can see the doll's craftsmanship is exquisite, but its visual design begs to differ. This sly look and eyes brimming with wit... Do people really like characters like this?

C: 你闭上眼睛，按照蕉师的指导开始冥想——
E: You close your eyes, and begin meditating as instructed by BananAdvisor—

C: 唉，每次看见你这样的学生，我就觉得心累。没有爬树天赋的猴子永远摘不到香蕉，何必上台难为自己呢？
E: I'm really sick and tired of seeing students like you. A monkey with no talent for climbing will never reach the bananas. Why volunteer only to embarrass yourself?
...Bana?

C: 芭蕉花酱一遍又一遍播放着手机中的《睡蕉之歌》——鉴于之前的经历，你觉得还是离她远点比较好。
E: Nanabloom-chan kept playing "The Slumbernana Song" on her phone over and over again — given past experiences, you think it's best to leave her be.

C: 我*银河粗口*来了！你们这帮学生就是群*银河粗口*！你们记住了嗷，我就在折纸大学骂你们！
E: I finally get to make a *cosmic profanity* appearance! All you *cosmic profanity* students are a *cosmic profanity* bunch of losers! Yeah, go ahead and *cosmic profanity* remember that! That I *cosmic profanity* cussed at you *cosmic profanity* at your own *cosmic profanity* Paperfold University!

C: 恶语伤人的邪祟已落败，残虐不仁的奸计被破坏。侠客抹去了学府的祸灾，宴会重拾往日的多彩——
E: Wicked tongues, wicked lies, all of them destroyed, say goodbye to evil plots, strategies and ploys. The life of the party, savior of the school, let's hear it for the hero, here to keep it cool...

C: 蕉授，它就是「睡蕉小猴」，而散布这种病毒的正是你手下的蕉师。
E: Slumbernana Monkey is that virus, Profnana. And its transmission was orchestrated by none other than your BananAdvisors.

C: 阴谋？蕉蕉蕉，未免太高看匹诺康尼了。这座只剩下铜臭味的金钱乐园，怎么配得上博士崇高的人类实验？
E: A scheme? Bana tsk, you're thinking too highly of this place! Penacony is nothing but a cesspool of riches. It will never be worthy of the great Doctor's sublime experiments on humans!

C: 什么都没有，但无所谓。这种事我见得多了，解决办法也只有一种。都是见过大场面的人，用不着我多说了吧？
E: There ain't a thing here, but who cares. Seen this plenty of times, and there's only one solution. We've all rid this rodeo, so I reckon I don't need to spell it out.

C: 怎么，看个电视麻烦成这样？
E: What's this now, watchin' TV gotta be this complicated?

C: 这…怎么了……
E: Wh—What happened...?

C: 顺应人们的渴望。
E: ...is in line with the desires of humans.

C: 巡海游侠先生，麻烦你了，向这位小姐开枪吧。
E: Mr. Galaxy Ranger, would you please fire a shot at this young lady?

C: 看什么脑子？他宝贝的……
E: Get my head checked? What in forkin' hell...

C: 他香蕉的，你到底在讲什么歪理？
E: Rottin' bananas, what wacky theory are you trying to prove?

C: 这是决定性的一刻，那个名为波提欧的男人心知肚明。
E: This is a decisive moment, and the man named Boothill knows it well.

C: 猎猎猎猎猎猎猎——
E: lo—lo—lo—lo—lo—lo—lone...

C: 将密咒灌注于异彩中，覆盖阵眼上的密咒，多么奇妙的忍•科学。
E: Channel the mantra into the colorful brilliance, then paint it over the existing mantra on the matrix core... What wondrous ninja tech.

C: 他宝贝的，阵仗搞得比我们还大。
E: Forkin' hell, they are making more of a scene than we are.

C: 恰丽卡，你简直就是个做甜点的天才！
E: Chaletka, you're simply a genius of dessert making.

C: 我只能为各位递上「期末考试」了。
E: I can only issue the "final exam" to you.

C: 放学了！
E: School is over!

C: 这些漂浮的密咒都是忍徒们的心音吗？看来他们之所以放弃忍道，不只因为邪祟•总长的蛊惑。
E: Are these floating mantras the inner voices of those ninja initiates? It seems the Fiendling Chief's beguiling isn't the only reason they gave up on the way of the ninja.

C: 苦茶大师
E: Master Kucha

C: 机会难得…火种事关翁法罗斯的世界本质，我们还是一探究竟为好。
E: This is a rare opportunity, though... The Coreflame has something to do with the workings of Amphoreus. It's best for us to learn more.

C: 没关系，做好万全准备才是上策。
E: No problem. We should only begin when everyone is fully prepared.

C: 没二次确认选项吗…
E: Why didn't I get a second and final "Confirm" button...?

C: 「方才一路走来，我认可诸位的勇力。但既然你们妄图践踏败者的尊严，我就无法坐视不理。」
E: "I applaud your courage and strength for coming this far. But you have chosen to besmirch the dignity of one who has fallen, and I cannot turn a blind eye to that."

C: 哼，我对你这可悲疯王的高见不感兴趣……
E: Hmph. Your opinions are of no interest to me, mad king...

C: 怎么不管阿格莱雅叫阿宝？
E: Is Aglaea's nickname Aglie?

C: 这谁想的台词，真抽象…
E: Who came up with this? How... unique...

C: …的影子？
E: ...Shadow?

C: 只是…{M#他们}{F#她们}无法确认泰坦有没有也受到黑潮感染……
E: But... they can't say for sure whether the Titan has also been corrupted by the black tide.

C: （盯着雕像）
E: (Stare at the statue)

C: 当然不是。问问身旁这位淑女罢，她一定明白个中缘由。
E: Of course not. Just ask the fair lady beside you. She'll definitely know the reason why.

C: 怎地忽怔住了？还是说，汝有别的法子能教水车转起不成？
E: Why did you suddenly freeze? Do you have another way to make the water wheel turn?

C: 银河幻影究极超绝大口径全垒打！
E: Ultimate Extreme Galactic Phantom Heavy Caliber Home Run!

C: 就当阁下这是在夸我好了。
E: I'll just consider that a compliment.

C: 找到那刻夏了吗？
E: Did you find Anaxa?

C: 抱歉，我也不知道…毕竟这可是整个树庭、乃至翁法罗斯，都只有极少数人知晓的秘中之秘。
E: Sorry, but even I don't know how... After all, this is a secret among secrets that only a select few in the entire Grove and even Amphoreus know.

C: 以极其挑衅的表情嚼嚼花瓣。
E: Chew on the petal with a highly provocative expression.

C: 没事…好伙伴，人家没事…！只是人家的身子…稍微有点点烫…！
E: Don't worry, friend... I'm fine...! I just feel... a little warm...!

C: 吾还在想，汝等要到何时才打算揭穿吾呢。怎么发现的？
E: I was wondering when you were planning to expose me. How did you know?

C: 还有，「出言必有据」——这正是我在树庭求学时习得的宝贵知识。
E: Also, "to make a claim, one must have evidence" — this is the precious knowledge that I acquired during my time at the Grove.
Ah...

C: 能看见具体的画面吗？
E: Can you see what's actually happening?

C: 一时来了兴致，想念几句诗而已。悬锋的王子，不会听不懂诗歌吧？
E: I just felt like reciting a few lines of poetry. Surely the crown prince of Kremnos knows how to appreciate poetry, right?

C: *我们*就不啦，毕竟变成小孩子了嘛。
E: We will have to pass. After all, we've become children.

C: 也许…会有办法的。智种学派的核心课题就是灵魂，针对它的损耗，或是弥补已经消散的灵魂…只要研究继续下去，没准会有新的发现。
E: Maybe... We can find a way to fix it. The primary research focus of Nousporists is the soul. We explore its depletion and methods to restore dispersed souls... As long as research continues, there might be a breakthrough that can help.

C: 走吧，我会保持分寸的。
E: Let's go. I won't go overboard.

C: …怎么办，阁下，我开不了口……
E: ...What should we do? I really can't tell him...

C: …就这样吧。我记得的同僚家属，就这些了。
E: That is it. That's all the colleagues' families that I remember.

C: 整理日志，顺便从风堇那里要了些树庭的研究资料。
E: I was organizing logs. I also asked Hyacine for some research material from the Grove.

C: 阿雅！等一下！
E: Agy, wait!

C: 是啊！虽然大海，还有天空，都好黑好黑。但是好多好多个我一点都不害怕，因为我们会一起唱歌！
E: Yeah! The ocean and the sky were really, really dark, but there were so many of me that I wasn't scared at all. Because we'd all sing together!

C: 当然是要和你一起，赶走黑潮的同伴啦。
E: Your friends who will chase the black tide away alongside you, of course.

C: 「雅努斯呵█ 敬请聆听█ █！」
E: "O Janus █, please lend me your ears █ █!"

C: 白厄转述了那刻夏的发现……
E: Phainon recounts Anaxa's discovery...

C: 有我在，别担心。
E: Don't worry. I'll be by his side.

C: 但离开故土，也让许多山之民遭遇不幸。比如……
E: But leaving their homeland also brought many Mountain Dwellers misfortune. They —

C: 这不正是你想要的么？
E: Isn't that exactly what you wanted?

C: …即便过去了一千年，那道预言的字句仍旧清晰。
E: ...Despite the passage of a thousand years, every word of that prophecy remains as vivid as ever.

C: 这意义非凡。也祝你们的「开拓」无往不胜。
E: That means a lot to me. May success accompany your Trailblazing wherever it leads.

C: 你与那几位半神关系甚好，理应明白这个道理：夺取神权的手段，从来不止剑与矛一种。
E: Given your good rapport with the demigods, you should know that the path to assuming divinity is never limited to swords and spears.

C: 你的心情果真如此轻松？亦或者…这又是你披上的伪装？
E: Do you truly feel as carefree as you seem? Or... is this just a facade you wear?

C: …你现在的语气像极了阿格莱雅，知道吗？
E: ...You know what, you sound just like Aglaea at this moment.

C: 愿您战无不胜。
E: May triumph always be yours.

C: 真是…久违了。
E: It's... been a while.

C: 您是我们的希望！
E: You're our hope!

C: 小敌…总觉得完成试炼后，他的背影变得更孤单了。
E: It somehow feels like De has closed himself off even more after he completed his trial.

C: ——住手！
E: ...Stop!

C: 呵。
E: Heh.

C: 宠物发言，主人概不负责。
E: The owner isn't liable for their pet's words.

C: 是的。我觉得缇安大人肯定很喜欢，就把它买下来了。
E: Yes. I figured Lady Trianne would like it a lot, so I bought it.

C: 好先进的同声传译。
E: Fancy simultaneous interpretation!

C: 这些大多是对每次仪式流程和结果的记录。早些年还有参考价值，可越往后便越……
E: These are mostly accounts of the proceedings and results of each ceremony. In the early years, they were valuable resources for reference, but as time passed...

C: 没想到都过去这么久了。{NICKNAME}的力量真不可思议，这里简直和过去一模一样……
E: It's hard to believe that it's been so long. Your power is exceptional, {NICKNAME}. This place looks exactly as before...

C: 没错，我的好女孩。怎么了？
E: That's right, my sweet girl. What's the matter?

C: 染指火种者！无论是谁——解除武装，立刻开门投降！
E: Who dares lay hands on the Coreflame! Drop your weapon and surrender at once!

C: 「翻越{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的万千门径，然后，*我们*必将再一次——」
E: "Surmount the myriad passages of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, and we will once again—"

C: …结果还是走到了这一步，大概是「开拓」逃不开的宿命吧？
E: ...We've ended up at this point after all. This is probably a fate that "Trailblaze" can't evade.

C: （想实现的愿望…似乎在进行「圣杯战争」的时候，也有人问过我类似的问题……）
E: (A wish, huh... Feels like someone asked me a similar question during the Holy Grail War...)

C: 我的愿望是再多要两个愿望！
E: I'd wish for two more wishes!

C: 为什么不呢？匹诺康尼的商界巨头抛下过去和气生财的形象，向家系之主和股东们发出邀约，进行这场梦中的角逐，允诺事后兑现一个你心底无法实现的愿望…这不是很有趣吗？
E: Why not? Penacony's biggest tycoon throws away his usual image of polite deal-making to invite the Family heads and shareholders to participate in this dream contest, promising afterward to grant a wish that someone could never fulfill on their own... Isn't that fascinating?

C: 将自己的愿望寄托在不知来历的圣杯上…就像一只全身涂满了油的狮子，非要表演钻火圈。
E: Placing your hopes and dreams on some unknown Holy Grail... it's like dousing yourself in oil and diving straight through a ring of fire.

C: 被篡改的仪式，被某人占有的圣杯，作为参赛者的主办方——Lancer，还需要我说下去吗？
E: A corrupted ritual... a Holy Grail in the hands of someone who is the host of this war. Lancer, do you want me to spell it out?

C: 本店的面包以及其他的所有食物，所用的原料都来自纯净有机的忆域农田。它们生长的土壤不含有有害的情绪……
E: Our store only uses pure organic ingredients sourced from the Memory Zone's farms. The soil they're cultivated in is free of harmful emotions...

C: 这没什么。我最喜欢看别人吃饱饭以后幸福的笑容了。不过，你的从者的食欲真是旺盛啊！
E: No problem at all. I love seeing people smile after they're full. But your Servant's appetite is truly impressive!

C: 他是受托抚养我长大的老骑士，从某种意义上来说，他就像是我的「父亲」。
E: He's the old knight tasked with raising me... he was my "father" in a sense.

C: 我害怕了。
E: I became afraid.

C: 整理地概科过去半年的经费报表，预约未来一个月的研究会议，收集各级科员的课题申请…够你干上一段时间了。
E: Sort the Department of Cosmic Geography's expenditure report from the past six months. Schedule research meetings for the upcoming month. Collect project proposals from all levels of researchers. Yeah, that should keep you busy for a while.

C: 根据额度分类整理。
E: Sort by budget category.

C: 哈哈哈哈，那我就是模范钓客了。
E: Hahaha, then I guess I'm the model fisherman.

C: 博识学会来访。
E: Visit from the Intelligentsia Guild.

C: 列车或许已经出发了，又或许没有，但只要你真的想要踏上这条道路，即使没有列车又如何？
E: The Express may have already left, or it may not have, but if you truly want to walk this path, what does it matter if there's no Express?

C: 总不可能是为了钱吧？
E: It couldn't possibly be for money, could it?

C: 你们要走了吗？
E: Are you leaving already?

C: 噗，哈哈哈。真想品尝一口啊！
E: Pfft, hahaha. I'd love to have a try!

C: 嘎吱，嘎吱，嘎吱。
E: Creak, creak, creak.

C: 不出所料的回答。但你们很快就会知道，谁才是匹诺康尼最伟大的电影导演，而现在——请容我暂且退居幕后。
E: As expected. Soon, you'll see who Penacony's greatest director is. For now, I'll slip behind the scenes.

C: 干脆我们投票决定吧，我投我那位花枝招展的御主一票。
E: Let's vote. I vote for my flamboyant Master.

C: 我本以为能从你们口中打听到关于这家伙过去的事迹。没想到竟然是个你们也闻所未闻的无名小卒。
E: I was hoping you'd know something about that person's past. But turns out he's just some washed-up no-name that even you folks have not heard about.

C: 御主，这无法改变现状，只要没有真名，我依旧只是手无缚鸡之力的鸢尾花艺者。
E: Master, this cannot change the present situation. Without a True Name, I'm just a weak Iris Family artist.

C: 区区三道令咒，就想在我的片场里支配我？斯科特先生，你被解雇了。
E: Trying to dominate me in my set with just three Command Spells? Mr. Skott, consider yourself fired.

C: Archer先生，你可不像是个会死板遵守盟约的从者。趁着我特地安排的「分头行动」，替御主解决一个对手，岂不美哉？
E: Mr. Archer, you don't strike me as someone married to a contract. Wouldn't it be smart to take this "split-up operation" and eliminate a rival for your Master?

C: 住手，如果杀了我，身为使魔的你们也会消失。
E: Wait! If you kill me, you all vanish too! You're still my familiars!

C: 可再怎么辩解， 也无法掩盖我的无能和失职。没有力量的从者，不过是个毫无价值的玩偶。
E: But no excuse can cover up my incompetence and negligence. A powerless Servant is nothing but a worthless doll.

C: 导演，快帮我疗伤啊！我好不容易把他们引到了陷阱里，你给我屁股开的这枪算怎么回事！
E: Director! Heal me up! I worked so hard to lead them into the trap, and now you're shooting me in the butt!?

C: 现在，轮到老子教训小子的时间了。
E: Now, it's time for the old man to teach the kid a lesson.

C: 很不可思议，会被纠正。用言语难以描述，您要亲自看看吗？
E: It's baffling, but corrective measures will be taken. It's kind of difficult to explain... Maybe you'd like to see for yourself?

C: 盛会之星的风波已经平息，星穹列车本该再度踏上「开拓」之行。是什么让各位依旧在匹诺康尼停留？
E: Now that the crisis on the Planet of Festivities has been averted, shouldn't the Astral Express have departed to continue on its trailblazing journey? Why have you and your companions stayed behind in Penacony?

C: 想必…他们玩得正开心吧？
E: They're probably... having a wonderful time now.

C: 看来这三位停云小姐还要争论一会儿，咱们插不上话。
E: These three Tingyun's don't look like they'll be reaching a conclusion anytime soon. We won't be able to get a word in.

C: 这应该符合你口中「能够沟通」的标准吧？
E: She ought to meet your "one we can properly speak with" requirement, right?

C: 但你又是幸运的，她要将你的一切据为己有，这需要时间，你才免于在一瞬间灰飞烟灭。
E: Yet you were also the most fortunate. Her desire to claim everything about you for herself meant she needed time, so you were spared instant annihilation.

C: 我们是要干啥来着…
E: What are we doing here again?

C: 欢迎，几位有什么需要？
E: Welcome! How can I help you?

C: 还是有点恍惚。
E: I'm still a bit confused.

C: 驭空大人，还记得么？也许对您而言，那只是一次平平无奇的飞行。可对于某个孩子……
E: Madam Yukong, do you remember? Perhaps that was just an ordinary flight for you. But for a certain child...

C: 话虽如此，「鸣火」那边还好吗？
E: Speaking of which, how are things with the Whistling Flames?

C: 同一时间 筑梦边境
E: Meanwhile at Dream's Edge

C: 所以万维克先生也是因此而生？
E: Is that also how Mr. Wonweek came into this world?

C: 这算什么？朝天上丢出一枚硬币，然后把命交给它来决定？
E: What is this? Leaving your fate entirely up to a coin flip?

C: 也许某一天，我会在旅途中找到所寻的答案，离开这里。
E: Perhaps I'll find the answer I'm looking for on this journey. And when that day comes, it'll be farewell.

C: 谢谢各位包容，感激不尽。
E: Thank you all for your forgiveness.

C: 准备好了就出发吧，期待各位的好消息帕。
E: Get going whenever you're ready. Pom-Pom can't wait to hear about your exciting discoveries!

C: 几束薄冰将昏迷的三月七锁在床上，原本温馨的房间如今透着一股凄冷。
E: A number of thin sheets of ice have shackled the unconscious March 7th to her bed. The once warm bedroom is now permeated with a bitter cold.

C: 这可不好说啊。
E: Things may look fine only on the surface.

C: 在那之前，咱们还得先解决一件小事。
E: Not yet. There's something else we need to deal with.

C: 门？锁？
E: Door...? Locked...?

C: 我们抵达空间站时，只发现这里漆黑一片，我和星期日都以为出现了什么紧急情况。我们一路下行寻找事故根源，没想到会在此处碰到您…的正身。
E: The space station was in complete darkness when we arrived, so Sunday and I assumed something bad had happened. We continued further into the space station, hoping to find the cause of the blackout... and that's when we chanced upon your... actual self.

C: 不过我还是好奇，星穹列车不是早就出发了么？那世界真有这么神奇，至于让你们特地折返一趟？
E: I still don't get it, though. Didn't the Astral Express already depart some time ago? Is that world so incredibly spectacular that it warrants this return trip?

C: 有点像兔子。
E: A rabbit of sorts?

C: 断崖对岸，宏伟的宫殿大门缄口不言，不愿透露一丝藏在身后的历史和秘密。
E: Across the cliff, the grand palace gates remain silent, unwilling to reveal any of the history and secrets hidden behind it.

C: …大地兽发出不满的叫声，轻轻一晃就把你甩开了数米远。
E: The dromas lets out a dissatisfied growl and easily tosses you several meters away.

C: *我们*是缇宁。
E: We are Trinnon!

C: 但今天，白厄阁下…奥赫玛需要你。
E: But today, Lord Phainon... Okhema needs you.

C: 阿格莱雅女士，可以稍等片刻吗？
E: Lady Aglaea, could you give us some time?

C: 继续说吧。
E: Go on.

C: …喝口水吧。
E: ...Drink some water.

C: 看来它很喜欢这样。你和大地兽很投缘呢。
E: It seems to enjoy it a lot. You get along very well with the dromas.

C: 这样也好，麻烦你了。
E: Alright then. Thanks for your help.

C: 哎呀，这不是缇宁女士吗？真罕见，您居然会离开智慧花园。
E: Gosh, isn't this Lady Trinnon? How rare that you would leave the Garden of Wisdom.

C: 买下二创作品（<unbreak>25000</unbreak>信用点）。
E: Purchase the fan work (<unbreak>25,000</unbreak> credits).

C: 流言？我看未必，只要公民们喜欢，真假又有何妨？但二位勇士如此忌讳，背后…莫不是有别的原因？说来听听？
E: Rumors? Hah! As long as the citizens like it, who cares about whether it's true or not? However, the way you two are trying to stop it from spreading further... Could there be some other reason? How about sharing it with me?

C: 遇上了一些麻烦，好在解决了。
E: We encountered some trouble, but thankfully everything has been resolved.

C: 辛苦了。缇安有消息了吗？
E: Thanks for your hard work. Is there any news from Trianne?

C: 你倚在阳台的石栏边眺望远方，翁法罗斯层叠的山峦被雾气遮蔽，轮廓若隐若现，如同一组在缓慢匍匐与站立之间转变姿态的石之巨人。
E: You lean against the stone railing of the balcony, gazing into the distance. The mist-shrouded mountains of Amphoreus appear as vague outlines, like stone giants slowly shifting between crouching and standing.

C: 这就是受泰坦支配的世界，必须由黄金裔颠覆的世界。
E: This is a world dominated by Titans. And that order can only be toppled by the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 金色的丝线剧烈地颤动。
E: The golden thread trembles violently.

C: 我更愿意把「死亡」视作宁静的告别，而非刑罚。
E: I'm more willing to view "death" as a peaceful farewell than a punishment.

C: 我一直坚信，黄金裔的旅途绝非寥寥数人的史诗，我们必须团结一切潜在的盟友——尤其是二位这样的英豪。
E: I've always believed that the journey of the Chrysos Heirs is not meant to be the saga of a select few, and that we must unite all potential allies, especially heroic figures like you.

C: …不会也招致天谴吧？
E: ...Will we also incur the wrath of the gods?

C: 你这家伙，有时候说话还挺好听的。
E: Surprisingly, your words can sometimes be music to my ears.

C: 已经过去许多年了…你还醒着？
E: After all these years, you're still awake?

C: 献上汝之战魂！
E: Consecrate your souls of war!

C: 顺利着陆！希望这条路上的敌人对得起咱俩的火力。
E: Made it! Hopefully the enemies on this side are worthy of our combined might.

C: 此路不通？难不倒我们。
E: Blocked path? That won't stop us!

C: 缇宝已在城外等待，随她前往重渊吧。我会向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}祈求诸位的成功。
E: Tribbie is waiting for you outside the city — go with her to the Abyss. I will pray to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} that you will find success.

C: 看不出来，原来她很强啊。
E: I didn't realize she was that strong.

C: 施展「神迹」…会令它如此痛苦吗？
E: Does performing a miracle really... subject them to that much pain?

C: 那位泰坦，它真的想用这种「考验」刁难我们吗？
E: Does that Titan really intend to deter us with a challenge like this?

C: 看来用蛮力通过考验不是一个选项。
E: It seems like we can't rely on brute force to clear this challenge.

C: 它说了什么，遐蝶？
E: What did they say, Castorice?

C: 这是…列车？
E: This is... the Express?

C: 这次的「剧本」完成得太过凶险，多亏{NICKNAME}灵活应变，我们才逃出生天。
E: The "script" turned out to be extremely dangerous. It's only because of {NICKNAME}'s quick thinking that we managed to escape.

C: 发生什么事了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: What's the matter, {NICKNAME}?

C: 逆流的记忆…在敲打。
E: Memories flowing in reverse... Pounding.

C: 起舞吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Let's dance, {NICKNAME}.

C: 是你抛弃了我吗？
E: Did you abandon me?

C: 多残酷的字句啊…你后来一定又经历了许多。
E: Such cruel words... You must have gone through a lot afterward.

C: 我看到了大工匠的记忆。
E: I saw the memory of the Grand Craftsman.

C: 我鼓起勇气前往悬锋城，却发现那祭典的氛围…不同往常。悬锋族人更像是在准备什么神秘的仪式。
E: I gathered the courage to go there, but I found the atmosphere of the festival to be... quite strange. It felt more like the Kremnoans were preparing for a mysterious ceremony.

C: 没错，只有完成被托付的任务，才能真正帮到他们。
E: Exactly. We'll only be able to help them once we've seen our own mission through.

C: 转念一想，既然你已经在我面前现身…那就再回答我一个问题：<color=#dbc291ff>赛飞儿</color>身在何处？
E: On second thought, since you're right here, I must ask you one more question: Where is <color=#dbc291ff>Cipher</color>?

C: 回到公民手中…还是回到你的手中，凯妮斯阁下？
E: Rest in the grasp of its people... or yours, Elder Caenis?

C: 他们有理由愤慨…因为万敌阁下曾是悬锋城的英雄。
E: They are entitled to that rage... because Lord Mydei was once the hero of Castrum Kremnos.

C: 上等武器！都来看啊，悬锋城最锋利的武器！
E: Finest weapons for sale! Come take a look! The sharpest blades in all of Kremnos!

C: 路障…得想办法清理掉。
E: Barricades... We must find a way to remove them.

C: 别误会。这不过是对你胆识的嘉奖，不代表我赞同你的理论。
E: Make no mistake. This is simply a commendation for your courage, not a sign that I agree with your ideas.

C: 也许你应该尝试<color=#dbc291ff>用欧洛尼斯宝珠映照出它的全身。</color>
E: Perhaps you should try <color=#dbc291ff>using the Oronyx Orb to reflect its whole body.</color>

C: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>纷争之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>尼卡多利</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>的灵魂已经腐烂，再无被救赎的可能。</color>
E: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Strife Titan</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Nikador's</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff> soul is corrupted beyond the point of salvation.</color>

C: 还差一个火盆。
E: One more to go.

C: …哼。接下来要怎么做？
E: ...Hmph. What's next?

C: 只要光照一直这么强烈，我就睡不安稳，与其逼着自己合眼，不如静下心来捋一捋思绪，这也算是一种休息。
E: So long as the light continues to shine this brightly, I won't be getting any sleep. Why force myself to shut my eyes when I can instead take this time to calm my mind and gather my thoughts? That counts as rest too.

C: 我大概应该放弃无用的思考，一直放空，直到仪式时分到来……
E: I should probably shut out these pointless thoughts and empty my mind until the hour of the ritual...

C: 白厄阁下…离开了？
E: Lord Phainon... is gone?

C: 记得你和白厄一样，都是「智种学派」的门徒。那刻夏的考核，想来和他本人一样不讲道理吧？
E: As I remember, you and Phainon were both disciples of the Nousporists. I assume that Anaxa's exams were as unreasonable as the man himself, correct?

C: 希望阁下能平安度过试炼，得到{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福。
E: May you complete the trial safely and obtain {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s blessing.

C: 这是奥赫玛最重要的社会活动，影响力之大…甚至能左右逐火之旅的动向。
E: This is the most important social event of Okhema. It is highly influential... and can even affect what happens to the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 走一步看一步吧。
E: Let's just take things one step at a time.

C: 别担心，{NICKNAME}。你比我有骨气，对吧？
E: Don't worry, {NICKNAME}. You're tougher than I am, right?

C: 未来…？
E: Future...?

C: 没来由地，你觉得此情此景似曾相识。
E: For some reason, you feel you have seen this scene before.

C: （拒绝）还是算了吧。
E: (Refuse) I think I'll pass.

C: 吓我一跳。
E: You scared me.

C: 线索…请再多一点吧，请再多给我一些指引……
E: Clues... Just a few more. I need more guidance...

C: 倒不如说是命运弄人吧。
E: You could say it's the fates toying with us.

C: 哼，我可不想承认自己是这种丑陋的模样。
E: Hmph, I, for one, am not willing to admit that I could look this ugly.
Huh...

C: （那是谁…{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}？）
E: (Wait, who is that...? {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}?)

C: 没有「死亡」的世界…那也是你的所求，是么？
E: A world without "Death"... Do you desire that, too?

C: 我老了，必须响应{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的召唤，去往它的国度了……
E: I have aged... The time has come for me to heed the summons of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} and journey to their domain.

C: 只是一些手工制品，按理说不会被窃贼盯上才对……
E: Just some handcrafted trinkets... Things that shouldn't catch the eye of thieves anyways...

C: 左边的短矛上刻着字——你别被耍了，右边的短矛刻着假话。
E: The left spear is engraved with the words: "Don't be fooled, the right spear is engraved with lies."

C: …确实是她会做的事。
E: ...Exactly the kind of thing she would do.

C: 嗡嗡……
E: Grumph...

C: 给我一个让你低下高贵头颅的理由。
E: Give me a reason why you're bowing your noble head to me.

C: …嗐，算了，大家都有苦衷，我就不多嘴了。反正我也没打算兑现跟她的赌注，嘻。
E: Pah... Fine. Never mind. We all have our own problems. I ain't gonna say anything anymore. It's not like I was gonna honor that bet anyway, hehe.

C: 是啊，老师的智慧也只能照亮我们脚下这方寸土地。只要踏出第一步，前路就是未知的浓雾…但在我漫长的旅行中，这也不是第一次了。
E: Indeed. Even one as erudite as Anaxa could only point us to this place, and no further. We will be entering the unknown as soon as we take our first steps... But that won't be the first time in my long journeys.

C: 如果赛飞儿阁下所言属实…或许真是万敌阁下所为。
E: If Lady Cipher is to be believed... this could be the handiwork of Lord Mydei.

C: 可惜……
E: Sadly...

C: 此处的气息…也确实便是冥流的终点。
E: The aura of this place... We have indeed reached the end of the Stream of Souls.

C: 既然这样，就不帮你专门带话了，裁缝女——我的时间可是非常宝贵的哪。
E: In that case, Seamstress, I suppose I no longer need to deliver your message — my time is rather precious, after all.

C: 那刻夏老师总喜欢在完成炼金准备后说上这样一句话。而现在——
E: Such is what Professor Anaxa always says after preparing for an alchemical ritual. And now —

C: 对不起，我不得不将你从远古的死亡中唤醒……
E: I'm sorry I have to wake you up from ancient death...

C: *悲伤的低鸣*
用不着这么反复确认，当然。
E: No need to ask so many times — of course I am.

C: 因为我、阿格莱雅、缇里西庇俄丝，我们仍会是你们忠诚的护墙，誓死捍卫你们所有人的抉择——
E: For Aglaea, Tribios, and I will remain your faithful guardians and pledge our lives to upholding your decision.
Cast... your... vote...

C: 天啊，连凯妮斯也背叛了奥赫玛……
E: By the gods, even Caenis has betrayed Okhema...

C: 投给凯妮斯！
E: Vote for Caenis!

C: 「过往」由忆质构成，「未来」也是终将被转化的可能性，而「当下」…它从不真实存在，只是一种抽象的表达。
E: The past is made up of memoria while the future is a possibility that will eventually be converted to memoria. But the present... it doesn't really exist and is only an abstract expression.

C: 然而，改造世界绝非易事。那些极端分子想必不是普通的命途行者，他们拥有令使的力量？
E: Remodeling a world is no easy feat. These extremists likely aren't just simple pathstriders. Do they wield the powers of Emanators?

C: 我们确实做了一桩交易，但我也让你们卷入了不可预见的危机中…请接受我的致歉。
E: Although we indeed struck a deal, it seems like I have involved you in some unforeseen danger... Please accept my deepest apologies.

C: 格奈乌斯阁下，以及吾师，你们也是来这里问候卡厄斯的吗？
E: Lord Gnaeus and Miss Calypso? Are you both here to visit Khaos too?

C: 正是，吾等已在此地等待有些时间了……
E: Yes, and we've been waiting for quite some time now...

C: 当年，我就站在这里，幻想自己有朝一日能到树顶上去，那里是离「天空」最近的地方。
E: I stood at this very spot back then, imagining the day when I could climb to the top of this tree... Because I would be the closest I can be to the sky at that spot.

C: （在神谕的指引下，英雄们走在猎取火种的道路上，以「再创世」为目标，迄今为止，已经取得了不少成果。）
E: (Guided by the prophecy, the heroes are on a quest to reclaim Coreflames and usher in the Era Nova. Their efforts have seen gratifying results to date.)

C: 七大学派的著述此处均有收藏，还囊括了外邦的哲学、诗歌、信仰书籍…据说向树庭求取智慧的城邦，都要献上等价的知识。
E: Other than books written by the seven schools, you can also find philosophical texts, ballads, and religious writings from the outlands here. Cities that desired to learn from the Grove were apparently expected to contribute knowledge of equal value to what they sought.

C: 友爱之馆的书目过于庞杂，一卷卷翻阅不现实。我们用藏书石版检索出需要的资料，统一带回奥赫玛研究吧。
E: There are too many books in the Library of Philia. Flipping through them all will take too long. Why don't we use the biblioslate to search for the texts we need? We can bring them back to Okhema for reading after that.

C: 我同意。
E: Yes.

C: 世间的人都由{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}庇护，尤其是沐浴神血的黄金裔。倘若真有此事，无疑是亵渎神明。
E: Every being in the world owes their safekeeping to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, and this is even more so for the Chrysos Heirs who have divine blood coursing through them. If he has really done something of that nature, then it'd indeed be sacrilegious.

C: 炼金术式的手稿被带走了，说明他的研究仍在继续……
E: The manuscripts detailing all the alchemical formulae have been taken away. His research... is still ongoing.

C: 拜你所赐，「死亡」是灵魂的终结这一事实，我已通过种种迹象亲自验讫。可有死必有生，有终结必有开端——
E: Thanks to you, I've had the chance to personally verify — in more ways than one — that the soul indeed ceases to exist in "Death." But where there is death, there is life, and where there is an end, there must also be a beginning.

C: 灵魂如何诞生？——在我的算式中，只剩下这一个未知数。
E: How, then, is a soul born? That was the only unknown variable left in my calculations.

C: 半神议院是奥赫玛的政治腹地，重要性不亚于创世涡心。在我的使命结束后，总有一天，这里会取代猎神的疆场，成为你们的下一道难关——
E: Being Okhema's political center, the Demigod Council holds just as much significance as the Vortex of Genesis. Someday, after my duty is over, this site will take the place of the battlefield where you hunt gods, become the next challenge you ought to overcome...

C: 凯妮斯阁下，所有人都知道「黄金世」早已结束。试问，元老院要如何让时光倒流？
E: We all know that "Era Chrysea" is a thing of the past, Lady Caenis. Please enlighten me — how does the Council of Elders plan to turn back time?

C: 当然。什么问题？
E: Of course. What is your question?

C: 正是。和你们踏上旅途，一路走来，我改变了世界，也改变了自己。
E: Indeed. Along this journey that we've taken together, not only have I changed the world, I myself have also changed in the process.

C: 那是个疯癫的学者，在路边对着夜空喃喃自语。我被他绊倒，却没发火。也许是觉得自己和他太像了，便鬼使神差地向他提问——
E: It was a crazed scholar looking at the night sky and muttering to himself by the side of the road. Although I tripped over him and fell, I wasn't angry in the slightest. And maybe because I saw myself in him, I inexplicably asked him a question...

C: 即便是预言…就一定要听之任之吗？太不公平了，为什么只有我们必须自相残杀……
E: Even if it was prophesied, do we have no say in the matter? It's so unfair... Why are we the only ones who are forced into mutual destruction...

C: 不会错：在世人熟知的泰坦诞生前，也有一群英雄行走大地。他们听凭预言，逐一接过神权，最终成为了新世界的众神……
E: I'm certain of this now: Before the Titans that we are well acquainted with were born, a group of heroes roamed the land. These heroes followed a prophecy and took possession of divine authorities one by one, until they eventually became the pantheon of the new world...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「你们的未来，就流淌于脚底那炽热滚烫的金池之间——」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Your future flows between the boiling streams of the golden pool at your feet —"</color>

C: 没时间了，至少要把它拿回来…{NICKNAME}，快！
E: We're out of time. We have to retrieve it... {NICKNAME}, quickly!

C: 我们离完成奇迹只有一步之遥。凡人会掌控自身的命运……
E: We're so close to achieving the miracle. Humanity will finally take control of its fate...

C: 平台，就在前方了！
E: The platform is just ahead!

C: 那颗宝珠…在闪烁！
E: That orb is... blinking!?

C: 千年前，刻法勒祭司的寝宫……
E: Thousands of years ago, in the sleeping quarters of Kephale's priests...

C: （不接话也不好…先用{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的力量顶着吧？）
E: (Not saying anything would feel awkward... maybe I can hold it together with {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}'s ability for now?)

C: *但是，但是！如果您有重要的事相托…我会全心全意地认真聆听的。*
E: If there's anything important you need to say... I'm all ears.

C: 是这样吗，裁缝女？「每个人都是世上独一无二的存在」……
E: Is that right, Seamstress? "Everyone in this world is unique in their own way..."

C: …就试着追上她吧！
E: ...you'll have to catch me!

C: *「永夜将至…但黎明机器将照拂圣城，只待金血人子塑造奇迹…<color=#dbc291ff>『直到永远』！</color>」*
E: "The eternal night is looming, the Dawn Device will safeguard the holy city, poised for the children of humanity to create miracles... forever!"

C: 偷走了你的身份…我…想对你说声抱歉呢……
E: I stole your identity... I... owe you an apology...

C: 本姑娘活了一千多年，还从来没见过能跟上我速度的对手…你算头一个！
E: I've been around for over a thousand years, and I've never met anyone who could match my speed... until now!

C: …哎唷喂，好险没砍了我的尾巴！
E: ...Whoo, close one, almost lost my tail!

C: 要相信自己，克莱门汀！你是位优秀的医者，已经可以独当一面了。
E: Believe in yourself, Clementine! You're an exceptional healer, more than capable of handling things on your own.

C: 一个为世人保留了希望火种的时代。
E: An age where a flame of hope was preserved for the world.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我将成为史诗最忠诚的读者，将汝等英雄伟业尽收眼底的观众。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I will become the most loyal reader of the epics, a spectator voraciously consuming the valorous deeds of you heroes.</color>

C: …喵、喵呜？
E: M—Meow?

C: 呼…呼……
…没了？这就没了？
E: ...That's it? Nothing else?

C: 过去的确如此。但近些日子…恕我直言，她的感官恐怕没有从前那么敏锐了。
E: That was true in the past. But these days... forgive my bluntness, her senses may not be as sharp as they once were.

C: 如今你不但痴盲，而且昏聩…「清洗者」就是为了这个时刻诞生的。当一切秩序、规矩和法理都无法制约你们，那就该轮到匕首来审判了。
E: These days you're not only blind but also deaf... The "Cleaners" were born for this moment. When all orders, rules, and laws fail to restrain you, it's time for the dagger to pass judgment.

C: 不愧是法吉娜信徒的地盘，这满满一箱都是拿海洋之泪制成的饰品…喏——拿去！这个赏你，看看合不合适。
E: As expected for a realm of Phagousa's disciples. This entire chest is filled with ornaments made from Ocean's Tears... Here — take this, and see if it suits you.

C: …哎哟喂！
E: ...Ouch!
...Tch.

C: 留在我身边吧。你有一张美丽的脸孔，它不该常与伤痕跟淤泥作伴。
E: Stay here with me. You have a beautiful face that deserves better than to be covered in scars and grime.

C: …嗯哼？
E: ...Uh-huh?

C: 在我写下这些文字时，你正与元老院的辩论家唇齿交锋，在硝烟无形的战场上争取逐火之旅的存续。
E: As I write this, you are locked in a battle of words with the Council of Elders, fighting for the survival of the Flame-Chase Journey on a battlefield where the smoke of war is invisible.

C: 请允许我见证：哪怕失去了「浪漫」的神权，奥赫玛仍会是末世中的理想乡。在这里，居住着阿格莱雅所期待的、神谕中的新世界所期待的……
E: Let me bear witness: Even without the divine authority of Romance, Okhema will remain a sanctuary in these end times. A place for the kind people Aglaea dreamed of, the kind of people foretold in prophecy...

C: 那就来说些你不知道的事吧。「盗火行者」——据我观察，那家伙可是对奥赫玛虎视眈眈哪。
E: Then let me tell you something you don't know. The Flame Reaver — they've been watching Okhema closely.

C: 嘟…嘟嘟。
E: Doot... Doot-Doot.

C: 我希望这世界能摆脱「死亡」的痛苦，每一位生者都能拥抱甜美的宁静……
E: I hope the world can be freed from the agony of "death," so that every living being may find calming peace...

C: 没想到又在树庭见面了。白厄说你在为征伐艾格勒作准备，莫非……
E: I didn't expect to see you again in the Grove. Phainon mentioned you were gearing up for the campaign against Aquila. Are you here to...

C: 您应该是特克菈将军吧？传说在黄金战争中，您曾率领族人与奥赫玛结盟，抵御悬锋军队的进攻——您的战果为天空一族在圣城赢得了一席之地。
E: You must be General Ektra. Legend has it that during the Chrysos War, you led our people to ally with Okhema and held back the Kremnoan forces. It was your victory that earned the Sky people a place in the holy city.

C: 没什么，听上去一切都很顺利。只是…我有些在意你提到的那则预言。
E: Nothing. It sounds like everything went smoothly. It's just... I'm a bit concerned about the prophecy you mentioned.

C: 但我始终告诉自己：那没什么不好。如果我的小蜂鸟能在乐观和善意中度过一生，那绝非她的不幸。
E: Yet I've told myself — that's not a bad thing. If my hummingbird could live her life in kindness and optimism, then it'd be a good thing.

C: 她的左侧是狮首的「烈阳之翼」索拉比斯，咆哮中吐纳灼世的神火；
E: To her left was the lion-headed Solabis, the Sunlit Wings, whose roars breathed divine flames and scorched the world.

C: …咳，海豹冲撞游戏的时候，你不是教过我一句话吗？
E: ...Ahem, that bumping seal game. Didn't you teach me something back then?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>据说，是两支最主要的天空部落，晖之民和雨之民之间产生了分歧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Apparently, the division was between the two most important sky tribes, the Sunfolk and the Rainfolk.</color>

C: 嗯…啊…好吓人的记忆……
E: Ugh... Ah... What a terrifying memory...

C: 从黄金年代流传下来的技术，现在倒是能帮上我们的忙啦。走吧，调试和校准的工作就交给我。
E: Technology passed down from the golden age is finally proving useful. Let's go. Leave the adjustments and calibrations to me.

C: 你当真要把枪尖对准我们的神明？收手吧！你的鲁莽将会招引神罚……
E: Will you really point the tip of your spear at our god? Stay your hand! Your recklessness will only bring divine retribution...

C: 直到…人们发现她的体内还流淌着黄金色的血液。那是将嫌恶转变为恐惧的最后一剂毒药。
E: Until... people discovered golden blood ran through her veins. That was the final straw that turned disdain into terror.

C: 「星月之翎」封锁了泰坦的神躯……
E: The Moonlit Plume sealed the divine body...

C: 更多被黑潮侵染的士兵…过了这么久，它还在守护天空泰坦的领域吗？
E: Soldiers tainted by the black tide... Do they continue to defend the realm of the Sky Titan after all this time?

C: 那时，我们一起在乡间奔跑、玩耍，到了晚上就去逗弄邻居家那头坏脾气的大地兽，每天都过得无忧无虑，好像世间所有的烦恼和灾难都与我们无关……
E: We'd run and play in the countryside, and in the evenings, we'd mess with the grumpy dromas from next door. Every day was carefree as if the troubles of the world had nothing to do with us...

C: 糟糕，这下没戏唱了…
E: Uh oh, looks like it's end of the line for us...

C: 逃生…圣城卫士在组织。但…该逃向何处，无人知晓……
E: Organizing their escape... the holy city guards are. But... where to flee to, no one knows...

C: 英雄…不需要独自承担一切。
E: A hero... doesn't have to bear everything alone.

C: 像是…某种预兆。
E: Like... some kind of omen.

C: 嗯。虽然不知道发生了什么，但眼下撤离才是上策。
E: Right. We don't know exactly what's happening, but retreating is the safest choice right now.

C: 哎呀，这种情况，应该是他更担心你才对吧？安心，人家会替他守护你的！
E: If anything, he's the one worried about you! But I'm here to watch over you now!

C: 呵呵…就算圣城将我奉为权要，然而之于天地，我也不过渺然一身，所能及者量小力微。
E: Ah... While the holy city may honor me, I'm but a humble speck before the cosmos. My reach... is limited.

C: 阁下很敏锐。不错，您看见的这段回忆，正是他迈向新世界的开篇……
E: Sharp as ever. Indeed, these memories you witness are the first steps of his journey...

C: 我就是这么捉摸不透。
E: Can't pin me down, can you?

C: 院子里。
E: How about the courtyard?

C: 那我们分开行动吧，我在院子里找一找，阁楼上就交给你了。
E: Alright, let's split up. I'll handle the yard, you check the upper floor.

C: 一二三四五，丹恒打虚卒…
E: One, two, three, four, five... Dan Heng and Voidranger jive...

C: 所以，如果你愿意……
E: So, if you're willing...

C: 好啦，好啦。他只是在学故事里的吟游诗人多愁善感，才不会真的忘记大家呢。
E: Oh, he's just copying those bards from his stories, being all melodramatic. He couldn't forget about you all even if he tried.

C: 神谕牌！当然知道了，就是村长大人要我们把它带回来的。
E: Oh, the oracle cards! Right, the chief asked us to get those!

C: …就不得不取消了。如果灾难将至，我们还是留在哀丽秘榭为好，以防万一。
E: ...will have to be cancelled. If disaster's coming, we should stay in Aedes Elysiae, just to be safe.

C: 翻开「羁客」。
E: Reveal the "Traveler."

C: 身经万死，可仍未能抵挡刺穿后背的一剑，来自那漆黑面具的盗火行者。
E: I survived a thousand deaths only to fall to a coward's blade... That masked Flame Reaver who struck from behind.

C: 昔涟，可以把那张「救世主」牌交给我吗？
E: Cyrene, may I have that "Deliverer" card?

C: 救人要紧，我们得出发了。
E: We need to save them — now.

C: 怎么办，白厄？我们……
E: Phainon... what path do we take?

C: 「救世主」……
E: "Deliverer"...

C: 但在心愿破灭的时候，我很庆幸…他愿意踏上这条道路。
E: Now that wish has shattered, yet I'm glad... he's chosen to walk this path.

C: 话虽如此，我只是一介圣城卫士，而对面是身经百战的悬锋王子……
E: That's easy for you to say. I'm just a Holy City Guard, up against Kremnos's walking war machine of a prince...

C: 来了么？
E: Finally decided?

C: 是啊，我已成为「死亡」之半神，再也无法漫步人间。因此你所看到的，不过是这生灵涂炭的末日之世，无数死者汇成的冥河，它汹涌的涛声。
E: Yes, I've become Death's demigod, and shall never again walk the world of the living. What you see is the surging of the River of Souls, brought on by the countless dead feeding it in these dark times.

C: 言尽于此，该分别了。我会亲自料理那些可悲的刽子手——不以金丝，而以针锋。
E: There is nothing more to say. We part here. I shall personally dispatch that wretched executioner — not with threads of gold, but with the steel tip of a needle.

C: 不知道石榴汁加奶味道如何……
E: I wonder how pomegranate juice with milk would taste...

C: 我知道。
E: I know.

C: 来吧，两位，做我们该做的事。
E: Come now, both of you, let's finish our job.

C: 然后，墨涅塔的「金丝」会做出裁断，宣判你的命运。
E: Then, Mnestia's "golden threads" will judge you and decide your fate.

C: 真是天方夜谭啊……
E: Absolute nonsense...

C: 既然同样的情节已经在你眼中上演了无数次，告诉我……
E: Since you've witnessed this same scene play out countless times, tell me...

C: 呵，是啊…最初将十二火种熔为一体时，我也产生了同样的错觉。
E: Heh, yes... When I first forged the twelve Coreflames into one, I had the same impression.

C: 可现在，这具躯壳竟承载了足足四千八百万枚火种…我想，过不了太久——或许只要短短万年的时光——它便会被烧成{RUBY_B#盗火行者}哀毁骨立的焦炭{RUBY_E#}了吧。
E: And yet now, this fragile body holds a staggering forty-eight million Coreflames... I suppose it won't be long — perhaps just a fleeting ten thousand years — before it's reduced to nothing but {RUBY_B#Flame Reaver}charred, crumbling bones{RUBY_E#}.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我会杀死神明和伙伴，夺走火种。即便理智随身形一起化作焦炭，我也会记得自己的使命……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I will kill gods and comrades alike and steal the Coreflames. And even if my mind turns to ash along with my body, I will keep my purpose in mind...</color>

C: 我明白。为了不让最黑暗的命运降临，你必须如此。
E: I understand. If you are to keep the worst fate from unfolding, this is the only path.

C: 去和未来抗争吧，白厄。
E: Go fight for the future, Phainon.

C: 为了公平，让我们奔赴更辽阔的疆场——
E: For the sake of fairness, let us go to a vaster battleground—

C: 这副光景……
E: All of this...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>实验过程异常：对象卡厄斯兰那未正常载入缓冲区——</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Experimental anomaly detected: Subject Khaslana failed to load into buffer zone —</color>

C: 是你！
E: It's you!

C: 我想起来了…以前拜托过太卜大人，用穷观阵帮我寻找自己的过去……
E: That's it... Master Diviner used the Matrix of Prescience to help me search for my memories...

C: 是呀，真奇妙，就像一颗种子长成了花。人家现在，也称得上像花儿一样可爱了。
E: Yep. Isn't it amazing? It's like a seed finally grew up and became a flower! And I'm definitely as cute as a flower now.

C: 我相信你的力量，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。「开拓」的双手能创造奇迹，也一定能掐灭罪恶的火苗。
E: {NICKNAME}, I believe in your capacities. The hands of the Trailblaze can create miracles, and will certainly be able to snuff out the flames of evil.

C: 很遗憾，打扰了您的雅兴。为充分表达歉意，还请您赏光前来我的寓处……
E: My apologies for disturbing your moment of repose. To fully express my apologies, please grace my abode with your presence...

C: 为了联手解决危机，我作为内应留在翁法罗斯内部，丹恒则按原计划返回列车寻求帮助。不仅如此，螺丝咕姆还告诉我们，三月七也在早些时候被卷入了翁法罗斯。
E: To tackle the crisis together, I stayed behind in Amphoreus as an informant while Dan Heng returned to the Express as planned to seek help. On top of that, Screwllum informed us that March 7th had also been drawn into Amphoreus earlier.

C: 我凭什么相信你？
E: Why should I trust you?

C: 呵呵，看来阁下尚未察觉。
E: Hehehe. It seems you haven't realized something about this place.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>刻律德菈</color>，谨代表我的土地和人民，向「救世主」致意。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Cerydra</color>. On behalf of my people and this land, greetings, "Deliverer."

C: 刻法勒也降下过神谕。但只有欧洛尼斯告诉过人类，「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯。
E: Kephale issued prophecies too, but it was Oronyx who told mankind that the Deliverer from beyond the sky would descend upon Amphoreus.

C: 翁法罗斯才能挣脱「毁灭」。
E: Only then can Amphoreus break free from "the Destruction."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我们的征程…也不应再被这顽固的天幕制约。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Our journey... should no longer be confined below this stubborn sky.</color>

C: 但，我允许诸位以王臣的身份与我踏上征程——随我铸就最完美的「律法」。
E: Though, I will permit you to join me as subjects and together, we will forge the most perfect "Law."

C: {M#他们}{F#她们}选择的道路将掩埋翁法罗斯的宏愿：这座行于「毁灭」命途的世界，必会远离它本应享有的荣光……
E: The road they have chosen will bury Amphoreus's grand aspirations: This world which follows the Path of "Destruction" will inevitably stray far from the glory it was meant to enjoy...

C: 我只求眼不见心不烦。地生的虫豸到底碍不得天空分毫，只敢在荫蔽处抱怨烈日刺眼。
E: I prefer to ignore them. Pests on the ground don't affect the sky in the slightest. They just complain from the shadows that the sun's light is too harsh.

C: 无伤大雅，不必惊惶。对我而言，这种状态反而自然。陆上的人儿强求穿衣蔽体，只是为自己徒增束缚……
E: It's no big deal. There's no need to panic. This is the natural state for me. People on land force themselves to wear clothes, adding unnecessary constraints...

C: 看来她们关系不错。
E: They seem pretty close.

C: 阿格莱雅，和过去好不一样…
E: Aglaea is so different from her past self...

C: 海瑟音小姐把浴宫让给我们了呢…还真是随性呀。
E: Miss Hysilens has given us the bath chamber... It seems she really does do whatever she wants.

C: 真是热闹的宴会啊。
E: What a lively party!

C: 谢谢你！我有种预感，等回来后，我就能把《落木逐火英雄纪》完结了。
E: Thank you so much! I feel like I can actually finish composing the Heroic Saga of Flame-Chase once we end this campaign.

C: 你这套说法…还真泛用。
E: That line of yours was quite versatile...

C: ——住口！
E: Silence!

C: 但，您看到了：只需一次简单的合掌，我便能将生命于这世间抹除……
E: But you have seen how I can erase life from this world with just a clap of my hands.

C: 我从未否认这点。
E: I have never denied that.

C: 要算计一位避世的天才，我确实没有头绪；但想叫一个安提基色拉人受苦，「理性」的半神可有一万种方法。
E: I've got no idea how to outwit a reclusive genius... But making an Antikytheran suffer? The Demigod of Reason has ten thousand ways to do just that.

C: 毕竟，新世界会从你的「记忆」中诞生。故事的主角…可千万不能缺席呀。
E: After all, the new world will be born from your "memories," and the protagonist of this story... mustn't be absent.

C: 可惜，这只是痴心妄想。这位典狱官先因时光的磨损陷入了迷醉，而她的囚徒安然如故。
E: But alas, it was all a hopeless dream. That warden fell before I did due to erosion of time, while her prisoner remained unchanged.

C: 法吉娜，高贵的女王，她用迷醉逃避我的追问，她说，大地之上总有我渴求的欢宴……
E: Phagousa. My noble queen... she evaded my questions with drunken stupor. She told me a grand feast awaited me in the surface world...

C: 「鸟儿的歌是穿林的风声，却绕不过他嶙峋的裂痕……」
E: "The bird's song is a whisper of wind through the forest, but it cannot pass the fractures in his form..."

C: 痛苦的过去，却用歌声蒙上了快乐的面纱。
E: A painful past, yet hidden beneath a veil of joyful song.

C: 但倘若真相如此，千年时光已逝，你却仍在守候那位凯撒的墓碑，履行对她的忠诚…为什么？
E: But if that's the truth, then why, after a thousand years, are you still here, guarding the Imperator's grave? Still bound by loyalty?

C: 前进吧，为了救世的责任！
E: Go forth. For the duty of deliverance!

C: 我拭目以待。以决定银河命运的高潮作为此世的黄昏，多么恰当。
E: I eagerly look forward to it. The last dusk this world will ever see shall become the climax that decides the fate of the cosmos. Oh, what an appropriate end.

C: ——然后，按下单集循环，直到他妥协为止。
E: Then command it to loop endlessly until he gives in.

C: 我更愿意将其称作「谈判席」，赞达尔阁下。但您的理解没错。我们恰好有一位擅长「调律」的盟友，而{NICKNAME}和昔涟小姐……
E: I would much rather call this location "our negotiation table," Lord Zandar. Nonetheless, your hypothesis is correct. We happen to have an ally skilled in "tuning," while {NICKNAME} and Miss Cyrene...

C: 只是「听故事」而已，人家最擅长这个了。
E: I'm the best at "listening to stories," you know.

C: 听听看吧？她是如何看待这个由星神和命途构建的世界……
E: Let's go listen to what she thinks about this world, all constructed by Aeons and Paths...

C: 我绝不允许凯撒的帝国任人宰割。翁法罗斯必须成为强权，不容寰宇轻视。
E: I will never allow the Imperator's empire to be sullied by others. Amphoreus must become a power so strong that no interstellar foreigner would dare to look down upon us.

C: 是我砸碎了{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的枷锁，团结世人自救，开启了逐火的时代。这短短几句话，就是凯撒光辉的一生。
E: I smashed {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}'s shackles, united humankind to save themselves, and started the Flame-Chase Era. That's what the Imperator has done in her glorious life.

C: 「凯撒陨落。有人说，那位剑旗爵确实堕落成为弑君的叛徒；也有人说，她将暴君囚禁在浅水中，独自离去——如此一来，后者就必须为改写『律法』而了结自己……」
E: "The Imperator fell. Some say that the Dux Gladiorum turned traitor and killed her liege. Some say that she imprisoned the tyrant in a shallow pond of water, then left... which meant the Imperator had to kill herself to rewrite the 'Law'..."

C: 所以，自己选吧，前辈。是一意孤行，让一句错误的结论成为你的遗言……
E: Make your choice then, Senior Society Member. Do you want to keep walking down the wrong path and be remembered for your incorrect conclusions...

C: 我本以为，就这么等候在忆域的角落，不会有人察觉……
E: I thought no one would notice me if I just waited at a corner of the Memory Zone...

C: 他们都没能突破{RUBY_B#防火墙}天空的封锁{RUBY_E#}。翁法罗斯默默无闻的原因，恐怕也有它自身的危险性吧。
E: None of these people managed to break through {RUBY_B#firewall}the Sky's seal{RUBY_E#}. There's probably a dangerous reason as to why Amphoreus had remained undiscovered for so long.

C: 这句话，应该我来说才对吧？
E: Shouldn't I be the one asking you that?

C: 三月的房间…从刚才起，就一直没听见她的声音。
E: March's room... I haven't heard a single peep from her this whole time.

C: 隐瞒事实，伺机而动。现在看来，让忆者们引导合适的人来到这里，也是计划的一环。
E: Hide the truth and wait for an opportunity. Now it seems that letting Memokeepers guide the right people here was also part of the plan.

C: 螺丝咕姆先生，你有办法将我的精神信号发射回翁法罗斯吗？
E: Mr. Screwllum, do you have a way to transmit my spirit signal back to Amphoreus?

C: 过去的昔涟，应该早就牺牲了…
E: All the Cyrenes from the past should have died long ago...

C: 如果到头来，每一次提笔，都只能写下相同的结局。那这篇沉甸甸的史诗……
E: If "I" can only write the same ending every time "I" lift my pen, then is this weighty saga...

C: 没错，鸟儿。所以我才需要你的协助。这一路同行，让我更加确信……
E: That's right. That's why I needed your help, little bird. The more we walked together, the more I was convinced...

C: 接下来，就交给「我们」吧！
E: Now leave the rest to "us"!

C: 这里是，用某人的「记忆」制成的光锥……？
E: This is... a Light Cone made from someone's "memories"...?

C: 悟性很高呢，小忆灵。但只凭你和「同谐」的小鸟——想困住我，多少有些勉强了呀？
E: Quite perceptive, little memosprite. But with just you and that Harmony's little birdie... thinking you could trap me? That's a bit of a stretch.

C: 可以，那让我拭目以待。绕了这么远的路，你接下来打算怎么做？
E: Fine. Lay it on me then. After going on such a long detour, what exactly do you want to do now?

C: 相信三月七和昔涟。
E: We should trust March 7th and Cyrene.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你怎么才来？
E: {NICKNAME}, there you are! What took you so long?

C: 聆听同谐的乐声。
E: Listen to the music of the Harmony.

C: 我们是她的忆灵。为了她的愿望，必须倾尽所有呀。
E: We are her memosprites. For the sake of her wish... we must give it our all.

C: 「——激起往昔的涟漪！」
E: "—and stir up ripples of past reverie!"

C: 那时，你的旅途将与「记忆」交错，在艾利欧预见的多数可能性中，它都指向一次巨大的危机。你会经历背叛，陷入迷茫，需要…答案。
E: On that day, your journey will intertwine with the Remembrance. In nearly every possibility Elio has foreseen, it leads to a great crisis. You'll face betrayal, lose your way... and seek answers.

C: （星期日…？）
E: (Sunday...?)

C: 「是啊，{NICKNAME}……」
E: "Yes, {NICKNAME}..."

C: 丹…丹恒？
E: Dan... Dan Heng?

C: 就是这里，是时候唤醒我们要找的人了。
E: We're here. Now it's time to awaken the person we're looking for.

C: 要想通过这里，方法多的是——桀桀桀，该轮到本大爷大显神通了！
E: There are plenty of ways to get through here. Hehehe, it's time for me to show you what I can do!

C: 慢着…还得帮他们搭个梯子…就用这个预言算碑吧？
E: Wait... I still need to make a ladder for them... let's use this Prophecy Tablet.

C: 孽火既生……
E: The fires of abomination reignite...

C: 海列屈拉…是你？
E: Helektra... Is that you?
(Oblivion...)

C: 似乎是在缇宝的记忆里…
E: I think... it was in Tribbie's memories.

C: 他在利用我挖掘这些秘密。
E: He's using me to dig up these secrets.

C: 「别、别靠近我——不——！」
E: "D—Don't come near me— N—Nooo!"

C: 我的立场从未改变：「智识」的溃败无可避免。
E: My stance has never changed. The Erudition's ruin is inevitable.

C: {NICKNAME}，还有…丹恒。
E: {NICKNAME}... and... Dan Heng.

C: 便是你计划覆灭之时。
E: That is the moment your schemes will come to ruin.

C: 与我一同，成为英雄吧！
E: Stand with me, and become heroes!

C: 谁先请缨，谁就是元帅的选择。我看——这结果正中景元下怀呢。
E: Whoever volunteers first is the Marshal's pick. If you have to ask, I'd say this outcome plays right into Jing Yuan's hands.

C: 当然。我们已经将绝大部分造物引擎重新封入冰下，以防「存护」之志成为「毁灭」的帮凶。
E: Of course. We have resealed most of the Engine of Creation beneath the ice to prevent the will of the Preservation from becoming an accomplice to the Destruction.

C: 放心，姬子小姐，贝洛伯格远比我们想象中更坚韧。
E: Don't worry, Miss Himeko. Belobog is far more resilient than we imagined.

C: …各位，小心。
E: ...Everyone, be careful.

C: 这一站，孩子们已经远远走在了大人前面了啊。
E: It seems the kids are already miles ahead of us at this stop.

C: 古老的神明，您忠诚的子民，迷茫的信徒，无畏的战友，已尽数跪拜于王座前。
E: O ancient god, your loyal subjects, bewildered followers, and fearless comrades-in-arms have all knelt before your throne.

C: 歌颂「黄金之茧，阿格莱雅」，您吐露的金丝编织「纯美」，令孤独的灵魂邂逅浪漫。
E: Praise be to "Aglaea, Chrysalis of Gold," for your golden threads weave Beauty, allowing lonely souls to encounter romance.

C: 歌颂「永夜之帷，三月七」，您为我们珍藏起岁月，将「记忆」织成繁星，绣于无垠的裙摆之上。
E: Praise be to "March 7th, Veil of Evernight," for you safeguard time for us, weaving Remembrance into stars, to be embroidered upon a boundless dress.

C: 不知真正的星穹列车坐感如何，但愿不会这么…颠簸。
E: I wonder what the real Astral Express feels like. Hopefully not this... bumpy.

C: 这最后一役，「灾厄」将与翁法罗斯同在。
E: In this final battle, Calamity shall stand with Amphoreus.

C: 他以怒火铭记背负的一切，可当余温散去，留下的便只有冰冷的悔恨。
E: He remembered everything he bore through the fires of his fury, but when the embers faded, all that remained was cold regret.

C: 「掌控你能掌控之事，待那无可逃避的命运降临时。」
E: "Control what little you can, and when fate's inescapable grasp comes..."

C: 如约定的那样，{NICKNAME}，接过它吧。
E: As promised, {NICKNAME}, take it now.

C: 「也熄灭了他因愤怒而燃烧的『绝望』。」
E: "And quenched the despair kindled by his wrath."

C: 既然你胜券在握，想必不会介意，给我们一些私人空间？
E: Now that your victory is assured, I trust you won't mind giving us a moment in private?

C: 洞穴的囚徒，终究难言世界的全貌。
E: A prisoner in the cave can never truly describe the world in its entirety.

C: 这就是星球大战吗…
E: Are we in "star wars"...?

C: 所以，一如既往，去拯救这个遍体鳞伤的世界吧，孩子们。而这一站……
E: So, go save this bruised and battered world just as we always have, kids. On this stop...

C: 我赎罪的工已完毕：无首的{RUBY_B#「铁墓」}巨匠{RUBY_E#}，将缔造{RUBY_B#「智识」}灵知{RUBY_E#}的葬仪。
E: My atonement is complete: The headless {RUBY_B#Irontomb}giant{RUBY_E#} will create {RUBY_B#the Erudition}wisdom{RUBY_E#}'s funeral.

C: 「毫无荣耀。你以『英雄』为躯，却偏偏如此卑劣？」
E: "You have no honor. You reside in the body of a 'hero,' yet you're so despicable."

C: 「这便是『再创世』的真容，果真丑陋不堪。」
E: "Is this the true face of Era Nova? As ugly as I thought."

C: 恐怕，它也吞下了三千万世的「毁灭」。
E: ...Was probably also when the Scepter devoured thirty million cycles of Destruction.

C: 帕姆？！你怎么在这…
E: Pom-Pom!? How did you get here...?

C: 既然如此……
E: In that case...

C: 「旅程才刚刚开始。我，瓦尔特，还有其他同伴，有许多秘密还没有告诉你。」
E: "The journey has only just begun. Welt, our other companions, and I still have many secrets we've yet to share with you."

C: 「我们能做到，对吗？」
E: "We can do it, right?"
█▄▄Progress▄▄█destroy█▄▄Erudition▄▄█

C: 只有眼见为实了，对吗？
E: So I have to see it with my own eyes, right?

C: 打头阵的任务是最艰巨的，我可不想露怯啊。
E: Going first is the hardest job. I don't want to make a fool of myself.

C: 早知道就同你们共饮几杯了，金织爵。
E: I should've shared a drink with you all, Dux Goldweaver.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「信任与无私，是世上最美丽的两件华服：一件赠予他人，一件装扮自己。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Trust and selflessness are the two most beautiful garments in the world: one to gift others, one to adorn yourself."</color>

C: 不，还是我先吧。毕竟——
E: No. Let me go first. After all...

C: 是这片银河的第一声丧钟。
E: The first toll of the death knell for the cosmos.

C: 一、沿着这条你踏出的「记忆」之路，挣脱这个世界，走向群星。
E: The first: Follow the trail of "memory" you have forged, break free from this world, and reach for the stars.

C: 为什么？
E: Why?

C: 是你——「冒充」神明的你——用温柔的目光托起{F#她}{M#他}的形体。
E: And it was you — you, "playing" god — who cradled {M#his}{F#her} body with your gentle gaze.

C: 即便我想为「昔涟」留下更多话，好像也做不到……
E: Even if I wanted to leave a few more words for "Cyrene," it seems I no longer can...

C: 但知晓自己的愿望，将在海的彼端…开花结果……
E: The tree knows that its wish will bloom on the other side of the sea...

C: 「银河间的星星会知晓，我是和{NICKNAME}一同写下《如我所书》的妖精。」
E: "The stars across the cosmos will know: I am the fairy who wrote As I've Written together with {NICKNAME}."

C: 嘻，要多运动呀。
E: Hehe, you really need to work out more.

C: 回首过去，果然是件费心的事呢。
E: Looking back on the past really does wear down the mind.

C: 害…怕，不…过……
E: S—Scared, but...

C: …得先找个安全的地方当根据地。从四周的建筑，还有这尊雕像来看，翁法罗斯肯定存在文明……
E: ...Let's find someplace safe to set up a base of operations first. This statue and the buildings we've seen so far point to a civilization here on Amphoreus...

C: 我知道，你在听。<color=#dbc291ff>好朋友</color>。
E: I know you're listening, <color=#dbc291ff>my good friend</color>.

C: 泰坦也送来祝福：<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将收梢于花开时，一如终结诞下起始。」</color>
E: The Titans also gave their blessings: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall fade when the flowers bloom, for every ending begets a beginning."</color>

C: >>>系统运行中…
E: >>> System running...

C: 保存
E: Save

C: 为什么。不开心？
E: Why. Unhappy?

C: 桃子。别怕。我帮你。找「空白」。
E: Peach. Don't be scared. I'll help you. Find "blank space."

C: 对了。有了。
E: Yes. Right.

C: 但现在不是哭泣的时候，对吗？我们会找到答案的，就像奇迹…总会发生。
E: But now's not the time to cry, right? We'll find the answer, just like how miracles... will eventually happen.

C: 当然，这是她给你的祝福。
E: Of course. It's her blessing to you.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我将改写「第四时刻」的锚点，让银河未来朝着黑塔喜欢的方向前进！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I'll change the anchor points for the "Fourth Instant" and move the future of the cosmos in a direction I want!</color>

C: 单纯的小姑娘，以为自己的愿望总能成真。
E: What a naive little girl, thinking her wishes will always come true.

C: 「好奇」，女士，仅此而已。
E: "Curiosity." That is all, Madam.

C: 呵…作为量子域的「幽灵」，观测是我的天职……
E: Heh... As the "ghost" of the quantum domain, it is my duty to observe...

C: 数个系统时前，飘荡于茫茫太空的列车车厢中
E: Some system hours ago, aboard the Astral Express in space...
███████ I was told: The destination is still unknown ███████

C: 「！」——在自然语言中，人们将其添加于文句后，以表达某种复杂的情感。也许它的意思是：对已至的一切永葆惊奇。
E: "!"... In natural language, it's appended to sentences as a vessel of complex emotions. Perhaps it signifies a perpetual wonder at all that has come to pass.

C: 主演
E: Starring

C: 缇宝，缇安，缇宁，…
E: Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon...

C: 当然，只差你一个决定。
E: Of course. You just need to make the decision.

C: 好啊。
E: Okay~

C: 取回<color=#dbc291ff>「晶彩流光」…「大裤衩」</color>一条！可恶，你这水魈，竟然冒充我取走如此重要的奇物！
E: Retrieve the <color=#dbc291ff>Boxer with Colored Tortoiseshell Pattern</color>... You cheeky Xenohydro! How dare you use my identity to steal such a valuable Curio!

C: 我本来只是想逗你玩玩，没想到引来这么多人……
E: I only wanted to tease you a bit. Never expected to catch so much attention.

C: 这就是他四处宣扬的「飞跃黑塔」事件。多少年了，这事我一想起来，就气得牙痒痒。
E: And this is the "Station Breakout" incident that he boasts about all over the place. It's been so many years, but whenever I think about it, I'm still so mad at him.

C: 二致「宝藏」的发掘者：
E: To Treasure Hunters: (II)

C: 我不知道她的本名，只知道她自称——<color=#dbc291ff>「瓜农」</color>。
E: I don't know her real name, but she calls herself <color=#dbc291ff>Gossipmonger</color>....

C: 是阿兰大哥托你来调查的吗？太好了，正巧我有些新发现。
E: Did Arlan ask you to investigate? Great! I've made some new discoveries.

C: 哟呵，行啊，这都被你发现了。
E: Oho! Well done — you found me.

C: 空间站有财务流程。咱们无论采购什么东西，只要是给空间站买的，都得走对公账户，用公司批的预算。
E: The space station has its own financial procedures. As long as the purchase is for the space station, no matter how big or small, it has to go through the organizational account using the station's allocated funds.

C: 三重权限认证缺失，禁止开启舱门。
E: Triple authentication failed. Opening the hatch is forbidden.

C: 温馨提示：在启动认证程序前，请确保携带完整的<color=#dbc291ff>三重</color>权限认证卡。
E: Reminder: Please make sure you have the complete <color=#dbc291ff>triple</color> authentication verification card before you launch the verification program.

C: 所有人都穿着相同制式的衣服，简直是对科员个性的抹杀！
E: Everyone is wearing the same clothes. This is an obliteration of the staff's individuality!

C: 当然有空搭理我！自从莱斯莉走后，我们一直断断续续地通过银河电波中继器联系。
E: Of course she does! Ever since Lesley left, we've been communicating on and off through the Cosmic Airwave Repeater.

C: 不回复就是一种婉拒…
E: Ghosting you might just be her way of rejection.

C: 请选择您要察看的过往讯号转译纪录。
E: You can view the historical signal decoding record here.

C: 算了，别多想，现在最要紧是找到中继器的监控记录。
E: Forget it. The most important thing is to find the surveillance record of the repeater.

C: …说得这么精确，看来你有证据。
E: Don't jump to conclusions. Show me your evidence.

C: 她成了神仙？
E: Has she become a god?

C: 怎么会这样…莱斯莉答应了我的表白，但星震那部分……
E: I can't believe it... Lesley said yes, but the starquake...

C: 但我要去追她。我要去，追赶时间！
E: But I can go after her. I am going to chase after time!

C: 他或许会离开空间站…
E: He may leave the space station...

C: 呼，呼…镇定，亚伯拉罕。作为奇物再收容小队队员，必须时刻保持冷静。
E: Phew, phew... Calm down, Abraham. As a member of the Curio Collection Squad, you must always stay calm.

C: 嗯，我已经加快速度了。
E: Yes, I am going as fast as I can.

C: 目力所及之处都化为了「毁灭」的焦土，怪物余孽仍在银光闪烁的舱室内巡回。
E: Everything within sight has been turned into a wasteland, and monsters are still roaming around in our cabins.

C: 我们需要动员每一位科员的力量，放下固有的偏见，长期通力地合作，回收流散的奇物，修缮破损的舱室。
E: We need to mobilize every member of our staff, put down our inherent prejudices, and work together to recover the lost Curios and repair the damaged cabins.

C: 我记得你是曾在主控舱段帮忙的年轻人？那更好了，我有一项特殊任务要拜托你。
E: I remember you. You are the young {M#man}{F#lady} who helped out in the master control zone. Great. I have a special task for you.

C: 听说人在入灭之前将会回顾一生的记忆，这卷录像带毫无疑问记录着一个已罹难之人的终末时刻。你奋力将自己从身临其境的黑暗泥淖中拔出，只听见一段断断续续的宇宙无线电……
E: They say your life flashes before your eyes at the final moment of your life. This video undoubtedly records the last moments of a deceased person's life. You struggle to pull yourself out of the immersive dark mud. All you hear is the intermittent cosmic radio...

C: （还是优先调查一下这位「希拉」吧。）
E: (I should investigate this so-called Sheila first.)

C: 我找到资料了！
E: I found the information!

C: 我怀疑你另有阴谋。
E: I think you have ulterior motives.

C: 我的天，这…乔安都开始干活了，难道是我今天没睡醒？
E: My goodness... Joanne is actually working. Am I dreaming?

C: 现在好了！麻烦您再过一次身份校验程序，然后直接查询终端机就会有结果了。
E: It's all set now! Please verify your identity again. And the results will come up when you input your query.

C: 看来的确如我所料，辛苦你了{NICKNAME}。
E: It's as I expected. Good work, {NICKNAME}.

C: …啊哈哈，不、不要在意细节。
E: ...Ahaha, d—don't worry about those.

C: 诶，你怎么回事，是哪里不舒服吗？怎么脸色越来越差，瞳孔都要涣散了…没有关系！我卡波特的爱好就是帮助迷茫之人，接下来我会提升强度，为你提供心灵上的支持。
E: Oh, still troubled? You must be ill! You look pale and your pupils are gray... That's fine! I, Capote, never waver in my support! I shall double my efforts to heal your heart.

C: 查看粉丝回馈手卡。
E: Read the fan reply card.

C: 佩佩，又该你出场了。
E: Peppy, it's your turn again.

C: 阿兰没有和你在一起吗？
E: Is Arlan not with you?

C: 是、是吗…直觉这种东西能有几分可信度？我、我简直冤枉啊。
E: I—Is that so? How reliable can one's gut feelings be? I—I am being framed!

C: 好，小阿德勒，你别紧张。既然你们提到了「呜呜伯」，我和这位{NICKNAME}，只想问你几个问题……
E: Alright, little Adler, don't be anxious. Since you brought up Wubbaboo, {NICKNAME} and I here want to ask you a few questions...

C: 站住！你们已经被包围了。
E: Freeze! We've got you surrounded.

C: 等一下，除非！它说除非……
E: Wait, unless! It says, "If..."

C: 嗯…不论是回收科员的所有物，还是清除「军团」余孽，都是防卫科应尽的职责。
E: Uh... Be it recovering researchers' belongings or taking out Legion remnants, they are both the Security Department's duties.

C: 拿到这么重要的证物，是得好好亲自查证……
E: We ought to have a thorough check after getting our hands on such important evidence...

C: 嗯。外人看到的都是空间站的光鲜，却不知道身处其中的疲累。
E: Yeah. Other people see the glory of being employed by the space station, but they don't know the exhaustion people have to endure while on the inside.

C: 你好，{F#女士}{M#先生}，想必你就是黑塔最近常挂在嘴边的人。
E: Ah! Hello, {NICKNAME}. I've heard so much about you. Herta talks about you often.

C: 啊…这里竟然没有涂鸦？完了，线索断了……
E: Huh...? There's no graffiti here... We're doomed. The trail has gone cold...

C: 总觉得他们的目的没这么单纯。唉，多希望能找到一些对你有用的线索，不然让你白忙活这么久，真挺不好意思的。
E: I can't help but feel that there's more that they're after. *sigh* I really hope I can find something that's useful to you... otherwise I'll feel bad for having you do so much work for nothing.

C: 谁？
E: Leonard call who well?

C: 她也会露出这种表情。
E: Never expected to see that kind of expression on her face.

C: 我认为模拟宇宙中的奇迹，应当拥有自行生长、萌发的权利，而不是由他人的意志加以干涉，就像宇宙本身。
E: I believe that the miracles inside the Simulated Universe have the right to grow and develop organically. The will of others shouldn't be imposed upon it, just like in the actual universe.

C: 这是当然，毕竟，这里还有一位不合时宜的第三者。
E: There is an unwelcome third party here with us.

C: 您确信自己能全身而退。
E: You're confident you will be able to get out of this in one piece.

C: 这下子，我终于可以不用担心被开除啦。
E: I don't have to worry about being fired anymore.

C: 这就动身了？我还以为你会先体验一下朝思暮想的卡带呢。
E: Getting a move on already? I would've thought you'd at least wanna spend some time with that cartridge you were obsessing about.

C: 「构似访问：银狼」强度等级提升
E: Simulated Visit: Silver Wolf strength level increased

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: （谨慎的不再接话。）
E: (Cautious silence)

C: 你…你是谁？为什么长得和我一样？
E: Wh—Who are you? Why do you look exactly like me?

C: 放心，只是得抓紧一点。让我想想…靠人力搜查效率比较低，{NICKNAME}，你能想想是否有更迅速的方式吗？
E: Let's stay focused, we just need to move fast. Let me think... scouring the train like this isn't very efficient. {NICKNAME}, any thoughts how to speed things up?

C: 列车的外壁…可能正在胃液中融化。
E: The outer components of the Express... may well be melting in gastric acid as we speak.

C: 为什么要单独和我说？
E: Why did you want to talk to me alone?

C: 那位访客看上去是一位骑士…还带着一位随从？
E: That visitor appears to be a knight... and it looks like he has a servant?

C: 列车…在被融化？
E: The Express is... melting?

C: 请各位切勿担心。
E: Calm yourselves, all of you.

C: 呜哇！{NICKNAME}乘客！你终于回来了！没想到列车大扫除之日这么快就来了帕……
E: Wow! {NICKNAME}, you're finally back — and just in time for the Express's grand spring cleaning!

C: 总之，好好干吧。我要出门一趟，想找人帮忙，你可以问<color=#dbc291ff>艾丝妲</color>。
E: Anyway, keep up the good work. I need to go out for a bit. Go ask <color=#dbc291ff>Asta</color> if you want someone to help you.

C: （…他们似乎有事隐瞒，想蒙混过去。）
E: (...They seem to be hiding something.)
About ■■■■■■?

C: 抱歉，情况特殊，希望你能帮我保密……
E: I'm sorry. This situation is unique. I hope you can keep this a secret for me...

C: 她是说了，那又如何？如果你想证明二者是同一件事，就拿出证据。
E: She did say that, but then what? You need to provide evidence to show incidents are linked.

C: 「信任」的毁灭。
E: The destruction of "trust."

C: 突如其来的连续失踪，无疑是培育混乱的最佳温床。
E: And the sudden and consecutive disappearances provided the best environment for chaos to fester.

C: 结束了。
E: It's over.

C: 螺丝星的君王果然通晓人心，只可惜也和天才一样远离凡众——你还是错了一点。
E: The ruler of Planet Screwllum is indeed well-versed in the human mind. It's a pity you are as much in the ivory tower as other geniuses — you still got one thing wrong.

C: 我只是列出自己的质疑，至于答案…他们自会解明。
E: I am only laying out my questions. As for the answers... They'll find them themselves.

C: 以及，在你们追踪敌人的过程中，防卫科找到了失踪的受害者。结论：他们都很安全。
E: While you were chasing the enemy, the Security Department also found the missing researchers. Affirmation: They are all safe and sound.

C: 签名？你这是要干嘛，鬼鬼祟祟的，吓人！
E: Autograph? What are you on about!? You're freaking me out!

C: （这太惊险了…）
E: (That was way too risky...)

C: 为什么要我一起？
E: Why with me?

C: 鉴定通过，嘶嘶。
E: Permission granted, *buzz*.

C: 但短暂的一生也应有意义。我想知道它能做到些什么，这代表了我在未理解的领域中走出了多远。
E: However, even the briefest life should have meaning. I want to know the limits of its capacity. It will indicate how far I've gone in a field completely incomprehensible to me.
(Meow...)

C: 提问之前，不如先想一想，答案是否对你要解决的问题有益。
E: Have you considered whether the answer to your question will be of any relevance to our current predicament?

C: 一级保密区域，嘶嘶。
E: Class one clearance zone. *buzz*

C: 你有一丝心软。
E: A hint of compassion tugs at your heart.

C: 我这算是被你们流放了吗？
E: Does this mean you're exiling me?

C: 这就走？会不会太急了？
E: So I just go now? Is this not a bit sudden?

C: 不是，哥们你俩在干什么？
E: Of course not. What are you two doing?

C: 唉…奋斗固然是好的，但怎么说呢，总感觉少了一些从前的松弛感。
E: Ah... It's always good to push yourself, but... How do I put it? I feel like we've lost that relaxing vibe we had before.

C: 对了，我的朋友马上就来了，而且你也认识她，要不要一起见见？
E: Actually, my friend will be here in a second. You know her as well. So, do you want to catch up with her as well?

C: 请各位站好，我将在你们站定后开始拍照——
E: Please take your positions. I will take a picture as soon as you are all in place...

C: 抱歉，目标所处的位置超出了我的处理能力，麻烦你自己寻找路线。
E: My apologies. Target location is beyond my processing capabilities. Please find your own route.

C: 我、我要跟鼹鼠党的大家说，让大家都来这里跟叔叔们打招呼！
E: I—I want to tell this story to everyone in The Moles! I want them all to come here and say hello to these nice guards!

C: 那还等什么，赶紧走吧。
E: Then what are we waiting for? Let's get going!

C: 但是漂流瓶被她拿去了。唉…好想知道里面写了什么。
E: But she ended up taking the Drift Bottle with her. Ah... I'd love to know what was written inside.

C: …你们是真不知道啊？银鬃铁卫就是贝洛伯格的军队，执法者，警察…那帮家伙完全不懂变通，就喜欢和干咱们这行的人打交道。
E: You...You really don't know? The Silvermane Guards are Belobog's soldiers, enforcers, and police. Let's just say they're not the most flexible of people... and they like paying visits to folks in our line of work.

C: 那怕是要等上一辈子了。
E: You might be waiting longer than you think...

C: 我们会尽力搞定这件事。
E: We'll do our best.

C: 看来你其实很懂艺术…
E: Seems like you know your art...

C: 啊，真的耶，说不定是要去找主人了？{NICKNAME}，我们先跟上它吧！
E: Looks like they want to find their master. Let's follow them, {NICKNAME}.

C: 简单，我给你看一样东西。
E: That's simple, I'll show you.

C: 这就是我和上面谈判的筹码。我要说服他们，让他们相信雅利洛-Ⅵ在公司的长远战略中能占有一席之地。
E: This is my bargaining chip for negotiating with the higher-ups. I'll convince them that Jarilo-VI has a place in the company's long-term strategies.

C: 这种事，换成谁都很难面对…
E: You couldn't have foreseen all this.

C: 放心吧布洛妮娅！虽然之前没能说服托帕，但这件事我们一定会好好完成的！
E: We've got your back! We failed to convince Topaz, but this should be a piece of cake!

C: 信息…好。把您知道的都告诉我吧，姬子女士。
E: Information? Please, tell me what you know, Miss Himeko.

C: 布、布洛妮娅，你可算来了！再慢两步的话，场面真要控制不住了！
E: B—Bronya? You're here just in time! Things were about to get out of control!

C: …还有事吗？我要挂了。
E: ...Anything else? If not, I'm hanging up.

C: 又见面了两位，别来无恙？
E: We meet again! How have you two been?

C: 一定要提醒守护者大人，不能主动踩进对方设好的陷阱里！
E: You must warn the Madam Guardian not to allow herself to fall into their trap!

C: 将公司讨债一事和布洛妮娅面临的抉择转告给了克拉拉……
E: You tell Clara about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...

C: 不如想想事情的反面。如果拒绝了，接下来会发生什么？重建计划本就一眼看不到头，现在又凭空多出一笔巨债要还，只靠我们自己真的顶得住吗？
E: Have you considered the opposite? What about if we refuse? The reconstruction plan already sounds like an endless endeavor. With the added burden of a massive debt... How's that something we can manage on our own?

C: 三月，{NICKNAME}…你们回来了啊。
E: March, {NICKNAME}, you're back.

C: 不过这个话题可以等你回列车再聊。你和小三月又经历了一段不可思议的旅程，最好还是先忘记这些杂事，饱饱地睡上一觉吧。
E: Let's talk about this later when you're back on the Express. You and March must be tired after such an incredible journey — it's time you got some well-deserved rest.

C: {NICKNAME}，还请你们先去歌德宾馆休息吧。我和托帕小姐还要聊聊后续的事宜。
E: {NICKNAME}, why don't you head over to the Goethe Hotel and relax for a bit? Miss Topaz and I still have a few matters to discuss.

C: 到底该怎么办……
E: What are we supposed to do...

C: 我保证不说出去。
E: I won't.

C: （再找另一个患者打听一下吧……）
E: (I should find another patient to talk to...)

C: 「风险」？
E: "Risk"?

C: 偷偷告诉你吧，「疑难重症患者互助会」现在还在卖这种药…让我告诉你他们的交易地点也不是不行，但你得遵守一条规矩……
E: Listen up... the Complex Illness Mutual Aid Society is still selling that medicine... I can tell you where they trade, but there's a rule...

C: 你要是还好奇瓦赫那所谓「特效药」的效用，不如去问问诊所里的患者吧——看看他们会给你什么样的答案。
E: If you're curious about Vache's wonder medicine, you should ask some of the patients in the clinic... see what they have to say about the effects.

C: 给我来一个疗程吧。
E: I'll take a course of treatment.

C: …你以为他活着的时候，做的事和「互助会」的那群药贩子有什么区别？要我说，他甚至还不如那帮家伙！
E: Yeah... But don't think for a second he was any better than those medicine dealers at the mutual aid society. He was worse than they could ever aspire to be!

C: 你没事吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 它也许冒充了你？
E: Maybe it's impersonating you?

C: 这块地方我还算熟，记忆中的确有一两处地方人迹罕至，有可能窝藏水魈，我可以带你去碰碰运气。
E: I'm quite familiar with this place. There are one or two places I know that are inaccessible where the Xenohydro may be hiding. I can take you to have a look.

C: 我不能，也没脸这么做。卡波特是第一个跳板，唯一的跳板。虽然要依附于他，但那总归是隶属于界种科辖下的，一个体面的工作。
E: I can't, and I am not shameless enough to do that. Capote was my first springboard to success, the only springboard. Although I had to rely on him, it's still a decent job in the Department of Ecology.

C: 你在问我吗？今天，的确是没有什么研究的活啦。
E: Are you asking me? There is really not much research work today.

C: 该怎么做才能走出去……
E: How can I get out of here...

C: 太…冷清了。要是平时的话，我们根本不可能在避免战斗的情况下一路走到这里。
E: It's... too quiet. Normally, we couldn't have come all this way without any fights.

C: 我们为什么要从这里开始搜索？
E: Why should we start searching here?

C: 既然这是老巴拉金留下来的东西，还用这种隐蔽的机关保护着，那大概就是新的线索了。可他到底是想表达什么呢？
E: Since this is something left by old Balakin and protected by this hidden mechanism, it very much could be a new clue. But what is he trying to say?

C: 爸爸妈妈都还住在老地方，他们虽然已经不再工作在一线，但是和学院、医院的联系应该还在。
E: Mom said they still live at the old house, but they're not working on the front lines anymore. They should still have some connections in the medical school and the hospital, though.

C: 他每完成一台高难度的手术，我和妈妈都会去买一朵「暖阳花」，别在他医务服的前口袋上。
E: Each time he finished a tricky operation, my mom and I would buy a single stem of Sunshine, then pin it on the chest pocket of his apron.

C: 对不起，妈妈…对不起，这十几年来我没能陪在你们身边。也让你受累了，奥森先生。
E: I'm so sorry mom... I'm so sorry. For ten years, I left you both in the Overworld. Mr. Oswell, I'm sorry you had to bear all this weight.

C: …是不能当着妈妈的面说的事吗？
E: Something that mom isn't supposed to know?

C: 是啊。你看我们这些在城外巡逻的铁卫，哪个不是冒着生命危险在执勤？
E: Yes. Take a look at the guards patrolling outside the city. All of them are risking their lives.

C: 瓦赫现在在哪？
E: Where is Vache now?

C: 从看到奥森先生保存的那封信开始，我就一直怀有一丝侥幸心理。逼着你陪我来到这么凶险的地方，是我太过任性了。
E: After seeing the letters Mr. Oswell kept for me, I was hoping things might've ended differently. I shouldn't have asked you to come with me to such a dangerous place.

C: 只是……
E: It's just...

C: 我大概想到是谁干的了。
E: I think I know who the culprit is.

C: 据驻扎在下层区的铁卫说，他们最近经常在深夜目击到一些行迹可疑的人物在<color=#dbc291ff>大矿区的隐匿处</color>接头。
E: The guards stationed in the Underworld reported that some suspicious characters have been meeting at <color=#dbc291ff>a hideout in the Great Mine</color> late at night.

C: 有三件事值得留意……
E: Remember the three things I told you...

C: 我这边也有了些进展。听这里的矿民说，他们最近发现身边有些人的举止十分诡异——有几个以前几乎从不离开大矿区的流浪者，最近没事总往磐岩镇跑。
E: I made some progress too. The miners here say they've noticed some people acting strangely recently – a few vagrants who almost never leave the Great Mine have suddenly started making trips to Boulder Town.

C: 本应在这里展出的是一尊现代雕塑，雕塑的名字叫「齿轮与智慧」。
E: The item that's supposed to be in this exhibit is a modern sculpture called Gears and Wisdom.

C: 你们在行政区应该认识不少熟人，对吧？如果可以的话，我希望两位能在市中心广场附近查访一下行人，看看能不能采到一鳞半爪的线索。
E: You're familiar with many of the locals in the Administrative District, right? If possible, I'd like you to head to the city center and see if they have any clues to offer us.

C: …啊，您是说历史文化博物馆的展品莫名连续失踪的那件事？之前略有耳闻。
E: ...Ah, you mean the items that have been disappearing mysteriously from the History and Culture Museum? I heard tell.

C: 我们今天已经调查得够久了，再问下去恐怕也只是白白耗费精力。{NICKNAME}，我们回去和布洛妮娅大人汇报一下吧。
E: That's enough detective work for today — questioning more people will just be a waste of energy. {NICKNAME}, let's go report back to Lady Bronya.

C: 结合诺尔伯特慌张之中脱口而出的「商店街」…我觉得，所有这些线索大概可以合为一束了。
E: Together with Norbert's mumblings about a "shopping street..." I think all these clues are pointing in one direction.

C: 是啊，为什么呢？
E: Indeed. So what happened to the surname?

C: 至少让我们听到了珍贵的故事。
E: Such a precious family story. Thanks for sharing.

C: 嗯…其实是佩拉小姐委托我来进行今天的面试……
E: ... Pela asked me to help conduct the interview today...

C: 好了，就聊到这里吧！虎克大人要公布面试结果了哦——
E: Well, let's call it a day. I'll announce the result now...

C: 个人经历…老实说，我想不出其他能写进简历里的东西了。
E: My personal experience... Actually, I can't think of anything else I can include in this column.

C: 啊，有了——干脆把我帮你们解决星核危机的事也写进去吧！
E: I have an idea! I'll write about how I helped you guys solve the Stellaron Crisis!

C: 现在给佩拉道歉还来得及…
E: It's not too late to apologize to Pela now...

C: 技能特长…真是满满当当啊，简直像报菜名一样——不过你的能力确实很强，大家有目共睹。
E: You have a long list of skills and expertise. You're indeed very capable. Everyone can see that.

C: 好的，希儿•没有姓。
E: Sure, Seele No-Last-Name.

C: 人生总要留点惊喜…
E: Better to keep it a surprise.

C: 这个名字嘛…是奥列格头儿给我起的。他说，这个名字在古代贝洛伯格语里的含义是「灵魂」。
E: Well... Oleg gave me the name. He said that it meant "soul" in ancient Belobogian.

C: 落到字面上就是这样。但我到底会做些什么…你在下层区想必也了解得够多了。
E: That's one way to describe it. I'm sure you know very well what I do in the Underworld.

C: 哎，说到底他们选择拉帮结派，就是因为其他矿工还没有真正地接纳流浪者…我早该注意到的。
E: *sigh* When it boils down to it, they only chose to form a clique because the other miners never truly accepted them... I should've seen it.

C: 说得可真好听！我们把你当领队，你就这么对待我们？
E: Save it! We treated you as our leader, but look how you treated us?

C: 到底发生了什么事？
E: What happened exactly?

C: 我不在时候，就麻烦你们照顾虎克了。
E: When I'm gone, please help look after Hook.

C: 不过什么啊？
E: But... what?

C: 成交。
E: Deal.

C: 你们…别以为我会怕你们！
E: ...I'm not afraid of you!

C: 好走不送！
E: Have a safe trip!

C: 哎哟，你这话就生分了啊。咱俩怎么说也是一起出生入死的交情，转眼就不认人了，这么薄情？
E: Oh, that's a bit harsh! We've been through ups and downs together, and now you just pretend you don't know me. How can you be so cruel?

C: 矿队规定，矿工必须凑齐三件装备才能下矿——我这要不把三件套一次性集齐咯，就根本租不出去。{M#好兄弟}{F#好妹妹}，你就体谅一下哥哥的难处吧！
E: The mining team has a rule that all miners must have all three pieces of equipment before they can go down the mine — I can't rent them out if I don't have all three of them. {M#My good man}{F#My dear lady}, please have some sympathy for me!

C: 别着急，谈好的条件我肯定不会反悔，这就是走个形式而已。就算是大守护者跟我做生意，我也得象征性地走个流程嘛。
E: Relax... I never break my promises. This is just a routine inspection. I'd do the same even if I were dealing with the Supreme Guardian.

C: 哎哟，别说这么晦气的话，等我慢慢给你解释……
E: Hey, don't say it like that. Just let me explain...

C: 救、救救我！
E: Help me!

C: 嘿嘿，谢谢玲宝。
E: Hehe, thanks, Lynxy!

C: 呃，然后不巧的是——你能看看这个炉具吗？它好像坏掉了……
E: Uhh... I've got a question, too. Can you take a look at this stove? I think it's broken...

C: 可这东西，看着不像很好吃的样子……
E: Yeah, but... we should put them back.

C: 你呢玲宝，找到什么好东西了吗？
E: What about you, Lynxy? Did you find anything good?

C: 好！我最期待的环节终于——啊，不是，我最期待的当然还是看极光啦！
E: Yay! That's my favorite part... Wait, no, my favorite part is watching the aurora!

C: 从露营料理中感受到了奇妙的力量……
E: You feel an amazing energy as you enjoy a meal with your fellow campers...

C: 你太在意别人的看法了。
E: You care about other people's opinions too much.

C: 只是猜测——瞧，这边的地上还有踩踏的痕迹。
E: It's just a guess, but there are also some footprints on the ground here.

C: 你别被他唬了，这小鬼是出了名的毛贼。没记错的话，你这衣服也是从其他孩子那儿偷来的吧？
E: Don't let him fool you. Everyone in the Underworld knows that this brat is a no-good thief. If I remember correctly, even the clothes you're wearing came off another kid's back?

C: 史瓦罗也在这里吗？
E: Is Svarog here, too?

C: 难道下层区就安全吗？
E: But the underground is safer?

C: 裂界迟早会把地底全部吞掉。
E: The Fragmentum will swallow up all of the underground sooner or later.

C: 虎克把计划告诉了鼹鼠党的其他小伙伴，结果尤利安让我也帮他带个宝贝回去。要是不帮他的话，他就要把咱们的计划抖给老巫婆！
E: I told the rest of The Moles about the plan, and Julian asked me to get some treasure for him. If we don't help him, he'll tell the old witch where we've gone!

C: 胡、胡说什么！漆黑的虎克大人谁都不怕！
E: Hehehehe her...? No, what? N—Nonsense, no! Nobody scares Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!

C: 你自己找，找到了再叫我吧。
E: You can look for it yourself and let me know when you find it.

C: 刮目相看！
E: Sit up and take notice!

C: 帕斯卡的痕迹往那边去了…我们顺着它继续前进吧。
E: Pascal's trail leads in that direction. Let's follow it.

C: 你一直在修缮这座城镇？
E: Have you been repairing the town?

C: 遗物帮
E: Relic Gang

C: …系统重置…成功。认证程序…上线。
E: ...System reset... successful. Certification sequence... online.

C: 去周围打听打听吧…
E: Let's listen in on some conversations...

C: 瞧，桑博有用吧？奥列格头儿早就知道——
E: See? Not so bad having Sampo on the team after all, right? Chief Oleg knew all along that I—

C: 看结构，好像比刚才的门还复杂……
E: It looks like this gate has a more complicated structure than the last one...

C: 她是史瓦罗的主人。
E: She's Svarog's owner.

C: 你也过于为别人着想了。
E: You give a lot of thought to others.
Umm...

C: 你知道「星核」是什么吗？
E: Do you know what a Stellaron is?

C: 我想接收资料。
E: Let's have it.

C: 资料调用已批准，现在播放……
E: Request approved. Transmission...
