C: {NICKNAME}，你很久没有休息过了吧？我听说了，从铆钉镇回来以后，你们就一直在为了见到史瓦罗东奔西跑，一刻都没闲着。
E: {NICKNAME}, when's the last time you got some rest? I heard that you've been on your feet looking for Svarog since Rivet Town.

C: 喂，你说呢？哑巴啦？
E: Well, what do you think? Cat got your tongue?

C: 啊！虎克正想问你和探针有关的事呢！
E: Ah! I was just about to ask you about the probe!

C: 哎呀呀，真是没想到…不过容我多一句嘴，两位其实应该把宝石单独取下来拍卖的。
E: Well, well, well, who'd have thought it... Allow me to make a suggestion — you should only auction off the gems.

C: 没事，我也没往心里去。
E: It's okay, I didn't take it to heart.

C: 请稍等一会儿，拍卖会很快就要开始了。
E: Please wait a moment. The auction will begin shortly.

C: 啊，拍卖会怎么了？
E: Oh, what about the auction?

C: 我再加五十！
E: I'll add another <unbreak>50</unbreak>!

C: 赌上我宝石鉴定家的名声，一定得把这颗黑宝石拍下来…再加一百冬城盾！
E: I'm putting my reputation as a gemologist on the line — I have to get my hands on that erebus... Add another <unbreak>100</unbreak> shield!

C: …也许本来是这样没错，但是现在的情况不一样了。
E: ...Maybe it did in the beginning, but things have changed now.

C: 太宠你了吧？
E: Sounds like they spoil you...

C: 这是…「地髓矿脉探针」？！
E: It's... the Geomarrow Probe!?

C: ——你敢信吗，怎么会有人是方脑壳？！实在是太可怕了……
E: Can you believe that? Someone with a square head! It was truly terrifying...

C: 痕迹向着那个方向去了…我们去那附近找找看吧。
E: They point in that direction... Let's go take a look.
█Run███escape! Open██fire██workshop████chase██don't██!

C: 还好，除了语言模块之外，帕斯卡已经基本没有问题……
E: Fortunately, apart from the language module, Pascal is still functioning properly...

C: 谢谢{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}…能够理解克拉拉的想法。
E: Thank you... for understanding me.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}是想说…平等的前提是优先考虑他人的利益吗？
E: Are you trying to say... equality means you have to consider others' interests first?

C: …谢谢{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，谢谢你陪我聊了这么多。这个抉择比想象中的还要残酷…但克拉拉已经做好决定了。
E: I appreciate you taking the time to speak with me. This decision is much harder than I expected, but I've finally made my mind up.

C: 总之，帕斯卡现在的状态还算健康。今天的例行检查也基本完成了…我们就先回去吧？
E: Hehe, you're in good health, Pascal. Today's checkup is over — shall we head back now?

C: 撤退永远不嫌晚…
E: It's never too late to retreat...

C: 他们是危险人物，大守护者在通缉他们！希露瓦，你别上当！
E: Serval, these are dangerous individuals, the supreme guardian has sent out a warrant for their arrest! Don't let them fool you!

C: 拜托你快屈服吧。
E: Please yield already.

C: 不管你信不信，这些人的确帮了下层区很大的忙，很多人都愿意为他们做担保。
E: Regardless of what you believe, these guys have been a great help to the Underworld. Many people would vouch for them.

C: 门开了！谢啦邓恩！
E: It's open! Oh, thank you, thank you, thank you, Dunn!

C: 负责军备管理的同事，忘了把残次品的事同步给指挥官了……
E: The worker in charge of arms management forgot to report the defective units to the commanding officer...

C: 热心肠的路人。
E: A kindhearted passerby.

C: 确实毫无意——
E: It's indeed all for naught.

C: 你…长大了？
E: Have you... grown up?

C: 总之，感谢你为维护禁区秩序做出的贡献，外来者！如果发现了什么情况，我会第一时间通知你的。
E: Anyways, thanks for your contribution to maintaining order here in the restricted zone, outsider. I'll give you a heads-up as soon as I hear anything.

C: 是在孤儿院找到的…
E: We found it in the orphanage...

C: 别勉强自己。
E: Don't be too hard on yourself.

C: 也好。还有什么可失去…还有什么不能尝试呢？
E: So be it. What is there to lose when so much has already been lost...

C: 可可利亚大人…就是在此处战死的。
E: ...This is where Madam Cocolia died.

C: 或许在生命终结的前一刻，我也曾被卷入羞愧的旋涡…但我已在这交界之域徘徊太久，早已感受不到悲伤或耻辱。我现在唯独渴望安宁。
E: Perhaps at the end of my life, I was caught up in a vortex of shame... but I've wandered in this purgatory far too long to feel any sadness or shame. All I want now is peace.

C: （为什么她留下的裂界余响强烈到能聚集成人形？甚至还伴随着那些古怪的箱子谜题……）
E: (How can these echoes of hers be so powerful that they took on human form in the Fragmentum? And why was it accompanied by all those weird box puzzles...?)

C: 没想到啊，你可能真的找到了件不得了的古董……
E: I'm flabbergasted! You might've just found an incredible antique item...

C: 这是一座精美的冰雕——它与你在「黑塔」空间站中见到的虚卒是如此相似，令你不禁感叹寒潮的奇妙造化。
E: This is an exquisite ice sculpture. It resembles the Voidranger you saw in the Herta Space Station. It leaves you wondering at the amazing creations of the Eternal Freeze.

C: 这是你订购的家用寻物仪吗？
E: Is this the Home-Use Object Finder that you ordered?

C: 散页上密密麻麻地写着「广云袖」的营业时间、不同服装搭配的方式等等。
E: Detailed notes about the business hours of Cloudbreadth Sleeves, mix-and-match of different clothing styles, and more are densely packed in the scattered pages.

C: 梅姐，有件事我想告诉你…
E: Mei, there's something I want to tell you...

C: 涉嫌袭击天舶司执法人员，我将依法刑事拘留，新账旧账你都逃不掉。
E: I am placing you in criminal detention for assaulting law enforcement officers of the Sky-Faring Commission. There is no way you can escape from this.

C: …连我自己都忘记了。
E: I forgot about this myself...

C: 您就别拿我说笑了。
E: I don't know.

C: 魔阴身？为什么仙舟人要用这么古怪的东西入药？
E: The mara-struck? Why would Xianzhou natives use such odd stuff in their medicines?

C: 这次行动我所整理的知识将会同你共享，拿好这份手稿吧。如果有进一步考察的需要，我还会找你的，孩子。
E: I will share with you all the information I gain from this project. Take this manuscript and keep it safe. I'll come find you again, young one, if I need to conduct more research.

C: 也不知道能赔多少……
E: How much would the insurance payout be...

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 相关法律我查过啦，仙舟上机巧不享有财产所有权。所以这把伞写的诗，版权属于我，怎么不算是我写的？
E: I've checked the relevant legislation, and ingenia do not enjoy property rights aboard the Xianzhou. So all the copyrights for all the poems written by it belong to ME — of course it counts as my writing!

C: 「缘起成羁旅，归乡亦客身」，要是在乘船码头都等不到，在其他地方就更等不到呱。
E: "From wanderlust to sojourns afar, we all come home a visitor." If it doesn't even arrive at the departure jetty, then you won't be able to find it anywhere, croak.

C: 我再考虑一下。
E: Let me think about it.

C: 我将这句诗刻在了灵感玉兆上，以此纪念今日之所见。来，给你。
E: I've engraved this poem on the Inspo Jade Abacus to commemorate the experience of today. Here you go.

C: 不过为了让你们死心，我可以正面回答：我已经不爱孤屿了，但是这并不代表我会接受小聪。
E: However, I don't mind answering this once if it means you'll give up. I don't love Guyu anymore, but that doesn't mean I'll accept Cong.

C: 那就一言为定。
E: Deal.

C: 这么做是不是不合适呀？
E: Is it ethically appropriate to do this?

C: 怎么回事呢？之前你的态度可不是这样的。
E: What's wrong? You weren't like this before.

C: 就是就是，我怎么可能是「狐仙黛青」嘛。我不是狐人，甚至不是女子。
E: Yeah, that's right. How could I be the Foxian Beauty Daiqing? I'm not foxian. I'm not even a lady.

C: …算了，我也不演了，我就是黛青。
E: ...Fine, I'll drop the act. I am Daiqing.

C: 没有问题，这个你放心，包括你的巨资，我全部都会还回去。
E: No problem, don't worry, I will return everything, including your massive sum.

C: 真的吗？
E: Really?

C: 哪里的话。你装作不谙世事的{F#小女生}{M#小男生}聊的很棒！
E: Oh come on! You play the "naive {F#girl}{M#boy}" part like a natural!

C: 与这只机巧犬对视的片刻，你从它又圆又亮的眼睛里品出了一丝好奇。
E: For a few brief moments you exchange glances with this ingenium dog, and you see a hint of curiosity in its bright, round eyes.

C: 可惜的很，阿基维利消失后，星轨航路也渐渐变得不再稳定，世界与世界的距离越发遥远。学会也渐渐不像过去那般对仙舟狂热了。
E: It's a shame that the star rail has become unstable since the disappearance of Akivili. The worlds are getting further and further away from each other, and the Guild has gradually lost interest in the Xianzhou.

C: 不过这想来也是顺理成章的事情。毕竟研究热潮早过了，派往仙舟进行文化交流的学者寥寥无几。
E: But that's a logical explanation. After all, the research hype has long gone, and very few scholars are sent to Xianzhou for cultural exchange.

C: 最后用上它是在哪儿？
E: Where did you last use it?

C: 我找到你的笔记本了。
E: I found your notebook.

C: 我提取了一些持明卵内部的生物样本，没有任何人因此受到伤害。
E: I took a few samples from inside a Vidyadhara egg. Nobody was harmed in the slightest.

C: 拿你们短生种来说吧，你们会将「衰老」看作是疾病吗？
E: Take you short-life species as an example. Do you consider aging a disease?

C: 你、你是谁？！
E: Wh—Who are you!?

C: …你不是十王司的冥差。呼，别在这平白无故地吓人哪。
E: ...You're not a Ten-Lords spiritfarer — why are you trying to frighten people!?

C: 【金色的徽章】
E: Golden Badge

C: 「药王秘传」视魔阴身为「登仙」，常常服食各种怪异的方子加以催化。我也不例外。
E: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus regard the mara-struck as saints — they take all kinds of strange medicines to speed up the process... I was no exception.

C: 怎么样，现在就出发吗？
E: How about it? Shall we set off?

C: 我想没有。
E: I don't think so.

C: 突然想到老师他最后的归宿，就是在这片古海里与鱼共游吧…而我，也会迎来这样的结局吗？
E: It suddenly occurred to me that my teacher's final moments were spent swimming here with the fish in these ancient waters... And what of I? Will I also face such an ending?

C: 喂！你要是闹出了什么动静，那判官肯定会再来的啦！
E: Hey! Don't cause a commotion or the judge will be on our case again for sure!

C: 云骑军军纪严明，你要是想贿赂，反倒是会被抓起来的。
E: Cloud Knights are well-disciplined — you'll just get yourself arrested.

C: 魔阴身…
E: Mara-struck...

C: 她说要给你带去什么东西吗？
E: What did she say she'd bring you?

C: 一份名单，一份有关「药王秘传」的组织名单。
E: A list of the names of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 妙啊！放开手脚来！无论你揍得多狠，我都能把他治好！
E: Great idea! Seeing as I'm due to heal him anyway... Do your worst!

C: 还没见上白露一面，就有人来劝我打退堂鼓。
E: I haven't even set eyes on Bailu, and people are already urging me not to meet her...

C: 再等等。
E: Wait.

C: {NICKNAME}，小心保护白露。
E: {NICKNAME}, protect Bailu.

C: 如此下去，终有一天，我们高贵的龙脉种族将会灭亡，这根本不符合「不朽」的命途天旨。为此，我这一世全都在研究如何让持明族脱离轮回、重新繁衍。
E: If this continues, one day our noble draconic bloodline will perish, and the fated decree of The Permanence will be violated. For this very reason, I have spent my entire life researching ways to free the Vidyadhara from the cycle of reincarnation.

C: 不许学我说话。
E: ...I thought we talked about copying people.

C: 罗刹在建木生发的前几日来到了罗浮，之后也没什么特别可疑的动向…直到事发前一天……
E: Luocha arrived on the Luofu a few days prior to the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection. Up until the day before the resurrection, there was nothing suspicious about his behavior...

C: 我早就怀疑她了。
E: I knew she was suspicious.

C: 还好还好，吓我一跳。那看来{NICKNAME}的排序还是有一点小问题的，你再想想看吧！
E: Phew, thank goodness. Looks like this order is still a little problematic. Try again?

C: 喂，不要催人家嘛！不好意思啦净砚小姐，这家伙有点急性子。不必急，我们会耐心等待的。
E: Hey, don't rush her! So sorry, Miss Jingyan, they can be a little impatient. Take your time, we can wait.

C: 嗯…我就是隐书。请问有什么事吗？
E: Yeah... that's me. Can I help you?

C: 你们一起回到三余书肆。在路上，你们给隐书讲述了前因后果。
E: You return to Spare Time Book Shop. On the way over, you get Yinshu up to speed.

C: 没事啦！孰能无过呢。
E: No worries! You weren't to know.

C: 就是就是。是那个家伙的问题。
E: Yeah, it's his problem, not yours.

C: 可以了，我受不了了。
E: I think I'm actually going insane.

C: 不知那位对星核有意的神秘买家是何许人也……
E: I wonder, just who is the buyer interested in the Stellaron...

C: （这是普洱，不是杨叔！）
E: (Hey, this is Pu'er, not Mr. Yang!)

C: …{NICKNAME}，你观察的角度总是那么…独特。
E: ...You have a... unique way of putting things, {NICKNAME}...

C: 晴霓这孩子一心想成为斗舰飞行士，可我没有允许，我让她好好做一个文员。这可能显得我很专断，但是，一想起她被怪物困住那一幕，我就后怕得尾巴打战……
E: Despite my earnest wish that she continue in her post, Qingni is fixated on becoming a fighter pilot. I may seem overbearing, but the situations she gets herself into send a shiver up my tail...

C: 唉，每天走过宣夜大街，抬头看那些自由自在划过天空的飞行器，心里就空落落的……
E: *sigh* Every time I walk along Starwatcher Avenue and look up at those ships flying freely across the sky, I feel empty inside...

C: {NICKNAME}，怎么样？你还喝得惯吗？
E: How is it, {NICKNAME}? Bearable?

C: 好喝，太好喝了！
E: Delicious! Simply delicious!

C: 阵刀？这不会也是之前遗落的东西吧？当时也来了不少云骑。
E: A devastator glaive? Is this from the battle? There were a lot of Cloud Knights.

C: 哎…好吧。
E: *sigh* ...Fine.

C: 无论如何，谢谢你告诉了我们这些，岩明先生。
E: Thanks for telling us all this, Mr. Yanming.

C: 倒霉孩子，我那是懒得跟你计较。
E: Hehe, you're a cheeky one... You're lucky I have a sense of humor.

C: 小女为人幼稚，让二位多费心了。
E: Thank you. I must apologize for the trouble my daughter has brought you.

C: 我粗暴地干涉了你人生的选择。对不起，这是我身为母亲的失职。
E: I brazenly interfered with your choices. I am sorry. That is my failure as a mother.

C: 一会再说吧
E: Let's talk about it later

C: 大人的感情真复杂！我搞不懂，现在也不想搞懂。
E: Grownups are so complicated! I don't understand, and I don't want to understand.

C: 如果都说真话会怎样？
E: What if both my answers are true?

C: 我的第一个问题：你是怎么看待我的呢？
E: My first question is: What do you think about me?

C: 打倒他们就行了吧？
E: Just defeat them, right?

C: 答案还满意吗？
E: Are you satisfied with my answers?

C: 刃和丹恒是什么关系？
E: What is the connection between Blade and Dan Heng?

C: 吞吐量这么大的港口，连个人影也见不着，真瘆人……
E: Such a huge port and not a soul in sight. It gives me the creeps...

C: 二位没事吧？
E: Are you two okay?

C: 噢，好吧。那你也是平民，也跟我走。
E: Huh, okay... You're a civilian then. Come with me!

C: 这信是谁送来的？
E: Who sent the letter?

C: 没人来过这节车厢，究竟是谁把信送进来的？
E: I'm certain that no one entered this car — so who delivered the letter?

C: 不必了。
E: That won't be necessary.

C: 你的朋友情况却又不同，她表象体征栩栩如生，但抓住她的手诊脉时简直像是抓住了一块冰，丹腑和脉络间又像是暗河流转，搏动不休。
E: Your friend's situation is unique. She looks healthy, but her hands are cold as ice. It feels like there's a dark current running and pulsing between her core esse and her veins.

C: 真是抱歉，让您久等啦。我这方剂虽然不能药到病除，但养护元气，稳定心神还是能办到的。
E: Apologies again for the delay. This prescription won't cure you, but it will nourish your body and calm your mind.

C: 是啊。持明龙尊受人敬仰。得知龙尊亲临战阵，云骑们如履薄冰，当时的腾骁将军便唤我来周护这支部队的安全。
E: Yes, the high elder was held in higher regard. The Cloud Knights became wary after learning of Dan Feng's imminent arrival — the General Teng Xiao called for me to guarantee the safety of the troops...

C: 汪呜？汪汪，汪汪汪汪！
E: Ruff? Woof woof, ruff ruff woof!

C: 咱俩也不能算是小小年纪了…
E: I don't think the two of us count as "widdle babies..."

C: 从被他劫走的星槎找起，也许能有眉目……
E: If we start by investigating the starskiff he stole, maybe we can get a lead...

C: 猎物既然留下痕迹，那就好办了。
E: The best prey is one that leaves traces.

C: （下一页）
E: (Next page)

C: 大毫满头大汗地向你告罪，匆匆离开。良久，他带回了一名女子。
E: Dahao sweats profusely as he apologizes and bolts away. After a while, he returns with a girl.

C: 你忙你的吧，我也该去干活了。下次见，注意安全。
E: Well, I'll let you get back to your business — I've got things I need to do attend to. See you, and take care.

C: 祂用谎言和力量蒙蔽了仙舟人，让他们对慈怀药王的恩惠产生了恐惧……
E: THEY used deceit and power to mislead the people of the Xianzhou, instilling fear in THEM about the blessings of Merciful Medicus.

C: 管辖长生种寿数与魔阴身之事。
E: Our work concerns the mara-struck and the lifespans of long-life species.

C: 这里的事情就交给我来操心，你先跟咱们一块儿走吧！
E: Come with us for now. I'll take care of things here later.

C: 当心，这么大动静，工造司里的警戒装置都动起来了，要是踩上去可麻烦了。
E: Careful — our movement could trigger the Artisanship Commission's alarm system. That would spell trouble for us.

C: 我们知道……
E: We know...

C: 看来在你的心目中，本座是个只会长篇大论，净说些废话的人。
E: It would appear that in Miss March's estimation, I'm somewhat of a... blabbermouth.

C: 令此处失真的「干涉因素」应该只有一个源头。也就是那个「此刻不应在场但却在场」的人。
E: Hmph... The interference factor creating the distortion here should only have one source. That is, the person present who shouldn't be.

C: 既然你说，可能有外力干扰了我的记忆…那不就更应该探索了嘛！总不能让封印我记忆的坏人逍遥法外吧！走吧，本姑娘带你逛逛这歌德宾馆！
E: You said external forces might be messing with my head, right? That just makes me more curious. Hmph, no one gets away with locking up MY memories! Let's go. I'll show you the way to Goethe Hotel!

C: 怎么说呢，竟然还有点像他会说的话……
E: Hmm, that actually does feels like something he would say...

C: 看来我的潜意识没什么编剧天赋啊。
E: Seems like my subconscious mind has no talent for screenwriting.

C: 只可惜到最后本座也没看到雪国的绝景，而是在一个域外客栈的大堂里待了这么久…看来这地方让你印象很深。
E: ...Shame, we didn't get to see the stunning vistas of the snow plains. This hotel lobby must have left a deep impression on you.

C: 忆庭中各怀异志的人可不少，仅凭一句自报家门没法确认其中原委。
E: Many members of the Garden have their own agenda — it's impossible to confirm anything from a cursory introduction.

C: 你原来是口是心非那一型的啊……
E: Hmph, don't believe you.

C: 「这段记忆的性质有些特殊，为了其他顾客的梦境体验，还请不要向任何人透露它的结局。」
E: "The nature of this memory is special. Don't ruin the dreamscape experience for anyone else by spoiling the ending."

C: 你肯定就是。
E: I bet he did.

C: 从字面上来看，这么说也没错。
E: I guess that's what it means literally.

C: 虽然这防备周密…但这除了金人还是金人，存着刀剑的武库又在哪里呢……
E: This place is heavily guarded, but... there's nothing but aurumatons. Where is the arsenal...?

C: 现在你有一个讲完谜语的机会。
E: Now you have a chance to explain yourself.

C: 在他看来，以「朱明火」或是「炼石箭」之类的大规模火力消灭敌人固然有效，但只要战争中仍需要士兵接敌鏖战，不畏生死才是左右胜负的关键。
E: According to him, while weapons of mass destruction like Zhuming Flames and Alchemical Arrows can destroy many enemies, true victory lies with soldiers who fearlessly fight, ready to lay their lives on the line.

C: 你这算盘打得太响了。
E: That would be too convenient.

C: 某月十五日 下午 4:<unbreak>04</unbreak>
E: <unbreak>15</unbreak>th day of Month X, <unbreak>16</unbreak>:<unbreak>04</unbreak>

C: 与飞霄谈判
E: Negotiate with Feixiao

C: 那可真是太好了！
E: That's perfect!

C: 一场空前绝后的好戏就要在匹诺康尼上演了，来不及登台的人，就只能退居幕后。
E: A show of unprecedented splendor is about to be staged in Penacony. If you're too late to take the stage, you can work behind the scenes.

C: 吓我一跳！你什么时候跑出来的？
E: You scared me! When did you pop out?

C: 原来如此。但你这么直截了当地说出来，它不就没有用了吗？
E: I see. But when it's so obvious, doesn't that defeat the purpose?

C: 不如将思路反转过来，思考「谁不可能是凶手」呢？毕竟嫌疑人只有三位，一一排除也不失为一种方法。
E: Why don't we flip the question and start by asking who COULDN'T be the murderer? After all, there are only three suspects, so elimination could be a valid method.

C: 嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟——！回答正确，真不愧是黑天鹅大人！按照游戏规则，我将告诉您下一道谜题的地点。
E: Beep beep beep — ! You have answered correctly. As expected, you didn't disappoint, Lady Black Swan. Game rules stipulate I must tell you where the next puzzle is.

C: …没错，正是如此！
E: ...That's right. That's the one!

C: 那人没带走凶器，大概是在向我们挑衅吧…太可恨了。
E: They didn't even take the weapon with them. Sounds like they're trying to provoke us... Despicable.

C: 扉页上写着「钱可通」…是个人名？代号？看着像是这账本的主人。
E: On the title page is written "Qian Ketong"... is that someone's name? A codename? I think it's the name of the owner of this book.

C: 凶手是「佐罗」。
E: The murderer is Lefton.

C: 你可别吓我，有太卜坐镇，能出什么事啊？
E: Don't scare me! Master diviner wouldn't let anything bad happen on her watch.

C: 就是这儿了。
E: Here it is.

C: 这劳什子星核侵蚀，搞得都是什么事嘛。
E: Ugh, this Stellaron corrosion... what's going on?

C: 难以置信……
E: I can't believe it...

C: 我知道，你们眼前重任在身，我也不好意思拿这事儿来耽搁你们。这点儿轻重缓急我还分得清。
E: I know, I know, you've got an important task ahead... sorry to keep you. Priorities are priorities.

C: 以我额间法眼观之，各位此行必然元亨利贞，无往不吉。
E: My omniscia has seen that your journey will be auspicious — everything will proceed smoothly.

C: 你们在这里做什么？
E: What are you doing out here?

C: 非常时期还讲究这个？

C: 方才杨先生也说了，鹿精能断续愈合，恐怕是仗着从某处汲取的能量。那建木闪闪烁烁，正像是在给它续命一般。
E: As Mr. Yang said, the deer monster is likely drawing power from somewhere in order to replenish itself. I'm certain that when the Arbor glows, we are witnessing that very process.

C: 你有「丹鼎司」洞天的消息吗？
E: Have you heard from the Alchemy Commission delve?

C: 有什么结论吗？
E: What is the conclusion?

C: 浅薄的化外民，觉得用两包零食就能收买我们「罗浮三少」吗？可笑！

C: 呜呜呜…谢谢{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，谢谢丹枢大人……

C: 对了，在下有一件礼物想要送给你。但这还需要我准备一段时间…等到谢礼准备好，在下会再联系你的。
E: Oh, I have a gift for you... though I'll need a little time to prepare it. I'll contact you once it's ready to collect.

C: 类似的情况还有很多…骨骼畸形、软组织缺失、先天性心脏病，等等等等。

E: I'd like to read some books to pass the time...

C: 我会立刻传令通缉丹枢的。如果你有找到她的线索，也欢迎随时与我联系。

E: I'd like to talk about the Unshackled...

C: 好安静啊，越来越吓人了……
E: It's so quiet... It's getting scarier and scarier...

C: 你，你给我滚出去！

E: You look nervous...

C: 强大的岁阳也许能吞下弱小的岁阳，让它们暂时屈从成为一体——比如「燎原」，或者咱们要对付的这个「恚炎」。
E: A powerful heliobus like Ignamar or Furynox might be able to swallow a lesser heliobus and placate them for a while...

E: (I wonder how Huohuo is doing... I should check up on her.)

E: Continue into the sea of memories to experience Cocona's past first-hand...

E: Woah, such a simple question, and you still didn't get it right!

E: Don't get too stressed out.

C: 你松开了手。
E: You release her.

C: 啊！啊！！救命、救命啊！

E: ...Familiar? You look pretty grown up to me. You're not still a minor, are you? This is Lesley Dean, a galactic superstar of Epsilon. How could you say he just "seems familiar"?

E: The letter is covered in dense, scribbled writing... It took a while for the Synesthesia Beacon to be able to translate it.

C: 门确实没锁。
E: Well, it wasn't locked.

C: 你将真相告诉了眼前的莱斯利：他是由一群心怀执念的影迷创造出来的幻象，那位真正的银河之星已经永远地消逝了。
E: You tell Lesley the truth: He is just a fantasy created by a group of crazed fans, and the true Cosmic Star has long since passed.

C: 公众人物和明星总要背负这些。虽然在多数人看来，这点「副产品」跟他们所积累的名利和财富相比不值一提。
E: This is the burden that stars and public figures must bear. Though a lot of people think that these "by-products" are nothing in comparison to the fame and wealth that they enjoy.

C: 我们回来了，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}……
E: We're back, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}...

C: 新船长，新气象……
E: New captain, new beginnings...

C: 由于合同条款的限制，<color=#dbc291ff>确定聘用当前大副后，不可更换大副人选。</color>除非大副犯有严重过失，否则随意解雇将面临高额的赔偿费用。这请您注意。
E: According to the clause's restrictions imposed by the agreement, <color=#dbc291ff>once you employ the current first mate, you are prohibited from changing your selection.</color> Unless the first mate commits an act of gross misconduct, the unprofessional dismissal of your first mate will incur a massive compensation fee. Please take note of that.

C: 以住客的反馈为基准，可以说是好评如潮。
E: The feedback from our guests is overflowing with praise!

C: 船员们因为获得了更多的自由和信任，工作表现出色，空艇上的客人们都给予了好评。
E: With the freedom and trust given to the crew, their performance level has increased, and the guests on the airship have been showering us with compliments.

C: 老叔说的船长来了…
E: It's the captain that uncle mentioned...

C: 唔，五官一致，和您本人一样{F#美丽}{M#帅气}…您看着真年轻，这雕像减少了部分细节，反倒显得气势十足！
E: Mm, the facial features are identical, just as {F#beautiful}{M#handsome} as the real thing... You look so young. This statue lacks some details, but it makes you look more imposing in contrast!

C: （很好…这下整个酒店大堂都归我了。）
E: (Very good... Now the entire lobby is mine.)

C: 坏消息，巴登豪威尔先生…系统里没有记录，你的预约恐怕被取消了。
E: Bad news, Mr. Baden-Powell... There's no record of you in the system. I'm afraid your booking has been canceled.

C: （把分配房间的责任推给别人）
E: (Shift responsibility for allocating rooms onto somebody else)

C: 有段时间没见了啊，朋友。我缺席的这段时间里，你是真没闲着。
E: Haven't seen you around for a while, friend. You've been busy in my absence.

C: 钟表匠…是什么？
E: Watchmaker... what's that?

C: 说出来，说出来！
E: Say it! Say it!

E: (That "master"... Isn't he the nephew of the Old Oti who came to check in earlier?)

C: 您如果也对帝垣琼玉感兴趣的话，下次有空我给您推荐几个博主——很有意思的，我向您保证！
E: If you're also into Celestial Jade, then I'll recommend some content creators for you when I get around to it — I guarantee you'll find them super intriguing!

C: 没错！
E: That's right!

C: 元帅三令五申，不准我技痒登台。不过看到有实力的盟友却不能切磋一番，我也觉得很可惜。
E: The Marshal warned me repeatedly that I was not permitted to take to the stage and show off my skills. Although, I also think it's a shame not being able to spar with my talented allies.

E: How about I have someone send an invitation to battle to the Astral Express when I get back?

C: 哦？想见识我的身手？
E: Oh? You wish to see my skills?

C: 刚才咱也在犹豫要不要提醒一下……
E: We were hesitating whether to tell you or not...

C: 不过你明知道我这人工作态度不太积极，就稍微体贴一下我嘛。怎么感觉你反倒是被太卜大人附身了……

E: Thank you. At least you managed to bring back the remaining parts of the manuscript. But I should be blamed for this. If I had been more brave and taken the manuscript with me as I fled...

C: 客人需要点些什么茶水，梦茗帮客人准备。
E: Is there any tea you'd like to drink? I'm your server today.

C: 一般来说，这样的短生种留学生在艺成后都会离开，要不回到故乡，要不另谋高就。

C: 你看铖杰难得打起精神…
E: It's so rare to have Chengjie in good spirits...

C: 好像，我已经能看到星槎大概的样子了…真的是从种子长成了船啊！

C: 星槎的育成阶段也已经拍摄成功了。

C: 请不要侮辱白痴、蛀虫和黑洞…
