C: 嗯哼哼哼……
E: Ahem...

C: 简单来说，那是位于仙舟底部，无人知其所在的地方。判官们会在那里收留寿尽者的灵魂。
E: To put it simply, it's a place at the bottom of Xianzhou, the precise location of which is known to no one. The judges will keep the souls of the dead there.

C: 眼前的界寰阵，「观寰宇之变」，这是专用来调取「空间」的阵基。
E: This Spatial Terminal that observes the changes in the universe is a base terminal designed to retrieve information related to space.

C: 是要我把金人带走是吗，不是？算了，我有点混乱。
E: Are you asking me to take the aurumaton away? Sorry, my mind is a mess now.

C: 怎么，说话不算话？
E: Are you going back on your word?

C: 我正有这个打算。
E: I was planning on doing just that.

C: 把和希儿、卢卡一同经历的事情转述给了奥列格……
E: You tell Oleg about everything that happened with Luka and Seele...

C: 兵器结构与炮筒若长期不予使用，锈坏风险将大大提升。定期使用将减小风险概率，延长部件使用寿命。
E: If weapons and gun barrels are unused for prolonged periods of time, the risk of rust damages increases. Periodic use will reduce such risk and extend the life of these components.

C: …啥？还能找个比这更烂的理由吗？
E: ...What? That's the worst excuse I've ever heard!

C: 呜…这地方是待不下去了，接下来怎么办……
E: Ugh... I can't stay here anymore... What am I gonna do...

C: 是啊，吃吃喝喝玩玩，一路快速堕落的「快落」。
E: Yeah, wherever we go, we eat, play, and have a blast!

C: 舒适的沙发，每次跃迁你都会坐在上面静静等候失重瞬间的来临。
E: The cozy sofa, your chosen sanctuary during each warp, where you calmly await the fleeting thrill of weightlessness.

C: 对我也这么警惕？
E: Do you have to be suspicious around me, too?

C: 可惜论剑艺，罗浮的剑士似乎不太行……
E: But it's a shame the Luofu swordmasters don't seem that great...

C: 论说话水平，还得是你！
E: You're a real master of conversation!

C: 你怎么越来越胆小了？你砸坏人家大铁人的时候也没见你怕吃官司。
E: What's with you turning into a scaredy-cat? I didn't see you worrying about lawsuits when you wrecked that giant mech.

C: 这不是星穹列车的客人吗？怎么和彦卿一起来工造司了？
E: Aren't you the guests from the Astral Express? What brings you and Yanqing to the Artisanship Commission?

C: 具体的结论恐怕要等丹鼎司的人来确认。不管怎样，按照条例，我们都要启封其中一个货品进一步检查。但这位公司专员却用专利保密的理由一再阻挠。
E: I'm afraid we'll need to wait for the Alchemy Commission for further confirmation. In any case, according to our regulations, we need to unseal one of the crates for further examination, but this IPC specialist has been hindering us on the grounds of patent secrecy.

C: 你们在那里嘀嘀咕咕什么呢？快点把货物还给我们！
E: What are you guys whispering about over there? Just hurry up and give us back our cargo!

C: 听好了{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}，少拿天才俱乐部的关系来压我。公司和那群高高在上的天才们是各取所需的关系，不是上下级。
E: Listen up, brat. Don't think that your fancy connection to the Genius Society scares me. The IPC and those geniuses are working together. We're not taking orders from them.

C: 尝试贿赂他
E: Try to bribe him.

C: 小子，你最好别太冲动。公司的规章赋予了我武装捍卫运输财产的权力。
E: Not so fast, you little brat. According to the IPC regulations, I have the right to arm myself and protect the property on my transport ship.

C: 你应该感谢你口中那个「小子」手下留情。至少你手下这些人的伤还算有救。
E: Just be grateful that the "little brat" showed you mercy. At least your staff aren't seriously injured.

C: 明白了，两位以真知灼见教我，灵砂在此谢过。
E: I see. Thank you for your valuable insights.

C: 我的工作性质也不适合人前露面。
E: My work doesn't lend itself to being in the limelight, either.

C: 你自入行伍起，屡建奇功。「云上五骁」各自隐没后，尽管联盟内对你多有非议，但元帅依然力排众议，将罗浮托付于你。
E: Since you joined the ranks, you have repeatedly achieved remarkable feats. After the High-Cloud Quintet each went their separate ways, despite the many criticisms within the Alliance, the Marshal still stood firm against the dissenting voices, and entrusted the Luofu to you.

C: 咱们是做错什么了吗？咱们确确实实拯救了罗浮，为什么要像个逃犯一样走人呢？
E: Did we do something wrong? We really did save the Luofu, so why do you want to sneak off like we're fugitives?

C: 虽然罗浮呈上报告解释了来龙去脉。但烬灭军团的入侵是否真的存在，星核猎手以及星穹列车到底如何介入此事，其中却有众多细节缺失。
E: Although the report from the Luofu explained all the details, we don't know if the Ruin Legion really invaded, or how exactly the Stellaron Hunters and the Astral Express became involved. This puzzle has many missing pieces.

C: 第二天
E: Day two.

C: 但后来，我接了某人一剑。那一剑将我原本完满无缺的自信斩得粉碎。在那一剑到来的瞬间，我第一次感受到了害怕。这也许就是椒丘先生所说的「死生刹那，万念成空」吧。
E: But then, I faced a really tough opponent, and just one slash shattered my confidence into a thousand pieces. That's when I felt true fear for the first time. Maybe that's what Mr. Jiaoqiu meant by "life and death hinge on a singular moment, every idea fades into nothingness?"

C: 但与椒丘先生这番畅谈，彦卿心中已有了答案。
E: But after talking with you, Mr. Jiaoqiu, I think I already have that reason in mind.

C: 什么叫所托非人啊，你给我讲讲清楚！
E: Hey! What do you mean by "an unworthy master"?

C: 少给我节外生枝，伽虏。任何一点意外都会干扰末度大人的计划。
E: Cut the theatrics, Grulok. Even the slightest slip-up could interfere with Lord Mok Tok's plans.

C: 拥有伪造的官方身份，能堂而皇之地出入仙舟…糟糕，真是太糟糕了。
E: If they can forge official identities and move around the Xianzhou without raising suspicion... Oh no, this is bad.

C: 唔，星核造成的那些问题我也有所耳闻，列车联结诸界，理应对此做出应对。银河破破烂烂，「开拓」缝缝补补。言之成理。
E: Ah, I've heard about those problems caused by Stellarons. The Express connects various worlds, so it makes sense for you to take care of this. The Cosmos is a mess, and the Trailblazers are just doing their best to fix it. I understand.

C: 那汝等就无法进入底层探视。
E: Then you won't be allowed to visit Hoolay.

C: 看来，我们得自救了。
E: Looks like we're on our own for this one.

C: 雪衣小姐壮烈成仁…寒鸦小姐，请节哀。
E: Miss Xueyi bravely sacrificed herself... My condolences, Miss Hanya.

C: 成交。我当然有我活着的价值……
E: Deal. I certainly have more value alive...

C: 呼雷在探视中逃出囚笼，你们和彦卿又在迴星港发现了步离间谍…若说这背后无人弄鬼，只怕刚出生的娃娃都不会相信。
E: Hoolay's escape and your discovery of borisin spies at Stargazer Navalia... Even a child could guess that these events were orchestrated.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了啊。
E: There you are, {NICKNAME}.

C: 幽囚狱管束无方，劳动将军大驾，感激不尽。
E: I am sorry for our improper management, and I truly appreciate your assistance, General.

C: 将军，如今各层的情势依旧混乱不明，您亲临险地——
E: But General, the situation inside is still chaotic and perilous. Your presence would be...

C: 狱卒倒在地上，肢体呈现不自然的扭曲。
E: A prison guard is collapsed on the ground, her body twisted unnaturally.

C: 其二，伪装的步离人需要服药才能维持狐人形貌。显然丹鼎司中仍有余孽在暗中帮助。
E: Additionally, the fact that the borisin need medicine to disguise themselves suggests that there are still moles within the Alchemy Commission assisting them covertly.

C: …他没有说谎。那是个从猎群中逃跑的战奴，一个炮灰，一个窃贼！她偷走了我们的力量，靠着对步离人的了解，在战争中用尽一切卑鄙手段——
E: ...He isn't lying. That lowly beast was a war slave who ran away from our pack! Cannon fodder! A thief! She stole our power and used her knowledge about us to fight us, using every dirty trick in the book...

C: 但她的预言也实现了！战首就在此处！
E: But her prophecy has come true! Our Warhead is right here, with us!

C: 你知道我们现在在哪儿吗？
E: Do you know where we are right now?

C: 两位，收起轻敌之心。呼雷绝不是能被你们轻易斩杀的步离人。人数多寡对这怪物而言毫无意义。
E: Do not underestimate the enemy. Hoolay is not an ordinary borisin that can be easily killed. The advantage in numbers means nothing when we face that monster.

C: 啊啊啊——
E: Arrrghhh...

C: 哪儿来得这么多抱怨，你答应了爷爷还想跑？快走！
E: What is all of this complaining about? You made a promise to my grandfather and now you want to run away? Get out there, now!
...Five.

C: 别别别，别往我这儿看。万一看到个打击人的数字也别说出来哈。
E: No-no-no! Don't look at me! If you see some embarrassingly low score, then I don't want to hear it!

C: 「演武仪典」的第一场赛事，就快开始了。三月你还好吧？
E: The first round of the Wardance is about to begin. Are you feeling okay, March?

C: 我打算继续知己知彼！
E: I want to keep learning about my opponents!

C: （尝试翻译一下谛听说了什么）
E: (Try to translate what Diting is saying...)

C: 这场狩猎务必教呼雷明白，「巡猎」的锋镝，永远快孽物一步。
E: This hunt will make Hoolay understand that the arrows of The Hunt will always be one step ahead of the abominations.

C: 你真是花了不少工夫研究我们…不过，你的路就到此为止了。
E: You really did put hard work into researching us... It is a shame that this is where your journey ends.

C: 你是医士的话，能治好我的「月狂」之症吗？
E: If you're a healer, can you cure my Moon Rage?

C: 飞霄，这就是他们对我们，对你，还有对银河中所有文明做的一切。我们唯一能做的，就是将他们的爪牙折断，将他们送入尘埃…我们必须复仇。
E: Feixiao, this is what they have done to us, to you, and to all civilizations across the cosmos. Our only choice is to clip their claws and fangs and reduce them to dust... We must have our revenge.

C: 我听在场的云骑说了。但从几十个狼卒到数千个狼卒有十来种版本的传言…目前数量还在继续增长中，越听越离谱！
E: I heard a few versions of the story from the Cloud Knights who were there. The number of Wolftroopers went from a few dozen to thousands, and the number keeps rising. It's becoming more absurd by the minute!

C: 各位，好久不见啊！距离上一次列席会议已过去三十多年，这段时间我可是一直日夜思念着几位将军啊☰☰。
E: Hello everyone, it's been a long time! Over three decades have passed since we last convened, and I've dearly missed each of you generals during this time ☰☰.

C: …竟是「繁育」的孑遗。
E: ...to be precise, it's the remnants of the Propagation.

C: 所以，能不能以朕的名誉作保，提前释放埃夫姆？朕保证他不会再犯。
E: So, can you take my honor as a guarantee and release Ephraim early? I promise he won't do it again.

C: 说话说一半，吃面没有蒜。
E: You can't teach a new dog old tricks!

C: 好，那我先走了。
E: Fine, I'll be leaving then.

C: …你是星穹列车的人，对吧？我听说过他们…你能做到什么都不奇怪。
E: ...You are from the Astral Express, yes? I've heard that they... that you can do the impossible.

C: 束手就擒吧！
E: Just accept your fate without resistance!

C: 对不起，琳儿玛，朕很感激你，真的。但你下手太狠了。
E: I'm sorry, Lenamar. I am very grateful to you, really. But you overdid it.

C: 灰骑士会理解你的。
E: The Gray Knight will understand you.

C: 朕并非被谁选定的继承人。朕愿意践祚，只是因为朕愿意也有能力接手先皇留下的政治遗产。
E: I was not chosen by the people. The reason why I am willing to ascend to the throne is because I am willing and able to continue the legacy left by my predecessor.

C: 孩子，你身上的未知令我感到好奇和欣喜。两者都是我许久未曾体验过的情绪——毕竟现在的我对自己一无所知。谢谢你能来到我面前。
E: The unknown about you intrigues and delights me — both are emotions I haven't experienced for a long time. After all, I still know nothing about myself to this day. Thank you for being here.

C: 如果我的假设成立……
E: If my assumptions hold...

C: 过来吧，「起爆专家」。该让军团尝尝我们的厉害了。
E: Come here, "bomb-maker." It's time to show the Legion our might.

C: …爆炸范围内有多少非敌方目标？
E: ...How many collateral targets are there in the blast range?

C: …不要怪我，查。我们都要为自己的选择负责。
E: ...Don't hold it against me, Chad. We have to be responsible for our choices.

C: 在家族的监视下，查德威克博士于梦中徘徊了两个琥珀纪。若不是你，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}——他们的监视还会一直延续。
E: Under The Family's supervision, Dr. Chadwick wandered in the dreamscape for two Amber Eras. If it weren't for you, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}, their supervision would continue.

C: 但是他留下的愿望…果然还是得尊重才行。
E: But his wishes... They must be honored.

C: 希望你能探明这背后的往事。
E: I hope you can unearth the history behind this matter.

C: 男人在尽力抵抗伤口带来的疼痛，但他的脚步无法控制地越来越慢。
E: The man is trying his best to withstand the pain from the wound, but his pace is obviously slowing down.

C: 是，我们理解隐夜鸫的初心，我们可以牺牲，但其他隐夜鸫呢？他们大多数只是热爱着筑梦的普通人，无论是否归属家族，他们的梦想都不会被磨灭。
E: Yes, we understand the intent of the Nightingales. We can sacrifice ourselves, but what about the other Nightingales? Most of them are just normal people who love weaving dreams. Whether or not they belong to The Family, their dreams will not be erased.

C: 那些小鸟只是「钟表匠」无心促成的造物吧…那家伙，总是喜欢做这种奇怪的事情。
E: Those birds are just the unintentional creations of the Watchmaker... That guy's always doing weird stuff like this.

C: 我终于到家啦。
E: I'm finally home.

C: 时间没能留下的真相，由你带回去就足够了。
E: It's enough to have you bring back the truth that time did not manage to preserve.

C: 奥尔拉？
E: Orla?

C: 小鸟看你的神态仍是贱贱的，但眼神中已经没有了那种*与众不同*的光。
E: The bird's gaze at you is still sly, but there's no longer that *unique* spark in its eyes.

C: 令人倍感亲切的*啾啾*声，叫声来自头顶的星空——四只圆滚滚的鸟从天而降，落在湛蓝爵士身边。
E: A familiar tweeting sound comes from the starry sky above — four chubby birds descend from the sky and land beside Dr. Blues.

C: 就算是最挑剔的冯恩，应该也会忍不住惊叫吧……
E: Even the most hard-to-please person, Vaughn, would yell in surprise...

C: 那么，被吉奥里亚祝福过的大地兽，又该是什么表现呢？
E: Then, how should dromases, blessed by Georios, be manifested?

C: 好了，你也快走吧。记得别再给人留下话柄——哪怕你并没有做错。
E: All right, you run along quickly. Don't give anyone else a reason to speak ill of you, even if you did nothing wrong.

C: 是不是因为没交买路钱？
E: Is it because they didn't pay the toll?

C: 找个能落脚的地方怎么就这么难？我只是想过上安稳的生活而已……
E: Is there no recourse in our search for a safe haven? I simply wish to live out a peaceful, simple life...

C: 你压箱底的就这货色？
E: This is your most premium produce?

C: 我自己吃，不行吗？
E: I'm eating them myself. How about that?

C: 站住，干什么的？
E: Hold it, what are you doing?

C: 应该依法量刑。
E: The sentencing should be imposed according to law.

C: 还是别掺和这事了…
E: Better not get involved in this matter...

C: 我要保留自己的态度，这场审判我不会支持任何一方。
E: I will maintain my own stance and not support any side in this trial.

C: …各位别忘了，黑潮的威胁尚未远去，预言中的末日就在前方。我们要面对的是一场天灾，唯有团结才能为搏来一线生机。
E: ...Let's not forget that the threat of the black tide is far from over. The prophesied apocalypse looms. We are facing a natural disaster, and only through unity do we stand a chance at survival.

C: 圣城守卫们接走了所有能找到的外邦人——当然，没有带进城区，只是送到了避难所。这是我能给予的最大仁慈。
E: The guards of the holy city escorted all the outlanders who could be found. Of course, they were not brought within the city walls, but to the shelter. This is the greatest mercy I can offer.

C: 太好了，谢谢英雄，谢谢英雄！
E: That's wonderful. Thank you, hero! Thank you, hero!

C: 好像没问到什么有用的东西，再去问问其他店主吧……
E: Looks like she didn't have anything useful to offer. Let's go and ask another store owner...

C: 男人托起天谴猎手的身体，吃力地往出口走去……
E: The man lifts the body of the Furiae Archer and struggles towards the exit...

C: 将我的性命从灰黯之手夺回的勇士，你何时才能从纷争掀起的雾潮中归还呢？
E: Oh warrior who stole my life back from the Hand of Shadow. When will you return from the tides wrought by strife?

C: 但我族的身体只为战争铸造，没有进食的器官。
E: But my race is built only for battle. We have no organs with which to feed.

C: 别害羞啊！给我们看看悬锋城的舞蹈！
E: Don't be shy! Let us see the dance of Castrum Kremnos!

C: 假如那三位泰坦真的能听到我的声音，比起咒骂，我更想让它们对我心中的疑虑做出回答……
E: If the three Titans could hear me, I would rather they answer the doubts in my heart than curse their existence...

C: 是的，而我也已经做出了决定。
E: I did. And I have already made my decision.

C: 太好了，那我们就——
E: Wonderful, then let's —

C: 唉，但我们怎么能审判命运呢——那执掌审判的泰坦也在判决命运的王座上啊。
E: Ah, but how are we supposed to cast judgment on fate... The Titan that presides over judgment also sits atop its throne.

C: 观察贵客方才的神色，它应当是承载了什么特殊的意义，或许在某些人眼中是十分贵重的宝物。
E: Seeing the look in our dear guest's eyes just now, I fear this object may carry some special meaning. It could be that this object was considered extremely precious to someone before.

C: 你知道她去哪儿了吗？
E: Do you know where she has gone?

C: 没有。
E: Nope.

C: 这不是阿格莱雅大人的客人吗？到这儿来有何贵干？
E: Isn't this Lady Aglaea's guest? What matter of business do you have here?

C: 如您所言，虽然无从窥见刻法勒背负的黎明机器，光芒洒落在身上的暖意也令人喜悦。
E: As you said, although I am unable to get a glimpse of the Dawn Device that Kephale is carrying, the warmth of its light still brings me joy.

C: 同盟需要的只是神谕，而非真实的神谕，所有人都对这件事心知肚明。
E: What the alliance needs is just prophecies, not real prophecies. Everyone is well aware of that.

C: 真假预言的区别，刁民看不出来，我们还不知道吗？不受控的神谕只会招致灾难，重蹈黄金战争的覆辙。
E: You think we don't know that the commonfolk can't tell the difference between true and false prophecies? Wild prophecies will only invite catastrophe, repeating the mistakes of the Chrysos War.

C: 我明白了。这绝非神谕所启示的毁灭，仅仅是我们这些卑劣的家伙，不满于侍奉命运泰坦的清贫，所以才被扎格列斯蛊惑，逃向奥赫玛而已。
E: Understood. This is absolutely not the destruction preordained by prophecy. Some of us are simply unhappy with the poverty that comes with worshiping the Fate Titans, so we were deceived by Zagreus and fled to Okhema.

C: 这些朋友，你们是从其他城邦逃来的吧？黑潮已经无法遏制，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的洪流即将吞没大地上的一切。
E: Friends, you all escaped here from other cities, right? The black tide can no longer be contained, and the torrent of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} will swallow the earth whole.

C: 要说起那场面，可真是：万顷星海非空域，千帆沓来舸满津。
E: And of that spectacle, one might truly say: The starry sea stretched vast, no void within. A thousand sails pressed forward, filling every harbor.

C: 猜猜看，这是为什么？懂的都懂，不懂的说了也不懂。
E: Wanna take a guess why? If you know, you know. And if you don't, well, no amount of explaining will help.

C: 这是我们共同的「记忆」。
E: This is our shared memories.

C: 是银河命运的转折点。
E: A turning point in the cosmic destiny.

C: 怕怕，呜呜…害怕，危险……
E: Scared... Wooo... Scared... Dangerous...

C: 所以今天还要麻烦你继续担任她的老师，再教教她到底该怎么做人。
E: Please continue to be her teacher today and tell her a bit more about how to navigate our world.

C: 古恩让我当你的老师。
E: Gunn made me your teacher.

C: （上报希拉的学习成果）
E: (Reporting the results of Sheila's studies.)

C: 《语言的艺术》《表达沟通有技巧》《沟通宝典：三十招教你俘获听众的心》…你注意到收货人写着埃美丽的名字。
E: The Art of Language, Communication Skills, The Communication Collection: 30 Ways to Capture the Hearts of Your Listeners... You notice that the purchases are all addressed to Emily.

C: 「晚饭吃什么」…话题过度很自然，语气和蔼没有攻击性，显得态度友好的同时不会过分卑微。
E: "What's for dinner?"... This sounds very natural. The tone is kind and non-aggressive, and it seems friendly without being overly humble.

C: （向他汇报刚才的情况）
E: (Tell him what happened)

C: 抱歉，之前麻烦您替我跑一趟了…请问，维护科那边怎么说？
E: Sorry for asking you to give me a hand before... Can you tell me what is happening with maintenance?

C: 他和广大的青年科员一样：热情积极，但又狂妄傲慢。他渴望创建属于自己的学派，渴望书写属于自己的史诗。
E: Like many young researchers, he was passionate, proactive, but also proud and arrogant. He dreamed of being the founder of a new school of thought, and wanted books to record his great deeds.

C: 诶，你真是没劲！那我就直说了：他死了，但大脑思维活在了奇物里。
E: You are being so lame! Fine. Here it goes: He died, but his consciousness lived on in the Curio.

C: 那个东西是什么？
E: What is "that thing"?

C: 这就结束了？
E: This is it?

C: 但不知道是哪个冒失鬼调高了重力，搞得这玩意跟「瞬移」似的，现在在空间站里乱窜。
E: But some careless fool increased the gravitational force in the experiment, and this thing is currently teleporting all over the space station.

C: 为了找这东西，我们科室全体出动了，可惜我们始终跟不上它的速度…还好，这次被我找到了。
E: My whole department is now out on the hunt for this thing, but we can never catch up to it... Luckily, I've found it for now.

C: 我感觉至少不会伤眼睛嘛。
E: At least it won't hurt your eyes this way.

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 墙上有一些斑驳的痕迹，你隐约觉得似曾相识，却不知道这是什么。墙边的角落，痕迹仿佛勾勒出一个数字——「3」。
E: There are some dirt marks on the wall. They look familiar, but you can't understand what they mean. The marks seem to trace out a number — 3.

C: 奶奶，我们是「鼹鼠党」的派送员！以后需要帮忙的话，记得联系我们哦！
E: Lady, we are couriers from The Moles! If you need help in the future, remember to call us!

C: 你也知道，下层区没有铁卫管束，很多民间事务只能靠「地火」出面解决，其中就包括生活必要物资的分装、派送。
E: You know, there are no Silvermane Guards in the Underworld, and many civil affairs can only be handled by Wildfire, including the distribution and delivery of basic necessities.

C: 喂，醒醒！匹克叔叔——醒醒！
E: Hey, Wake up! Peak, wake up!

C: 哟哟——耶，站稳，听好！这里是八十八度矿底的伊妮丝——今天要把发自内心的赞美，献给这个乐于助人的小鬼！
E: Yo, yo, listen up! Eunice from <unbreak>88</unbreak> Degrees Bedrock. Here's something for this kind and warm little kid. Respect from the deep of my heart!

C: 生而好强的鼹鼠也绝不妥协于黑暗！耶~
E: No born brave moles would ever yield to the darkness none!

C: 老奶奶，拿好！快把药先吃了吧！
E: Grandma, take it! Have your medicine!

C: 无人派送的快递
E: Undelivered packages

C: 矿石封装检查，完成…每周军备例行维护和清洁，完成……
E: Ore pack inspection, checked...Weekly armament routine maintenance and cleaning, checked...

C: 没、没什么，你就当没听见吧……
E: No, nothing, just pretend you didn't hear it...

C: 哎呀，不好意思，一不注意就跟你说了一大堆家务事。反正…我只希望老爸能平平安安地回到家里就行了。
E: Argh, sorry for going on about our family matters. Anyway... I just hope that my father can return home safely.

C: 那我推荐您买上一束「初雪八落」——这种花的花语就是「纯洁善良」。我猜，它和您送花的对象一定非常搭配。
E: Then I recommend the First Snows — they stand for "pure and kind-hearted" in the language of flowers. I think they'll suit the recipient of your present very well.

C: 我听说您并未受过教育？没受过教育却能轻松答出这些问题，您可不是等闲之辈啊。
E: I hear you have no formal education, mmm? You're no slouch if that's the case. It's pretty impressive how you manage to answer these questions so easily.

C: 这根本不是重点吧！哎…算了，看来也没有必要继续问下去了。
E: That's not the point here! Tsk... forget about it. Seems like there's no need for us to continue here.

C: 事成之后别忘了付账。
E: Don't forget to pay your bills once everything's done and dusted.

C: 行了，听见波瓦大臣说的话了吧？你快走吧。
E: Alright. Did you hear what Minister Bova said? Move on, then.

C: …「一样多」。唔，居然真答对了……
E: ..."The same." Well, how 'bout that, you're correct.

C: 好吧，既然都答应你了，我也不能反悔…我会向教育部申请受理你这份论文的，请你回去等消息吧。有消息了会通知你的。
E: Okay, I can't just go back on a promise that I've made, can I? So I'll apply to the Ministry of Education with your thesis then. Run along then, and wait for my news. We'll notify you when ready.

C: 如何，您知道答案了吗？<unbreak>8848</unbreak>等于什么？
E: Got the answer then? What is <unbreak>8848</unbreak> equal to?

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 能不能请你亲眼看一看，塔米拉小姐在舞台下的样子呢？
E: Could you please go and see for yourself how Tamila looks when she's offstage?

C: 呜…好吧。塔米拉小姐慢走，塔米拉小姐再来……
E: Oh... okay. So long, and see you again soon...

C: 「陛下、陛下~你应当遮蔽世间的明镜~连同平静的湖水~你需道出她的真名实姓~驱逐千面的妖妃~」
E: "Your Highness, Your Highness~! You must shield yourself from all mirrors of the world, even the serene lakes! You must ask for her true name and banish that duplicitous succubus!"

C: 能不能请你亲眼看一看，塔米拉小姐在舞台下的样子呢？
E: Could you please go and see for yourself how Tamila looks when she's offstage?

C: 成，都听你的！你是我的大恩人……
E: Alright, I'll listen to you! You helped me so much...

C: 一次帮助可抵两次求助——我们鼓励大家相互支援，一起享受休闲时光。
E: One instance of helping other Members equals two instances of asking for help. We encourage everyone to help each other and enjoy some off time.

C: 好了好了，别演了——你是来替他求情的，对吧？
E: Alright alright, you can stop now — You're here to ask me to leave him alone, right?

C: 咳咳…我们先点餐吧。来这种地方歇脚总得点些东西，不然我都不好意思坐在这儿。
E: Ahem... Let's order first. You've gotta eat something when you're sitting in places like this, otherwise I'd feel embarrassed.

C: 一小时过去……
E: One hour later.

C: 那您还有在和儿子联络吗？
E: Are you still in contact with your son?

C: 呜…呜呜……
E: *sob*... *sniffle*...

C: 嚯嚯…那么，你也多保重。
E: Hahaha... Take care of yourself as well.

C: 嘿嘿，没事的！我再拜托别人帮我拍一张就好。
E: Hehe, it's okay! I'll just ask someone else to take one for me!

C: 看你比较帅。
E: I'm looking at you being handsome.

C: 你…你敢挑衅我？！本想顺点东西神不知鬼不觉地走人…看来这下非得来硬的不可了哈。
E: Y—You're taunting me!? I wanted to swipe something quick then sneak away... But now I have to get tough with you.

C: 面前的铁卫手扶脑袋作思考状。你仿佛能从那严密的铁盔下看到他虬曲的眉头。
E: The guard in front of you puts his hand on his head in thought. You fancy you can see his deep frown even under his full-face helmet.

C: （落难者又增加了，还想要回信，这个时候应该怎么办呢？）
E: (The ranks of castaways have grown, and they want a reply? What am I supposed to do now?)

C: 是我问你问题，还是你问我？
E: Are you asking the questions here, or am I?

C: （照他说的做）
E: (Do as he says)

C: 免费的话…乐意至极！
E: I'd love to! ...If it's free.

C: 这「烈焰浓茶」新品，已经按照你先前的建议，保证「燃」味十足。
E: This is the new flavor for Flaming Potent Tea. I've followed your suggestions from last time, and this one is sure to lift your spirits with its spicy kick.

C: 说好的报酬你收好，今日这茶不太行，等我研发出靠谱的新品了再喊你。
E: Here's the compensation I promised. This tea isn't up to par today, it seems. I'll give you a call once I've come up with something new.

C: 杜老板为你亲自斟茶，倒了满满一杯茶。
E: Boss Du personally pours a cup of tea for you.

C: 传说中用法吉娜赐福过的泉水浸染的毛巾，能吸走一切污秽与疲惫。不过在看到旁边写着「乱丢毛巾罚款五十利衡币」的字样后，你觉得这些毛巾吸走的恐怕是钱包。
E: Legend has it that using a towel doused in Phagousa-blessed springwater can absorb all taint and fatigue. But reading the warning sign beside that writes "<unbreak>50</unbreak> Balance Coin fine for intentional misplacement of towels," you reckon that your purse is what these towels will absorb instead.

C: 「老师们辛辛苦苦站着讲课，学生却慵懒地坐在台下走神，是否有些悲哀？」——这个现象在奥赫玛得到了有效改善。
E: "Teachers stand tirelessly, expounding their learnings, yet their students lackadaisically sit below the podium, their eyes glazed. Isn't that somewhat tragic?" This issue has been effectively improved in Okhema.

C: 雕塑的存在挡住了这里的美景——早该给它一球棒了，这种粗糙的玩意儿摆在这儿只会污人眼睛。
E: The statue's presence hinders the scenery here — you should've given it a smash with your bat. Its crude workmanship is an affront to one's aesthetics.

C: 你发誓那雕像已被你砸得稀巴烂，可惜他并不相信你所说的一切，尽管你的论述是如此合理，如此充分。
E: You swear that statue was shattered into smithereens, but he doesn't believe a word you say, no matter how reasonable and adequate your details are.

C: 落下吧！让悲戚的冤魂重新回到大地。
E: Fall! Let the somber and wronged spirits return to the land once again.

C: 宴饮早已散场，酣歌也已停歇。
E: The feast has long ended, the songs long silenced.

C: 别听，都是空话。树种，种土里，亩产，一万七。解决，照明危机。
E: Don't listen. Empty talk. Seed... plant in soil. Yield... <unbreak>17,000</unbreak> per acre. Solve... lighting crisis.

C: 「切莫假托神谕之名，给人以虚假的希望」吗……
E: "Do not give people false hope under the guise of prophecy...?"

C: 那…阿那克萨戈拉斯，你我都明白，像我这般腿脚只能是拖累。你一路护送我至图书馆，身上平添了多少本不该有的伤痕？
E: Then tell me, Anaxagoras... You and I both know very well that legs like mine will only slow us down. How many unnecessary wounds did you suffer just escorting me to the library?

C: 呼呼。黎明云崖，真是个复杂的地方。还好这里的风儿不甚喧嚣，让我的火焰可以安静地燃烧。
E: Phew. Dawncloud, such a complex place. Luckily, the winds here aren't too strong, so my flames can burn peacefully.

C: 你甚至能从即将消逝的光芒中感受到那股问好的意思。
E: You can even feel a sense of salutation from the fading light.

C: 真正热爱智慧的狮口，不会错过任何磨砺思维的机会。别被刻板印象误导了，本狮和那些只懂得用刁钻问题为难旁人的同类完全不一样吼！
E: A lion truly devoted to wisdom would never miss an opportunity to sharpen its mind. Don't let stereotypes fool you — unlike those who rely on tricky riddles to test others, I'm nothing like that!

C: 让我考考你！
E: Let me put you to the test!

C: 既然贵客已经帮了这么多忙，也是时候与你打开天窗说亮话了。
E: Since you've helped so much already, it's time I spoke plainly with you.

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the uncollected nymphs?

C: 嗯…有位织者热爱诗歌。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>拜谒步道下的桥洞内</color>，边眺望圣城边作打油诗呢。
E: Hmm... there's a weaver who is passionate about poetry. The golden threads bring word that the weaver is <color=#dbc291ff>under the bridge on the Worshiper's Footpath</color>, gazing at the holy city while composing limericks.

C: o((〒ω〒; )っ「咕呜…本豹头都想痛了，也还是想不通，你们是怎么做到的？」)∋
E: o((〒ω〒; )っ "Weeh... My head hurts. I kept thinking but I just can't figure out how you did it." )∋

C: o((-'ω´- )っ「本豹从小就有一个梦想，就是自由自在地扬帆远航！」)∋
E: o((-'ω´- )っ "Ever since I was a pup, I've always dreamed of sailing far and free!" )∋

C: o((='ω´= )っ「庆典上的美食，还请量力而行！」)∋
E: o((='ω´= )っ "Please be moderate with all the delicious food at the festival!" )∋

C: 已经见怪不怪了。
E: How original.

C: 神性的声音在风中响起，随后缓缓消散——只余一枚硬币在你手中。
E: A divine voice rises with the wind and gradually fades — leaving only a single coin in your hand.

C: 「洋流剧变，航线暂停——」
E: "Ocean currents shifting drastically, route suspended —"

C: 我只是一名医师，即便拥有了力量，也无法变得和其他半神一样强大。
E: I am merely a healer. Even with this power, I cannot match the strength of other demigods.

C: 用洗刷天空阴翳的沸血，去交换贯穿百目的长矛和一句箴言——
E: Trade boiling blood that cleanses sky's shadows for a spear through hundred eyes and this truth—

C: 可鄙的土地应当降下硫磺和盐卤。我誓要如此。
E: The wretched land deserves sulfur and saltwater. This I swear.

C: 往复的云层之下，我们忘记一切，重新开始往复的航行。
E: Under the cyclical clouds, we forget everything and start our endless journey anew.

C: 你感到寒意沿着双足攀上身体，唤起一股糅杂着悲凉与落寞的复杂情绪。
E: A chill creeps up from your feet, wrapping around your body, and stirring a mix of sorrow and solitude.

C: 是不是每场旅途都会始于喧嚣，归于宁静？你有预感，故事并未就此结束。而新的故事会如何开启，将由你来见证。
E: Is every journey destined to begin in noise and end in tranquility? You have a premonition that the story isn't over yet, and you will be the one to witness how a new story begins.

C: 很大的蘑菇，不确定能不能吃，出于食品安全着想，最好还是慎重考虑吧。
E: That's a big mushroom. Not sure if it's edible or not. But for food safety's sake, better think twice before you make any moves.

C: 小锤<unbreak>40</unbreak>，大锤<unbreak>80</unbreak>。
E: Looks like you're stuck in a bit of a stable situation!

C: 算了。
E: Never mind.

C: 别瞎掰了，赶紧给它运走，不然这些坛子过会儿吐你身上…
E: Quit your nonsense and move these brew jars before they spew all over you...

C: 我心中有确定的答案——
E: I know the answer for sure...

C: 这些火种汇聚的力量，一定能将无尽的深夜照亮，所有人与虫愿望中的黎明，也快要到来了喀！
E: The power of these gathered Coreflames will surely light up the endless night. The dawn wished for by both humans and nymphs is almost here, crrk!

C: 进退维谷喀…
E: Stuck between a rock and a hard place, crrk...

C: 列车长有难，岂能坐视不管。
E: The conductor is in trouble, we can't just stand around and do nothing.

C: 我能做些什么呢？
E: What can I do?

C: 我享受和裂界战斗。
E: I enjoy fighting the Fragmentum.

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: {NICKNAME}，又见面了！您好！
E: {NICKNAME}, we meet again! Hello there!

C: （糟了…这些大家伙，我可打不过它们……）
E: (Oh no... I can't beat these giant baddies...)

C: 管家是谁？
E: Who's the butler?

C: 我记得的，只有这些了。
E: That's all I recall.

C: 不行，你没有权限。
E: (No, you have no authority.)

C: 门禁权限已转移，监控预警提示：最近三个月捕捉到异常人像记录，请留意！
E: Access control rights have been transferred. System alert: Warning! Signs of intruders have been detected across the past three months.

C: 佩佩解除了同步。
E: Peppy desynchronized.

C: 走吧？
E: Let's go?

C: 嗯哼，那你继续思考吧，我不问，嘻嘻。
E: Hmph, keep pondering then. I won't ask.

C: 人家已经很困啦，你看，睫毛都要打结了……
E: I'm sleepy now, look, my eyelashes are about to tangle...

C: 这、这么针锋相对吗？不至于，不至于……
E: A—Are they that hostile to each other? I don't think it's that bad...

C: 嘻嘻，这种话术骗不到人家。只看{NICKNAME}的眼睛就知道，你是个很单纯的人。
E: Hehe, that kind of line won't fool me, {NICKNAME}. Just looking into your eyes for a second is enough to tell — you're a very simple person.

C: 所以货运星槎入港的时候，不一定会从里面蹦出什么玩意儿呢！
E: So when a freight starskiff enters the port, it's not certain what might pop out of it!

C: 据说那组数字是靠侦测引力波变化来敲定的绝对真随机。不然人家也不会求上门来了。
E: Rumor has it that the number set is determined by fluctuations in gravity waves, meaning it is truly a random number. Otherwise, people wouldn't be coming to look for me, would they?

C: 让我也赚赚大钱！
E: Let me get in on this, too!

C: 瞎说的吧。
E: Are you just pulling my leg?

C: 来吧。
E: Come on then.

C: 我就不信下次你的运气还能这么好。
E: I don't believe you'll be this fortunate next time.

C: 等一下。
E: Wait a moment.

C: …你输了，我还给你什么奖励？
E: ...You lost. Why should I give you a reward for losing?

C: 因为这届玩家不行。
E: The players suck at the game.

C: 是啊，虽然不知道客人你是怎么做到的，但我们想请你帮帮忙！
E: Yeah, we're not sure how exactly you pulled it off, but we really need your help!

C: 无论如何，很高兴能再见到你，试试其他难度吗？
E: No matter what, I am happy to see you again. Care to try other difficulties?

C: 游客！这里好热闹啊！我都看不到自己的脚了！
E: Guest! It's so crowded here! I can't even see my own feet!

C: 虽然你确实得到了欧洛尼斯的祝福，不过在这件事上，恐怕我们得求助于其他泰坦的眷属。
E: While you indeed received Oronyx's blessing, I'm afraid we must seek the help of the other Titans' kin in this matter.

C: 嗯…有位织者心慈好善，不愿见旅者误入歧途。金丝带来消息，它正把守在<color=#dbc291ff>一扇紧闭的门扉上</color>，唤它来歇息一会儿吧。
E: Hmm... There is a kind-hearted weaver who wishes to prevent travelers from straying onto the wrong path. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand guard <color=#dbc291ff>at a tightly closed door</color>. Perhaps you should tell them to take a break.

C: 嗯…有位织者有着出类拔萃的雕塑技艺，意图将辉煌岁月的荣光在今日重塑。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>一座坍圮的雕像前</color>谋划最新的作品。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver with exceptional sculpting skills who seeks to revive the glory of a bygone era. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>before a collapsed statue</color>, envisioning their latest masterpiece.

C: 再次感谢你的协助，贵客。
E: Thank you once again for your aid, esteemed guest.

C: 不细心的人就该受到惩罚。交回悬锋战士的称号，从新兵开始重新练起吧喀！
E: Those who do not pay attention to detail should be punished. Return the title of Kremnos Warrior, and begin your training anew as a recruit, crrk!
Nine warriors.

C: 好奇总没有错吧？您在看到宝箱时，难道能按耐住这种迫切的心情，想要打开它一探究竟？
E: It never hurts to be curious. When you see a treasure chest, can you suppress that rising impulse to open it and see what's inside?

C: 扎格列斯老祖在逃跑中磕到小脚趾时有云。
E: Ancestor Zagreus mentioned this after stubbing its toe while fleeing.

C: ——扎格列斯老祖的第一课。
E: ...That was ancestor Zagreus' first lesson.

C: 贼灵永不失手！
E: A master thief never fails!

C: 切，小气。真正的江洋大盗都讲究一个见者有份，像你这样一毛不拔的我巴特鲁斯就没见过第二个！
E: Stingy! Real thieves share spoils when they work together. I've never seen anyone as tight-fisted as you!

C: 唉，要不是云石市集的一个誊写商找上门来，我才懒得碰这些老掉牙的废纸呢。
E: *sigh*... I'd never even bother with antiquated scrap paper like this if it weren't for that scribe from Marmoreal Market who came knocking.

C: 喂喂，我们都玩了这么多次了，就偶尔让你听听老巴特鲁斯的抱怨，应该也不是什么罪过吧？
E: Come on now, after all our games together — surely it's not too much to ask you to listen to old Bartholos's complaints occasionally?

C: 干嘛在编的故事里找答案？
E: Why seek truth in a story you just invented?

C: …也？哦，想必你刚刚见过其他的巴特鲁斯分身。没关系，只要不考虑人格的同一性，我们就都是巴特鲁斯。
E: Another? Oh, you've met my fellow projections. Well, if we ignore the whole identity issue, we're all Bartholos anyway.

C: 试炼没意思，我不要打。
E: Trials are no fun. I'm not fighting.

C: 陀螺？桀桀桀桀，它那个原地打转的样子的确很像陀螺！拥有这样的幽默感，不愧是巴特鲁斯传说中的朋友。
E: Top? Hehehehe, it really did look like a spinning top, didn't it! With that sense of humor, no wonder you're Bartholos' legendary friend.

C: ——那么！接下来要发生什么，你想必也心中有数了吧？
E: Which means... you already know what's coming next, don't you?

C: 这…不试试怎么知道呢？
E: Well, there's only one way to find out.

C: 现在的宝箱，真是一个比一个无趣了。三秒钟就能开锁，这怎么够本大爷拯救财宝的仪式感呢？
E: Chests these days are so boring. Three seconds to unlock? How's that supposed to satisfy my sense of ceremony of rescuing treasures?

C: 看来，即使动用{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的权能，对于不复存在之物，也只能言尽于此了…但我有种预感，这个结果或许不算太差。
E: It seems that even with {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s power, what no longer exists cannot be entirely restored. Yet, I have a feeling this outcome may not be as bad as it seems.

C: 如此精确的指示，想必那位信徒应该能满意…石板托付于你了，去交给他吧。
E: Such precise directions — surely this will satisfy the follower. The slate is yours to deliver.

C: 就这么交付吗？
E: Should we just tell the child this?

C: 好啦，接着解谜吧，我先飞回去等你，记得要绕回去哦？哗啦。
E: Alright, back to solving puzzles. I'll fly back and wait for you. Don't forget to circle back. *whoosh*

C: 走，跟我去奥赫玛。
E: Come, let's go to Okhema together.

C: 停住了！你真厉害！不是敷衍你哦？连设计谜题的祭司自己都把握不好时机呢，哗啦。
E: You stopped it! Amazing! I'm not just flattering you. Even the priest who designed the puzzles couldn't time it perfectly. *whoosh*

C: 这个…是考卷？不…经卷…不对……
E: Wait, this is... an exam paper? No... a scripture? No, that can't be right...

C: 遗体尚有余温，身上可见与黑潮怪物搏斗留下的伤痕。
E: The body is still warm, bearing the scars of battle against the creatures of the black tide.

C: 这东西就别放在火种匣里了！
E: Why even bother keeping this in the Coreflame Casket!

C: 没有一惊一乍，好不习惯。
E: Wow, no sudden outbursts? Feels kinda weird.

C: 从树庭「绳结学派」结业时，大家都以为我会成为一位工程兵…但在本该去应征的那天，我却选择对它宣誓，成为了一名祭司。
E: When I graduated from Nodism in the Grove, everyone assumed I'd become an engineer. But on the day I was supposed to enlist... I swore my oath instead. I became a priest.

C: 这一次，我们不会再分开了。
E: This time, we won't be separated again.

C: 别磨蹭了，上吧！
E: Enough, let's go!

C: 「总之，现在它不会被损毁了。」黑塔讥笑着指出了问题，「你试试呗，可以获得<color=#dbc291ff>无穷无尽的奇物</color>——帮我多弄点来！最多损失点血量而已，反正是模拟宇宙，又不会真的被炸晕。行就这样，拜。」
E: "Anyways. It can't get destroyed anymore." Herta snickers and points out the issue. "Why don't you give it a go? You can get <color=#dbc291ff>endless Curios</color> — and help me gain even more! The worst that can happen is you losing HP. It's the Simulated Universe anyway. Not like you'll actually get blown up. Anyways, that's all. Bye."

C: 「{NICKNAME}，振作点。我猜『虚无』星神Ⅸ出现了，祂本身就是虚无，系统没法辨识祂出现了。」黑塔说道，「Ⅸ现在离你很近，你的精神被影响了。你有意义，你是个了不起的人，你很受爱戴，你为世界带来了光明和未来。现在继续玩『模拟宇宙』，快！」
E: "Cheer up, {NICKNAME}. I guess IX, the Aeon of Nihility, has appeared. THEY are nothingness, so the system cannot detect THEIR appearance." Herta says, "Your spirit is affected because IX is near you. You have meaning. You are an amazing person. You are loved and respected. You bring light and a future to our world. Now, keep playing the Simulated Universe. Quickly!"

C: 你突然跌入漩涡里，抬起头，看到了祂——祂庞大身躯遮天蔽日，躯干有一道巨大的、被划开的创伤，汩汩金血从中流淌。你震栗不已，因为祂的视线瞥向了你——
E: You suddenly fall into a vortex. Looking up, you see THEIR huge body obscuring the sky and the sun. There is a huge, open wound on THEIR torso, from which golden blood flows. You tremble as THEIR eyes glance at you...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「糟糕，祂来了……」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Uh oh, THEY're here..."</color>

C: 唔，「模拟宇宙」做了个技能树系统，我在犹豫要不要启用…如果开启了，你在「模拟宇宙」里会慢慢变强，但这么做是不是好事，我说不清。你先试试吧。
E: Well, the Simulated Universe has an Ability Tree system. I'm debating whether to enable it... If I do, you'll gradually grow stronger in the simulation, but I can't say for sure whether that's a good thing. You try it out first.

C: 我也想加入祂们的交流！
E: I'd like to join THEIR interaction!

C: 你的思绪被牵回。<color=#dbc291ff>奥博洛斯</color>的巨口吞下无数星球时，「记忆」的片段分成无数碎片涌入你的脑海：这是种浩瀚的诞育，有着万众哀嚎和吼叫声…是你听到的那些细碎的声音！
E: Your mind is pulled back to reality. When <color=#dbc291ff>Oroboros</color> is swallowing countless planets with their massive mouth, the clips of Remembrance split into endless fragments and flood your brain. It is a grand birth, accompanied by the wailing and roaring of all beings... They are the delicate and intermittent sounds you heard earlier!

C: 瞎编是你最擅长的事。当第十四世皇帝抬头看向天空，大片虫潮正在消退，他让你赶忙记载——你为这一天象编纂了十二个版本的预示，而后世时髦的铂弗安拉新人以此为自己测试性格与命运，掩盖他们对不可预知的未来的不安。
E: Making up stories is your forte. As the Fourteenth Emperor gazes skyward, watching the Swarm retreat, he implores you to document the phenomenon. Inventing twelve distinct explanations for the ebbing Swarm, you fabricate twelve different versions of prophecies in response to this omen. In the years that follow, the prophecies you created become popular among the trendy Ptarmigans, who use them as a means to divine their character and destiny, masking their unease about the capricious future.

C: 「他生成后立刻被古阿米巴黏菌吞噬了。」阮•梅叹了口气，「得再试一次。」
E: "He was consumed by Amoeba Slime Molds right after he was created," Ruan Mei sighs. "I'll have to try again."

C: 你在船底遇见一群*共犯*…！他们称…她在睡着前拉下了面罩，以掩盖自己将开始梦游的事实——她会在梦中开始毫无规律的行为，并于某刻毫无征兆地苏醒，对此前一切毫无知觉。
E: As you make your way to the bottom deck of the ship, you run into a group of your *accomplices*, who claim that... she will pull down her mask before falling asleep to conceal the truth that she will start sleepwalking. In her dreams, she will behave erratically and wake up suddenly, oblivious to everything that has happened before.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 「磨磨蹭蹭的。」黑塔讥笑着，「{NICKNAME}，经过我们的努力，这场涉及众多星神与派系的寰宇蝗灾，其始末初见轮廓。但同时，有<color=#dbc291ff>三个巨大的疑点</color>也随之浮现，你发现了没有？」
E: "Slowpoke." Herta mocks you. "{NICKNAME}, with our efforts, we now have a rough idea of this Swarm Disaster involving multiple Aeons and factions. But, at the same time, there are <color=#dbc291ff>three major points of suspicion</color> that have surfaced. Have you noticed them?"

C: 你脑中的血管开始扩张…你感到自己的「极限」要到了。你不希望自己的「认知」继续拓展…即便身为星核的载体，也无法让你承受更多……
E: The blood vessels in your brain start to sprawl... You feel you are almost at your limit. You do not wish for your own cognition to continue expanding... Even as the receptacle of the Stellaron, you are unable to withstand anymore...

C: 帝皇鲁珀特•其一
E: Emperor Rubert (I)

C: 「也有人说这事背后是公司在推，但现在看来——至少波尔卡在现场。要是能问本人就好了。」黑塔嘟囔着，「那么，其它『星神』的痕迹呢？」
E: "Some opined that IPC was behind this. Looking at it now, at least we can be certain that Polka was there. If only I could ask her in person..." Herta mutters. "How about the traces of other Aeons?"

C: 「有没有可能，模拟宇宙终究出自天才之手，无法阻止祂的并非模拟星神，而是我们的智慧？」黑塔摊手，「熟悉的祂——我怀念被祂瞥视的那天，我怀念向祂求知的心情。时间流逝，而祂亘古不变，多有趣…好了，我们是不是该出去了？」
E: "The Simulated Universe is, after all, created by geniuses. Is it possible that what failed to prevent the moments from happening was our limited intelligence, not the simulated Aeons?" Herta shrugs. "The familiar Aeon... I miss the day THEY gazed at me and how I felt when I asked THEM questions. The passage of time never changes THEM. How interesting... Well, is it time for us to get out?"

C: 是的…但第二天，你再次醒来了。她总是通过杀人，给予「终结」或是「新生」。
E: It's true... Yet, you woke up the next day. Through killings, she grants an end to life or a rebirth.

C: 据说，在一切发生前，「反对战争」的提案也曾被呈上，但公司董事会的沉默证明了一切：当数之不尽的单一个体都在凭借自己的准则行事时，就再没有哪一种人为意志能扭转全局——即便是位于公司权力顶端的人们。
E: It is said that anti-war proposals were submitted to the IPC before all hell broke loose. Yet, the silence of the board of directors provided the answer: When countless individual units are acting according to their own principles, no human will, even the top guns of the IPC, can turn the tide.

C: 仿佛有一种无形的力量*摧毁*了整个世界，你意识到——这就是「末日」。滚滚尘烟中，世界瓦解的声响久久回荡，如同来自宇宙的风暴，几乎要撕裂你的*耳膜*…你四处躲藏，却无处可藏。
E: An invisible force seems to have destroyed the entire world, and you realize that doomsday has come. Amid the billowing dust and smoke, the sound of the collapsing world keeps reverberating in the air. It is as loud as a storm from the universe and is enough to tear your eardrums apart... You try to no avail for a place to hide.

C: 你知道，在漫天尘雾中轰然倒塌的，是一种信仰、意志…一整个*帝国*——它曾经辉煌过。
E: You know what has come crashing down in the cloud of dust is a belief, a will, and an entire empire whose glory days are in the past.

C: 你罕有地发出嘶吼，可似乎连嘶吼的器官也已退化。有一个庞大的身影来到你的面前，它得意洋洋地刺破你的表皮，吮吸流淌出的脓水和汁液。咔咔，咔咔，腺体鼓舞它的叛逆，后足在甲壳上亢奋地撞击。
E: You let out an uncharacteristic roar, but it seems that your organ responsible for that has atrophied, too. A large figure approaches you, gleeful as it pierces your skin to suck the pus and juices that pour out. Click-clack, the glands inspire its rebellion as its rear legs smash excitedly into the shell.

C: 道路越来越狭窄，像一根绳索，你能看到两侧的城市，有只蝴蝶在半空中飞行，真可怜，你希望它不要被淹死在空气里。
E: The path grows narrower, like a rope. You can see the city on both sides, and a butterfly floating past in the air. What a pity. You hope it won't drown in the air.

C: 赞美至上毁灭者！
E: Hail the Supreme Destroyer!

C: 「细胞同化了实验体<unbreak>6.01%</unbreak>的身体组织，已经是普通人承受的极限了。实验体天生的体液沸腾综合症，能极大程度地抑制『拟赤月』带来的副作用，可即便如此，结果如你所见。」那斗篷说。
E: "The cells have assimilated roughly <unbreak>6.01%</unbreak> of the subject's tissue, and this is the limit that a regular person can withstand. Although the subject's innate bodily fluid boiling syndrome is able to greatly suppress the negative side effects of the Mock Crimson Moon, the effects are as you can see." States the man in the cloak.

C: 导师先停下来环视四周，接着从口袋里掏出一台仪器。「你先休息，我检测下这里的地质环境。」
E: The teacher first takes a look around the surrounding area before pulling a small machine from their pocket. "You take some rest, and I'm going to examine the geological environment."

C: 「是的。不要做多余的事。你只要相信，少了一颗钉子，将失一个国家。」
E: "That's right. Do nothing more. With faith, the removal of a single nail can topple an empire."

C: 是因为本体还在的缘故。
E: It's because the original is still present.

C: 老学者惊呼：「你是说『庸众院』，那群无礼的乡野匹夫！你竟然要把他们粗鲁的血输进纯粹造物学派的静脉中？不可，决计不可！」
E: One of the old scholars exclaimed in shock: "You mean those uncouth bumpkins of the Council of Mundanites! You would have their crude, tainted blood coursing through the veins of the School of Pure Creation? Impossible, out of the question!"

C: 沉默。
E: Stay silent.

C: 如今你孤身一人，为了生计，不得不在一所乡下小学当数学老师。
E: Now, you are all alone, and forced to become an elementary school math teacher in a small town to survive.

C: 你蓬头垢面，目光呆滞，嘴里一直嘟囔着。「星神是一个骗局，我是一个骗子，我是一个骗子……」
E: You are disheveled and dirty, your eyes sullen and you are mumbling to yourself over and over: "Aeons are a lie. I am a liar, I am a liar..."

C: 搜索人群中那抹糖果色。
E: Survey the crowd for that splash of pastel.

C: <unbreak>3941</unbreak>-天体的功能改造。
E: <unbreak>3941</unbreak>: Celestial bodies' functional modification.

C: 嘿，轻点儿！
E: Hey, that hurt!

C: 助理黑塔，你在干什么！
E: Assistant Herta, what are you doing!

C: 「你以为我愿意？我宁可用所有救世主的声望换一次无事发生。」黑塔不满地跺脚。
E: "You think I wanted to? I'd trade all my messianic renown for an experiment where everything goes smoothly." Herta stamps her foot in discontentment.

C: 「没错，一道不受任何干涉的孤波，如果能找到它诞生的源头，以它为原点，就能建立一个描述宇宙运动轨迹的模型。」这个模型，将解开未来学大会上的第四道寰宇难题——<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙的未来是确定的，还是混沌的？</color>
E: "That's right, a solitary wave undisrupted by anything. If we can find out its source and use it as a point of origin, we can build a model that describes the universe's movement trajectory." This model will answer the fourth Cosmic Conundrum at the Futurological Congress — <color=#dbc291ff>Is the future of the universe predetermined, or is it chaotic?</color>

C: 音乐家赛梅在抗议期间谱写的庸人曲，为齐唱的学士们提供了灵感。
E: The musician Saime writes a Mundanite melody during the resistance, providing inspiration for the scholars singing in chorus.

C: 是否需要检索相关服务？
E: Would you like me to search for related services?

C: 你和目的地的移动轨迹逐渐同步，模型中涟漪的整体结构也愈发清晰。系统的另一侧，化身决策智能的黑塔「面色」凝重。
E: As your trajectory begins to sync with your destination's movement, the Rippling Waves' overall structure in the model grows clearer. On the other end of the system, Herta, who had become the strategic intelligence, has her "face" grow solemn.

C: 我想领受祂的片刻思考…
E: I wish to receive a brief moment of THEIR thoughts...

C: 庸人和天才间的天堑…
E: The natural chasm between the mundane and genius...

C: 「我还以为你不会来了。」
E: "I thought you weren't coming."

C: 如果圆圈外未知的知识会破坏确定的未来，那么，让它们不再出现便好。在未来模型被导向不可知前，有一位天才立于黑暗中，推落第一块骨牌，以天才的尸骨铸成的骨牌。
E: If unknown knowledge outside the circle threatens to disrupt the ascertained future, then such knowledge should never appear again. Before the future model can be guided into the unknown, a genius stands in the darkness, pushing down the first domino — a domino set forged from the bones of geniuses.

C: 「我拒绝。我们确信心中的猜想是唯一正确的猜想，这一点不会改变。」
E: "I refuse. We both are certain that the hypothesis in our mind is the only correct one, and that certainty will not waver."

C: 但你笃信，这些都只是虚假的、惑乱人心的话语。你感到分外寒冷，打起哆嗦，而这也是假象，是试图固化认知的陷阱。
E: But you firmly believe that this is no more than the fake and misleading words of man. You feel an intense cold and begin to shiver, but this is just another illusion, a trap trying to enforce these ideas in your mind.

C: 听闻模拟宇宙的下个研究方向是「第一次帝皇战争」，真珠小姐很感兴趣，因为那也是「边星贸易战争」的年代。
E: We heard that the Simulated Universe would do research on The First Emperor's War next. Miss Pearl is quite interested, as the Emperor's War happened in the same era when the Borderstar Trade War took place.

C: 说实话，帝皇战争太久远了，我不觉得能对现在的投资工作有什么帮助——除非他们是办公室坐无聊了，想多看些公司刚成立时的八卦。
E: Frankly, the Emperor's War was so long ago that I don't think it'll be any help to modern investment — Unless they've run out of things to gossip about in the office and just want to read about the IPC back when it was first established.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 你为什么要这么做？
E: Why did you do that?

C: 购物节目令你如痴如醉。你还想接着看，但屏幕「咻」地关闭了。
E: The infomercial is addictive. You want to keep watching, but the screen suddenly turns off.

C: 「埃维利星球遭遇了金融危机。」疤眼夫人说，「业务巩固部准备帮助星球度过难关，我们推出了天使型谢债发行机，我会给你开个无法拒绝的条件。」
E: "The planet Evelli is hit by a financial crisis," Madam Scarred Eye announces. "To help them tide over, our Business Consolidation Department has launched the Angel-type I.O.U. Dispenser. I'll make you an irresistible offer."

C: 「当然。爱可以作为宇宙通用货币，我们量产它。星际和平公司会致力于为众人提供永无止尽的爱，克里珀庇佑着我们。」疤眼夫人说。
E: "Of course. Love can be a universal currency, and it is something we mass-produce. The Interastral Peace Corporation endeavors to provide everyone with an endless supply of love. Qlipoth blesses us." Madam Scarred Eye states.

C: 突然！你同时感觉到无数隐秘的眼睛在黑暗中注视着你…你再次看向「永眠领主」，它正闭目沉睡。或许你刚刚的动静太大了？你对此感到一丝后怕……
E: Suddenly, you can sense countless hidden eyes staring at you from the darkness... When you look back at the Lord of Eternal Slumber again, it is still sleeping with its eyes closed. Maybe you made too much noise just now. You feel a hint of unease creeping in...

C: 你手握代谢酶，缓步踏入腐殖化王座前…你十分紧张…你相信只需要一丁点剂量，只要沿着虫群的纤维……你扎了下去！
E: Holding a syringe containing Metabolase, you stride toward the putrefied throne slowly and nervously... All it takes is a tiny dose deliver into the Swarm's fibers and... You pierce it with the needle!

C: 「你想问我火漆的事吗？」它目光如炬。
E: "Do you want to ask me about the sealing wax?" It has a penetrating gaze.

C: 星际和平投资机器打开它的*肚子*…你成功了！
E: The Interastral Peace Investment Device opens its *belly*... You have succeeded!

C: 「秉承以和为贵的精神，伟大的乐子神创造了达达球。」喇叭里的人捏着鼻子说道，「它用球类撞击替代了肢体冲突，每位选手都能享受比赛的乐趣。」
E: "Abiding by the spirit of valuing peace, the almighty Laughter created Dahdah ball." Pinching her nose, the person on the loudspeaker says, "It uses ball collisions in lieu of physical clashes. Every player gets to have fun."

C: 你走在隐蛰虫挖掘的地心洞穴，渗透进岩层的海水滴在肩膀上，带着潮湿的腥臭。沿途飞行的虫子将目光投向你，转头又回到繁忙的搬运工作。
E: You walk into the cave leading to the planet's core that was hollowed out by lurking dormant insects, as seawater that has penetrated the rock formations drips onto your shoulders, carrying a dank odor. Passing insects cast their gaze over you before returning to the busy work of transportation.

C: 你怀疑自己是忘了眨眼，仅仅一个瞬间，飞船便已把同行的对手远远甩在身后，以不到一秒的时间获得了胜利。
E: You wonder if you forgot to blink. In just a heartbeat, the ship had already long left its opponents behind and secured victory in less than a second.

C: 「此地禁止欢笑。」你听到一阵阵吟唱，海浪般的祈祷令你浑身发麻。
E: "Laughter is forbidden here." Waves of chanting reach your ears, prayers that send a shiver down your spine.

C: 你把画框精心包裹起来，就近卖给了一位口碑不错的妖怪收藏家。
E: You carefully wrap up the painting frame and sell it to a nearby monster collector with a decent reputation.

C: 「怎么可能？那我的研究还有什么意义？」学者恍恍惚惚地抛下手中的证伪推论，举起铁锤，对着机器重重砸下。
E: "How can this be? What's the point of my research, then?" The disheartened scholar tosses his refuted theories in a daze, raises his hammer, and brings it down heavily on the device.

C: 草地的湿润与泥土的香气，都在告诉你，危险已离你远去。你张开双臂，手却骤然触摸到一块冰凉的东西。
E: The dampness of the grass, the fragrance of the earth... they all tell you that danger is far behind you. You stretch your arms, only for your hands to abruptly touch something cold.

C: 你不打算接受法官的歪理，并准备为它带来真正的失败。
E: You're not going to accept the judge's twisted logic, and prepare to deliver true failure to it in response.

C: 虽然对策已显露成效，但贪婪的海洋可不会就此满足。
E: The tactic seems to be successful, but the greedy sea is far from sated.

C: 你深吸一口气，卯足全力划动船桨，无视掉溅入船里的鱼腥味，让船笔直地撞进暗礁。
E: You take a deep breath, mustering all your strength in your rowing, ignoring the fishy stench that has splattered onto the boat, steering it straight for the submerged reef.

C: 作为刺杀僭主的惩罚，等到艾格勒重新睁开眼，这里的所有人都会被扔进斗兽场去喂狮子。
E: As punishment for assassinating the tyrant, everyone here will be cast into the arena to be fed to the lions the next time Aquila opens their eyes.

C: 一道微光淹没了你们的祭品，在监狱的地上被巨大的破洞吞噬，下方的河流汹涌澎湃，但总归比留在这儿等死更好。
E: A faint sliver of light engulfs your offerings, swallowed by the gaping chasm on the prison floor. A raging river surges below, but leaping in seems the much better option than waiting to die here.

C: 两位执棋者共同掷下木棍，一场战役的胜负，只由两枚棋子决定。
E: The two chess players toss out their wooden sticks at the same time. The fate of the battle will hinge on only these two pieces.

C: 能统一下版本吗？
E: Can we align our narratives?

C: 聆听一则孩提的睡前故事，关于万物不可违背的生死流转。
E: Listen to a Lullaby For Children to Sleep, a bedtime story of life and death's inescapable cycle.

C: 是时，动物在刻法勒的足迹上生长，植物因瑟希斯的垂枝发芽。可蓦然回首，却没有谁能理解自己的智慧，理性之泰坦的树心因悲伤而生出裂痕。
E: Yes. Animals grow in the footsteps of Kephale, and plants sprout from the hanging branches of Cerces. Yet, upon sudden reflection, none could comprehend their wisdom. The heart of the Reason Titan cracks with sorrow.

C: 年幼的欧洛尼斯，以第一声啼哭唤醒了时间。命运的果实在成熟后绽裂，黏稠的混沌逸散，涌向空无一物的世界。
E: Young Oronyx, with their first cry, awakens time. The fruit of fate bursts upon ripening, its viscous chaos spilling out, flooding the empty cosmos.

C: 每条丝线都是一条道路。
E: Each thread is a pathway.

C: 你还想去到世界的尽头吗？在黑潮尚未降临的黄金时代，在无尽之海中寻到雅努斯的门扉，穿过它们，你将抵达翁法罗斯的每一个角落。而只有最虔诚的信徒，方能在惊涛骇浪中将它们开启。
E: Do you still desire to reach the world's end? In the Golden Age before the black tide, find Janus' gates amidst the Endless Sea, pass through them, and you can arrive at every nook of Amphoreus. Only the most devout disciples can open them amidst turbulent seas.

C: 你卖掉布利萨的祖传棉花糖店，还欠了一屁股债打造出终极飞行机器，不是让你在这么低的高度听麻雀唱歌的。
E: You sold off your family-run cotton candy shop at Bulsa and drowned yourself in debt to build the ultimate flying machine — not to hover at this pathetic altitude listening to sparrows chirp.

C: 它能让将领掌握叛军的进攻路线，也能让医生知晓瘟疫的爆发时间。人们在预言的庇护下重新燃起斗志，推动生活艰难地运转下去。
E: They allowed generals to grasp the routes of rebel attacks, and they enabled doctors to know the outbreak time of plagues. Under the protection of prophecy, people reignited their fighting spirit and struggled to keep life moving forward.

C: 可是，若所有的道路都需要神明才能照亮，人类又能走多远呢？若有那么一天，它抛弃了我们，我们又该何去何从？
E: But if every path requires a god's light to illuminate it, how far can humanity truly advance? Should the day come when they abandon us... where would we turn then?

C: 众神都拿它的造物打趣，连扎格列斯都懒地偷它的作品。
E: All the gods mocked Georios's creations for amusement, and even Zagreus was too slothful to steal from them.

C: 我曾游历八方，见过大地万般景象，那广阔的平原是吉奥里亚的胸膛，巍峨的群山则是它的臂膀。
E: I wandered the world and saw countless sights. The vast plains were Georios's chest, and the majestic mountains were their arms.

C: 人们学会了从劳动中获得粮食，他们在第一抔小麦种下的地方建起吉奥里亚的神殿，将收获月的第一捆麦子送到这里，献祭给这位伟大的泰坦。
E: Humans learned to reap sustenance through toil. Where the first seeds were sown, they raised Georios's sanctuary, offering the inaugural wheat harvested during the Month of Reaping to the merciful Titan.

C: 甚至从那似乎莽荒未化的沃辛尼什，也撷来了几则令人捧腹的笑谈。如此，不胜枚举。
E: Even from the seemingly primeval Worthinnis, they gathered several amusing tales. And countless others beyond these.

C: 正在识别用户身份信息，请不要晃动您的工牌或人脸。识别成功，您当前可领取的套餐为：「空间站商务套餐」。
E: Scanning user identification information, please do not move your Name Card or face. Scan successful. The meal package available for pickup is: "Space Station Business Meal."

C: 请回答最后一个问题——本终端的备用实体密保卡存放于？
E: Please answer the last question: Where is the spare physical security card for this terminal stored?

C: 你看到一个马桶没有？
E: Have you seen a toilet bowl around here?

C: 可惜！我前段时间一直在支援磐岩镇周边的镇子，起早贪黑地跟裂界里冒出来的妖魔鬼怪打交道，完全错过了你们拯救世界的大冒险……
E: What a pity! I was supporting the folks around Boulder Town, dealing with the monsters emerging from the Fragmentum from dawn to dusk. I completely missed you lot's big saving-the-world adventure...

C: 然而，你只感觉到一丝温暖的触感。你睁眼，发觉那白袍只是将额头抵在你身上。你见那兜帽的阴影中流下两行热泪：「纪念碑在颤抖…祂感知到我们了！」
E: Yet, you only feel a warm sensation. You open your eyes to find the person pressing his forehead against your body. Tears are streaming down his face, which was obscured by the shadow of the hood. "The monument is shaking... THEY have sensed us!"

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 你们穿入建筑物后复又穿出…你们搜索了太久，却仍未摆脱困惑：正如书呆子所说——这颗星球表面的一切生命活动，确实以一种诡异的方式戛然而止……
E: You and the rest enter a building and exit again... The search lasts for a long time, but your confusion is not answered. As the nerd puts it, all life activities on this planet have creepily come to an abrupt halt.

C: ——哈，有了！你那干瘪的眼球狡黠地、骨碌碌地转动，随后向国王致以标准且灿烂的微笑。随后，你走上讲台，口若悬河…当然，用的是你*想象中*的黏土语。
E: Haha. You've got it! You roll your dry eyeball slyly and swiftly, then flash the king a standard yet dazzling smile. You take to the stage and release an unending waterfall of sounds in what you IMAGINE their language to be.

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 映入视野的是一颗巨大的行星——它真的好大好大！年幼的你从未想过，行星竟然可以达到这种尺寸…你还以为它们都是可以直接一口吞掉的呢！
E: What comes into your field of vision is a massive planet. It is truly a big, big celestial body! You are still young, so you never imagined that a planet could be so big... You had previously assumed they were all small enough for you to swallow whole!

C: 听说阿格莱雅会驱使若虫为自己服务…它们平时都住在这里吗？
E: There's a rumor that Aglaea commands these nymphs to serve her... Do they live here all the time?

C: 我倒是没什么意见，矿队向来不嫌人多——话说回来，你手上有干活的家伙吗？
E: I'm not judging. The mining team can never be too big. Anyway, you have tools to work with?

C: 佩服，真是佩服。
E: Admirable. Truly admirable.

C: 建议采购记忆泡沫枕头和天鹅绒被。
E: May I suggest you buy some memory foam pillows and velvet quilts?

C: 那个…我看你艺高人胆大，可以拜托你一件事吗？
E: So... You strike me as a bold person. Can I ask you for a favor?

C: （还是悄悄告诉希露瓦吧……）
E: (Maybe I should tell Serval secretly...)

C: 咦，这照片怎么看不见我人在哪里……
E: Hmm? I can't see myself in the picture...

C: 这面墙内似乎有一只若虫。你已经想到了绝妙的捕捉方法，可惜墙缝太小，挤不进去。
E: There seems to be only one nymph in this wall. You came up with a brilliant way to catch it, but the crack in the wall is too small, and you can't squeeze in.

C: 众所周知，「舞蹈」是法吉娜祭典上至关重要的环节。微醺的人们通过热烈地舞动肢体，进入某种近乎迷狂的状态……
E: It's common knowledge that "dance" plays a vital role in Phagousa's Festival. Through vigorous movement, the tipsy participants enter a near-ecstatic state...

C: 这个地方不太好过来，对吧？一路辛苦了喀！不过请相信我，朋友，这历练于你百利而无一害——
E: Quite a trek to get here, eh? Tough climb! But believe me, friend, this trial will serve you well—

C: 看你做选择相当有趣…过程值得我细品一番。
E: Watching you make decisions is fascinating... The process is worth savoring.

C: 还是换个地方吧。
E: Maybe switch to another spot.

C: 但你现在这样，搞得虎克非常担心你的游戏体验！
E: But how you're acting now has me worried about your gameplay experience!

C: 嗨、朋友，你好喀！初次见面，相逢即有缘，陪我聊聊天喀！
E: Oh hey there, friend! What lovely luck running into you. Won't you stay for a chat, crrk?

C: 救救嘤！
E: Help, chirp!

C: 我已抵达朝圣终点…
E: I have arrived at the end of my pilgrimage...

C: 世界能在转瞬间崩塌，但真理将继续长存嗡~
E: The world can crumble in an instant, but the truth will always endure~

C: 你要飞到哪里去？
E: Where are you flying to?

C: 我说不要劝，你就真的不劝，你愿意把我的话听进去，我很感动。
E: I asked for you not to dissuade me, and you did just that. You take my words so seriously. I'm very grateful.

C: 不过，既然能够附身的话，为什么不变成更酷的东西呢？
E: However, if they are able to possess robotic bodies, then why not become something more ruthless?

C: 成交！但是你要做什么事呢？
E: Deal! What do you want me to do?

C: 这时你不禁回想起这只机巧鸟带给你的第一印象，它眼里所闪耀的，确实是「欲望」的本源——
E: You couldn't help but recall the first impression this cycrane gave you. There was a sparkle in its eyes. That's the source of desire.

C: 一句真话一句假话的鸟。
E: A cycrane that tells a truth then a lie.

C: 我会回到鹤运物流，说到做到。
E: I'll go back to Heron Express. I'm a bird of my word.

C: 你能想到这只机巧鸟回到鹤运物流之后，它不会为了生存资料而奔走，它会为了在劳动中肯定自身的存在而辛劳…也许它找到了真正属于机巧鸟的快乐。
E: You cast your mind to this cycrane returning to Heron Express — how it won't struggle to survive, how it will find meaning existentially through life-affirming work... Perhaps it has even discovered the true happiness of being a cycrane.

C: …不好，这箱子比外表看上去更重。倘若知晓它的重量，你一定会做好准备，扎好马步，借助身体支撑将它拿下，可惜你没有这样的机会了。
E: ...No, this chest is heavier than it looks. If you knew how heavy it was going to be, you would've braced your back and lifted from the legs, but you had no such chance.

C: 深不见底的黑暗…
E: Bottomless darkness...

C: 啊，这烈日骄阳！
E: Ah, this blazing sun!

C: 这是「开拓之道」的一部分！
E: This is part of the Way of Trailblaze!

C: 哈哈，没事，您随便看！
E: Haha, that's fine. Enjoy the show!

C: 威逼也好，利诱也好！只要能让你在比赛中获得优势，什么手段都可以！
E: Be it intimidation or seduction! Anything goes, so long as it gives you an advantage!

C: 但…我还是决定——向你送上安慰奖，以兹鼓励！
E: But... I've made a decision — to award you a consolation prize as encouragement!

C: 本届大胃王比赛的赢家已经产生——
E: The winner of this year's Competitive Eater Championship has been determined!

C: 赶快离开，否则我就要用阳雷将你轰！杀！成！渣！
E: Get out of here, or I'll blast — you — to — pieces with Daythunder!
Beeeep!

C: 就这？没了？
E: That's it?

C: 你要是实在好奇，就把它找回来拆开看看吧——这次就不用来告诉我了。
E: If you're really curious, you can always get it back and open it to have a look — no need to tell me this time.

C: 哦，差点忘了这个…青镞小姐还让我把这些交给你——她的原话是：「感谢你对神策府工作的支持，顺便报答你拯救了仙舟罗浮所有人。」
E: Oh, yes, almost forgot... Qingzu also asked me to give this to you. Her exact words are: "Thank you for your support of the Seat of Divine Foresight's work, and also for saving everyone on the Xianzhou Luofu."

C: 哎呀呀，你别乱骂人，呜呜，我妈妈都没有骂过我。
E: Hey, don't scold people like that! *sniffle* Not even my mom has scolded me before.

C: 《寻星顽童》，在匹诺康尼颇受欢迎的童话故事，曾被翻拍过多个版本。
E: Urchin Starhunters, a popular fairy tale in Penacony, has been remade several times.

C: 在不少电影和游戏的情节里，这样的雕像最后都会站起来，与你发生一场激烈的战斗。
E: It is a common plot in a lot of movies and video games that a statue like this will rise up and face you in glorious battle.

C: 你不觉得，扛着一块广告牌大杀四方是件很酷的事吗？
E: Don't you think it would be awesome to run around slaying your enemies with a billboard?

C: 你不信邪地塞了枚普通的硬币进去，不到一秒就被它吐了出来…看来，这居然还是个挑食的家伙。
E: Refusing to relent, you shove some ordinary coins in it — they are spit out right away... Looks like this one's a picky eater.

C: 不知不觉间，你的身边似乎多出了许多人，虽然看不见他们，但你知道，大家都是来等待那辆列车的乘客。
E: Before you realize it, many people seem to have appeared around you. Though you can't see them, you know that they are all passengers waiting for that train.

C: 快坐下吧，快坐下吧，快坐下吧…沙发向你发出催促。
E: Sit on me, sit on me, sit on me... The sofa calls out to you.

C: 可恶，这一定是假面愚者的陷阱！
E: Darn, this must be a trap created by a Masked Fool!

C: 贴心的你瞬间想到，你的同伴们或许还没游玩过惊险刺激的《小小哈努行动》呢！
E: Being the kind and considerate person you are, you instantly recall that your companions might not have played the thrilling and exciting Hanu's Adventure yet.

C: 艾格勒的故事嘛，早听腻了。
E: It's the story of Aquila. I'm already bored of it.

C: 必秒！
E: Instantly!

C: 火盆，翻了…
E: Brazier, fell...

C: 我上缴的灾害预备金…
E: The disaster relief fund I donated...

C: 还有丹恒，丹恒乘客回来之后感觉有点点奇怪…所以说…你们几个在仙舟上到底发生了什么帕？快跟列车长汇报一下帕！
E: And also, things have felt a bit weird with Dan Heng since he got back... so I was wondering... what actually happened over on the Xianzhou? Give your conductor a quick update!

C: 在外面都认识这么多朋友了，帕姆想你刚来星穹列车的时候，那会儿还是谁也不认识呢。
E: You've met so many friends out there. Pom-Pom thinks back to when you first came aboard the Astral Express, and you didn't know a soul.

C: 呜哇！帕姆是帕姆，帕姆是列车长，才不是什么「小动物」！
E: Whoa there! I'm Pom-Pom, and Pom-Pom is the conductor — not some "small animal"!

C: （给帕姆讲段冒险经历）
E: (Tell Pom-Pom about a brief adventure of yours)

C: 嘿嘿，难道我也要发现一种全新的植物了吗？嗯…叫什么名字好呢……
E: Heehee, don't tell me I'm about to invent an all-new species of plant, too? Mmm... What should I call it...

C: 地板都快反光了…
E: The floor is turning into a mirror...

C: 你说她的咖啡是「黑泥」对吧？哎，其实这已经是她改良过的版本了，现在好歹是用单分子锯手动打磨的咖啡豆。
E: What was the word you used to describe her coffee — "black sludge," was it? Well as it turns out, this is already the new and improved version of her coffee: The coffee beans are polished by hand with a monomolecular blade.

C: 关于三月七：帕姆的辫子
E: About March 7th: Pom-Pom's ears

C: 推开眼前挡路的军械箱，继续前进吧。哔——啵。
E: Push away the armory box blocking your path, and continue on. Beep — boop.

C: 大门依旧纹丝不动，但里面似乎传来了什么动静…只持续了一瞬间。
E: The door still doesn't budge, but for just a split second... you think you can hear faint noises from within.

C: 喂喂，{NICKNAME}教官！你可要想清楚了，杰帕德戍卫官说不定就在那扇大门后面休整哦？
E: Hey, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! Do you know what you're doing? Maybe Captain Gepard is resting behind that door!

C: 辛苦你跟那个叫威廉的联络员保持联系了。那小伙子虽然说话不太利索，但办事靠谱的很，希望你多担待。
E: I hope you'll keep in touch with William. That boy might not be articulate, but he is very reliable. Please be more patient with him.

C: 不说这些了，聊点开心的吧——比如你的奖励。拿着，{NICKNAME}！这些都是你靠实力挣来的。
E: Let's talk about something positive, like your rewards. Please have this, {NICKNAME}! You have earned this.

C: *电波滤音*地衡司已经封锁了积玉坊附近的区域，你只要<color=#dbc291ff>专心猎捕扑满</color>就行！
E: *electronic voice* The Realm-Keeping Commission has sealed off the area near the Trove of Verdure. Just <color=#dbc291ff>focus on tracking down the Trotter</color>!

C: 哈努兄弟走错过路，但时间和运气会改正错误……
E: Hanu has made mistakes, but time and fate will correct them...

C: （这小孩怎么回事……）
E: (What's wrong with this kid?)

C: 哦，我们的新秀{NICKNAME}即将对玛丽发起挑战！
E: The rookie {NICKNAME} is taking on Mary!

C: …没了？
E: ...That's it?

C: 换句话说——要想做出这种违反公序良俗的事，你就必须消耗一个「崇高道德的赞许」，以及忍受自己良心的拷问、周围人惊异的目光、银鬃铁卫的通缉…诸如此类。
E: In other words, to do something that goes against societal ethics would cost you a "Praise of High Morals," not to mention the guilt you'd have to endure, the look you'd get from others, the warrant for your arrest by the Silvermane Guards, and so on.

C: 啊，我、我…我不认识这些东西，哈哈。什么通缉令？听都没听过。你快拿走吧，想收藏还是想干嘛都随你，再见。
E: Ah, I—I... I've never seen these before in my life, haha. What Wanted posters? Never heard of 'em. You can take those away. Keep them or do whatever you want. Goodbye.

C: 好吧，我不问了。
E: Alright, I'm not asking anyway.

C: 你的脑中毫无规划，一片混乱。那些杂乱无章的地名被你的视觉神经吸收，下一秒又被干干净净地抛在脑后。
E: You looked around aimlessly, and all your thoughts are completely muddled together. All those random place names are reflected onto your visual receptors but are immediately discarded by your brain the very next second.

C: 想想看，当别人知道这件事后，会如何评价你和一众开拓客？——想到这里，你便觉得实在良心难安，于是悻悻然放弃了搞破坏的想法。
E: Think about it: What will people think of you and the Trailblazers once they find out about this? This thought leaves you feeling deeply uneasy, and so you give up this dastardly plan of yours.

C: 菲多拉最近发现，巴列维在卖几件从未见过的古代遗物，价格昂贵。
E: Fidora has recently discovered that Balaway is selling several never-before-seen ancient relics at astronomical prices.

C: 它总是自信满满地讲一些伤人的话…一两次我还能当它开玩笑，但是太过频繁了就……
E: It's always saying these cruel jokes at my expense... Once or twice would be okay, but it's just too much...

C: 你眼里就只有生意…为了那一摊子生意，你什么都能放弃……
E: All you do is sell... You'd give up anything for the business...

C: 桌子旁放着一张纸条，上面用潦草的字体写着：「史考特先生的箱子。没有值钱的东西。勿动」——哈！真是此地无银三百两。
E: Next to it is a memo with sloppy handwriting that reads, "Mr. Scott's box, containing nothing valuable inside. Do not open." Aha! He couldn't have advertised its value more clearly.
Two.

C: 谢、谢谢{F#大姐}{M#大爷}。
E: Th—Thank you, {F#milady}{M#milord}!

C: 你站住不动，紧盯着罐子。罐口在你的眼中越来越大，仿佛可以吞没你。又或许，它的确吞没了你。
E: You stand still and stare at the vase as it expands before your very eyes, as if trying to engulf you. Or perhaps, it does indeed engulf you.

C: 我想再看看信的内容。
E: I want to take another look at the letter.

C: 可是夕葵姐姐给我的照片就是你啊。
E: But Xikui gave me a picture of you.

C: …您真是太好了！我们这就出发。
E: ...You're so nice! Let's hit the road right away.

C: 刚才「赎珠阁」门前走过了一位青年，一直念叨着「复仇、复仇…」，你去问问他，也许会有些收获。
E: Just now, a young man passed by the door of the Jeweler's Pagoda muttering on about "Revenge... Revenge..." Go ask him. It might just be worth your while.

C: 好像在哪里听说过这个故事…
E: I think I've heard this story somewhere before...

C: 家人为了拆散我们，想了很多办法…但爱又是如何能被外力所消解的呢？所以，我们决定藏在这艘「化蝶号」货运星槎上，偷偷离开罗浮……
E: Our families keep trying to split us up, all these different schemes... But how can true love be broken from the outside? So that's why we hid out here on this freight starskiff, the SS Butterfly: We want to sneak off the Luofu...

C: 男人陷入了长久的沉默，只能用眼神向你投以回答。
E: The man sank into a long silence and could only reply to you with a look.

C: 既然我已经下定决心玩转匹诺康尼，穿着肯定也要符合这里的风格才行。
E: Seeing as I've decided to stay here in Penacony, my style has to be in line with those here.

C: 美梦，这就是货真价实的美梦！我过去几十年人生里没有一次做出过这样的美梦！
E: Sweet dreams — well, this really is the sweetest of dreams! I haven't dreamed anything like this for dozens of years!

C: 玩得开心。
E: Have fun.

C: 只剩这么几天了…得赶紧抓住假期的尾巴才行。
E: Only a few days left... Gotta really seize the tail end of this vacation.

C: 我听说，家族为了避免负面情绪污染他们「纯洁无瑕」的梦境，特聘了不少「心地善良」、「细腻敏锐」、「认真负责」的人来担任梦境鼓励师。
E: I heard that The Family hired a whole bunch of Dreamscape Motivators — "kind-hearted," "meticulous and perceptive," "responsible" people — to help protect that "pure and flawless" dreamscape of theirs from being contaminated by any negative mindsets.

C: 陈腐、愚钝、俗不可耐！我不明白，为什么市场会变成这样。
E: So clichéd, stupid, and vulgar! I don't get it. How did the market ever get like this?

C: 说什么要我去迎合什么主流市场、什么大众审美…就是因为…就因为全都是这种水准，我才……
E: Asking me to pander to the mainstream market, and pop culture... It's exactly because... because they're all of this kind of standard that I...

C: 来聊聊吗？
E: Care to chat?

C: 她还说了其它什么吗？没有了吧…每次都是这一套，呵，也不嫌腻歪。
E: Did she say anything else? Nothing, right... It's always the same old trick each time, ha. Doesn't she ever get bored?

C: 是不是有什么误会……
E: Has there been some kind of misunderstanding here...

C: 我一动也动不了，连喊疼的力气都没有，只能紧紧盯着那双眼睛。视线随之变得模糊…不知不觉间，「我」就睡着了。
E: I couldn't move. I didn't even have the strength to cry out in pain — I just stared at those eyes. My vision grew blurry... Before I knew it, "I" was asleep.

C: 多可笑，多可悲啊…你说是吧？
E: How ridiculous! How tragic... Don't you think?

C: 吓死了？
E: Scared to death?

C: 是不是很好奇，为什么这样的故事称得上惊险呢？别急，我来告诉你……
E: Aren't you curious as to why this story isn't considered thrilling, though? Don't worry. I'll fill you in...

C: 似乎也没那么惊险。
E: Doesn't seem that thrilling to me.

C: 这种疏漏往往是因为地图数据不足。只要把正确的坐标上报给公司，就可以拿到一大笔信用点奖励。
E: Such oversights are often due to insufficient map data. I could get huge credits rewards for reporting correct coordinates to IPC.

C: 应知晓的故事我已铭记，那些密文还是留给专业人士来伤脑筋吧。我相信他们比我更擅长解读。
E: I'd learned the lesson I was supposed to, and the secret of the glyphs should be left to professionals. I trust they will be better than me at decoding them.

C: 于是在某个契机下，我脱离组织、成了独行侠。自那之后，我想去哪就去哪，想打谁就打谁，逍遥自在。
E: So when an opportunity arose, I left the organization and became this loner. Since then, I can go wherever I want, fight whomever I want, and everything feels so free and breezy.

C: 误会？我只知道悬赏金没有误会！
E: Misunderstanding? All I know is that there's no misunderstanding about the bounty!

C: （小声）我知道，你没必要当着{M#他}{F#她}的面跟我说。
E: (Whispering) I know. There's no need for you to tell me in front of {M#him}{F#her}.

C: 不要以为我们怕了你…这只是出于大局考虑，各退一步而已！
E: But don't think that we're afraid of you... We're just taking into consideration the bigger picture and deciding to de-escalate!

C: 还有那些对我做手脚、以为能用下三滥手段阻拦我的家伙…管它是家族还是什么公司，我总有一天要让他们付出代价！
E: And those guys who tried to sabotage me, thinking they could stop me by using dirty tricks... whether it's The Family or the IPC, one day, I'll make them pay!

C: 我不反对吃肉，但作为无名客，这些人明显缺乏对未知的敬畏和探索精神——他们应该加入泯灭帮才对……
E: I'm not against eating meat, but as the Nameless, these people obviously lack the awe for the unknown and the spirit of adventure — they should've joined the Annihilation Gang, instead...

C: 至于我具体怎么知道的，你只能猜猜看咯——有秘密的女人才更有味道嘛。
E: As for how I know, feel free to hazard a guess — after all, no intriguing women go without secrets.

C: 很难评价对吧？宇宙中就是会有这样的事情……
E: Hard to take a stand? Well, such things are common in the universe...

C: 家族这群两幅面孔的货，明面上笑脸相迎，背后居然在狠狠地嚼我们的舌根……
E: These two-faced scumbags from The Family! They greet us with smiling faces but criticize us behind our backs...

C: …让我自己待会儿吧，伙计。我得静下来好好构想一下未来的方向……
E: ...Please leave me be for a while, buddy. I need some time to ponder about our future...

C: 他们现在应该就在【艾迪恩公园的吧台】。快去吧，我等您好消息！
E: You should be able to find them at the bar of Aideen Park. Go on! I'll wait for your good news.

C: 算了，调查得差不多了，准备去<color=#f29e38ff>和费曼聊聊</color>吧。
E: That's enough sleuthing for today. I'm going to <color=#f29e38ff>talk to Feinman</color>.

C: 波奇的「宝贵的企划书」，不知道有没有机会用上。
E: Bocchi's "Precious Proposal." You're uncertain whether it'll see any use.

C: 我刚不小心听到你同事聊天……
E: I overheard something when your colleagues were talking just now...

C: 你感觉心情有些复杂。或许你可以留下来看看车主的反应…或是直接转头离开。
E: You feel a mix of emotions. Maybe you should stay for a while to witness the owner's reaction... or just walk away.

C: 艾默里奇突然蹦了起来，捏紧的拳头差点锤到你的膝盖——好险！
E: Emmrich jumps up with a jerk, his fist almost colliding with your knee! So close!

C: 下次再聊。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 我不能让波波特就这样放弃演员的道路，他是一位很有潜力的年轻人——<color=#dbc291ff>宾客{M#先生}{F#小姐}，请您帮我把他劝回来吧！</color>
E: No, I can't just let Popott give up on his acting career. He's got so much potential! Please, <color=#dbc291ff>dear {M#mister}{F#miss}, could you please ask him to come back?</color>

C: 别犹豫了，波波特先生，这是对你来说是全宇宙最好的机会——你想在星际和平娱乐掌控自己的命运，还是想在家族一辈子当个傀儡？
E: Stop hesitating, Mr. Popott. This is the best opportunity in the whole universe for you! Do you want to control your fate at Interastral Peace Entertainment, or do you want to remain as a Family puppet for the rest of your life?

C: 话没讲清楚我就不走！
E: I won't leave until everything is sorted!

C: 你…唉！你们匹诺康尼人真是麻烦，我只给三分钟，快点！
E: What? *sigh* You folks from Penacony are a real pain. I'll give you three minutes, so make it snappy!

C: 我想跟你聊聊…
E: I'd like to chat with you...

C: 那时我彻底明白了，我想要的原来不是让大家喜欢上「纯美之歌」，而是要大家喜欢上「拉洛丝」——比起门达希亚与「纯美」女神，我更爱我自己。
E: It was then that I fully realized that my desire was not for everyone to appreciate the Song of Beauty, but for everyone to appreciate Larose. It turns out that I love myself more than Mendasia and the Goddess of Beauty.

C: 如此失败的我……
E: I'm such a failure...

C: 我想跟你聊聊。
E: Can we talk...?

C: 这未免有些…太简单了。我甚至搞不清那到底真是诺卡的魂灵，亦或仅仅是我的幻想。
E: This seems... a bit too easy. I can't even be sure whether that was the real Noka, her soul, or merely a figment of my imagination.

C: …为什么！为什么——告诉我！我到底做错了什么？！
E: ...Why? Tell me what I did wrong!?

C: 格-蕾的声线带上了一丝悦耳的欣喜——这对她的合成音来说难度不小。
E: Go-Ray's voice is tinged with content, a challenging feat for her synthetic voice.

C: 再看我的母星…倘若我真回到了那里，估计也不会看到人们握手言和。
E: As for my home planet... even if I go back, I don't think I'll see the people there bury their hatchets.

C: 当我拥有这副身躯时，我也拥有了这个赐名。
E: I was given the name the moment I had this body.

C: 罗斯玛丽是怎样的人？
E: What kind of person is Rosemary?

C: （试着和它对话一下吧……）
E: (Try talking with it...)

C: 我距离那五人究竟还有多远…到底还要付出怎样的代价，我才能跻身家主的行列？
E: Just how much further away am I from those final five... Just what kind of price do I have to pay to join the ranks of family heads?

C: 趁着这股东风，未来找上门的订单只会越来越多，就像滚雪球。
E: If I capitalize on this momentum, more and more of these deals are gonna come a-knockin' and things will start to snowball.

C: 玩具有这么重要?
E: Are toys really that important to you?

C: 什么手段？
E: What methods?

C: 请允许我将自己的一切奉献给您，知更鸟小姐——
E: Please allow me to offer myself to you, Miss Robin...

C: 这位老者愤怒地自言自语着，头顶的天环发出不和谐的闪动。在看见你的那刻，他立即收起动作，换上了足以示人的礼貌面容。
E: An elderly person is angrily muttering to himself, the halo above his head flickering discordantly with rage. However, when he spots you, he immediately stops what he's doing and puts on a polite countenance to greet you.

C: 有点太激进了…
E: These measures sound quite extreme...

C: 居然说什么我应该留下来建设匹诺康尼…都这年头了，还一点宇宙化思维都没有。当初要是听他的，我可拿不到战略投资部的offer！
E: I can't believe he's suggesting that I should stay behind and develop Penacony... For someone as advanced in age as he is, I'm surprised how lacking he is in cosmic thinking. If I listened to him back then, I would have never received the Strategic Investment Department's offer!

C: 这番话着实有些让人难以拒绝。在某种情绪的推动下，你拿出了纸笔……
E: You find it difficult to refuse such a request. Driven by a certain emotion, you take out a pen and piece of paper...

C: 你打开了第二个木桶，里面依旧什么也没有。看来这样的行为注定不会带给你任何东西。
E: You open the second barrel, and again, there's nothing inside. Your efforts seem destined to be fruitless.

C: 从这里向下望去，人就像蚂蚁一样渺小。
E: When you look down from here, people are as tiny as ants.

C: 啾？你们不是来打卡的吗？
E: Tweet? You're not here to check the place out?

C: 你伸手触碰它的表面，起初，泛着微光的冰冷表面在你指尖留下冰冷的触感。
E: You reach out and touch its surface. At first, its cold surface leaves behind a chilly sensation on your fingers.

C: 帮帮我，阮•梅女士！
E: Help me, Miss Ruan Mei!

C: 就它了。
E: This one.

C: 哟，没想到有心人不止我一个。
E: Oh! I see it is not just me that cares for these things.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 哈努兄弟啾，吾将为你带来猫头鹰老师的启示——
E: Brother Hanu, tweet, I will take you to Professor Owl for enlightenment...

C: 「高傲的狼，低下头吧，看你的脚下群敌环伺，但秘宝也隐于其间咕！」
E: "Arrogant wolf, bow your head. There are many enemies beneath your feet, but there are treasures hidden within!"

C: 我得好好跟黄金公子吐槽这里的设计，先飞一步了啾。
E: I'll be sure to give Young Master Gold a piece of my mind about this design. I'll make a move first, tweet.

C: 那是你的脑袋毛。
E: That's the hair on your head.

C: 不知道黄金公子能不能送一辆长方方给我…回去问问他吧。
E: I wonder if Young Master Gold will give me a rectangle... I'll go back and ask him.

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

C: 没兴趣！
E: Not interested!

C: （拿出一枚艾迪恩代币）
E: (Take out an Aideen Token)

C: 嘀嗒嘀嗒，你来早了，还没到换班的时间啾！
E: Tick-tock tick-tock, you're early. It's not time to change shifts yet, tweet!

C: 嘿呀呀呀！！赤红大哥来了啾？！
E: Hi-yahhhh! Boss Red is here, tweet!?

C: 你只是贴在了玻璃上吧。
E: You just stuck yourself against the glass.

C: 是谁勤勤恳恳每天搬枝条~
E: Who's hard at work carrying the branches?

C: …啾？等等啾……
E: ...Tweet? Hang on, tweet...

C: 球棒侠，你的战利品中有神奇的「魔法硬币」吗？有它我就能想起来了啾！
E: Baseballer, do you have a wondrous Magic Coin among your treasures? I'll be able to remember if you have one, tweet!

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，负责来回巡视的小家伙是最滑头的孩子，最擅长利用客人的惯性心理藏猫猫了啾！说不定它就藏在<color=#dbc291ff>一些需要回头的地方</color>呢…
E: Hi-yah! Let me think: The little one on roaming patrol is the sliest, very good at hiding in spots that take advantage of the guests' habits, tweet! It could be hiding in <color=#dbc291ff>places where you need to turn your head</color>...

C: 这里是美梦小镇最外围，正在搭建新巢穴的地区啾~
E: This is Dreamville's farthest outskirts, where we are currently building a new nesting site, tweet!

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 小小的房子里有小小的人啾…
E: There are tiny people inside this little house... Tweet~

C: 钟表小子大电影正式开拍！
E: Filming has officially begun for the new Clockie movie!

C: 啾啾啾~现在你也是幸运的宠儿啦。
E: Tweet, tweet, tweet~ Now you too are favored by fortune!

C: 再见了！我要去胶片里的世界啾！
E: Farewell! I am heading off to the world within the film, tweet!

C: 啾、啾啾，啾啾啾！！
E: Tweet, tweet tweet, tweet tweet tweet!!!

C: 在下名为「草绿经理」，负责帮助猫头鹰老师一起建设美梦小镇啾~
E: I am known as the "Verdant Manager," I am responsible for helping Professor Owl build Dreamville, tweet~

C: 美梦小镇的居民都是很有趣的家伙呢~当然，本公子自然是其中最耀眼的那一个~
E: The citizens of Dreamville are all fascinating fellows~ Of course, I am the most dazzling of them all~

C: 偶尔我会去音符小姐的茶话会——音符小姐总会准备好可口的浆果和美妙的歌曲。哼哼，勉强算是小镇第二耀眼的居民吧~

C: 只见那位化外民说道「我闻此曲，如见白璧有缺，不禁悲从中来……」琴师心中一惊，只有此人听懂了琴声——这是他一直苦心谱写，却始终无法完成的杰作。

C: 纸上写着：「想了许久，还是不愿再给您添麻烦了。从今往后，我将珍惜您给予的、来之不易的自由，独立坚强地活下去。衷心地…祝您幸福。」
