C: 医疗舱？不，我不需要。请你相信，我对我自己的身体状况非常清楚。
E: Medical Cabin? No, I don't think so. Trust me, I know my body just fine.

C: 倘若非要凌踏这片科学的净土，那么就先从我，卡波特身上跨过去吧！
E: If they are to trample on this pure land of science, they'll have to go through me first!

C: 嗯……如果你找不到避难所的话就跟着指引方向前进，走那边可以前往主城安全区，我说得清楚吗？
E: Well... If you can't find a shelter, follow these directions. You will arrive at the safe zone of the main town if you go that way. Am I making myself clear?

C: 空间站的科技水平想必大家有目共睹，可是大家却丝毫没有对于机械抱有敬畏之心。
E: I'm sure everyone can see the level of science and technology in the space station. However, people show no respect for machines.

C: 不过我手艺不好，雕刻出来的样子和莱斯莉本人差距很大。她可比这些石头好看多了！
E: But my crafting skill is not very good. The face I carve on the rocks doesn't really look like her. She looks much better than these!

C: 你看上去并不喜欢喝咖啡。
E: You don't seem to enjoy drinking coffee.

C: 我没有什么问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 你口袋里装着的是？
E: What's in your pocket?

C: 如果之后有什么问题，可以随时来问我。
E: Feel free to come to me if you have any questions.

C: 缺乏约束的秩序，崩溃起来是很快的。
E: Groups with no discipline tend to collapse very easily.

C: 我明白了。
E: I see.

C: 毕竟…她只做自己感兴趣的事，一旦失去兴趣就立刻走人，她就是这个性子。
E: After all, she only pursues what interests her and as soon as that interest is lost, she abandons it and moves on.

C: 可以呀，你想聊些什么？
E: Of course. What do you want to talk about?

C: 有科员举报他此前多次抹黑过其他科员，我核实了下，的确是真的…哎…现在还有人说，开除他都是轻的呢。
E: There are reports from other researchers saying that he had a history of slandering other people. I did some fact checking and that turned out to be the case. Some even think he deserves worse than getting sacked.

C: 我不是科员，但比他们厉害。
E: I'm not a researcher, but I'm greater than one.

C: 啊，又是你！我认得你，上次见过你我还问你是不是空间站的科员嘛！我叫……
E: Ah, it's you again! I met you before, and I asked you whether you were a researcher last time! My name is...

C: 不是，她可能在忙别的事。
E: Nope. She's probably attending to some other affairs.

C: 你这话什么意思？我可是尊贵的阮•梅女士亲手创造的生命，爪子长短和实力并没有直接关系，我的反应速度和隐藏实力说出来我都怕吓着你。
E: What do you mean? I'm a life created by the honorable Miss Ruan Mei, and the size of my paws has nothing to do with my capabilities. If you know my reaction speed and hidden talents, you'll be blown away.

C: 外面乱哄哄的，危机四伏！这里就不一样了，你是不是觉得这里很安全？
E: It's chaotic and dangerous outside. Here, it's different. You feel safe here, don't you?

C: 你的声音有点特别。
E: Your voice is quite special.

C: 呜呜不，呜呜想玩，呜呜不想回去。
E: I want to play here. I don't want to go back.

C: 查询中…找不到所需权限，无法执行该操作。
E: Checking permissions... Permission for this action not found.

C: 我发现这批珍稀物种之间应该有接近于人类的复杂情感，它们之间的想法甚至会出现相互矛盾的情况。
E: I noticed that these rare creatures exhibit complicated emotions akin to the ones in humans. Sometimes, their thoughts can even contradict each other.

C: 我还能再见到你吗？
E: Will I see you again?

C: 哈哈，这次咱俩强强联合，定能赚个盆满钵满。您就等我们的好消息吧！
E: Haha, earning our pots of gold is inevitable now that we're working together. You just wait for our good news!

C: 在你的仔细观察下，你注意到坐垫表面有些古怪——按理说坐垫的内里应当是柔软的，可眼下它的表面却有着某种凸起，摸上去极为坚硬。
E: Under your careful observation, you notice that the surface of the cushion is a little strange... Logically, a cushion should be soft inside, but this cushion has something very hard sticking out of it.

C: 是我刚才的表述有误。我曾来自阿卡索斯，那是我的故乡，黑潮来临前，我携带所有财产逃来了奥赫玛。我来自尚未覆灭的阿卡索斯，这点千真万确。
E: I made a mistake in my last remark. I originally came from Icatus, and that is my home. Before the black tide descended, I took all of my worldly belongings and fled to Okhema. I come from an Icatus that has not yet been destroyed. This point is absolutely true.

C: 请别这么说，德墨忒尔婶婶。安心等我回来吧。
E: Please don't say that, Aunty Demetria. You just hold on, and I'll be right back.

C: 你俯身，从地上捡起一个破破烂烂的<color=#dbc291ff>卷轴</color>。
E: You reach down to pick up a tatty old <color=#dbc291ff>scroll</color>.

C: 你将方才所见转述给赫卡忒，换来对方一阵咬牙切齿的大笑——
E: You recount to Hekate what you just saw, who replies with a big snarling laugh...

C: 只是没想到，一见面我就无可救药地爱上了你。然后你带我结识了很多异乡的朋友，看到了更广阔的世界……
E: But I never thought that I'd fall head over heels in love with you as soon as we met. And when you introduced me to so many outlander friends, you opened up my eyes to the bigger world outside...

C: 在外面注意安全。
E: You stay safe out there.

C: 喂喂，别搞错——我只售卖新闻，不回收新闻。
E: Hey, don't get me wrong now — I only sell news. I'm not into recycling it.

C: 他们…应该是去了很远的地方。
E: They... have probably headed off somewhere very far away.

C: 树庭同样有驻守的黄金裔，在黑潮来袭时不该如此不堪一击，还有那个黑衣剑士的行为…仔细想来确有些蹊跷。
E: There was a Chrysos Heir stationed at the Grove, they shouldn't have fallen so easily to the black tide. And that black-clad swordmaster's actions... they seem rather suspicious upon reflection.

C: 问题不大，已经解决了。
E: No problem, it's already been solved.

C: 你不由想象，在生命最后一刻，那对姐妹究竟是怀着怎样的心情去面对如此的绝望……
E: You find yourself wondering what final thoughts crossed these sisters' minds as they faced such utter despair...

C: 哈哈哈！成何体统，成何体统！
E: Hahaha! Scandalous, just scandalous!

C: 哎，可事情不能就这么算了，您被大地兽给狠狠地撞了，当然要赔偿才行。
E: Well, we can't just let this slide. That dromas hit you hard, so compensation is definitely in order.

C: 不，只是到时间了。去老地方看看吧，它准在那。
E: No, it's just that the time has come. Let's check its usual spot. It'll surely be there.

C: 我看它们的进展挺不错的。
E: I think they're making progress.

C: 大地兽做出了选择。它转身朝向奥赫玛的城门，头也不回地走去。
E: The dromas has made its choice. It turns toward Okhema's gates, walking away without looking back.

C: …咱们有这么个泰坦吗？
E: ...Do we even have a Titan called that?

C: …埃德加怎么跑了？剧本上没有写这段啊？他这人，戏好多……
E: ...Why did Edgar run off? This wasn't in the script. He's always being so dramatic...

C: 肯定会出事啊！
E: Of course, it won't!

C: 对对对，对你个头啊。
E: Yes, of cour— wait a minute, as if!

C: 所以，为什么说起故事来？
E: So why are we talking about stories now?

C: 云石市集的大家很照顾我，我现在过得很开心，只是……
E: Everyone at the Marmoreal Market has looked after me. I'm quite happy nowadays, but...

C: 还是守规矩吧，别去了。
E: Rules are made to be followed. Let's not go.

C: 哈哈，举手之劳。
E: Haha, it's no trouble at all.

C: 人手和物资都不充裕，即便有如我这样的强者坐镇，恐怕也很难挡住黑潮啊。
E: We're short on both manpower and supplies. Even with someone as strong as me in charge, it's going to be tough to hold off the black tide.

C: 又一次袭击来临了。
E: Another wave of the attack has begun.

C: 一个谎言需要无数个谎言来圆…要实现孩子们的心愿，恐怕需要再次找到这个守卫，和他事先串通好。
E: A lie needs to be helped up by infinitely more lies... Looks like you gotta find the guard again and deal with him in advance.

C: 奇怪，怎么没有回应？
E: Weird, no response?

C: 选择卷三
E: Select Volume 3

C: 人类…还真是矛盾的生物啊。
E: Human beings really are conflicted life forms...

C: 呵呵…你说得对。下层区的人们暂时还离不开我这个医生……
E: Hehe, you're right. People still rely on me as their doctor.

C: 最近没什么灵感啊……
E: Argh, this writer's block...

C: 都是朋友，不必道歉。
E: We're all friends here — no need to apologize.

C: 可以出其不意地发动攻击。
E: You'd be able to act preemptively.

C: 在得知佩佩的事情之后，列车长很热情地分享了一些独家烹饪配方，说是可以有效缓解这类问题。
E: After I told Pom-Pom about Peppy's shedding, they shared some cooking tips that should help solve the problem.

C: 是很柔软的材质，让人感觉身心都得到了放松。
E: The material is super soft — whoever made this had relaxation in mind.

C: 那位戴眼镜的瓦尔特先生，看见我后转身走了，过了一会儿拿设备传了本书给我，叫《论环境的意义——没有人生而为恶》。
E: The gentleman in spectacles — Mr. Welt Yang — he walked away as soon as he laid eyes on me. A while later he used a device to transfer a book to me called "On The Matter of Environment - No One Is Born Evil."

C: 还挺有同伴意识，我喜欢。
E: A strong sense of awareness for your companions — I like that.

C: 之前那位戴眼镜的大叔也在用很微妙的眼神看我，我们之间是不是哪里有误会？
E: The older gentleman with glasses was also giving me some very subtle looks. Has there been a misunderstanding of some kind?

C: 看到你们这几个无名客之间的关系，以及星穹列车如此温馨的氛围，勾起了我许多关于「家」的回忆…很令人羡慕啊。
E: The Nameless have a great relationship — it lends a warm atmosphere to the Astral Express... and it brings back memories of my own family. I'd be lying if I said I wasn't a little envious.

C: 都说了本小姐不喜欢啊！
E: I told you, I don't like it!

C: 咱们今晚就走吧……
E: Let's go tonight.

C: 应该不会。
E: I don't think so.

C: 谢谢你的解答，我没有问题了。
E: Thank you. I don't have any other questions.

C: 她们已经看见了星辰，不再被阴翳笼罩双目。所以才能如此炽热地注视我…哦不，注视真理和现实啊！
E: They no longer have their eyes clouded and now see the stars, and that is how they are able to passionately look at me... I mean, at truth and reality!

C: 小说里说的都是真的。
E: Everything in the series is true.

C: 诶诶，真的吗真的吗？我都没有听说过那种数据统计技巧，你给我详细说说好不好？
E: Huh, really? I've never heard of that data analysis technique. Can you elaborate on that?

C: …连你都听说了啊？肯定是咱们医疗科那几个大嘴巴到处说。
E: ...Even you are in the know? It must be those blabbermouths at the medical department.

C: {NICKNAME}，我正在思考一件事，你听听有没有道理——
E: Hey {NICKNAME}, I was thinking about something. Hear it out and see if it makes sense —

C: 说起仙舟象棋，本座可说是罗浮上的一等好手，能胜过我的不过寥寥数人。
E: Speaking of Xianzhou chess, I'm a bit of an expert — few on the Luofu could ever dream of defeating me.

C: 毕竟是药茶，能好喝到哪儿去？虽说口味是比不上你们列车上的饮品，但效用可是一等一的。
E: Have you tried any herbal tea that tastes good? It may not be as palatable as the drinks on the Express, but its efficacy is peerless.

C: 一直没来得及答谢……
E: I haven't had the chance to thank you...

C: 喔，看来账账很喜欢这个哦！
E: Oh? Seems like Numby really likes that!

C: 她说这是星穹列车特供的「咖啡」。我尝了一小口，感觉稍微有些……
E: She said it's coffee — an Astral Express specialty. I tried a sip, but it's a little...

C: 的确，有些让人脊背发凉…但同时也美得惊人。
E: Brr, it sends a chill down my spine... but it's also magnificent.

C: （模仿恐怖的鬼叫声）
E: (Scary ghost noises)

C: 不知列车的尽头通向何方，也许会经过我的家乡也说不定呢？
E: I'm curious about the Express' trajectory. Will it pass by the place I call home?

C: 米沙有什么建议吗？
E: Do you have any suggestions?

C: 嗯，你们喜欢就好！
E: I'm glad you like them!

C: 照这个合成方法，放袋垃圾进去是不是也能变成宝贝？
E: Following this synthesizing method, would it turn a bag of trash into treasure?

C: 惩治恶人难道不算正义？
E: Does punishing evildoers not count as justice?

C: 这话怎么听着这么熟悉……
E: Why does that sound so familiar...

C: 如果不只是治治呢？比如打断他的腿脚……
E: What counts as "punishment"? What if I break their legs...

C: …不如，就买这款「金橘卷」吧！偏橘的卷发，逛街拍照也很合适。
E: ...Why don't I just get this one called "Kumquat Curls"! Curly orange hair, it's perfect for taking pictures and shopping!

C: 我相信你的潜质，能有这样开朗豁达的心境实在不可多得。
E: I believe in your potential. It is rare for someone to have such a carefree, optimistic disposition.

C: 伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！
E: Idrila's beauty is peerless!

C: 倘若契机存在，我会毫不犹豫，拼尽全力助他脱离困境。
E: If an opportunity had arisen, I would have spared no effort to help him out of his predicament.

C: 智库的记录…
E: Data bank records...

C: 下次比赛开办时，{NICKNAME}与列车组如果有兴趣观看，我会给大家寄送入场门票。
E: The next time there's a race, if {NICKNAME} and the Express Crew are interested in spectating, I will send everyone admission tickets.

C: {NICKNAME}，我来了。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm here.

C: 三月徒弟最近……
E: Lately, my apprentice March...

C: 哦？真的？可我方才听帕姆列车长说，她时不时睡到午时才起床。
E: Oh, really? But I just heard Pom-Pom say that she sometimes sleeps in until noon.

C: 听说在很久以前，有将山包一般的原牛养大，赶往其他世界的巨人无名客，也有在终年下宝石雨的国度采摘品鉴奇石的无名客……
E: I heard that once upon a time, there were giant Nameless who raised cattle as big as the hills and herded them to other worlds, and there were also Nameless who harvested and evaluated marvelous crystals from worlds that rained gemstones...

C: 没错，它笑得超级大声。
E: That's right. Its laugh is super loud.

C: 不知再回仙舟，会看到怎样一番风景呢……
E: I wonder what kind of scenes I would behold if I returned to the Xianzhou...

C: 有个叫拉雯妮的房地产中介，跟我做过几笔买卖，地位和我很相配。请你帮我问问，她愿不愿意和我做朋友？
E: There's a real estate agent named Lavonne with whom I've had a few dealings — in terms of social status we're an excellent match. Would you mind asking on my behalf whether she's willing to be my friend?

C: 你很有钱吗？
E: Are you rich?

C: …可能会吧？
E: ...Maybe?

C: 那些蘑菇和可食用苔藓，吃起来真不错。我最近品尝了不少新奇的下层区美食，我现在脑子里可是灵感爆炸，得好好捋一捋才行。
E: The mushrooms and edible moss aren't too bad. I've recently sampled several new foods from the Underworld, and now my brain is bursting with inspiration. I have to make good use of it.

C: 我知道你在顾虑什么，我就明说吧，看上这个项目的人很多，钱已经投进去不少了。
E: I understand your concern. Let me tell you this, lots of people have already invested in it.

C: 唉，算了…我也不能指望人人都有文学素养……
E: Well, don't mind me... I guess I can't expect everyone to be as educated...

C: 灵感是这样降落的吗？
E: I doubt that's how you discover something.

C: 罢了罢了，这只是小女子自己的事情，还请你不要放在心上～
E: This is my private affair. Please don't be bothered by it.

C: 嘿嘿，毕竟离开了技术部那个乌烟瘴气的地方，还能做自己想做的事，我当然开心啦。
E: Hehe. Well, I did leave that foul Technology Division, and I'm able to do whatever I want now. Of course, I'm happy.

C: 嗯？啊，好像确实是这样…可能是因为机械屋平时没什么生意吧？
E: Huh? Ah, you've got a point... Maybe that's because the workshop often doesn't have any business?

C: 依我看啊，这个贝洛伯格供暖公司就不值得信任！大守护者就该直接接手，把整个城市的供暖管线翻新！
E: The way I see it, Belobog Heating Corporation shouldn't be trusted! The Supreme Guardian should step in and revamp all of the city's heating pipes!

C: 没见过。
E: I've never seen someone like that.

C: 哈哈，您的消息也真是灵通！
E: Haha, you're really up with the play!

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 我在想…也许，这会是大家不愿意和阿丽娜一起玩的原因吗？
E: I think... maybe that's why they don't want to play with me.

C: …总之，等下次再玩捉迷藏的时候，你肯定抓不到我的！我保证！
E: ...Anyway, the next time we play hide-and-seek, you won't be able to find me! I am <unbreak>100%</unbreak> sure of that!

C: 真的吗？！…谢谢你，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！
E: Really!? Thank you!

C: 我可以享受何种权利？
E: What kind of rights?

C: 参考资料？
E: Refer to documents?

C: 托帕小姐…她很复杂。
E: Miss Topaz... She is very complex.

C: 嘿，我还以为贝洛伯格这巴掌大的地方入不了你的法眼呢。
E: Hmm, I thought a small town like Belobog would be beneath someone like you.

C: 至于贝斯手，我们乐队暂时没有……
E: As for the bassist, we don't have one...

C: 估计到那时候，我已经成为白发苍苍的老希露瓦了吧，哈哈哈~
E: I imagine by that time, I'll already be old-lady Serval with gray hair, hahaha~

C: 最近有什么趣事吗？
E: What's interesting lately?

C: 后来实在没办法，邓恩只好出来自首。不过好在杰帕德戍卫官宽宏大量，这事就算过去了。
E: So Dunn had to give himself up. Luckily, officer Gepard is a lenient man. He let it go.

C: 你对希露瓦…
E: You and Serval...

C: 我负责禁区后方的综合管理。军需、后勤、能源…这些都归我管。
E: I am responsible for the general management of the support lines in the restricted zone. Munitions, logistics, energy... all of these are under my control.

C: …你倒是说词啊！
E: ...Please say something!

C: 怎么？是我，不满意？
E: What's the problem? Are you unhappy to see me?

C: 别着急，总会有办法的。
E: Don't worry. You'll think of something.

C: 虎克大人真是雅兴啊。
E: The great Hook is certainly in high spirits.

C: …还有你！
E: ...and you!

C: 你认识桑博吗？
E: Do you know Sampo?

C: 但只靠一个人是完成不了这么重大的任务的——不管她的能力有多强。好在她的真诚已经打动了很多人，我们都愿意成为她的助力。
E: A major undertaking can't be accomplished by a single person, regardless of her individual strength. It's a good thing her sincerity has touched so many, and we're all glad to be helping her.

C: 下雪的国度，车轮在辗转，时代将完成它最后的清算
E: The wheels they keep are turning in the snow nation. Our era will complete its reconciliation.

C: 看样子，你现在不在切磋的兴头上啊…可惜，那就下次吧！下次我可不想再听借口了哦！
E: Such a shame that you're not in the mood for a spar... Fine, let's fight next time! No more excuses, hah!

C: 你为史考特打拳吗？
E: Are you fighting for Scott?

C: 瞧一瞧，看一看。
E: Take a gander, and have a look.

C: 原来花朵寓意这么多……
E: I never knew flowers could symbolize so many things...

C: 叮叮号好像有段恐怖传说……
E: I heard there's a legend of horror about the Ding-Ding Tram...

C: 又是无所事事的一天……
E: Just another day of nothing to do...

C: 没想到克拉拉小姐又为我们送来了物资……
E: I didn't expect Miss Clara to send us more supplies...

C: 哎，你们听说了吗？无敌大老爹宣布参加这次说唱比赛了！
E: Hey, did you hear? Big Daddy Invincible is entering the next rap battle!

C: 优质纯净水，第二杯半价！
E: Quality purified water. Second glass half-price!

C: 哈哈，别心急。
E: Haha, don't worry.

C: 保护视力无激素！
E: Protect your vision without hormones!

C: 再讲一个，再讲一个！
E: Another, another!

C: 别犹豫，继续进攻啊！
E: Don't hesitate! Keep attacking!

C: 呜呜呜，我的「圆滚滚」…
E: Oh, no! My "Chubbie"...

C: 我还没有。
E: Eh.

C: 呵呵，慢走。祝你享受这趟历史文化之旅。
E: Heheh, take care now. I hope you enjoy this historical cultural tour.

C: 你的工作是什么？
E: What does your job entail?

C: 老板您算是找对人了，这是我们店里的招牌服务「今日运势 」。第一次测试是免费的，我帮您看看……
E: You've come to the right person. This is our shop special, the "Fortune for Today." The first try's free. Let me see...

C: 好啊，老板您尽管问，只是要是问了运势，咱可得收费了呀。
E: Fire away. But I'll have to start charging if it's to do with your fortune.

C: 我看这里还有些牌桌？
E: I see a few game tables here as well?

C: 吃过…感觉还不太够味儿，谢谢你啊。
E: I've eaten them before... They didn't taste great though. Thanks anyways.

C: 怎么？打算和咱再探讨一下美食吗？咱最喜欢和人一起研究美食了。
E: Hmm? You want to discuss food for a little longer? I love to chat about cuisine with people.

C: 有空记得来咱这儿好好吃一顿啊…无论这尚滋味有多忙，只要您来，就一定有座位。
E: Just drop by and enjoy a hearty meal whenever you're free. My store might be busy these days, but I'll always reserve a seat for you!

C: 还真是和我聊天？你可真有意思…你想聊什么？
E: Really? How curious... What do you want to chat about?

C: 《涯海星槎胜览》，狐族冒险家撰写的异星奇观记录…哦，你本来就是来自异星的游客。稍等，我想想……
E: "Views of the Universe from a Starskiff" is a record of wondrous exoplanets by a foxian explorer... Oh, you're from an exoplanet anyways. In that case, hang on and let me think...

C: 对不起，我无意冒犯…
E: Sorry, I didn't mean to offend...

C: 所有人都这么说。
E: That's what everyone says.

C: …你又是什么人呢？拱火我们俩吵架，你又是什么意思。
E: ...And who are you? Egging us on to fight like this... What can you get out of this?

C: 难不成是你的影迷，好啊，武赫你多来讲讲。
E: Is it possible that you've got a fan here? Alright, keep talking, Wu He.

C: 接下来可以再出一部《密探零零幺》，就说神策府派了一位高手前去调查建木，路上却遇到了几位不着调的人……
E: Next, we can release one titled Agent 001 about an agent from the Seat of Divine Foresight who runs into some troublemakers on his way to investigate the Ambrosial Arbor...

C: 来咱们这形虎拳馆练上十几年，保证您长命百岁！
E: Come to our Tiger Boxing Gym for a few decades, and I guarantee you'll live much longer!

C: 我这么多年还没成年怎么了？碍着你了吗？你们这群人啊，还有地衡司那帮人，成天就知道管这管那，给我添堵……
E: So what if I'm still not yet an adult? Is it bothering you? All you people and the people at the Realm-Keeping Commission, just sticking your noses in my business all day, making things tough for me...

C: 建木停止生发了…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor has stopped sprouting...

C: 真期待这一天啊，这小家伙的身手我早就赶不上了，侍卫长的职务恐怕也该早些让贤了。
E: I'm looking forward to that day — this kid's surpassed me already, and I should probably be yielding to him my role as the chief guard.

C: 啊，原来你是来视察工作的吗？感谢您百忙之中莅临地衡司公廨。
E: Ah, so you're here to inspect our work then? Thank you for taking the time to visit our humble Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery.

C: 嗯…我不是很方便立刻回答这个问题。请问您是想听地衡司执事的正式回复，还是普通上班族的抱怨？
E: Mmm... I'm not at liberty to promptly respond to that question. May I ask, would you like to hear the formal response from a Realm-Keeping Commission officer, or the complaint from a regular staff member?

C: 地衡司公廨的所有公职人员都有各自的工作侧重点，每个人都是地衡司不可或缺的组成部分。
E: All public officials at the Chancery have their own focus, and everyone is an integral member of the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 辛苦了！
E: Keep up the great work!

C: 我在家乡的时候，获取经商营业许可就已经够繁琐了，经常一等就是一年，一开始我还会有些愤怒还有焦虑，可是后来我也心态平和了。
E: When I was back on my home planet, getting a business license was always a real pain. It usually took a year. At first, I was pretty angry and anxious. But later on, I became more calm about it.

C: 不过，您放心，我在这流云渡上工作了几十年，再复杂的手续也难不倒我，尤其是货物报关清关和装卸的事项。
E: But don't you worry! I've worked in Cloudford for decades. Doesn't matter how complicated the bureaucracy is, nothing is an issue for me, especially things like customs clearance and unloading goods.

C: 虽然做什么都晚了。
E: Even though it's already too late...

C: 药王秘传的残党棘手吗？
E: Are the remants of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus problematic?

C: 咱们罗浮的居民，还是得和云骑通力合作，这样才能保持现有的安宁嘛。这点自觉我还是有的。
E: Here on the Luofu, we still have to cooperate fully with the Cloud Knights to keep the peace around here. I'm self-aware enough to get that.

C: 行啊。我曾在此处当了两百多年的护珠人。对这里熟得不能再熟了，你有什么想问的都可以问我。
E: Alright. I've been a Pearlkeeper here for over two hundred years. I know everything there is to know about this place, so you can ask me anything you want.

C: 以后你要遇到有人和你说这种话，还请你帮我狠狠教训那个人——当然，要用语言教训，不要用拳头。
E: If you meet anyone who says things like that to you, please teach that person a lesson for me. Of course, you should do it verbally, not physically.

C: 但具体是怎么闹起来的，这些事我倒是不知道了……
E: Still, I have no idea about the details...

C: 白鸟扑棱着翅膀一顿操作……
E: Shiratori begins to flap his wings and...

C: 一看您就比仙舟的老古董好说话，让我们进行一场「现代的交流」吧。
E: You seem way more reasonable than those old chumps. So, how about we have a real chat? You know, a "modern" one.

C: 你还有着慧眼识人的本事啊？
E: You have a discerning eye, don't you?

C: 我如果观察得不错，你这人足够敏锐，用不了多久，就会知道我在做什么，我有什么考虑。但你也足够聪明，我相信你知道什么事情应该插手，什么不该。
E: If my observation are correct, then you're sharp enough to soon figure out what I'm doing and why I do it. However, you are also sharp enough that I can trust you to know what you can get involved in, and what you shouldn't.

C: 相信我，「劳务中介」既可以简单，也可以复杂。
E: Trust me, being an "employment agent" may be easy at times, but it can get complicated.

C: 你和旁边这位认识吗？
E: Do you know the person next to you?

C: 噢，我并不是在说你，请不要误会。我们之间还有什么要聊的吗？
E: Oh, don't get me wrong. I wasn't talking about you. Is there anything else you would like to know?

C: 有没有听到的秘密可以分享呢？
E: Could you share any of your secrets with me?

C: 想问问你与会长的关系？
E: What's your relationship with the president?

C: 我没什么事了。
E: I have nothing else.

C: 我不打扰了，请继续演奏。
E: I won't bother you any further. Keep on playing.

C: （向克利欧说出陶德的真相）
E: (Tell Cleo what happened to Todd.)

C: 你之后有什么打算？
E: What are you going to do next?

C: 不过说实在的，无论是我手下的那些艺人，还是你姐我，也都是因为这样才入行的。
E: To be honest, that's also why my peers and I joined this industry.

C: 你看见的是仙舟「曜青」，它挟风驭雷，自九天之外疾驰而来。甲板上无数狐人披甲站立，威风凛凛势不可挡。
E: You are seeing the Xianzhou Yaoqing, which is advancing at a dazzling speed, carrying the momentum of tempest and thunder. Countless foxians, fully armed, are standing on the deck in a majestic posture.

C: 顺便一说，我们集团都是不收现金的，仅支持「奇巧零食」付款～
E: And before I forget, the Correctional Group doesn't take monetary payments, only Trick Snacks.

C: 看起来将军聊兴很高啊？
E: Looks like you are in the mood to talk.

C: 毕竟铁盔覆面，这倒也不是不可能。
E: I can't rule that out, since they all wear an iron helmet that covers their faces.

C: 这罗浮的确是和咱们曜青不一样，单是这说书的话本子就没重过样……
E: The Luofu sure feels different from our Yaoqing. The storytellers here never repeat their stories...

C: 你还有很多要学，以后我们再多交流交流吧。
E: You have a lot more to learn. Let's have more discussions like this in the future.

C: 估计之后是很难像以前那样废寝忘食地战斗了…但做养老玩家也不错～姐已不在江湖，但江湖上到处都是姐的传说～
E: I don't think I'll be able to be as battle-obsessed as I was before... But! Being a retired player isn't bad~ I am no longer in the game, but people still tell legends of when I was~

C: 嗯嗯，下次再聊～有事没事记得来金人巷找我玩啊！没空来也没关系，记得给我直播间打赏也行，嘻嘻～
E: Yeah, another time~ Remember to come back and see me in Aurum Alley whenever! If you don't get time, just send me a tip on my live stream, hehe~

C: 我、我当然了解。不过，就算是{NICKNAME}，也不可大意。
E: O—Of course I do. However, even you can't afford to be careless here, {NICKNAME}.

C: 目前「束形却邪阵」需要有人维护，捉拿岁阳是一回事，镇伏岁阳是另一回事。这份工作，对长生种来说也够煎熬的啊。
E: The Evil Binding Matrix currently needs someone to maintain it. Capturing heliobi is one thing, but subduing them is a whole other matter. This work is torment for a long-life species.

C: 总能看见她出现在任何地方。
E: I always see her all over the place.

C: 雪衣大人真的很厉害，无论是怎样的任务都能妥善处理。
E: Madam Xueyi is truly amazing. No matter the mission, she can handle it properly.

C: 请问。金人勾魂使四卅七号将尽可能回答。
E: Please do. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> will do its best to answer your questions.

C: 你好，欢迎光临「广云袖」，店内现在装修，不方便入内，请问有什么可以帮到你？
E: Hello, welcome to Cloudbreadth Sleeves. Our shop's interior is undergoing renovation at the moment, and isn't available to customers. How may I help you?

C: 啊这…你，不对，您，您认识景元将军？！
E: Oo-er, wait, you... no, you-you know General Jing Yuan!?

C: 我们是阴冥使者，我们是必然的死亡，我们为所有长生种带去有尊严的结局。
E: We are the emissaries of the afterlife, we are the inevitable death, and we offer all long-life species a dignified ending.

C: {NICKNAME}，您来了！欢迎光临！
E: {NICKNAME}, you have come! Welcome!

C: 严格来说，星槎海的食物足以果腹，但还谈不上是什么美食。
E: Strictly speaking, Starskiff Haven's food is enough to sate your hunger. Whether it tastes good is another matter.

C: 那有缘再见。
E: May we meet again.

C: 下次有机会再说吧。
E: Let us talk next time.

C: 那有缘再见。
E: May we meet again.

C: 难道说你也有在写日记？
E: Are you keeping a diary of all this?

C: 为什么囚犯会出现在这里？
E: Why would a prisoner be here?

C: 你怎么又来了？
E: Why're you here again?

C: 这可是个了不得的哲学问题…
E: Now, that's a profound philosophical question...

C: 哈哈哈哈，你我见面是缘，送你一个小礼物，「礼轻情意重」，请您千万不要客气。
E: Hahaha, fate has brought us together. Take this small gift. "Small gifts in place of vast appreciation," as they say. Please accept it.

C: 这都是我应该做的。我的梦想就是，仙舟有朝一日可以没有交通事故。
E: It's my job. I dream that one day, Xianzhou will be free of any crashes.

C: 闲话听了一堆，长生秘法却什么都没打听到…说这些干嘛，你找我有什么事儿吗？
E: I've heard plenty of gossip, but nothing about the secret to immortality... Why are you talking about these? Do you have business with me?

C: 「龙尊」是？
E: And high elders are...?

C: 嘿嘿嘿，我有这么重要吗？
E: Oooh, am I really that important?

C: 不好意思，话题有些跑偏了。不过，你也大概理解商会有多重要了吧。
E: Pardon me for getting off-tangent, but you probably realize how vital the guilds are now...

C: 我去请飞霄将军。
E: I'll go get General Feixiao.

C: 你又是哪里冒出来的，别总想着做和事佬呀，你甚至不知道我的主张是什么。
E: Stop trying to be the peacemaker when you don't even know what I'm pushing for!

C: 成天叨叨「…仙舟自有打算」，说些听不懂的谜语，能解决任何问题吗！
E: They keep reiterating "Xianzhou has a plan," as if vague platitudes could solve problems!

C: 好，你去忙你的事吧。我还有些事情要和他们谈谈，我是不会放弃的。
E: All right. I've other issues to discuss with them, and I won't give up.

C: …啊，是你啊。你今天有什么事吗？我现在正好有空。
E: ...Ah, it's you. What's up? I happen to be free right now.

C: 不用说了，我懂。
E: I got it, say no more.

C: 虽然我这里没有「长生不老药」，但是我这里有「长生文化创意小商品」，在化外民中的销量可好了。
E: I don't sell Elixir of Immortality here, but I've got long-lived cultural knickknacks. They sell well with Outworlders.

C: 你这儿卖什么？
E: What are you selling?

C: 我想要的位置你真不一定有…
E: Truthfully, you might not have the seat that I want...

C: （狠狠打一下）
E: (Whack violently.)

C: 下次要记得带钱哦。
E: Remember to bring your wallet next time.

C: 你可能再也见不到了…
E: You'll probably never see him again...

C: 嗯…鼻行兽算不算？
E: Um... does a Nosewalker count?

C: 引擎输出功率平稳，但是转速有些不太自然的浮动，到底是什么原因呢……
E: The engine's power output is stable, but the revolution rate is fluctuating unnaturally. What exactly is the reason...

C: …个鬼啊！作为一名引擎工程师，我非常理解您的好奇心。但是求您了，千万别让我们为难。
E: ...Not! Look, I'm an engine engineer, I totally understand your curiosity. But please, don't make this difficult for us.

C: 我了解她，我也理解她，我会尊重她的想法。
E: I know her, I understand her, and I respect her wishes.

C: 也许吧。人与人之间的感情，确实没办法用这种无情的标准去衡量…虽然我根本就不是「人」。
E: Maybe. Interpersonal emotions truly cannot be measured by such heartless standards... even though I'm not even a "person" to begin with.

C: 我和妖物不熟。
E: I'm not friends with monsters.

C: 接下来有什么逃脱计划吗？
E: Any further escape plans?

C: 说这么好听，你只是想爽一下。
E: You make it sound so lofty, but you really just want to feel superior.

C: 怀念？哼，本座是要做将军的人，不需要怀念，未来有的是机会。
E: Do I miss them? Hmph, I will be the General one day, and there is no need for me to look back on them longingly.

C: 如今不少仙舟民心高气傲，自以为短生种的学养注定比不上自己…无论长生短生，本座还不到三十岁的时候，就已经比大部分几百岁的老家伙有学问了。
E: Nowadays, many Xianzhou residents arrogantly think that the short-life folks can never catch up with them in terms of knowledge... But knowledge cares neither your age nor your lifespan. By the time I was just under thirty years old, I had already surpassed the knowledge of many centenarian old-timers.

C: 继续！血战到底！
E: Keep going! Fight to the death!

C: 我满腹经纶，应该可以…
E: I'm a walking encyclopedia. It should be fine...

C: 老实点！每次都有你！
E: Tell the truth! You're here every time!

C: 你可别自己骗自己了，领导的话是能认真听的？
E: Don't fool yourself. Can you really trust management?

C: 我们是鳞渊境的搬运工。
E: We're porters from the Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 不碍事…过会儿便好了
E: It's okay... It'll be fine in a bit.

C: …听听可以，切忌多嘴。
E: ...You can listen, but keep your mouth shut.

C: 我在教索芙洛尼娅发音，她是个很聪明的小女孩。{NICKNAME}您听得出，刚才那句对您说的话，她已经准备了很久了。
E: I've been teaching Sophronia pronunciation. She's a very clever little girl. {NICKNAME}, she has been practicing that line for you for quite a while now, as you can tell.

C: 哦！要演亲情大戏了吗？
E: Oh! Are we about to witness a family drama?

C: 小灰！要对老师保持尊敬啦，冷不丁的，吓了*我们*一跳！
E: Little Gray! You have to show some respect to your teacher! You gave us quite a scare, doing that without a warning!

C: 嘻，是不是特别地可爱？
E: Hehe, isn't it super adorable?

C: 为何？无论荒笛做过什么，它都是承载过「大地」之重的半神。
E: Why? No matter what Terravox has done, it is still a demigod that once bore the weight of Earth.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 确实，酣饮过后，总是会有新的主意像气泡那样从思绪里升起。
E: Indeed. New ideas always rise from the mind after a good drink, like fizzy bubbles.

C: 你们抓错人了，我只是和这人很像。
E: You have the wrong person. I just look very similar to this person.

C: 这一世我先悟，下一世我定能成。
E: I'll get my eureka moment in this life, then I'll definitely make it in my next life.

C: 直到上个礼拜才好。
E: I only recovered last week.

C: 「我是世界之王！」
E: "I'm the king of the world!"

C: …算了，你早就知道我没有这个设定了。
E: ...Forget it, you already know that this is not true.

C: 饱经风霜的石门，自幽囚狱建成之刻便屹立于此。波月古海之下，所有的秘密它都了如指掌，可石头不会说话，只能把它们都烂在肚子里。
E: A weathered stone door that has stood here since the construction of the Shackling Prison. It knows all the secrets under the Lunarescent Depths, but regardless, nobody else will find out, for stone cannot speak.

C: 模拟宇宙的祝福。
E: A blessing from a Simulated Universe.

C: 三月七的大师兄。
E: March 7th's senior.

C: 木人桩得意地向你招招手，邀你与它比上一场，如果它真有手的话。
E: The wooden dummy would be proudly beckoning you to battle... If it had hands...

C: 星历<unbreak>7533</unbreak>年
E: Star Calendar Year <unbreak>7533</unbreak>

C: 年代不明
E: Period unknown

C: 望夫石。
E: Amah rock.

C: 我谁？我要去哪？
E: Who am I? Where was I going?

C: 假作真时真亦假
E: When lies are made truth, the truth becomes lies

C: 貌似卷轴，但实际上是可供悬浮阅读的柔性屏「展阅」，广受仙舟民喜爱。
E: It looks like a scroll, but it is actually a flexible display that can float in the air. It is popular among the Xianzhou citizens.

C: 那么你现在准备好了吗？
E: Are you ready?

C: 「真的吗？我不信。」也许是炸弹上的钟表，也许是被不幸封进箱子的小动物，也许…某种更隐秘的东西。你的好奇心驱使着你，为了仙舟安危，你必须知道真相。
E: "Really? I don't think so." Perhaps, what's inside is the clock on a bomb, a poor animal, or something even more mysterious. As your curiosity gets the better of you, you are bent on finding out the truth for the safety of the Xianzhou.

C: 很好，这样做才算是真正的舒展了肌肉，打开了关节。
E: Very good, this is what a REAL warm-up is like — muscles stretched, joints flossed.

C: 骗我可以，但是别骗你自己！
E: You can try and fool me, but don't try and fool yourself!

C: 我只是个路过的教练罢了。
E: I'm just a coach who happened to pass by.

C: 嗯，总监对那里很熟了。
E: Yes, the director is quite familiar with that place.

C: 仙舟洞天与外界的唯一门户，化外民须经过天舶司重重盘查方可从此处入境。
E: It is the only gate that connects the Xianzhou delve to the outside world. Outworlders must go through a stringent check of the Sky-Faring Commission before they can enter the delve.

C: 工匠们植入玉兆的生长信息有误、或是生物材料繁殖失控才导致了星槎种子生长失败——这枚可怜的金属壳并没有做错什么，它很无辜。
E: It was either the wrong jade abacus info entered by the craftsmen or the uncontrolled reproduction of the biological materials that led to the growth failure of the starskiff seed. The metal shell has done nothing wrong; it is innocent.

C: 形似枝条的生物材料就像鸟巢。它轻轻托起星槎种子，后者仿若亟待孵化的雏卵。
E: The biological materials in the shape of branches work like a nest which gently supports the starskiff seed; the latter looks like an egg waiting to hatch.

C: 「我们猜测，这是某位绝灭大君的手笔，而不是此前未曾记录的天体现象。」
E: "We suspect that it was the doing of one of the Lord Ravagers, instead of an unrecorded astronomical event."

C: 「博识学会，首屈一指的泛银河学术研究组织。博识学会持之以恒地促进全宇宙的文明交流、技术与专利贸易，将『遍智天君』博识尊的智慧之光洒向黑暗角落。」
E: "The Intelligentsia Guild is a top-notch pan-cosmic academic research organization. The guild consistently promotes the exchange of knowledge and technology as well as the trading of patents across the universe, aiming to illuminate the dark areas with the wisdom of Nous, the Wisdomwalker."

C: 我珍藏的游戏卡带啊！
E: My precious game cartridge!

C: 要是没演出看不就亏了！
E: It'd be a massive loss if there's no show!

C: 「呛啷」一声，球棒打击到了一个硬物，将你的虎口震得生疼。你捡起箱子，撕开打击位置上覆盖着的纸壳……
E: With a great "twang," your bat strikes a hard object and rattles your hand painfully. You pick up the box and tear back the paper covering the area you struck...

C: 附身在幻戏制作人身上…
E: I possessed an immersia producer...

C: 断线的风筝和「无糖星芋啵啵」一样，被人抛弃的命运早已注定。
E: A kite with a broken string and a sugar-free Startaro Bubble Tea share the same fate — they are destined to be abandoned.

C: 关于这个图腾所指的家系，来宾们议论纷纷。有人说它头顶的三叶草是苜蓿草家的象征，有人则说它中心的纹路代表了橡木家系。
E: Guests have different views of which Family lineage this totem refers to. Some argue that the three-leaf clover at the crown is the symbol of the Alfalfa Family, while others say that the lines in the center represent the Oak Family.

C: 即便隔着橱窗，你也能看到香甜、嗅到柔软、品尝到色泽金黄。
E: Even through the display windows, you can see the sweetness, smell the softness, and taste the golden hue.

C: 「可是…我该怎么做到…我怎么可能做到？」
E: "But... how do I do it... How can I possibly complete it?"

C: 糖浆味的烟雾从通风口里飘出…看来梦里的排气也是香的。
E: Syrupy smoke wafts through the vents... Seems like the exhaust in dreams smells good too.

C: 「谁来救救他…谁来救救我们……」
E: "Who will save him... Who will save us..."

C: 老人好像一眼便看穿了你的身份——显然，他知道你不该出现在这里。
E: The old man seems to have seen right through you. Obviously, he knows you shouldn't be here.

C: 哦，对了，你找我有什么事？
E: Oh, by the way, what can I do for you?

C: 我也尝试过各种各样的手段方法。就比如我手里这瓶——匹诺康尼特产的美梦糖浆，一小瓶就能让脑子安静一整天，既无副作用，也不会上瘾。
E: I've tried many methods, such as this bottle I'm holding — this Dream Syrup, Penacony's specialty. One small bottle can keep my mind calm for an entire day. It has no side effects and isn't addictive.

C: 眼前的男人情绪肉眼可见地低落。
E: The man in front of you is clearly feeling depressed.

C: 去你的苜蓿草银行！整天业绩业绩，都是放屁！信不信我把你们一个个都崩了！
E: Curse you and your Alfalfa Bank! Work work work all day, it's all rubbish! You think I won't end all of you!

C: 想知道你的秘密。
E: I want to know your secret.

C: 酒店的白金套房？
E: The hotel's Platinum Suite?

C: …怎么回事，风扇声音这么大。
E: ...What's going on? The fan's too loud.

C: 迤逦灯火幽微，帷幕下影子沉睡~♪颓靡月夜…嗯？
E: The meandering lights faint, the shadows slumber 'neath the curtaaaaain ♪ on a downcast moonlit night... Hmm?

C: 希望刚刚并未给您带来困扰，请见谅……
E: I hope I didn't make you uneasy just now. Please forgive me...

C: 明明光是素材就已经收集了十几个书架了…难道我真的在这方面毫无天赋吗？
E: I've collected dozens of bookshelves worth of material... Do I really not have the talent for this?

C: …星灵？它们没有实质形体，属于特殊情况，当然不符合要求。这点刚才说得很清楚了。
E: ...Astral Spirits? They have no physical form, so they're a special circumstance — of course they don't meet the requirements. I already made that very clear.

C: 几乎…不会有……
E: Almost... never...

C: 小冰原熊歪着脑袋打量着你，扑扇着两只半圆形的耳朵。
E: The little arctic bear cub watches you with its head tilted, flapping its semicircular ears.

C: （咦，订单显示的商品是5个「仰望星空」……）
E: (Hey now, the order is for five "Stargazer"...)

C: 乌玛的神情看不出喜悲，正如她播报新闻时的模样。
E: Uma's expression betrays no hint of joy nor sorrow; the very likeness of when she's reporting on the news.

C: 家族派人去调查了，报告上说，那个出现在大屏幕上的「怪物」，实际上是观众们负面情绪的集合体。
E: The Family sent people to investigate, the report said that the "monster" that appeared on the big screen was actually just an aggregated concentration of angry emotions from viewers.

C: 哟，这位客人，你也对道具表演感兴趣？那你来对地方了。
E: Hey, interested in a prop performance? Then you're at the right place.

C: 仔细想想，要是真能一辈子待在巢里，那也不赖。
E: Come to think of it. It would be a good thing if I could stay at home forever.

C: 我当初可真幸运——多少人想要这么厉害的父母都没处找去呢！
E: I was really fortunate — not everyone can have such amazing parents!

C: 小佩说的也许没错。我不会爱…我也没有资格去爱。
E: Perhaps Pennie was right. I don't know how to love... and I'm not qualified to love.

C: 咦？我的心脏好像出了点问题……？
E: Huh? I think there is something wrong with my heart...?

C: 正因身处梦境之中，所以机械的心脏也能感受到「喜悦」吗？
E: My robotic heart is able to feel "joy" because I am inside a dream?

C: 那音符引领你继续攀援而上。你终于得见舞台的全貌——
E: These notes guide your ascent, leading you to a grand vista of the magnificent stage.

C: 可惜这么好的孩子，却被自己曾经最要好的「朋友们」给抛下了……
E: It's a shame that such a kind boy was abandoned by those whom he considered his "best friends"...

C: 想象一下猎犬的品质吧——机灵，善战，而且忠诚。这也是每名猎犬成员的美德。我们是匹诺康尼美梦的后盾，宾客安全的保障。
E: Think about the characteristics of a hound: Clever, battle-hardy, loyal. These are also the virtues of each Bloodhound member. We are the shield of Penacony's beautiful dream, safekeeping the well-being of our guests.

C: 不用担心意外，家族会保护每一位来宾。
E: Don't worry about accidents — The Family will protect each and every guest.

C: 要是没有我们保护匹诺康尼的梦境，这地界早就乱套了，哪儿轮得到他们夜夜笙歌？！
E: If we weren't around to protect Penacony's Dreamscape, this realm would plunge into chaos. Where would they have the idyllic moods to sing the night away!?

C: 我弟弟今年就要举办成人礼了。我问他最喜欢什么活动，他居然说是刺绣…真是枉费我一番苦心，把全套宇宙拳王争霸赛的珍贵录像都送给他了。
E: My younger brother will have his coming-of-age rites this year. I asked him what his favorite activity was, and he actually said embroidery... What a complete waste of the trouble I went through — I even gave him the entire Cosmic Fistfighter Championship collection that was worth a fortune.

C: …听说购物中心的珠宝店新出了一套钻石首饰，你想要吗？
E: ...I hear the jeweler at the mall has recently launched a set of diamond jewelry. Do you want it?

C: 真正的演奏艺术，绝不是用乐器的振动发出乐谱上的声音这么简单…那是乐器、旋律、乐手一同合作的艺术品，蕴含着一个音乐人对艺术的感悟和他的灵魂！
E: The art of musical performances goes beyond merely using the instrument and translating the notes from a sheet of music... It involves the harmonious collaboration of the instrument, melody, and musician, working together to craft a masterpiece. This encompasses the interpretation and soul of the musician!

C: 我觉得自己或许该换个视角看待问题了。这些自动乐器说不定能创造新的音乐形式…我可能还要再思考一下。
E: I wonder if I should look at this problem from a different perspective. Perhaps this automated orchestra has a new way of creating music... I may have to contemplate further.

C: 能收获对音乐的新感悟，这也是我在宇宙中旅行的意义。谢谢你的启发——这是我曾经为一群悲剧演员献奏时得到的报酬，小小薄礼，不成谢意。
E: One of the reasons for my cosmic travels is to gain new insights into music. Thank you for your revelation — this is the compensation I earned when I played my music for a group of tragedian actors. It's not much, just a token of my appreciation.

C: 不过，能被家族叫来当筑梦师的家伙肯定都很会玩。你要是有办法溜去那里，指不定能偷学两招。
E: Although, I just know that anyone that The Family would call to be a Dreamweaver must be super fun. If you could find a way to sneak in, maybe you could learn a few tricks from them.

C: 估计他们还以为我很不食人间烟火。哈，其实都是假正经！
E: They probably think that I am stuck-up and consider myself superior to everyone around me. Hah! My seriousness is all an act!

C: 随着他的动作幅度逐渐加大，各种东西从他口袋里接二连三地掉出……
E: As his movements grew larger and more exaggerated, various things began to fall out of his pockets, one after the other...

C: 平田平次皱着眉头，嘴里念念有词，似乎正在思考母国动漫产业的未来。
E: Hirata Heiji furrows his brow, mumbling something to himself. It seems that he is deeply considering the future of the anime industry in his homeland...

C: 等等，我就开个玩笑…
E: Wait! Wait! I was just joking...

C: 祝您在匹诺康尼度过一段愉快的时光。
E: We wish you a pleasant stay in Penacony.

C: 银河球棒侠？好名字啊，又高贵又独特，和您非常般配！
E: Galactic Baseballer? What an impressive name! Noble and unique, perfectly suited to you!

C: 我是萨宾娜，来自雅利洛八号的公主。能见到您可真是三生有幸。
E: I'm Sabrina, Princess of Jarilo-VIII. It's an honor to meet you.

C: 不过这酒店每天人来人往的，要记住每个人的名字确实有些力不从心…能劳烦您再说一遍吗？
E: To be honest, with the flow of guests in this hotel, it's challenging to remember everyone's name... Could you please remind me of yours?

C: 好，正好我也该去巡查了。
E: Well, it's about time for me to start my patrol.

C: 我确信您的梦一定有个非常棒的结尾，但相信我，这样断章可以最大化它的…呃…市场效益！
E: While I'm certain your dream has a remarkable ending, stopping it at this juncture can optimize its... well... market appeal!

C: 班上有个出名的打架王，名字叫刃。他平时不爱说话，但不论多凶狠的校园恶霸碰到他都只敢绕道。他经常不交作业，考试也经常挂零，但没有老师愿意管他。
E: There is a bad boy named Blade in your class. He is usually quiet, but even the worst bullies are afraid to mess with him. Although he frequently neglects homework and fails exams, no teacher dares to reprimand him.

C: 第三十五名…■■，<unbreak>36</unbreak>分。第三十四名…■■■，<unbreak>41</unbreak>分。第三十三名…■■，<unbreak>43</unbreak>分。
E: <unbreak>35</unbreak>th place... ■■■■■, <unbreak>36</unbreak> points. <unbreak>34</unbreak>th place... ■■■■■■■, <unbreak>41</unbreak> points. <unbreak>33</unbreak>rd place... ■■■■■■, <unbreak>43</unbreak> points.

C: 叮铃铃——感谢您使用窥梦电话服务！欢迎您下次再来！
E: *ring* Thank you for using the Dreampeek Call service! Please come back next time!

C: 梦里不会累。
E: I won't get tired in a dream.

C: 啊，亲爱的主人。从此刻起，我的全部都将只属于你。
E: Oh, my dear owner. I'll belong exclusively to you from now on.

C: 送我去「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」。
E: Bring me to The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand.

C: 小鸟向你挥了挥翅膀，应该是让你「赶紧走」。
E: The birdie flaps its wings at you, supposedly trying to urge you to go.

C: 你为什么还不「啾」？
E: Why aren't you tweeting yet?

C: 接下来才是重点，你可要听好：很多人都不知道，那种金色的钞票可以被用来为「我」补充美梦能量！
E: Here comes the crucial part, so listen closely — many have no idea that those golden banknotes can be used to replenish my dream energy!

C: …嘿嘿，嘿嘿嘿……
E: ...Hehe, hehehe...

C: 我想起了一位告解者，他向我寻求良心的慰藉，可他所做的分明是丧尽良心之事。
E: I'm reminded of a penitent who sought my comfort of his conscience, but what he did was clearly unconscionable.

C: 虽然大部分是些没什么技术含量的杂活，但架不住量大类多，大家都会时不时招呼我去帮忙。
E: Most are odd jobs that don't require much skill, but there's plenty of it to go around. Most people call for my help regularly.

C: 哈哈，多谢关心，不过辞职还是算了。
E: Haha, thank you for your concern, but I'm not planning on leaving.

C: 门口的导览牌要修缮，游戏机里的代币要更换，动漫人物的扮演者们也需要慰问一下……
E: The signboard at the entrance needs fixing, the tokens in the arcade machines need changing, and there are cartoon character actors who need attending to...

C: …和我吗？如果你想的话，当然没什么问题。
E: ...With me? If that's what you want, be my guest.

C: 无论如何，我和那个男人的孽缘…也该有个了结了。
E: Anyway, it's probably time for the karma between me and that guy... to come to an end.

C: 一个博识学会的学者，竟然想要垄断知识——这种事情传出去，只会是天大的笑话！
E: As a scholar of the Intelligentsia Guild, he actually thought of monopolizing knowledge. What a massive joke that would be if others heard about it!

C: 哎呦，怎么竟然还有人相信「在匹诺康尼工作满<unbreak>70</unbreak>年，才能拿到永久居留权」这种事情啊，怪好笑的……
E: Ah, how are there people who still believe that "you have to work in Penacony for <unbreak>70</unbreak> years to receive the right to permanent residency" nonsense... It's ridiculous...

C: 放在宇宙里挑都挑不出来。
E: You couldn't pick me out of the universe.

C: 哎呦，我就说吧，您果然是个人物。看在咱这交情上，您以后可别忘了多多照顾我的生意啊！
E: Oh my, I knew it! You are a big shot! As we're friends now, don't forget to come and help me out with business, okay?

C: 汪！这是客人点的单，不可以偷吃哇！
E: Woof! A customer ordered this, you can't steal it!

C: 至于你…这家酒吧的事，我都打听过了，你像是个会平等对待动物的人，但就算如此，我还是没法相信你。
E: As for you... I've heard about this lounge. Even if you seem like someone who treats animals the same as humans, I'm not trusting you completely.

C: 有时我能听到一些声响，虽然不知道是哪儿发出的，但我想，那一定就是演奏的余音……
E: Sometimes, I can hear some sounds. I don't know where they are coming from, but I imagine that they must be the reverberations of the performance...

C: 真是位可敬的对手——托你的福，亲爱的，我度过了非常有意义的一天。
E: You are truly a worthy opponent. My day has been meaningfully spent thanks to you, darling.

C: （听他讲完）
E: (Let him finish)

C: …自言自语？不不不，我只是在…和家人们排练。
E: ...Talking to myself? No no no, I was just... rehearsing with my family members.

C: 要登上「谐乐大典」舞台的只可能是我——我已经梦见神主不止一次了，祂说我迟早会成为调弦师，成为众望所归……
E: The only one who can mount the stage at the Charmony Festival is me — the Great One has visited me in my dreams more than once to tell me that sooner or later I am going to be a Chordmaster beloved by the masses...

C: 我对你没有兴趣。
E: I'm not interested in you.

C: 嗨，这个啊——其实就是个由逐梦客自发组织创办的期刊，用于进行信息的分享与交换。
E: Ah, that — actually it's a self-published magazine from the Dreamchasers who use it to promote and share info.

C: 安装这个哨子模组是我这辈子做过的最正确的决定。
E: Installing this whistle module was the best decision I'd ever made.

C: 要聊聊吗？
E: Do you want to chat?

C: 科琳突然一言不发，神情落寞。看起来就像是一位…智慧的贤者。
E: Colleen suddenly falls silent as her expression becomes gloomy. Suddenly, she looks like... a wise sage.

C: 可惜，现在大家都用合成机生产粮食，谁又能理解一分耕耘一分收获的快乐呢……
E: Unfortunately, everyone uses synthesizers to produce food nowadays... No one understands the joy of "reaping what you sow" anymore...

C: 别误会，我可是公司员工，怎么会认为城市不好呢？可如果连旅游都只能看见千篇一律的景观，未免太无聊了些。
E: Don't get me wrong. I am an IPC member, so how could I believe that urbanization is a bad thing? However, if even my travel destinations offer nothing but the same scenery, I'm going to find it dull.

C: 真的吗？看来你的灵敏度堪比精密的科学仪器。
E: Is that true? It looks like your sensitivity is comparable to a precision scientific instrument.

C: 当初无意间观测到流梦礁异常的忆质运动，还在寻找毕业课题的我就被此吸引，长期地驻扎在此地。
E: Initially, I was in search of a topic for my graduation project when I chanced upon the unusual movement of memoria in the Dreamflux Reef. I was deeply attracted to it and stayed here for a long time.

C: 不知道怎么回事，前不久我好像在梦里睡了过去。
E: I don't know what happened, but I fell asleep in my dream a while ago.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 那些追求自由的囚犯，不畏险阻的逐梦客，甚至他们自己手下默默牺牲的成员，都成为如今五大家系的注脚——
E: The freedom-seeking prisoners, the odd-defying Dreamchasers, and even the members of their crew who were quietly sacrificed have now become the footnotes of the five major lineages...

C: 我可是把老提琴了——在我诞生之初，匹诺康尼还是座监狱呢。
E: I'm actually an old double bass — back when I was born, Penacony was still a prison.

C: 我很享受现在的生活……
E: I love my life at the moment...

C: 没问题，面包和故事，我这里都有。
E: No problem. Bread and stories — we've got the works.

C: 嗯…见过那种藏在气球里的小鸟吗？<color=#dbc291ff>商业街那条死路的拐角</color>里还有一只，去那找找吧。
E: Hmm... Have you ever seen a bird that hides in balloons? There's one right by the <color=#dbc291ff>corner of the dead-end alley of the business street</color>. Go there and take a look.

C: 你这也算顶端？
E: You call yourself top gun?

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，有个害羞的小家伙，最近在偷偷练习唱歌，<color=#dbc291ff>大厅的那些音响</color>，应该很适合它啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: There's a shy fella that's been learning to sing in secret. The <color=#dbc291ff>lobby with audio equipment</color> should be perfect for it to practice, tweet.

C: 哦~那不是坏掉，那是他们找到了自我，不再是奴隶的表现~
E: Ohh, not broken. They've found their own selves, and aren't slaves anymore!

C: 我和很多无名客有过接触，甚至和他们成为了朋友…但不，我不是他们中的一员。
E: I've encountered many Nameless, even becoming friends with them... But no, I'm not one of them.

C: 有关他们的记忆已经有些模糊了——在那场反抗压迫的战争中，无数和我一样的孩子失去了亲人、朋友。
E: My memories of them are hazy. In that war against our oppressors, many children like me lost our kin and friends.

C: 唉，「钟表匠」先生创作它本是想铭记他的故事，如今却反倒将他的存在掩盖了。
E: *sigh* Mr. Watchmaker initially wanted to make the cartoon to preserve his story, but the cartoon ironically buried his actual existence.

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 有些人称呼我为「虚无的摄影师」，但我自认并未走上「虚无」的命途——至少并非在通常意义上。
E: Some call me the Nihility's Photographer, but I do not see myself as having walked down the Path of Nihility... At least, not in the usual sense.

C: 独一无二，充满惊喜——这正是匹诺康尼应该为客人献上的体验。
E: Unique and full of surprises... This is the experience that Penacony should offer its esteemed guests.

C: 嗯…哪怕不去问，大多数客人也都觉得我疯疯癫癫的吧？
E: Hmm, even if you don't ask, I know most guests think I'm an oddball.

C: 他自称坐拥巨量财富，希望我能为他制订详尽的方案，以免随着时间推移而遭到贬损。
E: He claimed to have considerable wealth and wanted my help with a comprehensive plan to protect its future value.

C: 但当我耗费了许多时间和精力后，终于发现他所谓的「财富」……那不过就是小小一箱贝壳而已。
E: I spent a lot of time and effort on the proposal, only to find out his so-called "wealth" was a small box of shells.

C: 没问题，这家可是我的必吃榜第一位！
E: Absolutely! This restaurant tops my list of must-visit eating places!

C: 她深吸一口气，如释重负，耸着的双肩终于垮了下去。然而没过多久，她像是又想起什么似的，条件反射般绷直了背。她开口了，掐着嗓子，气息明显有些颤抖。
E: She lets out a deep sigh, her shoulders finally relaxing. But almost immediately, as if recalling something, she reflectively tenses up again to speak, her voice strained and her breathing evidently uneven.

C: 你知道吗？我觉得我不能坐以待毙…我是说，我不能眼睁睁看着这份豪华旅行套餐把自己…呃，榨干。
E: You know what? I shouldn't be sitting here and doing nothing... I mean, I can't be whiling away the time when this luxurious vacation combo is already... ugh, bleeding me dry.

C: 至于事业…哈，我又不是知更鸟小姐，我可没她那样的好嗓子。说什么唱歌，其实只是我老公找个借口开个音乐公司避税，顺便做点…见不得人的事罢了。
E: As for my career... *sigh* It's a pity I don't have Miss Robin's singing talent. Honestly, the music studio is just a front for my husband's tax evasion and... dealings that have to kept underground.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 呃，公司计划有变，我收到命令就赶过来处理。其实托帕总监是建议我继续放婚假来着，不过我觉得去哪儿度假都是去，还不如来匹诺康尼呢。
E: Uh, the IPC had a change of plans, so I came on immediate notice to work on them. Director Topaz actually said to go ahead with my marriage leave, but I figured a vacation anywhere's still a vacation, so why not Penacony?

C: 来，这是人家给客官准备的礼物，都送给你啾~
E: Here, this is a gift I've prepared for you. It's all yours, tweet!

C: …好像也没跟我打过招呼。
E: ...I don't think anyone checked in with me about this.

C: 你见达夫突然放下手中的搅拌杆，长长地叹了口气，眉间似乎有些阴郁。
E: Dahf abruptly releases his grip over the stirrer and you see him let out a long sigh, his expression turning somewhat gloomy.

C: 第三种是命名为「飞翔时针号」，尾翼配以钟表小子模样的涂装。
E: The third is The Soaring Clock Hand. It features an insignia designed after Clockie on the tail of the airship.

C: 您说吧！老佩德罗听着呢！
E: Go on, I'm all ears!

C: 何止是普通学生，我可是荣誉留级生，差不多留了半个琥珀纪吧。
E: I'm not just any normal student. I'm an honorary repeat student. I've repeated school for almost half an Amber Era.

C: 「这不是哈鲁吗？正巧，我手上有两张客户送的机动球观赛门票，虽说有些廉价，但在你这里应该能发挥出价值吧。」
E: "Oh? It's Haru! What great timing, I happen to have two tickets to the Roboball match. I know this may sound cheap because a client gave them to me, but I'm sure it'll be of some value to you?"

C: 我当然清楚，自己在其他人眼里是什么评价。
E: Sure, I know how others think of me.

C: 全是纸上谈兵！在你实习的第一天，这些知识就会统统都被推翻！
E: Theories that won't work in the real world! Everything you learned in class will be proven wrong on your very first day as an intern!

C: 这篇报道，你读起来什么感觉？
E: What do you feel when you read this article?

C: 可以再接个飞踢！
E: Then give him a flying kick!

C: 还故意在我眼前晃，把产权证摆给我看！说什么「喂，我知道你需要它」…要换成你，想不想揍他？
E: He deliberately rubbed it in my face and showed off his proof of purchase. He kept saying: "Hey, I know you need these." If it were you, would you not want to hit him?

C: 不得不说，上次的报告会可真是太精彩了，我还是头一次看到三个学院的教授吵成那样——
E: I have to say, the last reporting session was truly wonderful. It was the first time I have ever seen professors from across the three academies argue so ferociously...

C: 会啊。我们是并肩作战的同伴，彼此间的信任早就坚不可摧了，这种深厚的友谊，可不是派对上认识的那些损友能比的！
E: Of course. We are comrades that stood by each other through thick and thin. Our trust in each other is unshakable. This deep-rooted friendship can't be compared to those fair-weather friends you meet at parties!

C: 这个键盘…
E: This keyboard...

C: 开玩笑的…经理很会照顾成员，也敢为乐队的演出和学院正面交涉，要是您愿意帮忙，我肯定会轻松很多的。
E: I'm kidding... You've taken great care of us, and were willing to confront the school about the band's performance. If you agreed to help out, it'd definitely be much easier for me.

C: 是啊，沉浸在回忆里没什么意思，也祝经理玩得开心！
E: Yes, it's no fun being submerged in memories. I also wish you a good time!

C: 难道是因为我平时对待他们过分严格？但我这样做，都是希望他们能将心思放在学业上。督促学员认真学习，这不是教师的职责么？
E: Is it because I'm usually too strict with them? But I do this in the hopes that they will concentrate on their studies. To guide a student's diligent study, is that not a teacher's duty?

C: 是吗？但我阐述的都是事实，数据清晰，逻辑完整。更何况，那位代表的所作所为你都见到了，完全不符合教师的规范。
E: Do you? But I expound the truth — the numbers are clear, and the logic sound. You have also seen that representative's actions, which have made a farce of teaching standards.

C: 哎呀，这不是{NICKNAME}吗？还记得我吗？我是之前的「芭蕉花酱」！
E: Oh my, isn't this {NICKNAME}? Do you remember me? I'm Nanabloom-chan!

C: 哼，小黑子，又被我逮到了！
E: Hmph, another hater caught red-handed!

C: 被认可的感觉真的很开心，每当我看到优秀的艺术作品——尤其是芮克先生那些扣人心弦的电影，就实打实地羡慕银幕中的那些主角，而如今我离他们越来越近了。
E: This feeling of being acknowledged makes me all warm and fuzzy. When I see an excellent piece of art, especially something like Mr. Reca's gripping movies, I can't help but earnestly envy those protagonists on the silver screen. And now I'm getting closer to being like them.

C: 什么东西？同学录？
E: What's this? A student record book?

C: 眼神一直躲躲闪闪的恰丽卡突然对你瞪大了眼睛，投来了困惑的目光，似乎无法相信你会问出这样的问题。
E: Chaletka, whose eyes have been averting yours, suddenly stares at you with widened pupils, projecting a gaze fraught with perplexity, as if in disbelief at the fact that you would even ask such a question.

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 恰丽卡握紧了拳头，憋红了脸——就像血色刺蕉那么红，看来这是她表达生气的方式。
E: Chaletka balls up her fists, her face flushing red — red like a bloodthorn banana. This is probably how she expresses her anger.

C: 唉，大家的生活都被学业塞满了，完全没时间做自己喜欢的事情…这还说什么「理想自由」，大家明明都被课程表和学分的镣铐锁住了。
E: *sigh* Everyone's lives are overflowing with coursework. No one has time to do their favorite things... All this nonsense about "ideals of freedom." Everyone's obviously been chained by the shackles of lesson plans and grades.

C: 看来，我还是更适合做「调饮机器人」一些。
E: It appears that I am more suited to be a drinksmith robot.

C: 我的过往不值一提。不过，是什么引起了你的好奇？
E: My past isn't worth mentioning. But may I ask what piqued your curiosity?

C: 朝左看。
E: Look to the left.

C: 你取下墙上的喇叭，隐藏的保险柜旋即展现于眼前。你失望地发现里面空空荡荡，看来是上一任船长撤离时做了充足的准备。
E: You take down the horn from the wall, and the hidden safe box appears before your eyes. You disappointingly discover that it's empty inside — looks like the previous captain made the utmost preparations before leaving.

C: 「隐夜鸫将修复一切。」雕像底座刻着这样一行字。
E: "The Nightingale will fix everything." That is what is written at the base of the statue.

C: 飞碟堡，匹诺康尼颇负盛名的美食之一。在你成为船长后，它会每年向你缴纳广告费吗？你很好奇……
E: The Floatdisc Burger, is one of the more popular dishes in Penaconian cuisine. After you become captain, will it pay you annual advertising dues? Most curious...

C: 差的有点大……
E: It's too different from the photo...

C: 我坚信，我们的筑梦艺术是当代社交和亲密关系的一种体现；这是一种无关乎外部世界他者的、完全纯粹的精神活动，并不以现实——我是说梦境——的客观变化为转移……
E: I firmly believe that our art of dream-building is an expression of contemporary socialization and intimacy. It is purely a mental activity that has nothing to do with others in the external world, and is not subject to objective changes in reality — I mean, the dreamscape...

C: 想不出来……
E: My mind is empty...

C: 真不想离开梦境啊…
E: I really don't want to leave the Dreamscape...

C: 先喝点苏乐达吧。
E: Let's have some SoulGlad first.

C: 好诶！
E: Wonderful!

C: 有什么好点子吗？
E: Any great ideas?

C: 噗嗤…
E: Pfft...

C: 呕——咳咳、咳咳咳！
E: Gahhh... *cough*... *cough*...

C: 我怎么可能会骗你呢？
E: How could I ever lie to you?

C: 以相同语素为基础进行概念偷换…是个新思路，但是在不熟悉该语言的前提下，容易造成认知混乱……
E: Conceptual replacement based on the same morphemes... It's a new idea, but prone to cognitive dissonance when familiarity with that language is low...

C: 您有什么需要吗？
E: How can I help you?

C: 是不是里面出事了啊。
E: Is there something going on inside?

C: 真的吗？太令人难以置信了！
E: Really? That's wild!

C: 这就叫天选之人。
E: The Chosen One hath arisen.

C: 这算是带薪休假吗？
E: Would this count as a paid holiday?

C: 你好好想想，自己看到了什么？
E: Think carefully, what did you see?

C: 盛会巨星可不是长得好看而已。
E: Being a festival superstar isn't just all about looks.

C: 也不知道是谁拿的是恋人的台词，硬是念出了一股苜蓿草开会的味道——事情弄成现在这样，显然不是我的问题。
E: I don't know who it was who got the lover's lines and performed it like some Alfalfa Family meeting. It's obviously not my fault that all this has happened.

C: 嗯嗯，当时我正在这儿看风景，顺手就拉了你一把。
E: Yes, I was here admiring the scenery then, and helped you up.

C: 你们先去，我回下房间，一会儿我就把合同送过来。
E: You all head out first. I'm going back to my room, and I'll see you there with the contract.

C: 稍等。
E: Just one moment.

C: 跟着公司吃肉，安逸啊。
E: It's safe and steady work to follow the IPC's footsteps.

C: 今天运气真背…
E: So unlucky today...

C: 我手头也没余粮了…
E: I don't have extra on me...

C: 在观影梦泡一再加价后，线下观影的人数不断增多，而入场时自行领取的电影海报数量也显著减少。
E: After the repeated price hike of the movie dream bubbles, the number of physical movie-goers has continued to increase, and the number of movie posters available for self-pickup upon entry has significantly decreased.

C: 趁没人发现，赶快开溜吧。
E: Sneak away while the coast is clear.

C: …看来即便是最富有智慧的头脑，也会在诸如「今天想吃什么」这样的问题上产生疑惑。
E: ...It appears that even the most intelligent mind also contemplates on questions like "What to eat today."

C: 这下听懂了。
E: Now I understand.

C: 别！那是我刚拿的麦芽果汁！
E: No! That's the malt juice I just got!

C: 据说穷观阵能推衍出时间长流中发生的一切。
E: It is said that the Matrix of Prescience can predict everything that occurs in the flow of time.

C: 可谁也没想到，我的真实身份竟是塞纳托斯秘传的嫡嫡嫡嫡嫡…嫡长女，注定为世间降下死亡与沉沦。我的哥哥奉瑟希斯之命饮下黄金血，亲手将我斩杀以免祸乱。
E: Little did they suspect that I was the great-great-great-great... granddaughter of Thanatos' clandestine lineage, fated to sow death and disorder in the realm of mortals. Following Cerces' will, my brother imbibed the golden blood and executed me personally to prevent further calamity.

C: 瑟希斯的信徒这么保守吗？
E: Are followers of Cerces so conservative?

C: 我想买书。
E: I'd like to buy some books.

C: 你…你的礼貌哪去了？！原本多乖巧的孩子啊，肯定是那个傻大个给你带坏了…我就知道那些山之民一个个都上不了台面……
E: Wh—Where are your manners!? You used to be so kind... but now? Must be the influence of that uncouth Mountain Dweller... I always knew those folks couldn't handle civilized society...

C: 我猜您想说「美丽的女士，我知道您擅长缝补，麻烦您把这些乱七八糟的文字缝起来吧！」——而我已经做到了。
E: I think you meant to say: "My lady, I know you're great at stitching, could you please fix these scrambled words?" — and I've done just that.

C: …喝了「法吉娜盲盒」的小奇美拉？怪不得满嘴胡话。
E: ...A little chimera who drank some "Phagousa Blind Box"? No wonder you're babbling nonsense.

C: 你们是谁啊？
E: Who are you lot?

C: 上次我听说有不少人已经看腻了浴场里的装潢，就想着能不能从马赛克拼贴入手，帮助大家提供一些新的灵感。
E: I heard someone griping about how boring the bath's decor looks, and it got me thinking about coming up with some new mosaic designs to bring in some fresh aspirations.

C: 不过你大可放心！只要来了{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}刻法勒的圣城{RUBY_E#}，有困难找元老院和黄金裔就好。你唯一的烦恼，只可能是无事可做，耐不住寂寞…哈哈。
E: But everything's safe in {RUBY_B#Okhema}Kephale's holy city{RUBY_E#}! If you ever run into trouble, just head to the Council of Elders or find the Chrysos Heirs. Your only trouble might be a bit of boredom... haha.

C: 神谕？什么神谕？我是来拉票的。
E: Prophecy? What prophecy? I'm just here to drum up support.

C: 要是再在一个和平繁荣的年代，缇宁说不定真的能做一个满肚子学问的好学者、好老师呢！
E: If we lived in a time of peace and prosperity, maybe Trinnon could have been a knowledgeable scholar or teacher!

C: 哼哼哼~缇安今天心情也很好！准备去把奥赫玛再飞个遍！
E: Hum-hum-hum! Trianne is in a great mood today as well! Time for a flight over all Okhema again!

C: 遐蝶，来聊会儿天吧。
E: Castorice, let's chat.

C: 喏，就隔壁那个疯子，我喊他「撒谎精」——天天讲他打仗的事。今天说自己杀了十个怪物，明天又说自己躲在树后面看别人打仗，前后矛盾，嘴里就没一句实话。
E: Ugh, he's the madman that lives next door. I call him the "braggart"... He is constantly telling stories of battles he's been in, how he killed ten monsters by himself, or how he hid behind a tree and watched others fight them. His stories are self-contradiction itself. You can never trust a single word he says.

C: 活着的人都有自己的苦衷，但我就是不喜欢他这样编排逝者们的往事，这是否有点过于不尊重他们了？所以呀，我对马尔库斯没什么好脸色。
E: Life is tough for everybody already. I just don't like how he fabricates the stories of those that passed away. It is sheer disrespect. That's why I have no good words to say about that Marcus.

C: 原来如此...抱歉，我有时分不清现实和幻象。你是新来奥赫玛的吧？我是马尔库斯，曾经的边境守卫。
E: I see... My apologies. I sometimes struggle to tell the difference between reality and fantasy. You're new to Okhema, right? I am Marcus, and I used to be a border guard.

C: 在我看来，真正的「永恒」存在于我们的文化之中……
E: The way I see it, true "eternity" exists in our culture...

C: 噢好的，我接下来还有几场演讲，恕我不能远送了。
E: Alright, I have a few speeches to give shortly. I shall have to leave you here, my apologies.

C: 年轻人想收藏什么样的艺术品啊？给老头子说说，我给你点建议！
E: What kind of collectable items are kids into nowadays? Tell me, and I'll give you a few suggestions!

C: 那得看你到底想不想占卜了。
E: Well, that depends on whether you want a divination or not.

C: 哈欠…巧了吗不是？饱饱地睡一觉，醒来就能看到这么有趣的陌生人。
E: *yawn* ...What a coincidence! After a long, fulfilling nap, I wake up to see a fascinating stranger like yourself.

C: 当时我率领小队出城执行剿灭任务，阴差阳错地进入了被黑潮掌控的区域——黑潮的污染极其可怕，只要踏入其中就会被影响。
E: The squad I led was dispatched from the city on an extermination mission when we unexpectedly entered an area under the control of the black tide... The black tide's contamination was terrifying... Just one step inside and it would take control.

C: 抱歉，不能分心，锻造过程。
E: Sorry, distracted I cannot be, while the smithing goes on.

C: 在翁法罗斯怎么挑选好武器？
E: How do I choose a good weapon in Amphoreus?

C: 若你愿意将你的迷醉之感转告我，我会非常感激的。为表示诚意，第一杯秘酿的费用由我承担。请享受这份祝福吧！
E: If you're willing to relay your inebriated journey to me, I would truly appreciate it. As a token of gratitude, this first cup of ambrosia is on the house. Please enjoy!

C: 帕姆玩偶填充物质量果真不错，耳旁的声音变得渺远……
E: The quality of this Pom-Pom doll stuffing is pretty good — the sounds you're hearing start to fade away...

C: 要是觉得累了，就去浴场泡泡澡吧。
E: If you feel lethargic, you should visit the baths.

C: 结束吧。
E: Let's finish up.

C: 数学是最为简洁优美的学科，数学的公理无论何时都不会改变。即便有哪天，现实中找不到任何圆形的东西，「圆」也仍旧存在。
E: Mathematics is the most simple and beautiful of studies. Its innate truths will never change. Even if there comes a day when there is no such thing as a circular object in existence, the concept of a "circle" will still exist.

C: 总而言之，我热爱这份工作。暂时是不会想着跳槽的，嘿嘿。
E: Anyway, I love what I do. I'm not looking to switch things up anytime soon.

C: 据说过去扎格列斯偷走了尼卡多利的武器，让一场战争大败而归，为了牢记这份耻辱，悬锋人会相约进行训练，一人把对方的物品偷走，然后对方要把被藏匿的物品找回来。
E: It's said that long ago, Zagreus stole Nikador's weapon, leading to a crushing defeat in a war. To remember this humiliation, the Kremnoans started a training routine: One person steals something from the other, and the other has to find the hidden item and get it back.

C: 大家不是都说，泡浴有助于放松思想，充足的糖分能帮助大脑高速运转。所以，如你所见，我正在浴池的餐桌旁思考。不觉得是个很高效的做法吗？
E: Everyone says that soaking helps relax the mind, and plenty of sugar helps the brain work at high speed. So, as you can see, I'm thinking while sitting at the bath's dining table. Don't you think it's an efficient way to do things?

C: 感觉都不太感兴趣…
E: I'm not interested in any of those...

C: 多干点活，少想点事。
E: Get more done and think less.

C: 你为什么在打嗝？
E: Why are you hiccupping?

C: 大地兽是重要的劳力，不能随意宰杀，因此我把目光投向了云羊和角猪——士兵们都说前者的味道更好，让我多用它做，但角猪的出肉量更高。
E: Dromases are an essential labor force, and we can't slaughter them needlessly. So I've got my sights on cloudsheep and hornswine — the troops say the former tastes better, and want me to use it more, but hornswines yield more meat.

C: 前面几种人要么被狂热冲昏头脑，要么有丰富的作战经验，要么在恐惧和自责之间纠结；而我用影子作为武器打击敌人，一战下来不造半点杀孽……
E: The first few kinds are either fanatically insane, or brimming with battle experience, or struggling between terror and self-reproach. Me? I use shadows as my weapon to strike at the enemy, leaving nary a drop of blood when I fight...

C: 出乎意料的结果…你原本还想和这匹木马理论一番，但小奇美拉已经黏上了你，还是先把它安置在你的私人浴场里吧。
E: An unexpected outcome... You were going to argue against the wooden horse, but this little chimera is already glued onto you — so let's stash it in our private bath for the time being.

C: 那太好了。但老夫毕竟不是祭司，也就能和你讲讲自己道听途说的一些东西。
E: Perfect. Although, I am no priest, all I can tell you is things I have learned along my travels.

C: 哈哈哈，年轻人确实还是忙一点好！
E: Hahaha, it is best for youngsters like yourself to keep busy!

C: 信我，他绝对在忽悠你！
E: Believe me, he was deceiving you!

C: 大胆，怎敢对我口出狂言！
E: How dare you make such outrageous accusations!

C: 不过，既是异邦贵族，可有能验明身份的证物？例如…贵邦的珍稀特产？
E: However, if you are an outlander aristocrat, do you have something that serves to prove your identity? For instance... some rare souvenir from your foreign land?

C: 她那时候还小，在那个冰冷的雪天，家里连一粒面包屑都没有，她在神殿外面徘徊了很久，在墙根下发现一个很小的洞，最后实在饿得受不了了，就钻了进去……
E: She was very young. It was a bitterly cold, snowy day, and she didn't even have a single crumb to eat at home. She lingered outside the temple for a long time before discovering a tiny hole at the base of the wall. Overwhelmed by hunger, she crawled through...

C: 要我说，这里面最有趣的或许还是侍奉泰坦们的那些祭司吧…还有圣女大人，不知道在他们眼里，我们这样的普通信徒是什么样。
E: I find the priests who serve the Titans and the Holy Maiden the most intriguing of all... It makes me curious how they view us mere regular followers.

C: 我以前给浴场当过保安，给商队当过护卫，不过现在只能做一些从边远地区为大家寻找失物的委托。
E: I used to work security at the baths and served as a guard for caravans, but now my gigs are mostly about retrieving lost items from remote areas for everyone.

C: 别偷了，踏实做人吧。
E: Quit taking what isn't yours and live an honest life.

C: 这样啊，好吧…我只是个卫兵，从未被允许踏入内殿，所以很好奇……
E: I see, well... I'm just a guard, never allowed inside the inner sanctum, so I'm curious...

C: 没了你我们可怎么办，呜呜呜。
E: *sob* ...What are we going to do without you?

C: 关于你的母亲……
E: About your mother...

C: 但凭借这一抹心跳，和怀抱的温热，冥界仿佛也变作温柔的归处。
E: Yet with this heartbeat, and the warmth of that embrace, the nether realm somehow seems to be a gentle sanctuary.

C: 用葫芦。
E: With gourds.

C: 下次再聊吧！
E: Let's catch up another time!

C: 哈哈，有名归有名。可不全是好名声呀。
E: Hah, you certainly have. Though not all of it is good.

C: 元老院的前辈们说「我们站在光历的转折点上」，或许真的如此。再见，希望我们都能顺利越过转折点。
E: The senior senators love saying, "We stand at the turning point of the Light Calendar." Maybe they're right. Goodbye. Hope we both make it through this turning point.

C: 人们常说，深刻理解角色的人生、拥有和角色同样充沛的感情是「演员的自我修养」…对剧本创作者来说，当然更必须如此。
E: People often say that deeply understanding a character's life and emotions is an actor's preparation. For a playwright, this is even more essential.

C: 不用解释，我知道你也是我的崇拜者。唉，每个人都解释一遍，我已经倦了……
E: I know you're one of my admirers. Ugh, having to explain this over and over is so tiresome...

C: 哦，好，我经常在附近闲逛，要是想见我了可以随时过来。
E: Oh, alright. I usually hang out nearby. Feel free to come over any time you want to see me.

C: 言简意赅。
E: Short and to the point.

C: 我还记得一些逝者的*临终遗言*，如果你也感到好奇的话……
E: I still recall the last words of some of the deceased, if you're curious...

C: 把他钓上钩，放置于此地。
E: They caught him with a hook and placed him here.

C: 再多给点！
E: More, please!

C: 我有些事想请教你。
E: There's something I'd like to ask you.

C: 嗯…有位织者心性单纯。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>围栏的挂饰上</color>，用铃声复诵愿望呢。
E: Hmm... A weaver is pure-hearted. The golden thread brings news that it is reciting wishes with the chimes on <color=#dbc291ff>the fence ornaments</color>.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.

C: 回想起阿那克萨戈拉斯的那番言论，恐怕不会如此简单。
E: Recalling Anaxagoras's words, I'm afraid it won't be that simple.

C: 哪怕死亡已将叹息刻进人们的额骨，我们也仍能循着命运的声息继续迈步。
E: Even if death has etched its sighs into our skulls, we can still follow fate's whispers and move forward.

C: 在此之前，请您倾听这最后的乐曲。
E: Before that time comes, please listen to this final melody.

C: 感谢您的关心，好心的听众。
E: Thank you for your concern, kind listener.

C: 远离危房，避免受伤！
E: Stay away from unstable buildings to avoid injury!

C: 浴场的状况如何？
E: What's the condition of the bathhouse?

C: …没什么，只是一些对牺牲者的感想。哦，恩维尔去救他那些信{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的伙伴了，所以这里只有我。那小子命大，这点变故还死不了。
E: ...Nothing important, just reflecting on the fallen. Avilius left to rescue his buddies — those {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} worshipers, so I'm the only one here. That boy's as tough as they come, this chaos won't be his end.

C: 你不是刻法勒的祭司吗？
E: You're a priest of Kephale, aren't you?

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 即使我也不得不承认，你确实是位尽职的英雄。愿你行于坦途之上。
E: Even I must admit, you are indeed a dutiful hero. May your path be smooth.

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 哈哈哈，有的有的，你想吃多少就吃多少。
E: Hahaha, you bet! You can eat as much as you want.

C: 关于这次出行…
E: About the upcoming trip...

C: 哈哈，好，等日子定了就告诉我，我去渡口给你们送行。
E: Haha, alright. Once you've picked a day, let me know. I'll walk you to the ferry myself.

C: 在这放只奇美拉也行。
E: Could always toss a chimera in here too.

C: 要是有能自动播种的魔法就好了嘤。

C: 琴音的冷寂，已经掠过泰坦的脖颈……
E: The chill of the lyre's notes has already brushed past the Titan's neck...

C: 一定是因为你的祝福…我才能在这方泡影中，得到幸福的回音……
E: It must be because of your blessing that I am able to receive the echoes of happiness in this fantasia...

C: 直到凯撒举起逐火的旗帜，我才看到那树冠之外的天穹，已经晦暗无边，为灾难所覆。

C: …我刚数到几了来着？
E: ...Wait, what number was I on again?

C: 要等它复位喀。
E: We need to wait for it to reset, crrk.

E: The Garmentmaker remains silent, or perhaps its voice has already been lost to the sea.

E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is very shy. The golden thread brings tidings: They are curled up <color=#dbc291ff>before a gravestone at the Somber Altar of Candles</color>, paying tribute to fallen heroes.
...Huh?

C: 唉呀，真是心疼啊…多好的东西，这就扔了。

C: 确实……
E: True...

C: 大家怎么就不明白呢？
E: Why doesn't anyone get it?

C: 嗷呜~嗷呜~嗷嗷呜~
E: Awoo! Awoo! Awoooo!

C: 咕咕…噢！有个很黏我的孩子，平日里与我寸步不离，搞不好就在我的附近，你应该不难发现它的身影咕。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who's very attached to me and never leaves my side. They might be nearby now, and you can't miss it, hoot.

E: To seek benefits, one must take risks. I am going to dig deep and find the rat.

C: 隔壁科室的混蛋是谁？
E: Who are the scoundrels from the department next door?

C: 哎，物是人非咯！
E: *sigh* How things have changed!

C: 没什么别的想问了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: …等等，你就这么自然而然地跟我搭上话了？
E: ...Wait, did you just casually strike up a conversation with me like that?

C: 暂时就聊到这里吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: 但我有些担心…
E: But I'm a little worried...

C: 嗯…有位织者心情激动。金丝带来消息，它正躲在<color=#dbc291ff>墙角的黑暗中</color>，回味美妙的体验呢。
E: Hmm... There's a weaver who is overwhelmed with emotion. The golden thread brings tidings: It's hiding in the <color=#dbc291ff>dark corner of the wall</color>, savoring a wondrous experience.

C: 嗯…有位织者挣扎求生。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>台阶旁的池水中</color>高声呼救呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's struggling to survive. The golden thread brings tidings: They are crying for help <color=#dbc291ff>in the pool by the stairs</color>.

C: 其中一只若虫的方位已然显明。风儿早在那边候你多时了，可别辜负了它的绵绵情意呀。
E: One of the nymph's locations has been revealed. The wind has been waiting there for you for quite some time. Don't let its tender affection go to waste.

C: o((◔ω◔)o「大家都变成海豹…」)∋
E: o((◔ω◔)o "Everyone's turning into seals..." )∋

C: 诶呀，少不了你的，等希瑞雅手上的针线活忙完了，咱们一起去！
E: Hey now, don't worry! Once Serena finishes up her needlework, we'll all go together!

C: 可是…靠谱吗？如果有客人预定了却不来怎么办？
E: But... is it reliable? What if customers make reservations but don't show up?

C: 要我说啊，你家姑娘从小就是闲不住的性子，曳石学派说不定还真挺适合她们的。
E: If you ask me, your girls have always been the type who can't sit still. Helkolithism might actually be a pretty good fit for them.

C: 哪儿那么简单！你们又不是不知道，就她俩那闯祸的能力，当初在树庭求学的时候可没少挨通报……
E: If only it were that simple! You know those two all too well. With their talent for causing trouble, they got called out plenty of times back at the Grove during their studies...

C: 您用盾把绞住先王的矛尖，然后挺出长矛，直刺先王的喉咙——
E: You deflected the late king's spear tip with your shield, then thrust your own spear straight at his throat—

C: 恭喜你。
E: Congratulations.

C: 呜嗡！（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！这里有好多熟人啊， 大家是打算烧烤吗？那我负责吃！…不对，我吃的主要是土来着。）
E: Grumph! ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}! There are so many familiar faces here! Are we having a barbecue? Great! I'll be in charge of eating! ...Wait, didn't I mostly eat soil?)

C: 这个选项都是会送礼物的…
E: All these options come with gifts...

C: 「但我并非『救世主』，而是——」
E: "But I am not the Deliverer—"

C: 其实，我的脑海中有一副画面：与残破的城墙相比，悬锋的图书馆却保存得异常完好，我想捡起一本卷轴仔细看一看，眼睛却被烧得模糊，怎么也看不清上面的文字……
E: Actually, there's a scene in my mind: Compared to the crumbling city walls, the library of Kremnos was strangely well-preserved. I wanted to pick up a scroll to examine it closely, but my eyes were so scorched that I couldn't make out any of the text, no matter how hard I tried...

C: 对逐火的大前辈还是要客气一点啦！
E: You have to be respectful to a senior of the Flame-Chase!

C: 「摇光爵」，竟然会采用这样的方式突破对方的心理距离，但又不令人反感，如此说来，倒是她独特的天赋……
E: The way Dux Lucens closes the emotional distance without causing offense... It is, in its own way, a unique talent of hers...

C: 火箭？不行不行…那实在是太危险了。
E: Rockets? Absolutely not... that's way too dangerous.

C: 要编织挂毯，{F#她}{M#他}的故事岂非最好的蓝本？
E: To weave a tapestry, wouldn't {F#her}{M#his} story make the perfect blueprint?

C: 呵，这又是哪里的箴言？罢了……
E: Huh, where's that proverb from? Never mind...

C: 突然这么正经吗？那我也不得不郑重地掏出这样东西了。
E: Why are you getting all serious all of a sudden? Ah well, you left me no choice but to solemnly pull out this thing.

C: 你所在之处，便是温柔的花海。
E: Wherever you reside is a gentle sea of flowers.

C: 嗯…有位织者难逃困境。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>停止运转的扇叶边</color>，为不再运转的死路愤怒呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's stuck and in trouble. The golden thread brings tidings: They're at the <color=#dbc291ff>edge of stopped fan blades</color>, raging about the dead end that no longer turns.

C: 我会联络那里的织者帮忙。可能会出现很壮观的画面，记得做好心理准备。

C: 如你所愿，史诗的道标已然显现。
E: As you wished, the saga's benchmark has revealed itself.

C: 哎呀，一旦开始多愁善感，就没完没了啦。总之，它就送给你啦，要摆记得摆在显眼的位置！
E: Aw geez, once I start getting all sentimental, there's no stopping me! Anyway, it's yours now. Make sure you put it somewhere everyone can see!

C: 列车正沿着「开拓」曾经的旅线行驶。部分站点的名称因记忆体的损坏而丢失了，但首站和末站的名字都是「裴迦纳」——阿基维利的故乡。
E: The Express is traveling on a route that Trailblaze once embarked on. The names of some destinations have been lost, but the first and final stops were both at Pegana — Akivili's home world.

C: 不管是谁想要伤害丹恒，我们是不会答应的。丹恒是列车组的一员，敢招惹星穹列车的人，就要准备好承受我和姬子的怒火。
E: Don't worry, no matter who or what wants to hurt Dan Heng, we won't let them. Those who dare attack members of the Astral Express should be prepared to suffer the wrath of me and Himeko.

C: 我当时要对付的敌人，是某个被称为「天上之人」的异星种族。
E: The invaders I was dealing with was an alien race known as "the ones above."

E: Wait, you're not pretending to like it, are you... let me ask you, who are the three protagonists in the book?

C: 我是不会再看这种书了。
E: I won't read this kind of book again.

E: (It shouldn't be here. This can't block anything.)

E: (Seems like something's blocking the automaton's path... Make way for it.)

E: The danger isn't over. We must be ready for anything at all times!

E: Tick-tock, ah, I'm not a superstar, just a Sweet Dreams Troupe member working at the venue...

E: Tick-tock, I'm going to explode!!!

E: Ahh... I feel dizzy. So that's what it feels like when my dial is missing a piece... No wonder I even forgot about work matters.

C: …不行啦，人家是有本职工作的，怎么能旷班帮我干私活……

E: "But if you lose... Well, you won't lose anything, but you'll find it very difficult to find me later."

C: 虽然我对这名字有些意见，但我毕竟还承诺了冠名权在你…所以，就它吧。

C: 任务很简单：你只要带着这台记录仪器前往下层区，与<color=#dbc291ff>「自动机兵•甲虫」</color>战斗一次就好。
E: This is a simple job: Just take this recording device down to the Underworld and get into a fight with an <color=#dbc291ff>Automaton Beetle</color> — that's all.

E: Let's fight, then! Bring it on!

C: 哈哈，比起普通的文物和艺术品，这几座冰雕可引人注目多了。

C: 「大守护者可可利亚在遥远的下层区度过了童年，那时的她就已展现出对世间万物的好奇与热爱——初雪八落是她最钟爱的花朵，一如大守护者高洁的人格；」 / 「大守护者可可利亚早在求学时便展现出惊人的学识与能力——贝洛伯格坚信：如此聪慧的大脑定将拾起文明最后的薪柴，引领众人穿越晦暗无际的雪幕；」 / 「大守护者可可利亚以她的气度与铁腕，唤醒了贝洛伯格每一颗沉睡的灵魂——她为忠诚的铁卫吹响反攻的号角，无愧为七百年来唯一的先驱；」
E: "The Supreme Guardian Cocolia spent her childhood in the distant Underworld. As a child, she was already full of love and curiosity toward the world. Her favorite flower was First Snow, a bloom as spotless and pure as her character." / "The Supreme Guardian Cocolia already demonstrated astounding wisdom and capacity as a student. Belobog firmly believed that such a wise individual will uplift this last torch of civilization, and lead the masses through the endless and gloomy snow curtain to emerge from the other side." / "Supreme Guardian Cocolia, with her magnanimity and firmness, awakened every sleeping soul in Belobog. She sounded the horn of counterattack for the loyal Silvermane Guards, worthy of being the only pioneer in the last seven hundred years."

C: 同心火铃没什么反应。
E: There isn't any reaction from the Harmonic Chime.
