E: Are you serious? But in the past, she would never reveal such a melancholic expression. Sometimes, she becomes so distracted that she stares blankly at me without uttering a word...

C: 你需要人聊聊，我会听你一直聊下去……
E: If you need to talk, I will always be here to talk with you...

C: （照片里的东西应该要等等才能出现……）
E: (I need to wait for the object in the picture to appear...)

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我隔着老远就看到你啦，你要去金人巷吗？
E: You're easy to spot, haha! Are you going to Aurum Alley?

C: 嗯嗯，作为到处吃喝…咳，外出看诊的名医，我对仙舟各地有什么好吃好玩的地方真是了如指掌，雇了我可绝不会让你吃亏的！
E: Mm-hm, as a renowned doctor, I regularly go out for street food. A—After I'm done treating my patients, that is! Anyway, basically I'm an expert on all the culinary delights the Xianzhou has to offer, so... Ugh, hire me as your tour guide already!

C: 金人巷？什么金人巷？
E: Aurum Alley? What's that?

C: 当然不是，怎么可能嘛。
E: Didn't know? There's lots to see around here!

C: 如果在游玩途中遇到些肠胃不适、跌打损伤的小问题，也有我这样超专业的医士为您立刻诊治，这样的好事哪里能找到喔！
E: And if you get into medical trouble — gastrointestinal discomfort, sprained ankle, yadi yada — you'll have a professional doctor right by your side! That's a two-in-one deal!

C: 有什么好吃的吗？
E: Is there anything good?

C: 我喝就我喝，这能有多可怕？
E: Fine. How bad can it be, anyway?

C: 喂，这又是从哪里蹿出来的野丫头，这关你什么事？
E: When did you decide to show up, little miss feisty? How is this any of your business?

C: ——这都要怪你们金人巷商会呀。
E: I'll tell you —the Merchant Guild's!

C: 别答应，这也太幼稚了。
E: This is so childish. Don't accept.

C: 早知道我就不会插手了。
E: If I knew it'd come to this, I wouldn't have gotten involved.

C: 试试就试试。
E: Couldn't hurt, I guess...

C: 可是，这样会不会不太安全？
E: Isn't this... a little unsafe?

C: 我是云骑素裳，这位头上长角的小姑娘我想就不用介绍了吧！而这位是……
E: I'm Sushang of the Cloud Knights. I think you already know the little girl with horns on her head. And this is...

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 我的老家曜青仙舟，和公司有着更密切的往来。据说最初也只是公司在此投资互市。不过时间久了，事情就有了变化……
E: My home, the Xianzhou Yaoqing, had much closer ties with the IPC. Initially, people thought they were just engaging in a little interstellar investment... but over time, things changed.

C: 你们看仔细了，这个什么古董怪物根本就不是我的。
E: Here, look carefully — this old piece of junk doesn't even belong to me.

C: 你就继续自欺欺人吧，这金人巷早晚得变成公司的大仓库！
E: Keep your heads in the sand if you like, but it's only a matter of time before Aurum Alley becomes another warehouse for the IPC!

C: 我谨代表天舶司，协调星际和平公司与金人巷商会之间的租金纠纷。
E: On behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission, I am here to preside over the leasing dispute between the IPC and Aurum Alley Merchant Guild.

C: 呃…这…十年？二十年？{NICKNAME}，怎么办，我、我也说不上来。
E: Uh... ten years? Twenty years? Psst, {NICKNAME}, what should I say? Is twenty about right?

C: 你们要能还上，<color=#dbc291ff>就拿出证据来呀</color>。
E: If you have the necessary funds, <color=#dbc291ff>prove it</color>.

C: 别忘了，我们之前的赌约，你要当着大家的面向我道歉！
E: Don't forget about our bet! You have to apologize in front of everyone!

C: 汪汪！汪汪汪汪汪！汪——
E: Woof, woof! Woof, woof, woof, woof, woof! Woof!

C: 现在可不是开玩笑的时候呀。
E: Now's not the time for jokes.

C: 老爸，你也别光在那里看着，过来指导指导学徒呀。
E: Don't just stand there, Father! Go teach your apprentice a thing or two.

C: 是啊，这也是他顽固不肯放手的理由。他不想让金人巷变作公司的物流码头，他还盼着旅客们人来人往的景象再一次出现呢。
E: Indeed, which is why he won't let it go. He wants to see the streets teeming with tourists, not IPC cargo.

C: 同功坊的营收分析？
E: Sales analysis of Artistry Hardware?

C: 老朽我也不想公开示人的，但今日事关金人巷未来，我不得不出席。
E: I know my appearance is a little unsettling... If the hearing weren't of vital importance to the future of Aurum Alley, I wouldn't attend in person.

C: 之前我拜托素裳去说服尚滋味的燕翠师傅和码头合作，最近这件事有了进展。
E: Some time ago, I asked Sushang to have a chat with Yancui to see if we could secure Spices Supreme as the next client for the dock. I've heard Sushang has made some progress.

C: 等、等等！听起来怪怪的，要是被丹鼎司的人和长老们知道，一定会怪我不自尊身份的！
E: Wait a second! I'm not sure about that idea... If the elders find out, they'll say I'm tarnishing my image or something!

C: 我真的没有什么灵感了。
E: I'm out of ideas.

C: 没错。
E: Indeed.

C: 小秘书，你们有什么要问的吗？
E: Mingxi, please ready your questions.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 商会利用码头物流，不仅还上了租金，还筹集到了竞标资金，这足以看出码头的重要性。
E: By utilizing the dock, the guild managed to repay outstanding rents and also raised sufficient funding to stand at the bidding. That just goes to show how vital the dock is.

C: 突然有一种「事情告一段落」的感觉了。
E: Guess we can say "that's it for today's episode."

C: 要不是白露喜欢凑热闹…
E: All thanks to Bailu looking for trouble...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>（这句话好像不太对劲……）</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>(I sense a hole in his logic...)</color>

C: 你不可能和这件事没关系。
E: I think this has a lot to do with you...

C: 阿姨打算效仿燕翠师傅研究新菜的做法，去打几只孽物，看看能不能下菜。
E: Seeing how Yancui expands her menu, I plan to hunt a few abominations and see what I can do with them.

C: 龙泉老窖，三大碗。
E: Dragon Spring Brew, three large bowls.

C: 青雀大老爷，您不能总是来找我开病假证明啊，我这是药店，一般不看病。
E: Miss Qingque, you can't always come to me for a medical certificate. This is a pharmacy. We don't do diagnosis.

C: {NICKNAME}，怎么办，我需要反驳青雀小姐的证据……
E: {NICKNAME}, what do I do? I need to refute Miss Qingque's evidence...

C: 我们的做法和公司是有区别的！
E: Our proposal is different from the IPC's!

C: 难道各位高呼「金人巷复兴」只是自我满足吗？我不相信。
E: ...I was using a figure of speech — but our vision of "rejuvenation" will benefit the majority.

C: 这是金人巷商会和尚滋味一起做的联动活动。
E: We organized a crossover between the Merchant Guild and Spices Supreme.

C: 鹤运物流是这方面的专家，商会总是能从他们这里得到很有用的建议。
E: Undoubtedly. Heron Express knows their stuff when it comes to shipping and delivery. They've been giving us really helpful advice.

C: 码头的事先暂时放一放，还有更紧急的事情要处理。
E: We should set the dock matters aside for now. There are more urgent issues at hand.

C: 我很想念过去的金人巷，那时我还能散步。
E: I miss the old Aurum Alley. I was still able to walk back then.

C: 我倒是想，可是定位失败了呀。
E: I wish I could, but positioning systems have failed.

C: 拿出球棒威胁它！
E: Take out the bat and threaten it!

C: 呃…你是哪位？
E: Umm... who are you?

C: 高阿姨让我来找你。
E: Tall Auntie asked me to check on you.

C: 你眼神不怎么好使啊，抓错鸟啦！
E: Hey, do you even know what you're looking for? You've got the wrong bird!

C: {NICKNAME}，你能帮我查一下吗？拜托了……
E: Could you please look into this for me, {NICKNAME}? I could really use your help...

C: （谛听闻到的气息和墙根相连，偷外卖的家伙该不会是飞过去吧？）
E: (The smell Diting detected is from the other side of the wall. Did the guy who stole the takeout food fly over this clutter?)

C: 我就是这个「机器人」大课题的持有者，温世玲！啊不对…这样说是不是有点太不谦虚了？
E: I, Wen Shiling, am the owner of this robot project! Oh no... That sounds a bit cheeky, doesn't it?

C: 哼哼，其实世玲不用做完最后一个实验，也能通过绩效考核。毕竟机器人这个课题，已经让小组长对我刮目相看了！
E: Well, actually, I can pass the performance review without finishing this last experiment. After all, my robot project has already immensely impressed the team leader!

C: 伴随着陈旧的木头挤压声，只有大量的灰尘进入你的视野之中。异常的现象不在这里。
E: With the squeaking and creaking sounds of old wooden furniture, a dust cloud emerge in front of you. The anomaly is not here.

C: 要是弄坏了…奶奶赔不起啊……
E: Grandma can't afford it if you break it...

C: （关掉开关）
E: (Turn off the switch)

C: 不错，肯定错不了了！我的猜想都是正确的！这是你的报酬！等之后感应仪有了反应，我会再来通知你的。
E: That's right, it can't be wrong! My hypotheses are true! This is your remuneration! If the sensor picks up something else in the future, I'll look for you again.

C: 咕叽咕叽…唔……呜呜！
E: *unintelligible sounds*

C: 好耳熟……
E: Sounds familiar...

C: 具体都有什么？
E: What exactly will be available?

C: 嘿嘿，还得是「鲱鱼先生」的广告词最有趣！
E: Hehe, Mr. Herring's has the most amusing tagline!

C: 今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
E: Is today's set of ingredients ready?

C: 我们成功了。看，是哈努老大！哈努老大亲自来接应我们了！
E: We made it! Look, it's Boss Hanu! He's here to pick us up!

C: 就在哈努兄弟取得监狱控制权的一瞬，变故发生了：混乱的联觉梦境吞噬了你们，连带着将整座监狱也全部卷了进去，
E: Right when Brother Hanu takes control of the prison, an accident occurs: A chaotic Synesthesia Dreamscape engulfs you all, and pulls the entire prison in it.

C: 典狱长石头老板对此大为震惊。他召回了所有狱卒，用坚固的铁门封锁了反抗区划的全部通道，似乎是打算直接饿死你们。
E: The prison warden, Boss Stone, is shocked by this. He recalls all the prison guards and seals all the paths in the rebel sectors with sturdy iron gates. He probably intends to just starve you all to death.

C: 他们托我将这枚梦泡转交给你，作为献给第一个忠实玩家的特别礼物。
E: They've asked me to pass this dream bubble to you as a gift for the very first loyal player!

C: …否则这里也不会变成这幅模样，对吧？
E: ...Or this place wouldn't be in this state now, would it?

C: 屏幕上播放着某款苏乐达汽水的广告，尽管你分不清它究竟是哪种口味的，但直觉告诉你似乎有什么地方不对劲。
E: An advertisement for SoulGlad is playing on the billboard. You cannot tell which flavor it is, but your instinct tells you something is off.

C: 下次还要带我玩好不好！汪汪！想出去玩，想出去玩！
E: You gotta take me out to play again, okay? Woof, woof! I wanna go play! I wanna go play!

C: 但你处理得很好，是位合格的调饮师了。我替它们向你表达感谢。
E: But you did great. You're a bona fide drinksmith. Allow me to thank you on their behalf.

C: 您调制的饮料非常美味，接待也很热情，我超爱这里的，以后还会常来玩！
E: The drink you made was tasty, and the whole vibe here was awesome! I'm totally loving this place, and I'll definitely come back again!

C: 就是…就是…唔……
E: It's... it's... you know...

C: 果然你和我们想得一样哇！
E: I knew you'd feel the same way!

C: （…有点好奇，不过还是先开始营业吧。）
E: (...As curious as I am, I should get the business started first.)

C: 我和它们都说过了，不会过来酒吧哇，我们可以自由行动！
E: I told them that we wouldn't be at the lounge today! Now we can do whatever we want!

C: …绝望紧紧攥住了我的心脏，压迫得仿佛将要窒息！
E: ...Despair is clutching my heart, so stifling. I'm about to suffocate!

C: 汪…我们什么都做不到，整天吵吵闹闹，随时可能发狂…逼得你只能呆在这个小酒吧里。
E: Woof... we can't do anything useful... We bicker all day long... and we may lose control anytime... so you have to stay in this lounge forever.

C: 还不愿相信的话，去打听打听呗？
E: If you don't believe me, why don't you ask around?

C: 还不赶快走？需要我帮你们向猎犬家系请示吗？
E: Why are you still here? Do you want me to say hi to your boss?

C: 那就好，那就好。
E: That's good, very good.

C: 你现在赶快出来，学小狗汪汪求饶，我就饶你一命——不然就等着被我一口吃掉吧！
E: Come out now and whimper at my feet like a pathetic dog, and I'll spare your life! Else, I'll swallow you whole!

C: …那我就要被艾迪恩先生开除了！
E: ...Then I'd be fired by Mr. Aideen!

C: 请别这么说，这里的筑梦师可不是一般人……
E: Please don't say that. The Dreamweavers here are all extraordinarily talented...

C: 我是星穹列车的无名客。
E: I'm one of the Nameless on the Astral Express.

C: 真是一位了不起的动画师。
E: What an amazing animation artist.

C: 我也是看钟表小子长大的，小时候一直想看流梦礁出现在动画里。而如今终于看到了我们的「清醒村」，也算是如愿以偿了。
E: I grew up watching Clockie too, and I have always wanted to see Dreamflux Reef in the animations. And today, I'm finally able to see our Rouseville. That's all I wanted.

C: 哈努兄弟的演员可以入场了——请先去电视机那里准备吧。
E: Brother Hanu's actor is ready to enter — please go ahead and get ready at the TV.

C: ——看到了！原来在那里！
E: ...I see it! So there's where it was!

C: 去拍下一个镜头吧。
E: Go shoot the next scene.

C: 记住，需要把<color=#dbc291ff>所有演员放在同一张画面里</color>哦。
E: Remember, <color=#dbc291ff>all the actors must be in the shot</color>.

C: 「一番苦战后，钟表小子与同伴们终于夺回了大树。」
E: "After an arduous battle, Clockie and his companions finally wrest back control of the Great Tree."

C: 重拍一次吧。
E: Let's reshoot that.

C: 哼，即便是对历史毫无兴趣的观众，也都应该听说过哈努兄弟的原型——解放匹诺康尼的{RUBY_B#反抗者}哈努努{RUBY_E#}。
E: Hmph, even people who know nothing about history should still have heard of who Brother Hanu was modeled after — {RUBY_B#Rebel}Hanunue{RUBY_E#}, the one who liberated Penacony.

C: 不过要创作「哈努兄弟」的故事，就必须对这个神秘的家伙有所了解。
E: But if you want to tell a tale about Brother Hanu, you'll have to understand a little more about this mysterious character.

C: 独立后的犯人们以这只野狼为原型，杜撰出了一位匹诺康尼的独立英雄「哈努努」，但他其实并不存在，只是一个浪漫的传说……
E: Following independence, the prisoners used this wolf to build up the hero of Penacony's independence: Hanunue. But he never actually existed — he was just a romantic legend...

C: 哼，我明白了，那哈努兄弟应该也是一个背负美好愿景的谎言吧。
E: Hmph, got it. Brother Hanu is a fabrication representing a beautiful hope.

C: 折纸小鸟外传的广告上映了。
E: The trailer for Origami Bird's extra story has been released.

C: 可以看到…
E: We can see...

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，你终于来了。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, you've finally arrived.

C: 这完全是服输了吧…快回来快回来……
E: That's totally giving up... Come back here!

C: 在焕然一新的匹诺康尼，你们看着对方，再见的欣喜与离别的悲伤，形同陌路的尴尬与久别重逢的羞怯，此刻一起涌上心头。
E: Against the backdrop of a revitalized Penacony, the joy of reunion mixes with the sorrow of past separation, the awkwardness of being strangers, and the shyness of a long-awaited encounter, all converging at this very moment.

C: 太…太感动了，你们的表演甚至超越了原作！简直…简直…简直就——
E: It's so... so touching, your portrayal outdoes the original! It's simply... simply... simply —

C: 因为，这里是苏乐达™有限公司赞助的第二十届第三十三场盛会海选！
E: Because, this is SoulGlad™ Enterprises' thirty-third Festivity Auditions of the twentieth season!

C: 在这一集《小小哈努行动》里，石头老板集结了战舰，准备进攻美梦小镇！老苍蝇、狼表哥和炸弹头也蠢蠢欲动…勇敢的哈努兄弟必须击退他们，保护家园！
E: In this Hanu's Adventure episode, Boss Stone has gathered his battleships for an assault on Dreamville! Old Buzzfly, Cousin Wolf and Bombhead are all raring to go... The brave Hanu must thwart their advance and protect his home!

C: 哦，勇敢的哈努兄弟…你看起来需要帮助，呵呵。
E: Oh, brave Hanu... You look like you could really use some help.

C: 哼？哼…哼。
E: Hmph? Hmph... Hmph.

C: 天哪…这是怎么回事？你的内心十分混乱！
E: Oh dear... What's going on in here? Your inner self is a mess!

C: 面对重重考验，你又一次证明了自己的实力，「盛会巨星」的称号真是实至名归！
E: After passing numerous challenges, you have proven yourself. You truly deserve the title of "Festive Superstar"!

C: 在不久的将来，各大梦境贩售店都会上架这款胶卷，所有的入梦之人都能体验成为盛会巨星的感觉，苏乐达企业也将借此开辟新的商业蓝海！
E: In the not-too-distant future, the Dreamscape stores will all have a film like this one, to let everyone know what it's like to be a Festive Superstar. The SoulGlad corporation will also use this moment to create new opportunities upon the tides of commerce!

C: 哦！那是一个多么野性、瑰丽、强大的存在啊，仿佛是拥有生命的噩梦！我都想为它设计一版新的苏乐达口味了，就叫「死亡苏乐达」吧！
E: Oh! What a wild, magnificent, and powerful existence. It's like a living nightmare! I'm very much tempted to design a new SoulGlad flavor based on it. I shall call it "DeathGlad"!

C: 关于那位艺术家……
E: About that artist...

C: {NICKNAME}，你是否已经做好准备凝视「终末」的投影了？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you ready to gaze at the projection of Finality?

C: 我要战胜谁呢…{NICKNAME}？丹恒？姬子姐姐？杨叔？
E: Who do I want to defeat...? {NICKNAME}? Dan Heng? Himeko? Or Mr. Yang?

C: 我必须再提醒一次，公司的诸位，在罗浮仙舟不可当街械斗。
E: Just a reminder, IPC members. Street fighting on the Xianzhou Luofu is prohibited.

C: 我反过来拜你为师？
E: I'll become your apprentice?

C: 嘿嘿，这次我就不谦虚了，我真是进步了不少！
E: Hehe, I won't be modest this time. My skills have improved by leaps and bounds!

C: 三月，你这么快就出师了？
E: You're graduating already, March?

C: 我记得当时彦卿说过「战胜一群恶徒的方法有很多，不过你若想成为『英雄大侠』，除了提升自己没有任何捷径可以走。」
E: I remember Yanqing once said, "There are many ways to defeat villains, but if you want to become a true hero, you have to focus on self-improvement."

C: 你在这里遭遇了事业的挫折。
E: Because you took a hit to your career that day.

C: 此时此刻，恰如彼时彼刻…在学猪叫之前，我还有一句话要说！
E: It's happening all over again... Alright! But before I squeal like a pig, there's something else I want to say!

C: 尾巴大爷此言差矣，有句话叫「君子报仇十年不晚」。但是斯科特是个小人，我猜他连隔夜仇都忍不了，现在可让他逮着机会了。
E: No, no, Mr. Tail. There's a saying, "Revenge is a dish best served cold," but Skott hardly has any patience. He couldn't resist the temptation to get back at us.

C: 咱是岁阳，你要是信得过我的话，大爷我有些岁阳的本事！藿藿，揭开封印吧……
E: I'm a heliobus, and I've got a few tricks up my sleeve! Just remove my seal, Huohuo...

C: 你将三月七与公司的好事之徒约战的事细细道来。
E: You elaborate on the matter of the upcoming duel between March 7th and that IPC busybody.

C: 哇，不得了不得了，你有道灵光从天灵盖喷出来。你年纪轻轻就有一身横练的筋骨，简直是百年一见的练武奇才啊！
E: Woah! This is amazing, you've got a spiritual light gushing out of your crown. To have the physique of a martial prodigy at such a young age, you're a martial genius who only appears once in a century!

C: 今天本来是想和藿藿一起打发点时间的，不过她有自己的事要办，还是等下次见面再说吧。
E: I was thinking about spending some time with Huohuo today, but she's got stuff to do. Let's chat again next time.

C: 老子承认你说的有点道理。
E: You make a good point there, girlie.

C: 如果再给我一次机会，我一定努力练剑，不会再输了！
E: If I get another chance, I'll practice even harder and won't ever lose again!

C: 刚才谁说话？
E: Hey, who said that?

C: 当然了，阿沙瓦特，你就放心地去塔塔里昂赴任吧。我会替你照顾好拉克什米的。
E: Of course, Ashavat. Go to the Tartarion without worries. I'll take care of her while you're away.

C: 你…难道你准备给斯科特下泻药？？？
E: Wait... do you plan on slipping Skott a laxative?

C: 太伟大了，仙舟医学。
E: Praise be to the Xianzhou medicine.

C: 诶呀，已经到决战的时间了，快去和斯科特先生决一死战吧！我还有事，先走一步。
E: Alright, it's time for the duel! Just go fight that Skott guy! I've got something else to do, so I'll be off.

C: 你要是想骂我的话就骂吧！这一招我也觉得有点过分……
E: Fine, give me a piece of your mind if you want! I admit it. I was kinda out of line...

C: 呜哇！我的剑说话了！
E: Whoa! My sword is talking!

C: 公司，爱不爱我…公司又不是人，它不用爱我！
E: Does the IPC love me back... the IPC is not a person! It doesn't have to love me at all!

C: 斯科特带着他的好兄弟们离开了金人巷，向不夜侯的店主梦茗道了歉。
E: Skott leaves Aurum Alley with his bros and apologizes to the shopkeeper of the Sleepless Earl, Mengming.

C: 你到底是不是医士哇？我来求药，怎么你在我这儿净编些段子来消遣我了？
E: Are you really a healer? I came to seek a prescription, and you're here spinning tall tales to taunt me!

C: 这真的是药吗？
E: Is this really medicine?

C: 灵砂小姐已经找过鄙人了，事情大概经过我也已经知道了。
E: Lady Lingsha has already sought me out. I also know how the matter roughly went.

C: 没错，它被自动判别为故障机械，扔进废料堆里了。好消息是，现在还能翻出来。
E: You're right. It was automatically seen as faulty machinery and was thrown into the scrap heap. The good news is there's still hope of finding it.

C: 坏了，现在是什么情况？
E: Oh no, what is going on?

C: …可以说是失败了吧？
E: ...I reckon it's a failure.

C: 别忘了阿休，你的好朋友。
E: Don't forget your best friend A-Xiu.

C: 幻戏故事里的大侠们只用苦练神功击败对手，故事就圆满结束了，现实哪有这么简单？
E: The heroes of immersia stories always rely on only intense training and great skills to defeat their enemies, then their stories end happily ever after. Since when was reality ever that simple?

C: 三月，你快醒醒啊！喂——
E: March, wake up! Hey!

C: 三月小姐，这本书真的很危险！
E: Miss March, this book is extremely dangerous!

C: 一个文明绝不可能不制造垃圾，正如人类的存在会不停弥散「忆质」。
E: It is not possible for a civilization to not create trash, just like a person will never stop emitting "memoria."

C: 长久以来，匹诺康尼的心理治疗师都喜欢深入梦境，研究密集的忆质。但我不这么认为——被人们抛下的垃圾并非毫无价值，只是人们不懂得如何利用它而已。
E: Penaconian therapists have long preferred going deep into the Dreamscape to research concentrated memoria. However, I don't believe in this practice. The trash that people cast aside still has value — people just don't know how to make use of it.

C: 竟然嫌我幼稚…小屁孩才喜欢黑深残，成年人都喜欢爱与魔法！如果你拒绝，你知道你的朋友们会发生什么吗……
E: You're calling me childish...? Children are the ones who like the grimdark, brutal, and horrible stories! It's adults who like love and magic! If you say no, do you know what might happen to your friends?

C: 来展示我们的「友谊凭证」吧！快点，来不及解释了，把我头上这盖子打开，使出你平日里奋力翻垃圾的劲头——
E: Let's show our Proof of Friendship! There's no time to explain. Open up the lid on my head and unleash that trashcan-diving vigor of yours...

C: 你见到了那个熟悉的粉红色身影……
E: You catch sight of that familiar pink silhouette...

C: 你看到了吗？我俩的「友谊魔法」，三五下就干掉了那些怪物！
E: Did you see that? Our Magic of Friendship wiped out those monsters in seconds!

C: 一阵金光闪过，小桶宝力获得了桑博的「友谊魔法」。
E: With a bright flash of light, Litter Pony obtains Sampo's Magic of Friendship.

C: 咱们可不是小朋友哦！云骑军的战术讲究的是相互配合、以多欺少！
E: But we're not kids! The Cloud Knights' tactical creed is to complement one another and overwhelm with numbers!

C: 李大枕头，过分了吧！哥几个请你来当教练指点战术，你怎么跑去给咱们对手站台了？
E: Sleepy Sushang, that's over the line! You were supposed to be our coach when we invited you here. How could you run off to the opponent's corner?

C: 看起来积分已经足够了。怎么样，{NICKNAME}教练，咱们准备挑战接下来的强敌吧！
E: Looks like I've got enough points. How about it, Coach {NICKNAME}? Let's get ready to challenge some powerful opponents!

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 有趣。…嗯，先做个造影检查吧，确认一下脑部有没有器质性问题。格斗家嘛，总难免会出一些类似的问题。
E: Interesting... Mm, let's run an imaging test first to confirm that your brain has no organic issues. A fighter's bound to run into such problems.

C: 没有啦。
E: Nope.

C: 不必担心。这只梦貘，是妾身私人豢养的小宠物，我可以把它作为医疗道具借给你。只是你要好好爱护它。
E: Don't worry. This tuskpir is a personal pet of mine. I can lend it to you for this treatment, but you have to take good care of it for me.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈。
E: Hahahahahahaha.

C: 卢卡，我将前往仙舟「罗浮」参加演武仪典的机会交给你。
E: Luka, I'm entrusting the chance of attending the Wardance on the Xianzhou Luofu to you.

C: 我被打一拳，恐怕会哭很久吧。呜…放过我吧！
E: One punch, and I probably won't stop crying for ages.  ...Please don't do this to me!

C: 原来是卢卡选手的粉丝呀！卢卡选手，有粉丝来看你了！
E: Ooh, Luka's fans! Luka, your fans are here to see you!

C: 好、好冷！忍不住就打了个哆嗦……
E: C—Cold! I was shivering for a second there...

C: 可是，当我想把胜利的消息告诉玛吉的时候，她的父亲却告诉我，她不在了。
E: But, when I wanted to tell Margie the news about my victory, her father told me she was gone.

C: 准备好了，我一定会顺利复活的。
E: I'm all set. I'm going to win this.

C: 不谈这个了…来看看下场比赛的对手是谁吧！
E: Let's not dwell on that... How about we check out your next opponent?

C: 我们快过去吧。再耽搁一会儿，比赛都要结束了。
E: Let's get moving. We might miss the match if we wait any longer.

C: 事实上，很多世界都遭到了纳努克疯子军团的袭击。所以我得提醒你，观众付了票钱，买的就是个刺激，他们可没兴趣听你危言耸听。
E: Honestly, many worlds have been attacked by Nanook's mad legion. So I must remind you: The audience paid good money to watch a thrilling show. They're not interested in your words of woe and weal.

C: 步离人也有好人？啊呸！我最好的两个兄弟都死在他们手上，照她这么说，我们才是坏人喽？
E: There are good borisin? Nonsense! They killed my two best bros. Is she trying to say we're the bad guys?

C: 啊对了，作为案件的旁证，十王司希望你能去一趟幽囚狱协助调查。录口供的时候，你就实话实说，什么都不知道，可别被这种事影响了后续的比赛。
E: Oh, by the way, as witnesses of the case, the Ten-Lords Commission hopes you can head to the Shackling Prison to assist with the investigation. When you're giving your statement, just tell the truth — that you know nothing. Don't let this affect your future fights in the tournament.

C: 但我作为参赛选手，我不想接受这场不战而来的胜利。
E: But, as a contender, I cannot accept a victory that was not earned in battle.

C: 等等…我还没赢！贫僧还可以继续战斗！只有赢得胜利，才能让仙舟听见丹轮寺的声音……
E: Wait... I have not won! I can still fight! Only with my victory will the Xianzhou be able to hear the voices of Claretwheel Temple...

C: 这是便携式匹诺康尼啊！
E: This is practically a portable Penacony!

C: 这人可能是最有名的通缉犯…细节等有机会再给你科普吧！现在的当务之急是退赛！这绝对不是开玩笑的事！
E: This guy could be the most wanted criminal of them all... I'll fill you in on the details later when we get the chance! It's imperative that we pull out of the tournament now! And I'm not in the least bit joking!

C: 我直接发短信问问萨姆吧。
E: I'll just send SAM a message to ask.

C: 可能是假名吧？
E: Maybe it's a fake name?

C: 别整天惦记着什么破谐音梗、炒作、记忆点、个人品牌了！好好练武、好好打比赛，人们自然就会记住你的名字！
E: Stop obsessing over lame puns, hype, catchphrases, and personal branding! Train hard and fight harder, and people will naturally remember your name!

C: 本场比赛对阵的两方，分别是「铁臂」卢卡和「朱明三不」——颓不流、贤不肖、何不乐！
E: The two sides in this match are, Luka "Strongarm" against the Tri-Dis of Zhuming — D. Celerate, D. Valieu, and D. Lite!

C: 喂！你到底会不会开发布会啊！
E: Hey! Do you know how to conduct a press conference or not!

C: 放心，我是专业的，规矩我都懂。
E: Don't worry. I'm a professional, and I know the rules.

C: 咱们卢卡有路人缘，那个十王司的工作人员是他粉丝，要签名来的。
E: Our Luka has a good relationship with the public. The staff from the Ten-Lords Commission were fans and just wanted an autograph.

C: 啊？还得提问啊，我想想…请问{NICKNAME}教练，您在赛前吃了什么？
E: Huh? I still have to ask another one? Lemme think... Coach {NICKNAME}, what did you eat before the match?

C: （糟糕，我的幻觉似乎更严重了。）
E: (Oh no, my hallucinations are getting worse.)

C: 我会给你最后一次机会，请好好把握。
E: I'm giving you one last chance. Please do your best.

C: 令人作呕
E: Disgusting.

C: 求你了，别玩这比我都老的梗好吗？好的。
E: I'm begging you, please don't use that new-generation lingo with me ok? Okay.

C: 地衡司分拨给「庙会」的预算越来越少，对年轻人越来越缺乏吸引力……
E: The budget allocated for temple fairs by the Realm-Keeping Commission is dwindling, making it less appealing to youngsters year after year...

C: 不要对自己那么苛刻嘛！你是货真价实的亚军～
E: Come now, give yourself a pat on your back! You're a bona fide runner-up!
WHAT!?

C: 为取得最佳战果，「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」需做好充分准备。
E: To attain the most stellar victory, Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party must make utmost preparations.

C: 或许…我最开始就不该参加乐队。
E: Maybe... I shouldn't even have joined the band to begin with.

C: 华丽的外观，新颖的谈吐，难以捉摸的思维方式，还有那不知底气何来的自信。
E: Her gorgeous looks, her refreshing speech, that unpredictable way of thinking, and that inexplicably confident swagger.

C: 更不用说…还有这么精彩的乐队演出！
E: Needless to say... there's also such an exciting performance!

C: 好呀。布置舞台也挺无聊的，不如来说说话，盛会巨星同学想要知道些什么呢？
E: Sure. Decorating the stage is kinda boring, but then again, as the Festive Superstar, is there anything you would like to know?

C: 是吧！后来我去问那些科员，他们都不愿意告诉我，遮遮掩掩的，肯定有秘密！
E: I know, right? Later on, when I asked those researchers, they wouldn't tell me anything. All that secrecy, they must definitely be hiding something!

C: 呜呜，大哥…太好了，真的太好了……
E: Boohoo, Bro... That, that was amazing...

C: ——来吧！加入我们，用最大的音量，最华丽的表演，最自信的姿态，让整个世界都记住你的存在！
E: ...Come! Join us! Let the world remember your existence with the loudest volume, the most beautiful performance, and the most confident poise!

C: 必须请我吃橡木蛋糕卷才行。
E: You'd have to treat me to Oak Cake Rolls first.

C: 智械也会学习不好吗？
E: Intellitrons can be bad at academics, too?

C: 虽然轻松得到了演出的机会，但是……
E: Well, that went really smoothly, but...

C: 完了！时间要到了，乱破小姐却还没有回来，怎么办？总不能去台上表演相声吧？
E: Oh no! Time's up, and Miss Rappa isn't back yet. What do we do? We can't possibly do a crosstalk routine on stage, can we?

C: 能确定的是，禁闭那个学生的梦境相当复杂，从其中脱身并不容易。建议：你们该寻找其他的解法。
E: What is certain is that the dreamscape confining that student is highly complex, and escaping it will prove challenging. Suggestion: You should look for other solutions.

C: 我也爱音乐！也爱舞台！当然，最喜欢的还是…和乱破忍首，还有乐队所有成员，共同演奏的时光！我们要一直、一直演奏下去！
E: I also love music and performing on stage! Of course, what I love most is... making music with Head Ninja Rappa and the rest of the band members! We are going to keep on playing!

C: 还来？…实在是忍无可忍了，朋友们，我们集体把这个不守规矩的家伙给轰出去！
E: Again? ...Absolutely incorrigible. Friends, let's work together and toss this unruly trespasser out!

C: 好耶！
E: Yeah!

C: （安慰它）
E: (Comfort it)

C: 哎，就别在这家伙身上费劲了，它在选拔时候肯定要被淘汰掉的。不如现在踢掉它，我们好好练习就行了。
E: *sigh* Stop wasting time on this guy. It'll definitely be disqualified at the selection phase. Why don't we just kick it out and practice on our own?

C: 不多时，所有的「阮•梅」造物都挤在舱段中间，依次进行了发声表演。
E: Not long after, all of Ruan Mei's creations are all huddled in the middle of the cabin, taking turns to perform their vocals.

C: 光是听篝火发出的噼里啪啦的声音，看锅里升起的白蒙蒙的蒸汽，都觉得很有意思。
E: Listening to the twigs crackling in the campfire, staring at the white steam rising from the pot — even the most humdrum occurrences were interesting.

C: 就是…你好，请问你会演奏音乐吗？
E: Err... Hello, do you know how to play music?

C: （现在不是玩的时候）
E: (It's not time to play now)

C: …你把姐姐的话记得真清楚。
E: ...You sure remember my sister's words well.

C: 我谢谢你们。
E: Thank you so much.

C: 就算战胜了我们，也没法改变我们的信念。因为音乐——是杀不死的！
E: Even if you defeat us, you won't change our beliefs. Because music cannot be killed!

C: 不不，那是你的操作太强了，普通玩家可达不到这水平。真的。
E: That's because you were too good at maneuvering. Average players wouldn't be able to hit such a level, really.

C: 根据调查，现在没有哈努兄弟题材的游戏，又是市场真空期，非常可能成为爆款。
E: According to research, there are no games themed around Brother Hanu right now, and there's a market vacuum. It's very likely to become a hit game.

C: 哎哟，好评如潮啊！
E: Oh-ho, the positive reviews are flooding in!

C: 我才不会作弊呢。
E: I never cheat.

C: 我要贿赂！
E: I want a bribe!

C: 没办法，食材有限。我已经尽力了。
E: Can't be helped. That's all the ingredients we have. I've tried my best.

C: 啊！
E: Ahhhh!

C: 唔…我虽然可以用自己的「力量」复原动画剧集，可这无中生有的工作颇为耗费精力，难以一蹴而就。要想看到另一部作品，恐怕要请你们多等上一段时间了。
E: Mm... I can indeed use my "power" to restore the animated series, but such tasks of creating something from nothing drains me greatly, so it's not possible in one sitting. If you want to watch another series, I'm afraid you'll have to wait a while.

C: 对对对，我也喜欢这句！
E: Yeah, I like this line too!

C: 见笑了。你们也知道，梦都是没什么逻辑的……
E: You must think me quite the joke. You all also know that dreams are illogical surrealities...

C: 你们翻遍了三月七的房间，最终在天花板的灯罩中找到了另一只耳机。
E: You all rummage through March 7th's room, finally finding the other earpiece in the ceiling lampshade.

C: 禁止！不要靠近帕姆！！！
E: Stop! Get away from me!!!

C: 瓦尔特先生怎么也玩起来了……
E: Why is Mr. Yang also playing along...

C: 音乐声响起，「铁砧队」获得了胜利。
E: The music plays — the Anvil Team has won.

C: 不再倾听万人的夙愿，也不再代行神明的权柄——「造像」溃退为织物包裹的一团人造纤维，醒目的缝隙间布满细密的针脚。
E: No longer heeding the wishes of the masses, nor executing the authority of the gods — the sculpture has withered into a bundle of synthetic fibers wrapped in fabric, myriad stitches between its conspicuous cracks.

C: 呜呜汪～
E: Wuoof!

C: 「开拓」的力量还真是好用呢。
E: The power of Trailblaze sure is handy.

C: 要是磕着漆面，我们估计得在匹诺康尼洗一个琥珀纪的盘子。
E: If we scratch its paint, I reckon we'd be washing dishes on Penacony for at least an Amber Era.

C: 去它正面拍一张试试吧……
E: Take a photo of its front...

C: 我本来就不会再长高了……
E: I'm not going to grow taller in the first place...

C: 我感觉到…剑在这个方向！
E: I sense that... the sword is this way!

C: 如果说电影的奥妙是用动态的镜头捕获流动的时空，摄影则是以静态的镜头凝固动人的瞬间。
E: If the magic of movies is using a moving lens to capture the flow of space and time, then photography is using a stationary lens to freeze moments of captivation.

C: 收下。
E: We'll take it.

C: 我们出发吧！
E: Let's set off now!

C: 啊，小奇美拉生气了！它说，虽然不知道帕姆是什么品种，但肯定不如它可爱！
E: Ah, the little chimera is angry! It says, although it doesn't know what breed Pom-Pom is, but it's definitely not as cute!

C: 大部分奇美拉都聚集在附近，你们可以随便看看。
E: Most chimeras gather nearby, so you can take a look around.

C: 我决定了！
E: I've decided!

C: 完成~大家辛苦啦，灰宝和小奇美拉都好好休息下吧~
E: All done! Good work, everyone. Grayie and the chimeras can go relax now!

C: 管理能力合格，与园丁的关系很好，同时对奇美拉表现出了友善，这样的人类并不多见，极有可能在日后成为威胁到我的对手。
E: Competent management skills, on good terms with the Gardeners, and friendly towards chimeras — there are few humans like that, and they could very well be opponents who would become a threat to me one day.

C: 啊？至于做到这个地步吗？
E: Hah? Did you even have to go this far?

C: 感觉像是硬套公式…
E: Feels like you're trying to force a formula onto something that doesn't actually fit...

C: 求求你，别死在我的石版里。
E: Please, don't die in my teleslate.

C: 最近有很多人在传不可靠的预言——「金杯终破碎，无人成冠军」。
E: An unsound oracle has been circulating recently — "the golden trophy shatters with no champion."

C: 看来比赛的双方都热情高涨啊，那么比赛正式——
E: Looks like both our competitors are fired up and ready to go! Now, let the match begin—

C: 请问参加「豹豹碰碰大作战」淘汰赛的选手，都有「银盏徽章」，对吧？
E: Every contestant in the "Seal Slammers" Elimination Round needs to possess a Silver Chalice Badge, right?

C: 小贼，哪里跑？
E: Stop right there, you sneaky thief!

C: o((◔ω◔¯ )o「桀桀，小海豹的梦想，是不会终结的！」)∋
E: o((◔ω◔¯ )o "Hehehe, a baby seal's dream never dies!")∋

C: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )o「哼哼，豹跟不懂红蓝配色的人没话说~」)∋
E: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )o "Hmph, I don't talk to those who can't appreciate red and blue~")∋

C: o( (•｀ω′ • )o「看豹的模样，你们就知道豹有多不好惹了！」)∋
E: o( (•｀ω′ • )o "Look at my form, and you'll know just how formidable I am!" )∋

C: 我呢，也该退场了。
E: As for me, it's time to make my exit.

C: 小白，难道是想说，一只豹豹跳进水，扑通？
E: Snowy, do you mean one seal jumps into the water, splash?

C: 看来我是问对人了。
E: Sounds like I've asked the right person.

C: 看看你的周围吧。一夜之间，奥赫玛的人类水平下降了一万倍——
E: Look around. In one night, the humans in Okhema have decreased their capacities by ten thousandfold—

C: 白厄，你的台词被抢走了！
E: Phainon, they stole your line!

C: 幸好现在有了更佳的人选——所以，好搭档，你愿意参加吗？
E: Luckily, you now have an even better candidate. So, dear partner — Would you care to participate?

C: …你也不能说？
E: ...You too?

C: 感谢大家宽容理解！低温浴池已经恢复了原样，我们的比赛，现在继续——
E: Thank you all for your patience and understanding! The cold bath is restored, and now let's continue with the tournament —

C: 不过，得给我点时间吧——至少需要五个工作日！
E: But I'll need some time — at least five business days!

C: 偶遇{NICKNAME}，强如怪物，我自知拼尽全力，无法战胜。
E: I ran into {NICKNAME}, as strong as a beast. I know even if I tried my best, I can't win.

C: 答案是——这台机器安装了业务巩固部的「截稿日辅助处理系统」。它可以激发、读取并记录人脑内的灵感，将它们形成场景，是创作者的不二帮手……
E: Here's why — it's equipped with the Business Consolidation Department's "Deadline Assistant Processing System." It captures, reads, and records creative inspiration right from your mind, turning them into scenes. Perfect for any creator...

C: 没办法，光凭我自己做不到嘛。有句星际格言怎么说的来着？「师夷长技以制夷」。
E: Well, I can't develop everything by myself, can I? You know the old Interastral saying: "Use your rivals' strengths against them."

C: 晚上好，亲爱的{NICKNAME}！真是激动人心的久别重逢啊——能在这茫茫宇宙中屡屡相遇，果然你我之间缘分匪浅。
E: Good evening, {NICKNAME}, my dear! It's such an exhilarating reunion — being able to cross paths again and again in this vast universe, it seems we really have a special bond.

C: 目前我们正在对测试版的数据进行最后调整，那台机器很快就能重新投入使用。
E: We're currently putting the final touches on the beta data. That machine will be up and running again very soon.

C: 汪汪！
E: Woof Woof!

C: 佩佩示意你触碰它背包某处，你按下按钮—— 「联觉信标已激活。」
E: Peppy gestures for you to press a certain spot on his backpack, and you push the button — "Synesthesia Beacon Activated."

C: 呼…输了就是输了，{NICKNAME}你的实力让我心服口服！
E: Phew... You beat me fair and square, {NICKNAME}. I have to say, I'm really impressed by your skill.

C: 不多聊了，我准备开始比赛了。
E: No more chitchat, my race is starting.

C: 抱歉我有点太激动了，一想到您要拿冠军就有点兴奋，希望没耽误您做赛前准备。
E: Sorry, I got a bit too excited. Just thinking about you winning the championship gets me pumped! Hope I didn't mess up your pre-race prep.

C: 既然您这么说，那我就放心了。
E: Since you said so, I feel reassured.

C: 一折腾起改装，人就会上瘾，钱也花了不少…所以——我向你保证这辆球笼赛车是你见过的最好的，你拿去好好开吧。
E: Once you start modifying, you'll get hooked, and end up spending quite a bit of money... so I promise you this Spheroid race car is the best you've ever seen, so go ahead and drive it well.

C: …不知道您是否还记得名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的集换式街机对战游戏？之前鸢尾花家系的缇娜负责的那个「啾啾，啾啾……」。
E: ...Do you happen to remember that arcade game "Origami Bird Clash" with the collectible items? The one Tinah from the Iris Family was running, with all the "Tweet, tweet..."

C: 为了节约您的时间，我就长话短说了——公司已经投资了「折纸小鸟对对碰」，并希望在全银河中推广这款匹诺康尼风情的街机游戏！
E: Let me cut to the chase for the sake of time. The IPC has invested in "Origami Bird Clash" and is planning to launch this Penacony-inspired arcade sensation across the cosmos!

C: 这可真是抱歉了…本来只是想请你们帮忙的，没想到还让你们也陷入危机了。
E: I feel terrible... I only wanted your help, and now you're caught up in this nightmare too.

C: 是在下赢了，恶灵式神•妖鸟！
E: I have emerged victorious, Evil Spirit Demon Bird!

C: 折纸鸟…小啾啾……
E: Origami bird... Hey, little birdie...

C: 这不只是说明我们仨…都不擅长打游戏吗？我本来就够菜了，没想到你俩比我还菜。
E: Doesn't this just mean... all three of us suck at games? I already knew I was bad, but I didn't think you two would be worse.

C: 再也不见。
E: Hope I never see you again.

C: 呵呵，孩子，你无耻的样子颇有我当年的风采。
E: Heh... Kid, that shameless look of yours reminds me of myself back in the day.

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 能让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>对任何事表示赞同</color>…不过是杯饮料，真有这么神奇的功效么？
E: Does it actually do that? Make people <color=#dbc291ff>agree with absolutely anything</color>? It's just a drink.

C: 扑哧…咳。咳。
E: Pfft... Very mature.

C: 提问：为什么谛听刚被制造出来就当上了父亲？
E: Question: Why was the Diting arrested for perjury?

C: 让她也重新学学吧！
E: She needs to relearn it too!

C: 请谅解。
E: Hope you understand.

C: 有什么可大惊小怪的。早说过了，我无处不在。
E: Why act so shocked? I told you, I'm everywhere.

C: 哼，看不出来，还挺有志气的嘛。
E: Hmph. Didn't expect that. Ambitious, aren't you?

C: 哼。未免有点太突然，也有点太自我了吧。
E: Hmm. This seems a bit too sudden. And a bit too self-aware.

C: 此处应有冷笑话。
E: At this point, a lame joke is expected.

C: 「不，朋友，你错了。」假面愚者拍拍他的肩膀，安慰道，「你现在连面具都没有了。」
E: "No, friend, you're mistaken." The Fool pats his shoulder and says, "Now you don't even have your mask."

C: 在这里的所有人，统统发配到「禁闭舱段」擦地板，一个不留！
E: Everyone here, straight to the seclusion zone. Grab a mop and start scrubbing. No exceptions!

C: 终于到真刀真枪的环节了吗？
E: Finally, time for some real action!

C: 哇哦，这位顾客，你的运气可真好！
E: Whoa! Dear customer, lucky you!

C: 不喝白不喝。
E: Free drinks? Count me in.

C: 不可以，马上就能领完奖励了，绝对不可以在这里结束！
E: No, you're so close to claiming your reward. Absolutely don't let it end here.

C: 我更担心匹诺康尼…
E: I'm more worried about Penacony...

C: 不会有远古细菌吗？
E: Wouldn't there be ancient bacteria?

C: 但是方才调饮的配方依然清晰。你打算把它记录在「特调配方」的最后一页，作为整个宇宙最了解它的人，只有你有资格添上这一笔。
E: But the drink recipe remains vividly clear. You decide to record it on the final page of your "Signature Recipes." As the one who understands it better than anyone in the universe, only you are fit to leave this mark.

C: 关你什么事…等等，看你这身行头，莫非你就是他们口中的「外来者」？怎么，你也是来寻宝的吗？
E: Mind your own business... Hang on — judging by your outfit, you must be one of them outsiders, right? What's up? Have you come looking for treasure, too?

C: 听起来不错。
E: Sounds good to me.

C: 冷静，冷静……
E: Calm down, calm down...

C: 你的脑内推演生成了许多莫名其妙的星球，我们想从中挑选点有用的东西；换句话来说，你脑子里的废料太多了！
E: You have imagined a lot of bizarre planets in your head, and we'd like to filter out some useful info. In other words, you've got too much nonsense in your brain!

C: 怎么事情越来越麻烦了…
E: This is becoming too much of a hassle for me...

C: 「一番奇遇，{NICKNAME}定眼观瞧，看到这丹鼎司中陈放着三个炉鼎。」
E: "A fortuitous encounter! {NICKNAME} studied the surroundings carefully, fixating on three elixir cauldrons on display at the Alchemy Commission."

C: 「进入炉鼎」
E: "Our hero enters the elixir cauldron."

C: 「{NICKNAME}跃入炉鼎，却忽然感到一阵天旋地转，再睁开眼时，竟已变成了一只机巧鸟！」
E: "{NICKNAME} leaped into the elixir cauldron, but suddenly felt as if the whole world were spinning. Our hero opened their eyes to find themselves to have turned into a cycrane!"

C: 「拿到『生灭灵芝』之后，{NICKNAME}一不做二不休，将手伸进了另一个炉鼎当中！」
E: "Having plucked the Life-Death Polypore, {NICKNAME} goes all or nothing, leaping into another elixir cauldron!"

C: 「{NICKNAME}知道，现在是时候去找那些祸乱仙舟、可悲可憎的药王秘传算算账了！」
E: "{NICKNAME} knew, now was the time to settle the score with those pathetic, detestable Disciples of Sanctus Medicus wreaking havoc on the Xianzhou."

C: 这样，这儿不是落笔写稿的好地方…您先跟我回一趟星槎海，待我把今天的故事和灵感整理一下，咱们来聊聊战斗的戏码。
E: Look, this isn't exactly the best writing place for us... Come back to the Starskiff Haven with me, and after I process all of today's inspiration, we can chat more about combat details.

C: 估计咱俩又要像上次一样，折腾大半天。所以您还是去稍作一下准备吧，吃点东西垫垫肚子，或者上个洗手间之类的。
E: I reckon this'll take the better half of a day just like last time. So why don't you go off and get ready? Fortify that stomach of yours or go to the bathroom first.

C: 我在身为持明卵时曾梦见一只小小的狐狸在我身旁徘徊嬉水。
E: Back when I was just an egg, I dreamed there was a little fox playing around in the water with me.

C: 童星？哈哈哈哈，我刚出道时确是小鲜肉，但如今已是从业五百多年的老戏骨了！
E: Child actor? Haha, I may have been fresh meat when I first debuted, but that was over five hundred years ago. I'm an old hand now!

C: 想加戏你早说啊…
E: Why didn't you say so earlier...

C: （无语凝噎）
E: (Stares speechlessly)

C: 放入「建木柄材」
E: Put in the hilt-wood from the Arbor

C: 呼～终于锻造好了！工序应该没出错吧？
E: Phew~ Finally forged! I did the process correctly, right?

C: 等等，这…「激光炮」是什么东西啊？
E: Hang on... What's this "laser cannon" about?

C: 听说你有特殊委派交给我…
E: I heard that you've got a special assignment for me...

C: 你开始迷茫，继而是某种不可名状的后怕与懊恼，你不明白除此以外，仙舟上还有多少秘密摆在你眼前却又无法察觉，这究竟是你的失误，亦或是旁人的精心安排……
E: Your mind is filled with bewilderment, followed by an unexplainable sense of fear and regret. You can't help but contemplate how many secrets might be right in front of your eyes yet remain unnoticed by you. Is this truly because of your lack of observation? Or could it be that someone else is pulling the strings...?

C: 我原来没当回事，可渐渐的在我们文玩圈子里也听到了些风声，我出去一打听，嗐——
E: At first, I thought it was just bad luck, but then the same thing happened in my fandangles circle as well. So I started asking around, and I found out... tsk...

C: 现在嘛，我想请你帮个忙，来先预排一次节目，好让我心里有个底儿。
E: Now I need you to help me with the rehearsal so that I'll know what the real event will be like.

C: 输就输了吧，每天工作这么累，能玩会儿以太战线就是生活中唯一的乐趣了。
E: Well, a loss is a loss. I work so hard every day, getting to play Aetherium Wars is my one joy in life.

C: 感谢您的自我介绍，乔瓦尼•迪•乔…什么什么先生。
E: Thanks for introducing yourself, Mr. Giovanni Di... something something...

C: 不必担心，绝大部分公司员工还是很有职业操守的，不会做这种败坏公司名声的事。
E: No need to worry, the majority of the IPC's employees are quite professional — wouldn't dream of tarnishing their company's reputation.

C: 没事，我们一起慢慢想。
E: No problem, take your time.

C: 不过，你说了算～还是说，你想要再考虑考虑？
E: It's up to you... Do you wanna try something different?

C: 没事，我们一起慢慢想。
E: No problem, take your time.

C: 不愧是你们。
E: Not bad.

C: 嘿嘿，谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thanks {NICKNAME}, you're the best!

C: 好吧…多谢公输师傅！
E: I understand... Thanks, Master Gongshu!

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 出发——目标是锦标赛的资格徽章！
E: It's time to get the next Mastery Mark!

C: 听起来…你很了解他？
E: Hmm... sounds like you know a lot about him?

C: 不过我对他不感兴趣，懒得挖他资料。
E: Anyway, he doesn't interest me in the slightest. I'm not gonna waste my precious time digging up info on him.

C: 好讨厌的感觉——！
E: Ugh! I can't believe it!

C: 而<color=#dbc291ff>「提问」</color>也是如此——
E: ...and the same principle applies to <color=#dbc291ff>asking questions</color> as well.

C: 汪汪！汪！
E: Woof woof! Woof!

C: 汪！汪汪！
E: Woof! Woof woof!

C: 请选手回到准备区——准备入场——！
E: Will contestants please make their way to the prep zone and get ready to enter the arena!

C: 这样的机会十分难得，希望你们能好好享受。毕竟「开拓」绝非纯粹的苦旅，享受旅途中的欢乐也是重要的一部分呀。
E: Opportunities like this don't come around every day, so I hope you enjoy it. After all, trailblazing isn't just about the challenges — relishing the fun of the journey is just as important.

C: 似乎没有什么特别的感觉。
E: I'm not sure if I'd call it "fun."

C: 本场对决的胜利者——
E: And the winners are...

C: 这样就彻底结束了吧。
E: Is it all over?

C: 是啊…乔瓦尼先生说过的那位<color=#dbc291ff>「高手玩家」</color>还没现身呢，对吧？
E: That's right... we're still waiting for Mr. Giovanni's mysterious <color=#dbc291ff>elite player</color> to show herself.

C: 哇，是那个对我很好的面具叔叔！我们又见面啦。
E: Ah! It's Uncle Mask!

C: 接下来的比赛，将由开拓者——
E: Aaaand in the next contest, please welcome... The Trailblazerrrrs⁓!

C: 应该快要到了…那位女士究竟是谁？
E: We must be close... I wonder who she is?

C: 我的看法是，「隐秘行事」与「曝光灵异」可不冲突，倒不如说，这是同一件事。
E: The way I see it, "operating in secret" and "exposing the paranormal" go hand-in-hand.

C: 嗯？好像打不开。
E: Huh? It won't open.

C: （尝试开门）
E: (Try to open the door.)

C: 所幸姐姐是以机巧之身还阳行事。若回到棺中，由冥差们维护更新，不至于有损性命。但我依然很担心她。
E: Fortunately, my sister is using an ingenium body. As long as she returns to the coffin and is tended to by the spiritfarers, her life is not in jeopardy. I still worry about her, though.

C: 十王司判官的过去原是一律被抹去的，一入幽府，便不牵外缘了。
E: A judge of the Ten-Lords Commission has no past. Once one has entered the service of the commission, all links with the outside world are severed...

C: 是啊，谁能想到尾巴牺牲自己战胜了浮烟呢？虽说岁阳之间没有同心同德的必然，但他愿意站在藿藿这边，已经说明了很多事情。
E: You could say that. Who would have thought Tail would have sacrificed himself to defeat Cirrus? Granted, heliobi have no obligation to be loyal to one another, but Tail's willingness to side with Huohuo is significant.

C: 我也不知道。那个岁阳看起来不打算用迷境困住咱们，似乎也不想攻击我们……
E: I'm not sure what to do... The heliobus isn't trying to trap us inside the illusion, and it doesn't look interested in attacking us either...

C: （大声却徒劳地驳斥符玄）
E: (Argue with her loudly and futilely)

C: 很好，这下第二条道路就出现了。
E: And now the second path appears.

C: 所以为什么是三个人搬救兵？
E: ...Why did it take three people to get reinforcements?

C: 寒鸦小姐让我来带领大家，我也很意外。
E: I'm really surprised that Madam Hanya asked me to be the leader of the ghost-hunting squad.

C: 当然了，凭她怎么找也一无所获。于是她又来求了我好几遍，你们没看到她那又怕又要问的表情，笑死！
E: She searched high and low, but came back empty-handed, of course. If only you could have seen her expression — simultaneously terrified and desperate to know more — utterly hilarious!

C: 混蛋！素裳，{NICKNAME}，咱们赶紧到流云渡去找藿藿！
E: Not good! Sushang, {NICKNAME}, let's head to Cloudford, quickly!

C: 寒鸦自袖中取出藏月瓠。
E: Hanya produces the Lunaumbra Gourd from her sleeves.

C: 本大爷去附身，你没准备好关老子什么事？
E: Not ready? I'm the one doing the possessing here!

C: 有老子在的时候，老子自会收拾你。
E: Other heliobi? Hmph, I'm the only heliobus you need to worry about.

C: 别、别靠过来！
E: S—Stay back! Don't come any closer!

C: …他们都没在这里。
E: ...They aren't here.

C: 藿藿，你看，本大爷把他们都带回来了。
E: Huohuo, look, I brought everyone back for you.

C: {NICKNAME}老师，给您介绍一下，这位…岁阳老师？自称「棋鬼」。后面那几位好像都是刚才下棋输给她的人……
E: {NICKNAME}, let me introduce you, this... heliobus? She calls herself the "Chess Ghost." Those guys at the back seem to be people who just lost to her...

C: 倒也没必要分清就是了……
E: It doesn't even matter...

C: 记得桂乃芬要我们帮忙发布「罗浮杂俎」吗，就拜托你了……
E: Remember Guinaifen asked us to post up to the Ghostly Grove? Could you please do that...

C: 至于文远和若昔两人，相信他们会给你们一个交代的。
E: As for Wenyuan and Ruoxi? I trust they'll give you an explanation of their own.

C: 出现了！金色传说！
E: There it is! The Golden Legend!

C: 在符玄的帮助下，你们驱散了围观人群，将青雀转移到一处僻静的地方。
E: With the assistance of Fu Xuan, you dispersed the crowd of onlookers and moved Qingque to a secluded space.

C: 似乎有这么回事来着，我一倒头睡着了，做了个好长好长的梦。梦里我发了大财，嘿嘿。
E: Actually, yes. I fell asleep and had a really, really long dream. I dreamed I got super rich, hehe.

C: 我是来见青雀的！
E: I'm here to see Qingque!

C: 青雀？你是说青总吧？
E: Qingque? You mean President Qing?

C: 你好，我们认识青雀小姐！我们是她的好朋友！
E: Hello, we know Miss Qingque! We are her close friends!

C: 我只是罗浮帝玉集团旗下的一名普普通通打杂小职员罢了…以自己微不足道的眼界为青雀大人预测股票指数。
E: I am no more than a mere employee under the flag of the Luofu Dynasty Corp... I use my limited vision to predict stock fluctuations for President Qingque.

C: 嘿嘿，你对着那假人喊破喉咙也没用啊。既然她想要玩大富翁游戏，咱们就陪她玩玩。
E: Hehe, there is no use tearing your throat apart screaming at a dummy. If it's a game of property trading board game she's after, we'll give it to her.

C: 缺乏实践可行性。
E: It's not practical or realistic.

C: 我可以让你们比公司更富有！

E: Dan Heng conducted a safety drill for possible assaults against the Express.

C: 瓦尔特组织了一场电子竞技比赛。
E: Welt organized an esports tournament.

C: 列车的人造重力系统因故障而短暂失灵，轻轻一跳就能浮上半空。列车组趁机打扫了天花板。
E: The Express' artificial gravity system temporarily ceased to work due to a malfunction, and one can float into the sky with just a small leap. The Express Crew took the opportunity to clean the ceiling.

C: 列车的某处发生了值日间的小插曲，领队的责任促使你去一探究竟……
E: Something small happened somewhere on the Express in between chores. The duty of being the team leader drives you to go check it out...

C: 本轮值日开始了！
E: This round of duties has started!

C: 品尝着咖啡的苦味，姬子仿佛领悟了什么，若有所思……
E: Sipping on the bitter coffee, Himeko seemed to have gained an epiphany and looked pensive...

C: 议论声起，\n男人起身离去。
E: A chatter breaks out among the people,\nand the man rises to leave.

C:
假以时日，万物皆成灰烬……
此世最后的美景，
将由这孤高的男人留下，
尽管无人相信。
E:
In time, the entire world will turn to ash...
This haughty man shall be,
The one to leave behind the world's final beauty.
Though none are willing to believe.

C: 「为荣誉而死并非永眠——」 这是悬锋城人尽皆知的谎言， 「死后的世界沐浴晨光，远胜凡尘。」 然而，王储不会轻信玄虚的诗篇。
E: "To die for glory is not eternal sleep —" This is a lie all Castrum Kremnos keeps. "The world after death is superior to reality and basks in light." But such vague poems the crown prince would not easily believe.

C: 「因而，未能继位的叛徒，\n是最为羸弱的王者。」
E: "Therefore, a traitor who does not inherit the throne,\nIs a king most infirm."

C: 「你的荣耀不在死亡，而是在我掌心。」
E: "Your glory lies not in death but in my hands."

C: 「你是缇安。」\n一位老人说。
E: "You're Trianne."\nan old man says.

C: 「错！*我们*是缇安！」\n缇安最为闹腾。
E: "Wrong! We're actually Trianne!"\nTrianne is the most spirited of the trio.

C: 令人心碎，令人心醉，\n她是死亡的指头，\n也是诗与爱的鬼魅。
E: She is heartbreaking and enchanting,\nShe is the fingertips of death,\nAnd the ghost of love and poetry.

C: 老妇用最后的秘密为女孩辩护：\n「不，那只是我收留的街头遗孤。」
E: To protect the girl, the old woman reveals the final secret unseen:\n"She's not my family, but just an orphan picked from the street on a whim."

C: 「骗术不错，不如放了我……」\n「我能带你找到一切埋藏的财货！」
E: "Nice trick, but why not release me...\nI can show you where all buried treasures lie!"

C:
烽烟灭绝了它的兄姊弟妹，
而巨龙无能为力。
唯有愤懑地沉默，
以及愧疚地回忆。
E:
War and flames extinguish all their siblings,
Yet the Giant Dragon is powerless.
Left only with bitter silence,
And memories filled with guilt.

C: 世人皆知，\n守护一切大地造物，\n是龙骑军的旗帜。
E: All the world knows,\nThat protecting all of Earth's creations\nIs the creed of the Dromas Legion.

C: 某日翻阅智库时，\n我留意到寰宇物种的更新——
E: One day, while browsing through the data bank,\nI noticed an update on the universe's animal species —

C: 它曾踏裂山之民的战阵，\n撕开吉奥里亚的胸膛，\n咽下火种，又断然将其交付。
E: They once shattered the battle formation of the Mountain Dwellers,\nTore open Georios's chest,\nSwallowed the Coreflame, only to resolutely pass it on.

C: 记得六相冰融化后还剩下一些，\n被我拿去捏了个模型。
E: I remember there was some Six-Phased Ice left after it melted,\nI used it to make a little figurine.

C: *我们*会将神谕昭示的您的未来，\n如实相告——
E: We will reveal your future with the prophecy\nAnd tell in truth...

C: 可是若问谁来纪念她的伟绩？\n我将在孤独之歌中伴她长眠。
E: But who will remember her achievements?\nI will. I will rest with her in a lonely song.

C: 「我会赢。翁法罗斯会赢。」
E: "I will win. Amphoreus will win."

C: 数日后的宴会，剑士盛装出席。\n众人惊叹她的华美，\n唯有凯撒啧啧称奇。
E: Some days later, the swordmaster appeared in finery at a ball.\nAll were awed by her splendor\nWith only the Imperator thinking in wonder.

C: 「海洋的宠儿，能掀波逐浪、战无不胜。」\n「作为交换，是塔兰顿收走了你的歌声。」
E: "The ocean's favorite child can control the waves and is invincible in battle."\n"In exchange, Talanton took away your singing voice."

C: 有人探寻那遥远的村落，\n却发现它无人记载，亦无人传唱，
E: Some have searched for that distant village,\nyet found it neither written about nor passed down through song.

C: 话虽如此，\n他也有安静的时候。
E: Though having said that,\nHe too has quiet moments.

C: 「我愿背负此世，这绝非谎言……」
E: "I am willing to shoulder this world, that is no lie..."

C: 如今那伎俩被视为伟大的术法，\n不在乎它曾是何物，\n只知晓它所为何事。
E: Now, that craft is regarded as a magnificent study,\nNot because of what it was,\nBut because of its purpose, known to everybody.

C: 学者从不直视法度刻印，\n漠视岁月的流逝与更替，\n不解的门生为此议论纷纷。
E: The scholar never looks at laws and measurements,\nIgnoring the flow and shift of time's passage,\nAnd uncomprehending students gossip in eager regiments.

C: 少年扯了扯眼罩，未被遮挡的那只眼睛饱含三分讥诮，三分忿忿不平，三分狂妄，还有一分琢磨不透的深意，「真理已尽在我手，且看我如何颠覆这个腐朽的世界吧！」
E: The young man tugged at his eye patch, his uncovered eye brimming with equal parts mockery, indignation, and arrogance, plus a hint of unfathomable depth. "The truth is already in my grasp. Watch as I turn this decrepit world upside down!"

C: 「荒笛，我想好了。我要像你一样，到人间去！我要用人类的方式拯救人类，在那之前，就让晨昏之眼再苟活些时日吧！」
E: "Terravox, I've made up my mind. I want to go down to the mortal realm, just like you! I'll save humanity the human way, and until then, let the Eye of Twilight cling to life a while longer!"

C: 男人用剑斩去墓周围的杂草，仔细擦去碑文刻痕里的灰尘，将带来的花束放在墓前。做完这一切后，他缓缓从篮子里取出还算温热的面包，享受着片刻休憩，远眺着大海。
E: The man cut away the weeds around the grave with his sword, carefully wiped away the dust from the engravings on the tombstone, and placed the bouquet before the grave. After finishing all this, he slowly took out the still-warm bread from his basket, enjoying a moment of rest while gazing out at the ocean.

C: 而今天的缇缇…是格外温柔，也有点忧伤的缇缇。
E: And today's Trity... is an exceptionally gentle and somewhat melancholic Trity.

C: 对于风堇来说，这自然是顶天的好消息，意味着她不再需要为小伊卡吃饭而发愁，也就不必满世界地流浪。
E: For Hyacine, this was absolutely fantastic news. It meant she no longer had to worry about feeding Little Ica, and wouldn't need to wander around the world anymore.

C: 望着阿格莱雅，风堇泪眼婆娑，「阿格莱雅女士，这，这一切…都要从一场科学实验说起……」
E: Looking at Aglaea, Hyacine's eyes welled up with tears, "Miss Aglaea, this... all of this... it all began with a scientific experiment..."

C: 「悬锋家族的字典里，亦无畏战一说。」
E: "In the Kremnos family's dictionary, too, there is no word for fear."

C: 第二轮比赛——「冷菜」的评审官是伏龙「荒笛」。这位精通古菜式的隐士低鸣着公布了命题：「背叛」。
E: The Second round: the theme "Cold Dish" was announced by the judge, the Seismic Walking Dragon, Terravox. This hermit, master of archaic cuisine, gave a low rumble as he declared the subject: "Betrayal."

C: 在全场欢呼声中，阿格莱雅与姬子对视一眼，不约而同地心想——「看来，这会是一场热火朝天的『开拓』之旅呢。」
E: As the crowd erupted in cheers, Aglaea and Himeko exchanged a look, each thinking the same thing. "This is going to be a blazing journey of 'Trailblazing' indeed."

C:
三月七：星穹列车的无名客，「记忆」行者，误入死循环的外部变量。
长夜月：有别于「三月七」的高危变量。命途图谱异常，能绕过权杖自检系统，并影响管理员的记忆。

在第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次死循环中，接替了空缺的「岁月」路径，暗中操纵泰坦并引导{NICKNAME}一行人推动「再创世」。
推测其目的：干涉「再创世」进程，清除权杖数据，中止实验。
死循环末尾，主动陷入沉睡，促成三月七完成「岁月」的试炼：取回未来。

最终循环，三月七升擢为「岁月」泰坦，与其余泰坦一同在权杖内核层迎战铁墓，并将其击败。
E:
March 7th: A Nameless from the Astral Express, pathstrider of Remembrance, external variable that accidentally entered the recursive loop.
Evernight: A high-risk variable distinct from "March 7th." Her Path chart is anomalous, able to bypass the Scepter's self-check system and even affect the memories of the Administrator.

In the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th recursive loop, she took over the vacant "Time" path, secretly manipulating the Titan and guiding {NICKNAME}'s group to advance Era Nova.
Speculated objective: Interfere with Era Nova's progress, clear Scepter data, terminate the experiment.
At the end of the loop, she voluntarily entered slumber, enabling March 7th to complete Time's trial: reclaiming the future.

In the final cycle, March 7th ascended as the Time Titan, joining the other Titans in the Scepter's core to face Iron Tomb and together, they prevailed.

C: 电信号敌对行为观测记录
E: Observational Record of Electronic Signals' Hostile Behaviors

C: 路径：理性。原动力：批判。\n注释：行动逻辑固化为求解，生存权重趋近于零。\n出现变异的电信号，作为首次解明翁法罗斯真相的个体，其进化速率具有高度不可复现性，其行为亦展现出「智识」在求解时可能出现的自毁倾向。
E: Track: Reason. Primum Mobile: Critique.\nNote: Its logic of action has been locked onto problem-solving. Its survival priority approaches zero.\nThis electric signal exhibited mutated anomalies. As the first individual to uncover the truth of Amphoreus, its evolution rate is extremely unreplicable. Its behavior also demonstrated the possible self-destructive inclinations of Erudition when that Path is seeking answers.

C: 天才俱乐部会员，ID：HertA、ScreW。高危外部变量。 【警告：检测到异常指令，内容：回退δ-me13演算进程。】 【依据终极协议，异常指令已拒绝。】 【指令：标记HertA、ScreW为恶意访客。】 注释：给我等着，我黑塔一定会回来，叫你和这台不近人情的铁脑袋通通报废！ ████████████ 【协议更新，访客指令已授权。运算逻辑更新：「再创世」后，将演算进程回退至96.75%。】
E: Genius Society Members. ID: HertA. ID: ScreW. High-risk external variables. "Warning: Abnormal instruction detected. Content: Roll back δ-me13 extrapolation progress." "Based on the Ultimate Protocol, the abnormal instruction has rejected." "Instruction: Mark HertA and ScreW as malicious visitors." Note: Just you wait! I, Herta, will definitely return and retire both you and this cold, heartless metal head! ████████████ "Protocol updated. Visitor instructions authorized. Calculation logic updated: After Era Nova, extrapolation progress will be rolled back to 96.75%."

E: Currently unable to edit team

E: Speedy Sweet Dreams to Be Had with SoulGlad

E: Finally, I can't help but remind you: Don't eat so much of Express Special in one go. That's not good for your stomach.

E: Peppy Patrol

E: Taking Shape

C: 会议中每次「重整思路」后，<color=#62cd54ff>得分效率+#1%</color>
E: <color=#62cd54ff>Scoring Efficiency +#1%</color> every time "Mental Reset" is used in the Meeting

C: 在泡澡中沉思，思路更加连贯了！追加攻击伤害有所提高。
E: You contemplate during the bath, and your thoughts now string together better! Follow-Up ATK DMG has been increased.

C: 列车巡游银河，逍遥云海，自由得令人羡慕。可惜仙舟公务繁忙，不能与诸位同游一段日子。\n\n只希望从今以后能常常登上列车，与诸位共饮闲聊，听些银河间的趣事，也就满足了。
E: The Express sails the cosmos and strides free above clouds and stars. Its freedom is truly worthy of envy. A pity that business aboard the Xianzhou is often busy, rendering me unable to spend some time travelling with you all.\n\nI just hope that I can board the Express more frequently in the future, and share drinks and conversations with you all as we discuss the happenings across the stars. That would be a most satisfying experience.

C: 我完全不能理解这个人。
E: I can't understand him at all.

C: 第三遗迹
E: Ruin 3

C: 「{NICKNAME}{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，史瓦罗先生说，这里似乎有与他同一型号的『原型机』。对史瓦罗先生来说，或许就是他的『家人』——{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我们去帮史瓦罗先生找找他的家人吧。」
E: "{F#Big sister}{M#Big brother} {NICKNAME}, Mr. Svarog said there seems to be a prototype here that's the same model as him. Maybe this is 'family' to Mr. Svarog... Let's help Mr. Svarog find his family."

C: 「可恶，好重的箱子…嘿，荣誉队员！这是虎克千辛万苦找到的宝物，现在交给你保管了，帮虎克搬回去吧！」
E: "Drats, this box is heavy... Hey, honorary member! Hook will now entrust this treasure that I found to you. Help carry it back!"

C: ——幸运的你来到了避难所的安全屋，没有怪物，只有宝物。
E: — You arrive at the safe house of a shelter. There are no monsters to be found, only treasures.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「遗物宝库」</color>开始探索时，将直接翻出古代遗物。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Relic Vault</color>: At the start of the exploration, immediately obtain an Ancient Relic.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「炸弹扑满」</color>携带古代炸弹的毁灭扑满出现！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Bomb Trotter</color> A Trotter of Destruction carrying an ancient bomb appears!

C: 寻宝者总计行动#1次后，扑满将会逃跑。\n在战斗中击败扑满后，将随机掉落一种<color=#f29e38ff>「古代装备」</color>。
E: After #1 Treasure Hunter action(s) in total, the Trotter will escape.\nA Trotter defeated in battle will drop a random <color=#f29e38ff>Ancient Equipment</color>.

C: 首领•成长能力
E: Boss: Growth Ability

C: 找到队伍中核心的<color=#f29e38ff>主输出角色</color>，优先为其穿满<color=#f29e38ff>3件进阶装备</color>。\n提示：主输出角色通常为羁绊中费用、星级更高的输出角色。
E: Find your team's core <color=#f29e38ff>DPS character</color> and prioritize equipping them with <color=#f29e38ff>3 pieces of advanced equipment</color>.\nHint: Main DPS characters are usually higher-cost, higher-star-rating damage dealers in the Bond system.

C: 地图上存在特殊的按钮，踩下后会<color=#f29e38ff>重置相同能量颜色</color>的一组传送门。按钮在传送门开启状态下<color=#f29e38ff>不会弹出</color>。
E: There are special buttons on the map. Stepping on them will <color=#f29e38ff>reset a set of teleporters of the same energy color</color>. The buttons <color=#f29e38ff>will not appear</color> while the teleporters are active.

C: 熟练使用装备追踪功能，可便捷的找到角色需要的推荐装备！
E: Master the Equipment Tracking function to quickly find the recommended equipment for a character!

C: 使用和敌方目标<color=#f29e38ff>弱点相同的属性</color>攻击，将敌方<color=#f29e38ff>韧性</color>削减为零时，会触发<color=#f29e38ff>对应属性的弱点击破效果</color>并使其<color=#f29e38ff>行动延后</color>，同时使其陷入<color=#f29e38ff>弱点击破状态</color>。
E: When you attack an enemy using the same attack Type as their <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness</color> and deplete their <color=#f29e38ff>Toughness</color> to zero, it will trigger the <color=#f29e38ff>corresponding attack Type's Weakness Break effect</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>delay their action</color>. Simultaneously, this will also cause them to enter a state of <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Break</color>.

C: 全体护盾可代替所有我方角色承担伤害，护盾量代表当前护盾可承担的伤害。

C: 击破<color=#f29e38ff>非首领敌人</color>的弱点，可解除敌方首领的<color=#f29e38ff>弱点保护</color>。\n在「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」期间，敌方首领无弱点保护，攻击处于<color=#f29e38ff>弱点击破状态</color>的敌人将获得大幅增益。

Attacking enemies in the <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken state</color> will provide immense buffs.

C:
他们曾唤你救世主，他们为你编织面容。
你的名字千千万万，你的过去朦朦胧胧。
可是，星星们复念着你的选择，
故事牵着你的衣角，如同你印下的每道车辙。
无名的人哪，你只需不停地迈出脚步——
向着最明亮的那颗启行。
E:
They once called you Deliverer and wove your visage.
Your names are countless, your past shrouded in mist.
Yet, the stars echo your choices.
Stories cling to your hem, like every track you've left behind.
O nameless one, you need only keep stepping forward.
Toward the brightest star to begin your journey.

C: 「星际和平公司」的基层员工，主要负责维持公司管辖地区的治安秩序。工资不高，只能在公司旗下的企业舰上合租房间。
E: An Interastral Peace Corporation grunt worker whose job mainly involves maintaining order in locations ruled by the IPC. With a meager salary, the only lodging they can afford is a shared room on one of the IPC's enterprise ships.

C: 以古老机巧术铸造的镇守金人。\n无数岁月前，金人随着仙舟出航求取仙方，监管和辅助人类进行战争——但历尽叛乱后，金人最终为仙舟人所降服。\n而今所有的金人都被符箓严格宰制，用以把守机要重地。
E: Garrison aurumaton created with ancient ingenium technology.\nCountless years ago, the aurumatons set sail with the Xianzhou to seek divine recipes of immortality, and were tasked with overseeing humanity and aiding humankind during warfare. However, after countless rebellions, they were finally overpowered by the Xianzhou natives.\nNow, all aurumatons are strictly controlled with talismans and are employed to guard important places.

C: 随玄鹿足迹而生的建木枝梢。出现于此的是基于你的记忆模拟出的幻影。
E: A branch of Ambrosial Arbor created from the Ebon Deer's footprint. This entity is a phantom borne from your memories.

C: 崇信丰饶的秘密组织「药王秘传」信徒渴求的形态，摆脱人性重负，以仙道重塑的真体。\n太古时代，求道者们自建木中参悟玄旨，自诩「仙人」。他们自在无拘，将血肉众生如泥塑形。在无数次变化间，他们忘却了自己的本来面目。
E: The form craved by the members of Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, a secret organization that worships Abundance. A true appearance that cast off the burdens of humanity and has been reforged using the way of immortality.\nIn ancient times, those who sought immortality received wisdom from the Ambrosial Arbor and called themselves Celestials. They lived without restraints and molded the flesh of themselves and others at will. They have long forgotten their original appearances after countless metamorphoses.

C: 以「齐响诗班」为基质，「秩序」与「同谐」的力量交织形成卵壳，新生的神安眠于其中。形而上的胎儿喃喃着童年的旧梦，命途于长夜胎动，徒劳抗拒显著的黎明。
E: Using the Harmonious Choir as a foundation, the power of Order and Harmony intertwine to form the shell of an egg, within which the newborn god slumbers. The metaphysical embryo mumbles the olden dreams of childhood as the fetal movement of Paths throbs in the long night, futilely resisting the rising dawn.

C: 其实…我对老师有一种天生的恐惧，不过…他是个例外！听不懂的那些概念，他总会用大地兽来做比喻，我一下子就明白啦！
E: I was, um, actually born with a fear of teachers... but he's the exception! Whenever I don't get a concept, he uses dromases as an analogy, and then I instantly get it!

C: 拍照，写日记，还用说嘛~
E: Taking pictures. Writing in my diary. What else is there to say~?

C: 赞美你！
E: You're the best!

C: 智库且需时时更新，我也一样。
E: Just as a data bank requires updating, so I must keep evolving.

C: 逃不掉的！
E: You won't get away!

C: 交给…你们了……
E: I'll leave the rest... to you...

C: 很有天赋。
E: Now, that's talent.

C: 我的故乡，一度被名为「崩坏」的力量所侵蚀，但这不妨碍它是个美丽而温暖的世界。
E: My home was corroded by a force known as Honkai, but that hasn't stopped it from being a warm and beautiful world.

C: 谢谢，你是个好人。
E: Thanks. You're too good to me.

C: 这样会痛么？
E: Does that hurt?

C: 还没学到教训？
E: Haven't learned your lesson?

C: 其他藏室什么时候能找到艾丝妲这样的管理者，我就好甩手不管了。
E: If my other collections had people like Asta watching over them, I could take a hands-off approach.

C: 阮•梅，天才中的天才，我不否认。虽然合不来，但我欣赏她…也许我们有点儿惺惺相惜吧。
E: Ruan Mei is a genius among geniuses — I won't deny that. I don't always get along with her, but I do admire her... Maybe the admiration is mutual.

C: 还要再来一下？
E: Ready for another?

C: 需要我来制定接下来的计划么？
E: Do you need me to formulate the next plan?

C: 克拉拉也要变得更加厉害…！嗯！
E: One day I'll grow up and protect everyone! Mm!

C: 克拉拉：谢谢，克拉拉会记得你的。
E: Clara: Thanks. I'll never forget you.

C: 坏蛋，报上名来！
E: Form a line, villains!

C: 倒是合乎眼缘。
E: This suits my tastes.

C: 不过是一时兴起罢了。
E: A moment's excitement. Nothing more.

C: 彦卿，要切记，不可躁进。
E: Remember, Yanqing — think before you act.

C: 武艺又进步啦，该给娘报个信！
E: My fighting skills have improved — I should let my mom know!

C: 本以为龙女为我所配的药茶中藏有振衰去乏的秘密成分，直到很久以后，我发觉她只是多加了糖。对人下药，不愧是丹鼎司一力培养的天才！
E: For a long time, I thought that the tea the Dragon Lady made for me had a secret ingredient for replenishing the weary. Eventually, I discovered that the secret ingredient was just extra sugar. Such a subtle method for treating fatigue, but I expect nothing less from such an exceptional member of the Alchemy Commission!

C: 哎呦，您可别放水。
E: Don't throw the game!

C: 小妹初到贵宝地，耍耍把式卖卖艺。仨瓜俩枣不嫌少，千金一掷显情义。闲言碎语不要讲，给您来段看家戏！
E: This girl arrived on your Xianzhou ship and started juggling to earn her tips, melons and dates make a very nice meal, but to make my day needs at least ten strale, no need to waste time on idle chat, 'cause a real stage play is right where it's at!

C: 我也不能放弃治疗~
E: Can't give up on my therapies just yet.

C: 冥冥梦兆之中，一颗天星照亮了我。
E: In the obscure prophecy of dream, a star from the heavens has enlightened my path.

C: 藿藿：你、你们不要过来啊…
E: Huohuo: D—Don't come any closer...

C: 在并不遥远的古代，人们不怎么在乎自己的生命，更不在乎别人的生命。追溯「人命至重」的历史，实际非常短暂。
E: In the not-too-distant ancient times, people didn't care much about their own lives, let alone the lives of others. The history behind the idea that life is precious, in fact, is very short.

C: 非徒闻道至于此，金玉谁家不满堂？
E: Having grasped such profound truths... Whose home isn't overflowing with riches?

C: 暴力是最终手段，也是我唯一的手段。
E: Violence is the ultimate means, and it is also my only means.

C: 驭空大人，请让我同您并肩而战。
E: Madam Yukong, please allow me to fight by your side.

C: 有福不妨同享。
E: There's no harm in sharing good fortunes.

C: 认识米哈伊尔的时候，他已经是个大人了…但不管怎么说，我还能见到米沙，也算陪伴过他完整的一生了…该知足了。
E: When I met Mikhail he was already grown up... but whatever the case, Misha's still here. He's spent his whole life with me, and for that, I should be glad.

C: 生活就是如此美妙。
E: Life... is just so beautiful.

C: 我能回赠的，只有玫瑰的馥郁气息。
E: I offer you the captivating aroma of a rose.

C: 一本十利的游戏，我喜欢。
E: A ten-to-one payout? Music to my ears.

C: 进步越快，说明犯过的错误越多。
E: The faster the progress, the greater the chance of errors.

C: 命运的馈赠，有时出乎意料。
E: Destiny gifts unexpected joys.

C: 独行银河的人，无非两种渴求：找到前人的行迹、寻得自己的道路。但在祂们的注视下…后者大多止于前者。
E: Lone voyagers in the cosmos are driven by two desires: To tread in the trails of the past, and to forge their own way. But under THEIR scrutiny... most end up adhering to the former.

C: 收到支援。
E: Support received.

C: 我不知道她是什么来路，也不知道她为什么要冒充「巡海游侠」的名号…不过倒也没关系，连我都能践行正义，说明践行正义的道路本来就不止一条！
E: I ain't got no idea what her story is, nor why she's parading around as a Galaxy Ranger... but that's alright. If a fella like me can uphold the justice, it means there ain't just one road to righteousness!

C: 我猜这不是免费的吧？
E: I'm guessing that wasn't for free.

C: *我们*最喜欢和大家玩「猜猜*我们*是谁」啦~*我*是缇宁！*我*是缇安~*我*是缇宝。你猜对了几个？
E: We love playing "Guess Who We Are" with everyone~ I am Trinnon! I am Trianne~ I am Tribbie. How many did you guess correctly?

C: 王储，你心中自有答案…我没什么可教授的。
E: Crown Prince, you already know the answer... There is nothing more I can teach you.

C: 对此，我大可睁一只眼闭一只眼。
E: I suppose I can just ignore this.

C: 只有足够冰冷的手，才能握住滚烫的火种…阿格莱雅大人，一定早就明白了这一点。
E: Only a sufficiently cold hand can grasp the burning Coreflame... Lady Aglaea must have come to terms with this long ago.

C: 老师曾告诫我，面对逝者也理应平静，不要将心中的悲哀说出口。直到后来我才明白，对他而言，「练习死亡」便是贯穿一生的命题。
E: He had once told me that I should stay calm even when facing the dead, and not tell them of my inner sorrows. It was only later that I understood "practicing how to die" was the theme that defined his entire life.

C: 在书上见过类似的谜题……
E: I've seen puzzles like this in books...

C: 命运，足以超越神谕。
E: Fate is enough to surpass prophecies.

C: 缇宝老师，您在远处指挥就好。
E: Lady Tribbie, it's fine if you just direct us from a distance.

C: 挣脱囚笼吧！
E: Shatter this cage!

C: 无妨。我会再次押上一切。
E: No matter. I'll once more give everything.

C: 在太阳尚未沉默时，先祖会在云朵之上调节阴晴风雨，盛夏寒冬。如今永夜已至，我也想成为一丝微光，尽力疗愈世人的伤痛——静候黎明再次盛放的那一天，我们共同沐浴在光芒之下。
E: Before the sun was silenced, my ancestors would mediate the weather and seasons above the clouds. Now that the eternal night has descended, I want to be a sliver of light that heals the wounds of this world as much as I can — I will wait for the day when the dawn blooms again, and for all of us to be bathed in light once more.

C: 先祖，我还没……
E: Ancestors... I haven't...

C: 水迹稍纵即逝，却能汇成浪花。
E: Though the ripples are fleeting, they converge into waves.

C: 金丝织就的未来本是一场幻梦，但她至诚的心血引领众人，去将它变为现实。
E: The future spun from golden thread was nothing more than a dream, but her sincere and unwavering heart led others to bring it to life.

C: 捍卫希望，也是每位无名客的责任。
E: To safeguard hope... that too is every Nameless one's duty.

C: 说到诡计，我也很擅长哦？比如…偷走一个人的「心」♪
E: I'm pretty good at playing tricks, too, you know? For example... I can steal a person's "heart" ♪

C: 三月，来拍张合影吧？你坏坏的样子，也很迷人呢！
E: Let's take a group photo, March! You still look quite charming as the bad girl~

E: \nThe mighty oak now stands hollow, leaving only withered leaves and dead branches of dreams.

E: The Dahlia

E: Sweet dreams sunken in the Primordial Memory Zone now swarm with the drone of the Propagation. Here, one lie begets another.

E: What's up?

E: Drop those little schemes, Cifera. You know you can't hide anything from the golden thread.

C: 使所有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」对指定我方单体造成虚数属性伤害。若没有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」则本技能施放失败。技能施放后，恢复「旧梦的回声」的韧性。
E: Makes all "Echoes of Faded Dreams" that can take action deal Imaginary DMG to a single target. If there are no "Echoes of Faded Dreams" that can take action, then this ability will fail to launch. After using this ability, restore Toughness for "Echoes of Faded Dreams".

C: 使指定敌方单体目标的速度提高。
E: Increases SPD of one designated friendly unit.

C: 发动数次攻击，优先对我方迎战【白卫士】的目标逐个攻击1次。
E: Launches several attacks, and prioritizes attacking targets in battle against "White Guard," attacking each of them 1 time.

C: 与【狮震八方】共同施放，对我方全体目标造成伤害，同时有一定概率对击中目标附加纠缠状态。
E: Simultaneously unleashes with "Earthshaker Leo" and deals DMG to all targets, with a certain chance to inflict Entanglement on the attacked targets.

C: 为我方和敌方其他目标施加【可负载】状态。处于【可负载】状态的单位会将受到伤害超出当前生命值的部分转化为<u>【负载生命值】</u>，且不会因此陷入无法战斗状态。同时行动序列上出现【负载清算】，当【负载清算】行动时，将进行生命值结算，当前生命值为0以下的单位会受到致命伤害。【负载清算】会随着敌方召唤物数量的减少而提高行动速度，当敌方召唤物被全部消灭时【负载清算】移除。
E: Applies the "Overloadable" state to all friendly and non-friendly targets (except this unit). When units are in the "Overloadable" state, they will convert DMG taken that exceeds their current HP to <u>"HP Overload,"</u> and will not be knocked down because of this. At the same time, "Overload Settlement" will appear on the Action Order. When "Overload Settlement" takes action, HP will be finalized and units with HP below 0 will take fatal damage. "Overload Settlement" will increase in SPD as the number of friendly summons decreases. When all friendly summons have been defeated, "Overload Settlement" is removed.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成少量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to one designated target and targets adjacent to them.

E: Living Eternal Flame

E: In the Boss Domain in Second Plane, it is guaranteed to spawn the Altar of Fortune. After receiving Benediction, for every Equation obtained, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Blessing(s) required for the Equation and <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Cosmic Fragment(s).

E: After attacking a Weakness Broken enemy target, converts the Toughness Reduction of this attack into 1 instance of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> Super Break DMG.

E: Additionally implanted Wind Weakness. Decreases Wind RES by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

E: Past Life: Shadowed Reverie

E: Ravings

E: Impassioned Spirits

C: 橡木鸣蛀之梦，梦主实行一切阴谋的地方——当然，律令所说的话不能尽信。既然阴差阳错来到了这里，想办法获取更多关于梦主的线索吧。
E: The Dream of Gnawing Oak, the place where the Dreammaster executes all his schemes... Of course, the words of the laws can't be taken at face value. Since I've ended up here by a twist of fate, I'll see if I can find more clues about the Dreammaster.

C: 梦主的意图已是昭然若揭…必须阻止他才行——可是，他究竟准备怎样做到那一切？
E: The Dreammaster's intentions are now painfully clear... I have to stop him. But how on earth does he plan to pull all this off?

C: 通过原始忆域非常顺利地潜入了匹诺康尼，尽管代价非小。接下来，要想办法进入「十二时刻」了。
E: You slipped into Penacony through the Primordial Memory Zone without a hitch, though it came at a heavy cost. Now you have to find a way into the "Twelve Hours."

C: 流萤一直在和某位同伴进行通讯，从她们的交流来看，她们的身份和目的都绝不简单。\n继续追索吧，联想到此前感知到的杂音，她们一定与梦境的异常有关。
E: Firefly has been communicating with a partner. From their conversation, their identities and objectives are clearly not what they seem.\nI need to stay on their trail. Considering the static I sensed before, they must be connected to the anomalies in the dreamscape.

C: 去为所有人夺回「开拓」的权利，人们终将在那里找到答案。
E: Reclaim the right to Trailblaze for everyone. That's where people will ultimately find their answers.

C: 和银狼聊聊
E: Talk to Silver Wolf

C: 和银狼聊聊
E: Talk to Silver Wolf

C: 打听匹诺康尼的现状
E: Check on Penacony's current situation

C: 和黑天鹅聊聊现状
E: Chat with Black Swan about the situation

C: 对了，就从「她」开始吧。你一定还记得——
E: Ah right, let's start with "her." You must remember...

C: 我先去别处看看，也许能找到适合「偷渡」的入口。
E: Let me take a look elsewhere first. Maybe I'll stumble upon a good entrance to become a "stowaway."

C: 开个玩笑，别紧张。知更鸟久未还乡，我特意带她来这边看看，追忆些童年旧事。
E: Just kidding, don't be so tense. Robin hasn't been home for a while, so I brought her here specifically to look around and reminisce about her childhood days.

C: 不过，你真觉得自己有能耐？想抓我的家伙多的是，鸡翅膀女孩，你又凭什么？
E: But do you really think you've got what it takes? There's no shortage of people trying to catch me, chicken-winged girlie. What makes you so special?

C: 那名愚者杀死了她，而你曾经见过的遇害现场，也是由她伪造。
E: The Fool killed her, and the crime scene you witnessed was staged by her.

C: 出发前，卡芙卡对我说过：在她看来，梦原本就是「过去」的交汇，每个人都一样，无论你多么不想面对，也无论你想要得到什么，都无法绕开——或许她说得对。
E: Before we left, Kafka told me: in her view, dreams are inherently a "convergence of the past." It's the same for everyone, no matter how much you want to avoid it, no matter what you're seeking, you can't avoid it. Perhaps she was right.

C: 我的梦…在开始时就注定破灭，但他们，还没到该醒来的时候。
E: My dream... was destined to shatter from the start, but for them, it's still not time to wake up.

C: 是「命运的奴隶」让你这么做？
E: Did Destiny's Slave make you do it?

C: 「属于你的那一副，真的叫做同谐么？嗯？秩序的双子？」
E: "As for that mask of yours... is it really called the Harmony? The Twin of the Order?"

C: 那是描述自己心中最为美好事物时的神情，所以我愿意相信你一次。
E: That's the look one has when describing what they hold most dear in their heart, so I'll trust you this time.

C: 我想，那时他曾指向的「命途」，<color=#dbc291ff>未必名为「同谐」</color>。
E: I believe that the Path he once pointed to <color=#dbc291ff>might not have been named the Harmony</color>.

C: 你将成为我最为阴暗的一桩罪行，也将成为一项伟业的起始。
E: You shall become my darkest crime, and the beginning of a great undertaking.

C: 所以，说说吧，你想从我这里…拿走什么？
E: So, tell me... what exactly do you want to take from me?

C: （蓝色的火焰…流萤小姐的同伴中，有一名焚化工吗？）
E: (Blue flames... Is there a Cremator among Miss Firefly's companions?)

C: 每一边。我会试着完成冥火大公的遗愿，会去推进歌斐木的布置，也的的确确，帮助了星核猎手挖掘真相。
E: Every side. I'll try to fulfill Duke Inferno's last wishes, advance Gopher Wood's plans, and yes, indeed, I've helped the Stellaron Hunters uncover the truth.

C: 不过很可惜，我没能做到。你的前辈拉扎莉娜，她在忆质中留下的通路，将流萤推入了{RUBY_B#死地}生机{RUBY_E#}。
E: Alas, I couldn't make it happen. The path your predecessor Razalina left in the memoria pushed Firefly towards a {RUBY_B#dead end}new lease on life{RUBY_E#}.

C: 此时此地？这可无从施予。在引你前往那处蜜泉之前，我将为你进行调律，使你无法再作声张。
E: Here and now? That's not possible. Before I lead you to that honeyed fountain, I shall tune you so that you can no longer speak out.

C: 星核回应了流萤想要活下去的祈祷，于美梦中，再造了寰宇蝗灾，以及…星神「太一」。
E: The Stellaron answered Firefly's desire to keep living. In response, it recreated within the sweet dream the Swarm Disaster... and the Aeon Ena.

C: 「繁育」将会唤起所有入梦者最原始的恐惧，并以人们的呼唤，延伸「秩序」的命途——直至银河尽归一梦。
E: The Propagation would awaken the most primal fears in all dreamers. Through their cries, the Path of Order would be sustained... until the entire cosmos drowned in a singular dream.

C: 人对美好幻觉的向往近乎偏执，这种心理会令人下意识地抗拒…残酷的真相。
E: Humans' yearning for sweet illusions borders on obsession, leading them to subconsciously resist... the harsh reality.

C: 我再重申一次——如果你玩够了，那还是趁早离开为好。「同谐」的乐章不能容忍杂音。
E: Let me reiterate. If you've had your fill, it'd be wise to leave before it's too late. The music of the Harmony doesn't tolerate discord.

C: 那不还是「同谐」那一套嘛，不过，这倒正合我意——我不是说了嘛，这是个轮盘游戏，不是爆破表演。
E: Isn't that still the Harmony's same old song and dance? But that suits me just fine. Didn't I already say that this is a round of roulette, and not an ammunition showcase?

C: …后来呢？
E: ...Then, what changed?

C: 天空与大地，是彼此的「证明」与「向往」——
E: The sky and earth are each other's "proof" and "aspiration"...

C: 我赋予自己的名字，是「流萤」。以前我还以为，是我觉得自己和萤火虫很像，只是转瞬即逝的微光……
E: The name I gave myself is "Firefly." I used to think I was similar to a firefly, just a fleeting glimmer of light...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>美也好，爱也好，我们的所有感受，来源都是我们生来的「缺陷」，而每个人都因此与众不同。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Beauty... Love... All our feelings stem from the "flaws" we were born with, and that's what makes each of us unique.</color>

C: 飞蛾扑火，不是渴望光芒。
E: Moths don't fly to flames because they yearn for light.

C: 唯有开拓前路，我们才能转动时间，予其意义。
E: Only by blazing a trail forward can we set time in motion and give it meaning.

C: 丹恒
E: Dan Heng

C: 波提欧
E: Boothill

C: 花火
E: Sparkle

C: 你也将会一样。记住，<color=#dbc291ff>若你有着非要弥补不可的遗憾，便在心底倾尽全力去呐喊，传至时间的尽头，让将要启程的「末王」听见。</color>
E: And you will be the same. Remember, <color=#dbc291ff>if you have regrets that must be mended, then shout with all your might from the depths of your heart. Let it be passed to the end of time and make Terminus, who is about to set off, hear your call.</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>重要的不是他们变成什么样子，而是你仍然对他们抱有同一份真实的感情。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>What matters isn't how they've changed, but that you still hold those same genuine feelings for them.</color>

C: 像我以前常常做的那样，闭上眼睛，去想象我们待在一起的景象…<color=#dbc291ff>就算看不见我，但你还是可以知道，我们的距离从未遥远过。</color>
E: Just like what I used to do, let's close our eyes and imagine ourselves being together... <color=#dbc291ff>Even if you can't see me, you'll still know that we've never been far apart.</color>

C: 我嘛…是一个来黄金时刻旅行的学生，最好零花钱能稍稍多一点…然后我出现在那里时，打扮得也要精致一点。
E: Me... I'm a student traveling to the Golden Hour, and it'd be nice if I had a bit more pocket money... Oh, and when I show up there, I should dress up a little fancier.

C: 「终末」的力量正在拨转时间，而少女最后的遗憾近在眼前。「一个美好的白日梦」——诺言兑现的时刻到了。你能，你会，你必将…使其实现。
E: The power of Finality is turning back time, and the girl's final regret is within sight. "A beautiful daydream..." The moment to fulfill that promise has come. You can, you will, you must... make it a reality.

C: 行至某座城邦废墟附近时，艾格勒降下了一场大雨。你淋着雨兜兜转转，终于躲进附近的一片岩洞。
E: As you approach the ruins of a city-state, Aquila brings down heavy rain. You wander around in the downpour until finally finding shelter in a nearby cave.

C: 「多好的宝贝们啊，现在它是你的了。」紫色葡萄吐出成吨的奇物，随后便像风一样消失了。
E: "What fine treasures! They're yours now." The purple grape spits out tons of Curios, then vanishes like the wind.

C: 这是个陷阱！
E: It's a trap!

C: 寂寞是什么声音？
E: What does loneliness sound like?

C: 所以，专属奇美拉是…
E: So, a personal chimera is...

C: 纯美的愿望
E: Beauty's Wish

C: <color=#f29e38ff>经验槽</color>满的时候，奇美拉就会<color=#f29e38ff>升级</color>。
E: When the <color=#f29e38ff>EXP bar</color> is full, your chimera will <color=#f29e38ff>level up</color>.

C: 解谜成功•一
E: Successful Puzzle-Solving 1

C: 队伍编成•黄泉
E: Added to Team With Acheron

C: 爱好
E: Hobbies

C: 站在我身边就随时可能死去…这可不是在威胁你哦？
E: To stand beside me is to court death at any time... though don't mistake this for a threat.
